瑟希斯啊，这群奇美拉都不用工作的吗？
O Cerces, do these chimeras not need to work?
呃…可能是近期要处理的工作太多，奇美拉都有些累，以前会更有精神的。
Err... Perhaps it's because there's been too much work recently. The chimeras must be overly fatigued. They used to be much more sprightly.
Absolutely right! This is their duty!
You lot sure know how to exploit free labor...
咳，我继续说。<color=#dbc291ff>每只小队都有位登记在案的管理员，负责督察奇美拉的工作情况</color>…理解成监工之类的也行啦。
Ahem, I'll continue. <color=#dbc291ff>Each squad has a registered administrator charged with monitoring the chimeras' work situations</color>... Something like what a foreman does.
刚才那个很拽的人，就是这群奇美拉的管理员。
That pompous person just now is the administrator for this group of chimeras.
现在，它们的监工是我了。
Surveilling them is my job now.
Isn't being a squad leader good?
嗯…事实是，这只奇美拉小队的工作成绩非常差，排名长期处于垫底状态。就算他没有把管理权转让给你们，队伍迟早也是要解散的。

Mm... Honestly, this squad's work output is very poor. Their performance has always ranked the lowest. Even if he didn't relinquish authority to you, the squad would've been disbanded sooner or later.
若是小队的成绩始终不达标，管理员不仅要支付一大笔罚金，还要…在公民大会上被通报批评——谁叫奇美拉是奥赫玛的代表物种呢？

If the squad still doesn't hit its targets, the administrator not only has to pay a hefty fine, they'll also be... issued a memo of criticism at the citizens' assembly. I mean, the chimera is Okhema's mascot, after all.
呀，通报批评…我在树庭求学的时候，都没有被那刻夏老师这么处罚过。对、对不起……
Ah, a memo of criticism... I was never punished so harshly by Professor Anaxa even when I was studying back at the Grove. S—Sorry...
Fantastic, I'm gonna be famous again!
灰宝！公民大会很恐怖的，要是惹他们不开心的话，甚至会被驱逐出奥赫玛的哦。
Grayie! The citizens' assembly is terrifying! If you upset them, you might even be driven out of Okhema.
别紧张，我也会帮忙的…真、真没做好的话，我来替你挨训！
Calm down. I'll help too... I—If they don't do a good job, I'll take the punishment in your place!
嗯，灰宝也别紧张，我会帮忙的…要是真、真没做好的话，我来替你挨训！
Hmm, you calm down too, Grayie. I'll help out... If they don't do a g—good job, I'll take the punishment in your place!
现在说这些也没意义，你们还是<color=#dbc291ff>想想该怎么提高小队的工作成绩吧。</color>得先定个小目标……
It's pointless to say all this now. You guys better <color=#dbc291ff>think about how to increase the squad's work performance. </color>A mini milestone has to be assigned...
这样，我带你们去看看目前奇美拉小队的排名情况。
How about this? I'll bring you all to see the current squad rankings.
——提前完成！好棒！灰宝，还有小奇美拉们都很厉害！
...Completed ahead of time! Well done! Grayie and the chimeras are wonderful!
距离最终期限还有不少时间，大家一起去放松下吧！嗯…去集市转转，给灰宝和小奇美拉买些好吃的，然后舒舒服服地泡个澡~走吧走吧！

There's still some time before the deadline. Let's all take a breather! Mm... You can go walk around the shops and buy something delicious for Grayie and the chimeras, then soak in a comfy bath! Let's go, let's go!
被表扬了！下班~好吃的~泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
I was praised! Time to clock off! Good food, warm bath, so happy! Awoo-awoo!
你和风堇带着小奇美拉在奥赫玛吃吃逛逛，度过了段极为愉快的时间……
With the chimeras in tow, you and Hyacine stroll around Okhema, enjoying a wonderful time...
好险，差点就没完成…不过已经很厉害了，灰宝，还有小奇美拉们都辛苦啦。
That was close. We almost didn't make it... But Grayie and the chimeras have all worked hard for this.
现在就把工作全都丢到一旁，好好地放松下！…去泡个澡？劳逸结合才能保持健康哦。
Now to toss work aside, kick back and relax! ...How 'bout a bath? A good work-life balance is how one stays healthy!
被表扬了！下班~泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
I was praised! Time to clock off! Get a warm bath in, so happy! Awoo-awoo!
你和风堇带着小奇美拉在浴池里舒服地泡着澡，尽情放松了片刻……
You and Hyacine bring the chimeras to the bath to indulge in a relaxing time...
…不行了，不行了…累死了，实在做不动了…怎么还有这么多啊……
...I, I can't do this anymore... Too tired to move... Why're there still so many...
小奇美拉们持续工作了好久，这才总算完成了目标……
The chimeras toil away for a long time, finally finishing the job...
不错。你达到了设立的目标，奇美拉小队暂时不会解散，可以安心了。
Not bad, you met your designated milestone. The chimera squad won't disband for now, so you all can rest easy.
…说实话，我还真为你捏了把汗。能让这几只奇美拉好好干活可不容易，尤其是合作，你有什么管理的经验或是秘诀么，让我也学学吧。
...Honestly, it was cutting it REALLY close there. It's not easy to whip these chimeras into shape, especially when it comes to teamwork. Mind imparting any management experience or secrets to me?
奇美拉的合理搭配是获胜关键。
The key to victory lies in the strategic synergy of the chimeras.
嗯…好吧。现在你们是合格的小队了，该想想后面的打算，争取更高的名次，或是停留在舒适区里都行。不过，首先你得给队伍改个名字。

Hmm... all right. You're a qualified squad now, so you need to consider what to do going forward — achieve a higher ranking, or stay stagnant where you are in the comfort zone. But, you have to name your squad first.
取名…看似简简单单的几个字，却足以让最富有智慧的诗人焦头烂额。你望向站在身旁的风堇，以及还在嗷嗷叫的奇美拉们，心中终于有了答案。

A name... may seem like a few simple letters, but it most certainly vexes even the most prolific of poets. You glance over at Hyacine standing beside you, then on the still-crowing chimeras, and the answer dawns upon you.
确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.
呀，这样会不会太直接啦……
Ah, might this be too straightforward...
确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.
确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.
确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.
确定是这个名字吗？没问题的话，我就登记进档案里了。
You sure you want this name? If so, I'll register it in our files.
——「{TEXTJOIN#215}」！这就是我们队伍的新名字嗷呜！
...{TEXTJOIN#215}! This is our squad's new name, awoo!
虽然早就听说灰宝的趣味有些…独特，但这个队名还是给了我不小的震撼呢。
I've heard that Grayie's tastes are a little... peculiar, but this squad name still got me a little startled.
打扰了。我看到排名榜上有支队伍的成绩突飞猛进，请问，你就是它们的管理员吗？
Sorry to bother you. I saw this squad's ranking rise in leaps and bounds on the leaderboard. Might I ask if you're their administrator?
It actually IS me this time.
没错，你要和我签订契约吗？
That's right. You want to sign a contract with me?
您好。或许有些冒昧，但…请允许我加入您的队伍。
Hello. This may sound a little forward, but... please allow me to join your squad.
咦，是因为队伍的表现太过出色，所以吸引了其他小奇美拉来加入吗？
Hmm, do other chimeras wish to join because of your squad's stellar performance?
正是如此。我的称号是「职业经理」，拥有极其丰富的工作经验，在实践中也沉淀了一套属于自己的方法论，与许多不同的奇美拉合作过，尤其擅长团队协同。

That is correct. My title is "professional manager," and I have ample work experience, having developed my own unique methodology in the practical arena. I've also worked with different chimeras before, especially excelling at teamwork coordination.
优秀的奇美拉，需要一位更优秀的管理员才能得到充分发挥。而我相信，在您的带领下，我能完全施展自己的才干，提升队伍成绩，进而实现双赢。

Superb chimeras need an even more outstanding administrator to fully wield their potential. And I believe that with your leadership, I can fully demonstrate my own talents and raise the squad's performance for a win-win partnership.
呃，灰宝…这只小奇美拉，是不是有点不太一样？
Err, Grayie... Doesn't this chimera look a little different?
即便在奇美拉当中，也有因能力差别而产生的定位划分。有的奇美拉适合实际工作，有的奇美拉则可以站在高位，着眼全局，发挥带头作用。

Even among chimeras, they are divided according to their capabilities. Some chimeras are more suited for practical work, while others can survey the bigger picture from an elevated position and utilize their leadership skills.
<color=#dbc291ff>领队奇美拉</color>——这便是人们对我的称呼，但我并不喜欢。奇美拉是团结的整体，不该再被*人为*地划分出等级高低。

<color=#dbc291ff>Alpha Chimera</color> — that's what people call me, though I dislike it. Chimeras are a unity of their lesser selves, and should not be artificially segregated into hierarchies of ability.
你好像会说些很厉害的话。
You sound like you know really big words.
Can't we just be checking on ability scores?
我也同意！要是因为能力高低而区别对待小奇美拉，就和先前那个议员没什么两样了。
I agree as well! If we gave differential treatment to chimeras based on their abilities, we'd be just as feckless as that Elder.
谈话间，你似乎看到这只自称为领队的奇美拉，嘴角露出了难以察觉的笑容。
In the midst of the conversation, you seem to notice a barely perceptible smile flash across this self-proclaimed Alpha Chimera.
无论如何，预祝我们的合作顺利，事业成功。
Regardless, let our collaboration be smooth and our endeavors successful.
等等等等——喂喂，明明是我先来的啊！
Wait wait wait! Hey hey, I was here first!
喂…为什么啊？我邀请了你这么多次，亲自跑了不下三回，你都不肯加入我的小队。
Hey... Why? I tried inviting you so many times personally, but you refused to join me.
凭什么这个新来的能排在我前面，就因为{F#她}{M#他}和黄金裔的关系好？还是有什么不能让我知道的原因，倒是说说看啊。
Why should this newcomer get ahead of me, just because {F#she's}{M#he's} on good terms with the Chrysos Heirs? Or is there some reason that I'm not privy to? I'd like to hear 'em.
Because, {F#she}{M#he} is more valuable than you.
哎，别「嗷呜」了，我也听不懂，但有件事很确定啊…就是你加入的这支队伍不过是群乌合之众。才刚组建起来，跟着{F#她}{M#他}能有什么前途？

*sigh* Stop awoo-ing. I don't understand you either, though I'm sure of one thing... This squad you joined comprises nothing but misfits. What future could there be, following {F#her}{M#him} with a newly formed squad?
这话我可不能当作没听见啊。
I just can't pretend I didn't hear that.
…听见又怎么样？我就是故意说给你听的。
...And so what if you did? I deliberately said it for you to hear.
哈，我都当了好久的管理员，你这队伍到底是个啥样，我还不清楚吗？
Ha, I've been an administrator for so long. You think I wouldn't know what your squad is like?
怎么，不服气？等你的排名超过我再来反驳吧，勉勉强强才达标，哟，还装起来了？
What, did I upset you? You can back up your words when your rank is higher than mine. You hardly even managed to hit your targets, and you're here strutting your stuff?
没问题。那就来打个赌。我相信{F#她}{M#他}带领的队伍，绝对能击败你。
No problem, let's make it a bet then. I believe that {F#her}{M#his} squad will beat yours for sure.
不用害怕挑衅。就把他的队伍设为下阶段的目标，我会帮你获胜。
Don't be afraid of his taunts. Just treat his squad as the next objective, and I'll help you hit it.
等等，你怎么替我决定了？
Hang on. Why're you deciding for me?
The time for conquest is nigh!
行啊。你就留在那个垃圾队伍里，浪费时间和精力，然后心悦诚服地被我踩在脚下吧！
Hah, sure. You stay in that trash squad and waste your time and energy. Only then will you be convincingly crushed underfoot by me!
三周内，让我们见见真章——
Three weeks, then we'll see who truly stands above the other...
提前完成！灰宝和小奇美拉都辛苦了，待会给你们买点好吃的~
Done in advance! Good job, Grayie and chimeras. I'll buy some delicious food for you guys later!
做得不错。我果然没有看错人。
Well done. I knew I didn't get the wrong person.
复盘的事就留到后面再说，现在是庆功时间！按照惯例，大家一起去集市逛逛，然后开开心心地泡个澡~走吧走吧！
We'll leave the postmortem for later. It's time to celebrate! According to tradition, everyone will head to the market together for a nice, relaxing bath. Let's go, let's go!
喜欢小风堇，喜欢夸夸！好吃的~泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
I love Cinny, I love praise! Yummy food, toasty bath, happy me! Awoo-awoo!
你和风堇带着小奇美拉在奥赫玛吃吃逛逛，度过了段极为愉快的时间……
With the chimeras in tow, you and Hyacine stroll around Okhema, enjoying a wonderful time...
有惊无险，差点就没完成…灰宝和小奇美拉都辛苦啦，做得很不错哦。
That was really close. We almost didn't make it in time... You've worked hard, Grayie and chimeras. Decent job.
没想到会如此胶着，或许得重新审视……
I wasn't expecting it to be so tight. Perhaps it's time for us to reassess our processes...
趁还有点时间，大家一起去泡个澡吧。充分休息才能用最好的状态迎接工作。走吧走吧！
While there's still a little time left, we should all go take a bath. A good rest is essential for an optimal work state. Let's go, let's go!
这个活就干到这里！泡澡~开心！嗷呜嗷呜！
That's it for work! Bath time, happy! Awoo-awoo!
你和风堇带着小奇美拉在浴池里舒服地泡着澡，尽情放松了片刻……
You and Hyacine bring the chimeras to the bath to indulge in a relaxing time...
你们队伍的名次居然比我高？…真的假的？莫不是我最近浴盐用太多，出现幻觉了吧？
Your squad's placed higher than me? ...Is this real? Am I hallucinating from all my recent salt baths?
喂，确定花园的工作量统计没出错？塔兰顿在看着你，所以麻烦上点心，负责任地帮我再检查一遍——我的队伍，完成的工作，比他们少？

Hey, you sure the Garden didn't tally our workload wrong? Talanton's watching from above, so please be more meticulous about your evaluations and help re-verify the results more responsibly — did my squad really do less work than theirs?
对。还不愿意相信的话，我把这张排名表贴到你常泡的浴池墙上如何？让所有来往的客人都看看，一个无能的管理员是怎么毁掉整支队伍的。

That is correct. If it's still hardly believable to you, how about I paste this leaderboard list on the wall where you regularly soak in your bath? All guests will be able to witness how an incapable administrator destroys their own squad.
花园会密切关注每只奇美拉的情况，所以别以为我们不知道——看看这个，你队伍里的奇美拉提交的工作日报，不会要说是伪造的吧？

The Garden keeps a close eye on each chimera's status, so don't think we're oblivious to the situation. Look at this: Your chimera squad's submitted daily work reports — you telling me these are forgeries?
日报，好可怕…是不是我们平时的言行，也会被小奇美拉报告给园丁呀。
Daily reports, how scary... You think our daily exchanges are also being reported by the chimeras to the Gardeners?
要是泡澡也有对应的神明的话，你绝对当之无愧。还有什么话想说吗，洗浴之泰坦？
If there was a god for the bath, you'd definitely be it. Anything else you would like to add, Bath Titan?
这是亵渎律法！奥赫玛公民享有正当的泡澡权利，这点在云石天宫的介绍里也有记录。再说，我是队伍的管理员，我做什么，轮得到它们来指点吗？

This is an affront to justice! Okheman citizens have the rightful privilege to their baths. This is also recorded in the Marmoreal Palace's introduction. Besides, I'm a squad administrator — what right do they have to criticize what I do?
要不是这群东西的工作效率太低，我会输吗？是花园分配的奇美拉有问题好吧！
If not for the atrocious work efficiency of this lot, you think I would've lost? This is the Garden's problem with how they assign chimeras!
但你的队伍名次目前岌岌可危，再不做点什么，就要面临解散了。提前准备好罚金吧。
But your squad's ranking is currently tanking. If you don't do something soon, they'll soon face disbandment. You'd better prep to pay a fine soon.
I can help you fight a demotion prevention match.
I'll guarantee a sure win for you, hand to heart.
我早就说，{F#她}{M#他}管理的队伍绝对能击败你。我不会接受邀约，请回吧。
I already said before that {F#her}{M#his} squad will surely defeat yours. I'm afraid I'll have to decline your invitation. Please return.
…不就是只奇美拉吗，我还不稀罕！我退出，我不玩了，你们自个去卷吧！
...Bah, they're just some chimeras, think I would care? I'm out, done! You lot can compete amongst yourselves!
想要单方面解除管理权限，请随我来这边，并支付相应的罚金。走吧。
If you wish to unilaterally revoke management privileges, please come with me and pay the respective fine. Let's go.
明明自己总在偷懒，还把工作都丢给小奇美拉。遇上这种不负责的管理员也挺难受的。
You're obviously slacking off yourself and stacking all the workload on the chimeras. It's probably tough having to deal with such an irresponsible administrator.
但是…虽然获胜了是好事，不知道为什么，我总觉得什么地方有点奇怪。
But... it's a good thing we won, but I don't know why I still feel weird about it.
应该不是。小奇美拉的工作很辛苦，算不上是简单……
I don't think so. The chimeras worked so hard, so I can't say it was easy...
应该不是。啊，我知道灰宝作为天外来客的实力很强，但奇怪的不是这方面……
I don't think so. I know your strength as a traveler from beyond the sky, but that's not why this is weird...
那个人为什么要来挑衅？
Why is that person here to provoke you?
对！就是这个。这位浴场的常客，和那个议员对待我们的态度极其相近。元老院或许确实看黄金裔不顺眼，但他没有理由针对我们。
Yes! That's it. This bath regular and that Elder treated us in overly similar ways. The Council may not see eye to eye with the Chrysos Heirs, but that's no reason to have a grudge against us.
是不是还有什么隐情呢……
Could there be something more that meets the eye...
花园布置的工作太多了？
The Garden's assigning too much work?
应该不是。近期奥赫玛要处理的事情确实很多，只能辛苦小奇美拉了……
Probably not. There've been plenty of happenings that needed to be settled in Okhema, but that's just more effort on the chimeras' part...
与其思考这些毫无根据的事，两位不如多花点心思在团队建设上。
Rather than dwelling on unfounded matters, why not spare that time to build a better squad instead?
说的也是。这次多亏了你帮忙啦。有了领队后，小奇美拉工作时的状态都完全不一样了。
You're right. Your help has been much appreciated this time. The chimeras' work mentality has been a complete about-turn with a leader guiding them.
领队奇美拉的重要性不言而喻，不过在欢庆之余，您应该多关注那些实际参与工作的奇美拉，它们才是团队的基础。

The essentiality of an Alpha Chimera speaks for itself, but in the midst of celebration, you should focus more on the chimeras that are actually doing the work. They are the foundation of a successful squad.
在近期工作中，我听到了些异样的声音。有空的话，您可以详细观察。
During my recent work stints, I heard some unusual sounds. You should investigate when you're free.
吹会风，让心情彻底放空——
Enjoy the breeze a little and empty your mind...
我决定了，明天要牙痛，失眠也可以。总之不工作。
I've decided: I'm having a toothache tomorrow, or even getting insomnia. I'm not going to work, in any case.
在生命花园打工，哪有不疯的，都是硬撑罢了。
Who has gone mad working in the Garden of Life? We're all just hanging by a thread.
你知道的，{NICKNAME}是我的领导，这家伙强得不可思议。
You know, {NICKNAME} is my boss. That one is incredibly strong.
而我，是队伍的元老，没有功劳也有苦劳。谁惹我，就让谁滚蛋！
And I, as a veteran of the squad, have endured my fair share of hardships. Whoever crosses me can get the heck out of my sight!
呀，因为最近的进展太过顺利，小奇美拉们开始有些松懈了。灰宝，得想想办法。
Hmm, it's been too smooth sailing recently. The chimeras have started getting complacent. Grayie, we have to think of something.
可是，这几只小奇美拉都是队伍最初的成员，和大家相处很长时间了。要是进行惩罚的话，或许会对其余成员造成不好的影响。
But, these few chimeras have been in the squad since the start, and they've been with everyone the longest. If we punished them, that might have a negative influence on the other members.
可是，这几只小奇美拉都是队伍最初的成员，和大家相处很长时间了。要是进行惩罚的话，或许会对其余成员造成不好的影响。
But, these few chimeras have been in the squad since the start, and they've been with everyone the longest. If we punished them, that might have a negative influence on the other members.
It's time for some new blood in this squad!
可是，这几只小奇美拉都是队伍最初的成员，和大家相处很长时间了。要是进行惩罚的话，或许会对其余成员造成不好的影响。
But, these few chimeras have been in the squad since the start, and they've been with everyone the longest. If we punished them, that might have a negative influence on the other members.
I will speak to them personally.
嗯，都工作了这么长时间，是该好好和小奇美拉们交流下了。
Mm, it's been a while since we've worked together. High time we had a chat with the chimeras.
这样。我们管理层内部先讨论好解决方案，再去找出问题的奇美拉谈话。
How about this: Let's discuss the solution among management first, then approach the problem chimeras for a chat.
你们商量了好久，才总算制定了谈话要点……
You all discuss for a long time before finally settling on the key points...
咳。自从灰宝接手以来，我们团队取得了长足的进步。能克服诸多困境，接连击败对手，获得如此成绩，当然离不开各位的努力。先表示感谢~

Ahem, ever since Grayie took the reins, our squad has seen excellent progress. To have overcome a multitude of difficulties and defeated a string of competitors, these results wouldn't have been possible without everyone's hard work. I'd like to first express my appreciation!
但是，我们必须看到，随着团队规模的扩大，竞争水平的提升，面对的问题也越发复杂。这也要求我们进一步提高工作能力，保持更积极的工作状态……

But, we must be able to realize that with the expansion of the squad, so will the rise in the competitive benchmark, as well as the increasing complexity of the challenges we face. This also requires us to take further steps to improve our work capabilities and maintain an even more proactive work attitude...
…嗷呜？我的工作已经很饱和，没法再增加了。
...Awoo? I'm pretty loaded up on work already. No need to add some more.
我们团队的情况，你又不是不知道。很难的嗷呜。
It's not like you don't know our squad's situation. It's tough on us, awoo.
你说的这个啊，我都明白，但是呢，做不了。至于为什么做不了…你瞧瞧现在的成员数量，够吗？提产能是要靠人手的，光吹是没用的。

I get what you're saying, but we can't do that. As for why not... Just take a look at how many we have in the squad, are we enough? Increasing workload relies on increased headcount — it's not just all hot air.
不够的话，就得再招点奇美拉过来。但那就不是我该考虑的事了，对吧？
We'll have to recruit more chimeras if we've more work. But that's something above my pay grade, I think?
好吧，作为管理者，和员工进行绩效谈话是你的职责。想想看，到底该说些什么呢？
All right, as the administrator, speaking to your staff about their performances is your duty. Think, what should you say?
说实话，现在的成绩还远远没有达到我的预期。你们都知道，生命花园里的奇美拉有很多，想加入我们队伍的呢，也有很多。
Truth be told, our current performance is way below my expectations. You all know that there are many chimeras in the Garden of Life. There are also many that want to join our squad.
仅统计昨日收到的入队申请，就已经有<unbreak>12</unbreak>次了。
Just counting the squad applications received yesterday, I already count <unbreak>12</unbreak>.
正好，园丁小姐也在问，是否需要派些更厉害的奇美拉来支援我们。
And it's been good timing that Miss Gardener has also been asking us if she needs to dispatch stronger chimeras our way.
这样的话，成员的数量会不会太多了些…有点苦恼呀。
If that's the case, wouldn't the number of members be a little... troublesome?
如果你们想留在这里，我很欢迎。要是有其他的想法呢，我也不会阻拦。
You're more than welcome to stay here. If you have other ideas, I won't stop you either.
当然，我们已经合作了很长时间，彼此间都是有信任在的。各位的工作能力呢，我也看在眼里，很出色，符合团队的要求。
Of course, we've been working together for a while, so there's trust built between us. I'm also aware of everyone's abilities — outstanding and a great fit for the squad's needs.
除非不得已，我也不想对团队进行换血。重新磨合很麻烦，对吧？
I don't wish to change up the squad either, only as a last resort. It's arduous to have to cohere with new members, is it not?
你们可以做选择，但需要想清楚代价，不是每次，都能有后悔的机会。
You all have to make a choice, but also be aware of its cost — one doesn't always get a chance to regret one's decision.
哎呀，都别紧张，今天叫大家过来，就是随便聊聊，没什么大事。
Gosh, no need to be anxious. The reason I gathered everyone today is just to have a casual chat. It's nothing major.
我们队伍组建已经有段时间了，成绩也很不错，各位都是最初就在团队里的资深成员，你们的付出自然不该被忽视，必须好好奖励才行。
Our squad has been formed for a while, and we've achieved great results. Everyone here has been with the squad since the start. Your contributions will not go unnoticed, and they must be rewarded.
正好，生命花园的园丁最近也在问，是否需要派些更厉害的奇美拉来支援。
It's good timing that the Gardeners have recently asked if we need stronger chimeras to assist us.
我想，你们忙碌了挺长的时间，是该好好休息了。
I've been thinking of letting you guys take a much-needed break after being busy for so long.
希望加入队伍的奇美拉也有许多，仅昨日就收到了<unbreak>12</unbreak>份申请。
There are many chimeras that're also hoping to join the squad. Just yesterday, we've already had <unbreak>12</unbreak> applications.
呀，这样的话，成员数量会不会有点太多了，灰宝管理起来也很费劲呢。
Ah, if that's the case, wouldn't we have too many members? It's also going to be hard on you, Grayie.
从长远发展来看，适时对团队做调整还是挺有必要的。精简成员，剔除不需要的部分，吸纳新鲜血液，这才是正确的做法，对吧？

From a long-term strategic perspective, it's essential to make timely adjustments to the squad. Streamlining, pruning inefficiencies, and bringing in new blood, that's the right way to go about it, no?
作为团队资深成员，你们应当发挥表率作用。明白我的意思吗？
As veteran squad members, you should all try to set an example as well. You understand what I'm saying?
嗯…我同意您的看法，完全同意嗷呜…没有任何意见。
Mm... I agree with you, I totally do, awooo... I have no objections.
竞争愈发激烈，要想获得更高的团队名次，就需要全部成员的共同努力……
Competition's getting stiff, so if we want to achieve a higher squad ranking, everyone has to work together towards that goal...
嗷呜，我们很清楚这个道理，会认真按您的要求去做的…会的……
Awooo, we're crystal clear on what that means. We will earnestly meet your expectations... we will...
没想到小奇美拉的心思会有这么多，看起来很听话的样子，心底却埋着不少事。
I never thought chimeras to be so thoughtful. They look outwardly obedient, but harbor many emotions inside.
以后和它们打交道的时候，灰宝得多留个心眼才行。
Grayie, you should be more careful talking to them in the future.
是这样吗？以后哪天要是小伊卡闹脾气的时候，也要麻烦灰宝来安抚它啦。
Is that so? If Little Ica ever throws a fit next time, I'll get you to cajole it as well.
Heavy is the head that wears the crown.
…王冠？对哦，灰宝是阿格莱雅女士的贵客，这点小事当然难不倒你！
...Crown? Oh right, Grayie is Lady Aglaea's esteemed guest. I'm sure such a trivial matter is nothing to you!
既然团队的问题都解决了，现在该继续认真工作啦。让我看看，下个目标是……
Now that the squad's issue has been resolved, we can focus on working hard. Let's see, our next goal is...
很抱歉，我想暂时休息一段时间。
Sorry, I'd like to take some time off.
Don't go. I'll raise your pay.
并非如此。对处在扩张期的队伍而言，团队成员的储备很重要。
Nothing of the sort. Having a reserve of squad members is imperative to expanding a squad.
如果我始终占据领队位置，其余成员将永远无法得到成长。后退，是为了共同前进。
If I continue to hog the leader role, the other members will never be able to grow. Taking a step back is so that everyone can move forward.
但要是你离开了，该由哪只小奇美拉担任领队呢？
But if you leave, which chimera will take the lead?
不必担心，我都安排好了。在收到的入队申请中，我筛选出了最适合的对象。
Don't worry. I've already made arrangements. I've filtered out the best candidate after receiving the applications.
往后，将由它来接替领队的职责，相信不会让您失望。那么，祝您的事业顺利。
In the future, it will bear the responsibility of leading the squad. I trust you won't be disappointed. Then, I wish you a successful career.
职业经理踩着欢快的步伐离开了，围观的奇美拉都露出了羡慕的神色。
The professional manager departs with a light-hearted skip, the onlooking chimeras casting envious stares.
嗷呜…果然，最快乐的时刻，就是提离职的那一刻。
Awoo... So the happiest moment is indeed tendering your resignation.
Can I take some time off too?
还有好多工作等着我们去做，灰宝可不能松懈！继续努力提升小队的名次吧。
There's plenty more work waiting for us. You can't slow down now, Grayie! We have to keep gunning for a higher squad rank.
得定个目标，嗯…这次就把<color=#dbc291ff>第二名的队伍</color>作为我们的对手吧！
Got to set a target, hmm... Let's have the <color=#dbc291ff>second-ranked squad</color> be our opponents this time!
…第二名的队伍发生了变化？好厉害，突然就蹿了上去，已经超过我们了。
...The squad in second place has changed? Impressive, they came out of nowhere and overtook us.
灰宝，我们去园丁那儿问问情况吧！
Grayie, let's go to the Gardener and ask about the situation.
小风堇，还有小灰。你们好呀。
Cinny, and Little Gray. Hello to the both of you.
唔…这么关注排名榜，莫非，你们也在陪小奇美拉玩吗？
Hmm... Paying so much attention to the rankings, are you guys playing with the chimeras too?
——缇宝老师？！啊，对不起，我们是不是打扰到了……
Tribbie? Ah, I'm sorry. Did we disturb you...
没关系的，小风堇。缇安原先就很喜欢这群小家伙，经常来花园找它们玩。
It's alright, Cinny. Trianne has always loved these little ones, often coming to the garden to play with them.
所以，你们也是小奇美拉的管理员吗？
So, are you guys also administrators for the chimeras?
嗯，灰宝接手了这支队伍，正在认真工作呢，我也会帮些忙。
Yeah, Grayie just took over this squad and is working hard on it. I'm also helping out.
等等，缇宝老师说*也*，难道……
Hang on, Tribbie said "also." Does that mean...
哼哼哼——揭晓答案！小风堇肯定想不到，*我们*就是「花花」的管理员哦。
Huhuhu! Revealing the answer now! Cinny, you definitely did not expect it, but we are Florie's administrator!
灰宝！明明你刚才还和我一样惊讶，这种时候就别逞强啦！
Grayie! You were just as surprised as I was earlier. Stop pretending!
You really hid it well, huh.
这么说来，那只小队的标志，确实是缇宝老师的图案。我应该早点察觉到的。
Come to think of it, that squad's insignia is indeed Tribbie's design. I should have noticed it sooner.
正好，小灰，还有小风堇，这么受小奇美拉欢迎的话，我们来玩个游戏吧。
Perfect! Since Little Gray and Cinny are so popular among the chimeras, let's play a game.
——看看在这个周期内，谁的小队能取得更高的名次呢？
Let's see whose squad can achieve a higher ranking this season!
行呀，缇宝老师主动提出要较量，我们当然会接受。
Sure, since Tribbie is the one who is challenging us, we'll accept the challenge!
灰宝作为管理员，也来说点什么吧。虽然要和超级强的缇宝老师比赛，但气势上不能输！
Grayie, you should say something too as their administrator. We may be competing against the overpowered Tribbie, but that's no reason to lose out in spirit!
我已经在研究决赛的对手了。
I have been studying our opponents for the final match.
You better not be bawling later on, 'kay?
太、太失礼啦！灰宝，对缇宝老师要尊重点。但我们…嗯，我们不会输的！
H—How rude! Grayie, you need to be more respectful to Tribbie. But we... yes, we won't lose!
*我们*知道的，小灰爱说大话，所以不怕。都要加油哦。
We know that Little Gray loves to brag, so we're not bothered. Let's all do our best.
轻轻松松~距离最终期限还有好多时间，灰宝带着小奇美拉去尽情放松下吧！
Easy breezy! There's still plenty of time before the deadline. Grayie, you should take the chimeras out to relax for a bit!
嗷呜！提前下班~开心~可以玩~嗷呜嗷呜！
Awoo! Getting off work early, so happy! We can go play, awoo-awoo!
完成~大家辛苦啦，灰宝和小奇美拉都好好休息下吧~
All done! Good work, everyone. Grayie and the chimeras can go relax now!
嗷呜！下班~开心~嗷呜嗷呜！
Awoo! Work is done, so happy! Awoo-awoo!
是呀，这里距离天空很近。看看云，吹吹风，让思绪在阳光中飘散，心情会舒畅很多。
Yes, this place is very close to the sky. Gazing at clouds, basking in the wind, letting your thoughts drift through the sunlight — your mood will turn out much better.
那我来帮你放松下嗷呜~
Let me help you relax then, awoo!
我已经下班了，有新需求请找我的同伴嗷呜。
I'm off duty. Please look for my buddies if you have any new requests, awoo.
不好好工作，在这偷懒是吧？
Not working hard, but hardly working here?
现在是下班时间。按照花园的规定，加班要付双倍的酬劳嗷呜！
I'm off-duty. According to the Garden's regulations, overtime requires double the compensation, awoo!
嗯？灰宝已经休息好啦？还觉得疲惫的话，我可以帮你疗愈哦。
Hmm? You're all done taking a break? I can help you loosen up if you're still feeling tired.
话说，你当了这么长时间的管理员，也和许多小奇美拉接触过了，有什么特别的想法吗。
Say, you've been an administrator for a long time and interacted with many chimeras. Do you have any particular thoughts about them?
The chimeras sure don't have it easy...
是呀。不知道灰宝有没有听过，小奇美拉并非原本就存在的生物，而是花园的园丁用收集来的生命信息培育得到，也就是…*制造*出来的。

Yeah... I don't know if you've heard of this, but chimeras aren't creatures that originally existed, but were nurtured by the Gardeners using collected life data, which means that they... were created.
从诞生之初，它们就被赋予了为人们服务的使命。想想…还挺难过的。
From the moment they are born, they are bequeathed the mission to serve humans. Just thinking about it... it makes me sad.
人活着果然不应该工作。
Humans shouldn't have to work for a living.
这段时间真是辛苦灰宝了。我也想每天舒舒服服地泡在浴池里，喝着清爽的秘酿，然后听学者们讲述那些沿海百邦的奇妙见闻。
It's been tough on you too during this time. I also want to soak in a bath all day long, sip on some cooling ambrosia, then listen to scholars recount wondrous stories of myriad Seaside States.
可惜，现在的翁法罗斯没有给我们这个机会呢。
Alas, we don't have that chance in present-day Amphoreus.
嘿嘿，灰宝是对我催促你工作这件事怀恨在心吗？
Heh-heh, are you annoyed at my constant pestering about work?
作为小奇美拉的管理员，当然要以身作则呀，不然该怎么监督它们呢？
As the chimeras' administrator, you must lead by example! Otherwise, how would you surveil them?
I've nothing I wish to say.
我受阿格莱雅女士之托，前来奥赫玛为伤者提供治疗，原本想着很快便能返回，但……
I was besought by Lady Aglaea to come forth to Okhema to provide treatment for the wounded. I initially wanted to return post-haste, but...
留在这里后，我才发现需要我做的事，远比想象的要多，也更困难。「昏光庭院」能治愈大家的伤病，可城市受到的破坏，需要更多时间才能修复。

After staying here, I began to discover that there were many more matters with great difficulty that needed my attention. The Twilight Courtyard can heal everyone's wounds, but damage to a city requires much more time to fix.
…我见到了太多悲剧。仅靠医治的力量，我能做的远远不够。
...I've witnessed many tragedies. There is much I cannot do on the power of medical treatment alone.
So you came to the Garden?
是呀。园丁们原本也是学者，他们照看小奇美拉，始终在想办法为城邦解决困难。或许，这里有什么我可以做的事。
Yes. The Gardeners are scholars at heart, but they look after the chimeras and are constantly thinking of ways to resolve the city's troubles. I thought maybe there was something I could do as well.
不是这个意思啦。园丁们原本也是学者，他们照看小奇美拉，始终在想办法为城邦解决困难。在这里，或许我可以帮上忙。

I don't mean it that way. The Gardeners are scholars at heart, but they look after the chimeras and are constantly thinking of ways to resolve the city's troubles. I thought maybe there was something I could do as well.
So profound, I didn't understand a word of it, awoo.
是在感谢你们呢。小奇美拉为奥赫玛的居民帮了大忙，我也想…嗯，尽自己的一份力。
I'm simply grateful to you all. The chimeras have helped Okhema's citizens so much, so I too, wanted to... yes, to do my part.
缇宝老师还没回来，估计也在什么地方忙着吧。
Tribbie isn't back yet. She's probably busy somewhere else.
现在，排名比我们高的还有一支队伍。好像听园丁小姐讲过，这支队伍很传奇，始终占据着排行榜首位，管理员却从来不露面。

Now there's only one squad above us on the leaderboard. I think I heard Miss Gardener mention that this squad is legendary — they've hogged the top spot for ages, but their administrator has never been seen before.
嗷呜？熟悉的回来了嗷呜！
Awoo? The familiar one is back, awoo!
嗷嗷嗷嗷嗷嗷…呜…呜呜呜——
喜欢奇美拉的人类，你们好啊。
最近的战绩，我都看到了。能胜过缇宝大师，很不错，有成为我对手的价值。
I have noticed your recent results. It's impressive that you've ousted Master Tribbie, to be worthy of being my rival.
听见没有？老大的意思是，站在那别动，它会逐个清算你们的罪过！
Hear that? What Boss means is, stand there and don't move, it will — it will take an account of your wrongdoings in order!
哼，别被狭隘的种族观点遮蔽了眼睛，我只站在正义这边。
Hmph, don't let lowly racial prejudice blind your eyes. I'm simply standing on the side of justice.
呵。现在该向你们揭示我的真实身份了。我，本奇美拉，就是「自由之角」的管理员！
Heh. I should reveal my true identity to you all now. I, am the administrator for Horn of Freedom!
All chimeras, stand tall and unite...
——消灭人类暴政，花园属于奇美拉！
...And annihilate human tyranny! The Garden belongs to the chimeras!
我早就看出你们绝非寻常人类。能将这只队伍带到如此高度，你真令我欢喜。
I've long noticed you're all no ordinary humans. To have brought this squad to such heights, you sure pique my fancy.
老大说，你们都是虫子！击败你们这种弱队，根本不用费力气！
Boss said, you're all worms! Defeating such a feeble squad as yours requires zero effort!
我听得懂，别翻译了行吗？
I got all that. No need to translate, okay?
I never thought you were the surrendering type.
啊，怪不得我先前觉得什么地方不对。这位先生没有接受过{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福，却表现得像是能和小奇美拉交流似的。原来他和你是同伴呀。

Ah, that's why I felt something was off before. This gentleman seemed to be able to communicate with the little chimeras without having {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces{RUBY_E#}'s blessings. Turns out that he's your companion.
正是。从接手那只队伍开始，我就始终在观察你们。
Precisely. I've been watching you ever since you took over that squad.
管理能力合格，与园丁的关系很好，同时对奇美拉表现出了友善，这样的人类并不多见，极有可能在日后成为威胁到我的对手。

Competent management skills, on good terms with the Gardeners, and friendly towards chimeras — there are few humans like that, and they could very well be opponents who would become a threat to me one day.
于是我假意投奔，顺势探探你的虚实，并驱使这个人来挑衅。
So I pretended to pledge my loyalty to probe your strengths and weaknesses, and used this person to provoke you.
老大派我来砸场，就是要叫的足够大声，喊得足够响！
Boss sent me to cause a scene, meaning I gotta howl loud enough, and roar proud enough!
如今，「{TEXTJOIN#215}」成为了行业里不可忽视的力量，你我终究要有一战。
Now, {TEXTJOIN#215} has become a powerhouse that can't be ignored, which is why you and I are fated to battle it out.
奇美拉自治，才是团队管理的最终答案。可惜人类的目光实在太过短浅，不愿将主导权交给奇美拉，而这，就将会是你们失败的原因。

Chimera autonomy is the ultimate answer to squad management. A pity that human foresight is short-sighted, unwilling to hand over control to the chimeras. And this, will be the reason for your defeat.
没想到最后的对手竟然是只奇美拉…灰宝可别掉以轻心，使出全力，让它心服口服！
I never thought my final opponent would be a chimera... Be careful, Grayie! Give it everything you've got and make them submit!
I can fight ten of them.
它跳起来都打不到我的膝盖。
It can't hit my knee, even if it jumps up.
哈哈哈哈。愚蠢的人类，别忘了，你现在的领队是谁安插进来的。
Hahahaha. Foolish humans, don't forget who recommended the one to lead your squad.
我做了如此多准备，就是为了这一刻！
I've made so many layers of preparation, just for this one moment!
啊？至于做到这个地步吗？
Hah? Did you even have to go this far?
要是没有领队的话，小奇美拉的工作效率会受到很大影响，这可怎么办……
Without a leader, the chimeras' work efficiency will dip significantly. What will we do...
不用紧张。小灰，小风堇，我来帮你们。
Don't panic. Little Gray, Cinny, I will help you.
缇宝大师？我很感谢你平日里对奇美拉的照顾，欠的零食也会归还，但这是我与{F#她}{M#他}之间的决斗，还请不要插手。
Master Tribbie? I'm really grateful for your constant care toward the chimeras, and owed snacks must be repaid, but this is a final fight between me and {F#her}{M#him}. Please do not interfere.
拒绝哦。小灰在游戏里获胜了，当然要有奖励。
Rejected! Little Gray won in the game, and thus must be rewarded.
喏！这是我的领队奇美拉，能力很强，也很好相处。暂时借给你们，肯定能帮上忙！
Behold! This is my chimera leader, highly capable and very affable. I'll lend it to you for now, so it'll surely be of help!
谢谢缇宝老师！事不宜迟，灰宝，我们这就开始比赛吧！
Thank you, Tribbie! No time to lose, Grayie! Let's get this match started!
时间到了，可以点投降了吧？
Time's up. Can I surrender now?
灰宝！这种时候就别开玩笑啦，拿出气势来！
Grayie! This is no time for jokes! You've gotta show 'em who's boss!
缇宝大师的加入，让局势产生了些许变化。
Master Tribbie's involvement has somewhat affected the momentum.
既然如此，我也不再留情——来，让我试试，你是否真能撼动我的位置！
If that's the case, I won't hold back either. Come, let's see if you can really take my place!
此后，「自由之角」将不复存在。你们可以自谋出路，不用再跟着我了。
From now on, the Horn of Freedom will cease to exist. You can all find your own paths. No need to follow me any longer.
既然输，便要输的彻底。我会重新加入你的团队，如何处置，都听凭你差遣。
A defeat must be utterly complete. I will rejoin your squad — what you wish to do to me is at your discretion.
莫非你以为我还会要你？
You think I still want you?
哼。败者没有反驳的资格。但这只是我的失败，并非奇美拉整个族群的失败。
Hmph. The loser has no right of rebuttal. But the only one defeated was me, not the entire chimera tribe.
只有坚持奇美拉自治，充分发挥成员的自主性，做到自我激励、自我约束，贯彻自由与自律理念的团队，才能适应这个竞争愈发激烈的时代。

Only when we persist in chimera autonomy, fully leverage on our members' initiative, achieve self-motivation and self-discipline, and instill the ideals of freedom and self-restraint, can a squad adapt to this age of increasing competition.
由人类担任管理员的队伍，终将被更强大的奇美拉团体取代！
A human-led squad will be eventually replaced by an even stronger chimera community!
你想办法占据排行榜的首位，坚持由奇美拉担任管理员，认为这样才能提高效率。可是，队伍名次是由小奇美拉的工作量决定的。

You keep trying to occupy the top spot on the leaderboard, insisting on a chimera being an administrator, and believing that this is the only way to improve efficiency. But, a squad's rank is determined by the chimeras' work output.
你所有的努力，都是在为奥赫玛的居民服务呀。
All your efforts are in service of Okhema's citizens.
我信奉的…建立最强奇美拉自治小队的理想，原来…是在帮助人类吗……
The ideal I believe in... creating the strongest autonomous chimera squad, is... to help humans...?
所有奇美拉都能幸福的世界，终究是不可能的吗……
A world where all chimeras can be happy, is it impossible...
这个问题的深奥程度似乎超过了奇美拉的思考能力，现场都陷入了沉默。
The profundity of this question has exceeded the chimera's thought capacity, and a muted silence descends.
领奖台都布置好啦，请获胜队伍的管理员过来吧！
The award stage is all set up. The winning squad's administrator can come over now!
哎，原以为和这只小东西站在同一边，真能赚点什么回来，是我想多了啊。
*sigh* I thought there'd be some benefits to siding with this fellow. Looks like it was just wishful thinking.
What the heck are you plotting now?
就是…你也见到了，我管理的小队出了点问题，没法跟生命花园交代。
It's... You saw it too — there was a hiccup with the squad I'm managing, and I couldn't explain it to the Garden of Life.
这只小东西就跑过来，提出和我结盟。如果我愿意帮忙的话，它可以帮我付罚款——我也不知道它究竟哪来的利衡币。
So this critter scampered over and suggested we work together. If I was willing to help, it would help me pay the fine. I also didn't know where it got the Balance Coins from.
原本的钱没挣到，现在还要倒赔一笔。这下可亏大了啊。
I didn't make any of the expected money, and now I have to pay a fine. This has been a huge loss.
这还不简单，我演示给你看啊。
眼前的男性趴在地上，指了指排行榜上的队伍名称，又指了指自己。
The man before you crouches on all fours, points at the squad's name on the leaderboard, then points at himself.
升调表示这支队伍是接下来的对手，降调表示不值一提；发声急促表示赶紧动手，拖长尾音则是慢慢来。就这些。

A rising inflection indicates this squad is the next opponent, while a lower inflection means they're not worth mentioning. A hurried sound means to act quickly, while a drawn-out ending means to take it slow. That's all.
奇美拉能有多复杂的想法，嗨，就是唬唬人罢了。
How complex can chimeras' minds be? It's all just a bluff.
You paid the fine to the Garden yet?
还没呢，我也在发愁，要是迟迟拖着不交，是要被送上公民大会的。
Not yet. I'm at my wits' end too. If I keep dragging this out, I'll be sent to the citizens' assembly.
我再去云石天宫想想办法吧。说不定泡在浴池里，就能冒出什么新主意来。
I'll head to Marmoreal Palace and think of other ideas. Who knows, I might be struck by inspiration in the bath.
咳咳。我要宣布：由{NICKNAME}管理的「{TEXTJOIN#215}」，成为了新的「工作冠军」！
Ahem. I hereby announce: {TEXTJOIN#215} led by {NICKNAME}, is the new work champion!
获得这个奖好像不是很开心。
Winning this award doesn't exactly make me happy.
I am the ruler among workhorses!
正好所有人都在，就请获奖者来分享{F#她}{M#他}的成功经验吧——
Seeing as everyone's here, let's have the winner share {F#her}{M#his} success story!
能把这只名次垫底的小队，一路带到排行榜的首位，你究竟是有什么团队管理的秘诀呢，总不可能都是碰运气吧？
For a bottom-ranked squad to bulldoze its way to the top, what exactly is your secret to squad management? It couldn't have all been luck, right?
小灰。别藏着，快乐经过分享才会更加美味哦。
Little Gray, don't hide it. Happiness is sweeter when you share it.
我从最开始就在队伍里啦，但也不是很明白。
I've been with the squad from the start, but I never really understood either.
灰宝总是能找到让小奇美拉和睦相处，所有力都往一处使的办法，究竟是怎么做到的呢？给我们讲讲吧~
Grayie could always get the chimeras to get along with one another, ensuring that their efforts were all aligned. How did you even manage that? Tell us, please!
我同意大家的看法，奇美拉是种相当聪明的生物，很认真，也很有热情，愿意为奥赫玛的居民们解决麻烦。能取得如此成绩，都是它们的功劳。
I agree with everyone that chimeras are smart creatures — dedicated, passionate, and willing to solve troubles for Okhema's people. It is all thanks to their efforts that we've achieved such success.
但就像人类那样，奇美拉也有自己的性格与工作习惯。作为管理员，最重要的并非是催促它们干活，而是要找到最适合团队，适合每个成员的协作方式。

But just like humans, chimeras have their own personalities and work habits. As their administrator, the most important thing is not to rush them, but to find the squad with the best fit, and the best way to maximize their teamwork.
再差劲的奇美拉，也会有属于它的位置。谢谢。
Even the worst chimeras have their own roles to play. Thank you.
这是…属于理性的胜利！自由放任解决不了问题，只有在*充分*管理下的团队才能超越生物的极限。
This is... a victory that belongs to reason! A laissez-faire attitude won't cut it. Only a squad under ample management can surpass the limits of all life.
请相信，这一切真的值得。谢谢。
Please believe that everything is truly worth it. Thank you.
大家还记得我提出的第一个队名方案吗？那就是——开拓者说的都对！
Everyone still remember the first squad name I suggested? It was: The Trailblazer is always right!
This is my secret. Thank you.
哎，这群小家伙对我都没这么热情。掏出你的留影石机，和可爱的奇美拉拍个合照吧。
*sigh* These little ones aren't even that cushy with me. All right, take your photostone out and snap a group shot with these cuddly chimeras.
Get closer, everyone, eyes over here...
得到了珍贵的合影。尽管持续工作了这么长时间，照片里的小奇美拉依旧笑得很开心。
You obtained a precious group photo. Despite your prolonged work hours, the little chimera in the photo is laughing happily.
So cute... I want to take it home!
你才刚成为管理员，很多事都不熟悉，就把目标放低点。我想想…<color=#dbc291ff>以第七名的队伍</color>为对手怎么样？

You just became an administrator, and aren't familiar with many matters, so you should lower your expectations. Let's see... How about setting the <color=#dbc291ff>seventh-ranked squad</color> as a goal to catch up with?
工作成绩达到这个标准才算是合格，先努力保住你的小队吧。
Our work performance must attain this standard to be considered acceptable. Let's just focus on keeping your squad together first.
Isn't this moving a bit too fast?
…又不是要告别，至于这么舍不得吗？
It's not like we're saying goodbye. Why so reluctant?
好了。你已经是个成熟的管理员，该学会自己去找些工作了。生命花园为你的队伍准备了些难度更高的委托，有空的话，就去看看吧。

Well, you're a fully-fledged administrator now. It's time to seek out work on your own. The Garden of Life has some more challenging assignments ready for your squad. Check them out when you have time.
嗷呜…就是，怎么还要工作嗷呜！
Awoo... Um, why do we still have to work awoo!
不管，奇美拉现在就要放假！
Nope, chimeras are on vacation, starting now!
放假！下班！您就是世界上最好的管理员嗷呜，蹭蹭——
Holiday! Finishing work! You're the best administrator in the world, awoo! *rub rub*
嗯。奇美拉忙碌了这么久，当然该好好休息下，那些委托在你有兴趣的时候来处理就好。
Of course. After all the hard work, the chimeras have earned some rest. The assignments can wait until you're ready.
最重要的…别忘了多陪陪这些小家伙呀。
Just remember... don't forget to spend more time with these little ones.
经过一番紧张刺激的测试，你正式成为了差分宇宙的头号贵宾。
After a bout of intense, thrilling tests, you have officially become the most esteemed guest of the Divergent Universe.
但人生在世，总会有千奇百怪的原因，让你和天才们天各一方，譬如——现在。
But in our vast existences, there will be countless peculiar twists of fate that separate you from the geniuses of the Cosmos — like right now, for example.
当然，也可能是不久后的将来。
Of course, it may also be a moment in the near future.
果然，即使有差分宇宙的支持，靠这点忆质的残渣就想构建翁法罗斯的模型，还是太勉强了。
As expected, even with the support of the Divergent Universe, trying to construct a model of Amphoreus from these mere scraps of memoria is still a bit of a stretch.
无中生有历来是迷思的做派，在「智识」的道路上，任何结论都应当有据可循。
Making something from nothing has always been Mythus's hallmark. On the journey of Erudition, every conclusion instead must be grounded in evidence.
忆庭之镜映照的封闭世界…我对两位无名客现状的担忧又增长了<unbreak>12</unbreak>％。
A sealed world reflected in the Garden's mirror... My concern for the state of the two Nameless has just increased by another <unbreak>12%</unbreak>.
哼，到底是什么宝贝，能让三重命途裹得严严实实的？等把他俩从里面捞出来，我可得好好盘问盘问。
Hmph, what kind of wonder could possibly cover up three Paths in such a waterproof way? I've gotta thoroughly interrogate those two when I get them out of there.
你恍然回过神来，这里是「神悟树庭」。即使并非初次来访，你还是被眼前的光景所震慑。
You snap back to reality — this is the Grove of Epiphany. Even though it's not your first time here, the scenery before you still manages to leave you speechless in awe.
你还记得，自己之所以来到这儿，是为了追逐某个悠远的声音。
You still remember that you came here to pursue that distant voice.
"{F#Young lady}{M#Young man}, do you desire wisdom?"
来吧，我将给予你树庭中最伟大的宝藏。
Come. I shall bestow upon you the greatest treasure of the Grove.
嘿！你这年轻人，怎么说话的？
Hey! Watch your tongue, young one.
可惜，这里没有财富，但有比财富更珍贵的东西——知识。
Alas, there's no wealth to be here, though there is something much more precious — knowledge.
我乃是伟大的智者卡利多托斯，留下的一缕神智，作为「目录」的大图书管理员。
I am a strand of consciousness left behind by the Great Sage Calidorthos to manage this grand library, known as the Index.
Got anything in here that's adult-only?
你，你这，嘶——嘶，念在你尚有可教化的余地，姑且原谅你的愚钝。
Y—You! Hiss... I shall graciously overlook your foolishness, considering there is yet room for your education.
众所周知，友爱之馆的经卷数量庞大，而历代学者的研究更是多如艾格勒的睫毛，杂乱无章。

It is well known that the Library of Philia holds a vast collection of scrolls, and the research of scholars across generations is as numerous as Aquila's eyelashes — a massive mess of disordered, disorganized papers.
我和同僚们费尽毕生心血，才把它们成功编织进了圣树的记忆。
My colleagues and I poured our lives into weaving all that research into the Sacred Tree's memories.
借由{RUBY_B#理性之泰坦}瑟希斯{RUBY_E#}的根系和{RUBY_B#浪漫之泰坦}墨涅塔{RUBY_E#}的金丝，这些智慧得以向外延伸，覆盖树庭的各个角落，交错成承载知识的网络。

Through {RUBY_B#Reason Titan}Cerces'{RUBY_E#} roots and {RUBY_B#Romance Titan}Mnestia's{RUBY_E#} golden threads, this wisdom has been able to extend outward, enveloping every corner of the Grove, interwoven into a network that bears knowledge.
只要心怀对泰坦的敬畏，任何人都能通过触碰它，浏览经卷，交流学术，同历代先贤乃至瑟希斯留下的知识产生共鸣。
So long as one holds reverence for the Titans, any may touch it, peruse its scrolls, engage in discourse, and resonate with the knowledge left behind by sages of old or even those left by Cerces.
You folks surf the net too?
受黑潮的侵蚀，地下的网络逐渐坏死，真正保留下来的，也只有些许残卷。
Corrupted by the black tide, the underground network is slowly decaying. What remains is nothing more than scattered remnants of certain scrolls.
但功夫不负有心人，我终归还是等到了可以托付的继承者。
But perseverance rewards the steadfast. In the end, I have found a successor to whom I can entrust this place.
I'm not it. Stop spouting nonsense.
来不及拒绝，一道炫目的光辉便渗入你的思维，将你的神识摄入盘根错节的根系当中。
Before you can refuse, a blinding radiance soaks into your thoughts, encompassing your soul essence into the labyrinthine root system.
你睁开眼，不敢相信眼前的场景。
You open your eyes, barely able to believe the sight before you.
我想测差分宇宙想出幻觉了？
I wanted to test the Divergent Universe so much that I've started to hallucinate?
老夫果然没看错人，不过是从记忆中采撷的一隅，竟有传说中那僭主的天舟一般的气派。
Indeed, I was not mistaken in my judgment. It is but a mere shard drawn from memory's depths, yet it bears the majesty of an astral vessel, akin to the tyrant's fabled skyship.
正所谓「美德即知识」，「德性」是智慧的起源，也是智慧的终点。
As the saying goes, "virtue is knowledge" — virtue is wisdom's origin and finale.
这里收集了翁法罗斯古往今来的神话和历史，从众神和英雄身上，我们得以学会「什么是美德」。
Gathered here are Amphoreus' collective myths and histories throughout its entire existence. We learn what virtue is from gods to heroes.
同时，它也会汲取学者的过往，让人们「认识你自己」，打造出独属于他们的试炼。
At the same time, it draws from the past of scholars, allowing people to understand themselves, forging trials and tribulations unique only to them.
你的内心选择了这艘天舟， 构建出这番场景，作为踏上求索之旅的门扉。
Your heart has chosen the skyship, shaping this very scene as the gate to embark on a voyage of discovery.
So this is the Grove Art Online.
你甚至怀疑，下一刻就能跑出来一个模拟螺丝咕姆或者拟似黑塔。
You even find yourself doubting whether a simulated Screwllum or Herta might appear in the next moment.
总之，你的神识会在这里与传说同行，塑造你的德性，令你成为真正的智者，乃至，真正的英雄。
In any case, your soul essence will walk alongside legends here, shaping your virtue and forging you into a true sage — and, eventually, a true hero.
多说无益，年轻人，准备踏入知识的河流吧。
Excessive words are not necessary here, young one. Prepare to tread forth into the river of knowledge.
比我预想的还要快…只不过，「命途」、「祝福」、「方程」，你用来解读泰坦的方式，实在有些别致。
It is much more rapid than I anticipated... but Paths, Blessings, Equations — how you interpret the Titans are indeed unconventional.
Feels like you're trying to force a formula onto something that doesn't actually fit...
别管老三样能不能套公式解开泰坦的秘密，程序能跑不就得了？不要在意这些细节。
As long as the program works, it doesn't matter whether these three old variables can be formulaically used to unlock the Titans' secrets. We shouldn't get caught up in the details.
即使是泰坦，想要理解从未见过的事物，也是无稽之谈。唯有用已知解读未知，循序渐进，因材施教，才能达到教化的初衷。

Even the Titans cannot understand things they have never seen. The original purpose of enlightenment can only be reached through interpreting the unknown using the known, forging ahead steadfastly, and tailoring education according to an individual's nature.
既然树庭选择以这种方式将知识传授给你，那就一定有它的道理。
Since the Grove elects to impart knowledge to you through such a method, it must have its reasons.
况且，神话嘛，总会因凡人的无知，出现牵强和杜撰。
Moreover, these are myths after all — they are bound to be subject to mortal ignorance, giving rise to embellishments and fabrications.
At the end of the day, we're still doing tests at this very place.
或许，就像主角要配球棒一样，哪怕是模拟的，差分宇宙也和{TEXTJOIN#87}更配吧。
Maybe like how a protagonist must have a baseball bat, the Divergent Universe is much more compatible with {TEXTJOIN#87} even if it's a simulation.
泰坦神迹什么都能解释吗？
瑟希斯的智慧，我亲爱的朋友。
It's Cerces's wisdom, my dear friend.
对不起螺丝咕姆，我玩了盗版。
Sorry Screwllum, I'm playing a pirated version here.
没关系，等你把这里的记忆带给他，他一定会很高兴的。
It's fine. He'll be overjoyed when you bring the memories you made here to him.
在你的身上，我看到了许多和那些英雄相似的地方。
I see many traits similar to those heroes in you.
我不曾相信过顽劣的扎格列斯，但能为馆藏找到你这样一位继承人，也让我不得不赞美一番，那诡计的贼星带来的机运。
I've never put much faith in the unruly Zagreus, but I have to praise the opportunity bequeathed by that Thief Star for me to discover an heir such as you for the library's collection.
记住，「勿忘英雄与美德」。英雄并非超人的存在，那些所有人都能拥有的美德，才是锻造英雄的火焰。
Remember, "Never forget the heroes and their virtues." Heroes aren't extraordinary existences — Virtues that everyone can possess forge the flames of a hero.

天气也不好！下雪！下雨！下冰雹！阳光太好了！又冷又热，不冷不热！
The weather was awful too! Snow! Rain! Hail! Too much sunlight! Too cold, too hot, not cold, not hot!
赛场因素也很多，裁判会帮你们；场外因素也很多，观众不为我们喝彩！
There were so many outside factors — referees were helping you folks, and so many external factors — no one cheered for us!
...Alright, fine! A loss is a loss.
这次交手，我大方承认了，灰子你的确是个不能小瞧的对手——
This time, I'll admit it: Gray Mystery, you're definitely an opponent to be taken seriously.
我就勉为其难地说一声「恭喜」吧，冠军{F#小姐}{M#先生}。
I'll begrudgingly say "congratulations" to you, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} Champion.
As for me, it's time to make my exit.
Not so fast! Did you forget something?
我赢了，该把奖杯还我了吧？
I won, so it's time for you to return my trophy, right?
嚯，你这记性也太好了嘛，算啦！我就给你再表演一个，小小的魔术，看那里——
Whoa, your memory's on point. Fine, fine! Let me show you one last thing — a little magic trick. Look over there.
Why did the lights in the bath go out again?
*耳边悄悄话*嘿呀，灰子，你还真够执着的。
*whisper* Hey, Gray Mystery, you really don't let up, do you?
*耳边悄悄话*「奖杯」呢…我就还给你了。
*whisper* "The trophy"... I'll give it back to you.
*耳边悄悄话*荣誉归你，财富归我，我们俩彼此都不亏，对吧？
*whisper* Glory to you, but the riches are mine. We both win, right?
奖杯回来了！奖杯在泡泡身边，大家快看！赛飞儿她居然说到做到！
The trophy's back! The trophy's with Bubbles — everyone, look! Cipher actually kept her word!
嗷呜嗷呜…嗷？发生了什么，刚刚，一瞬间？
Awoo awoo... huh? What happened in that split second?
嗝…果然，是我们的「金海豹杯」，「金海豹杯」回到了冠军手下的王牌小「海豹」这里。
Burp... As expected, it's our Gold Seal Cup. The Gold Seal Cup has returned to the champion's ace little "seal."
Gold Seal Cup! Gold Seal Cup!
欢呼吧，公民们，{NICKNAME}为我们赢回了「金海豹杯」！{F#她}{M#他}是这份荣耀理所应当的拥有者！让我们再次恭喜——
Cheer, citizens! {NICKNAME} has brought the Gold Seal Cup back home for us! {F#She}{M#He} is the true and rightful bearer of this glory! Congratulations again!
多谢，真是多谢大家的支持，我们兄弟…从没想过这次的庆典能举办得这么热闹。
Thank you. Thank you all for your incredible support. We... never thought this celebration would be this lively.
不仅招揽来了这么多观众，还有这么多人气选手参与，最后还夺回了丢失的奖杯。
Not only did we attract so many spectators, but so many popular competitors joined in, and in the end, we managed to reclaim the lost trophy.
嗝~我想为这次欢宴留下，珍藏的纪念！希望我们的冠军{NICKNAME}捧上奖杯，与来客们一起合影，嗝——
Burp~ I want to leave a lasting memory of this celebration! I hope our champion {NICKNAME} will hold up the trophy and take a photo with our guests. Burp—
Make sure I look good in the shot!
Don't drink too much or your hand will be shaking!
嗝~放心吧，等你准备好了，就带上奖杯来找我们兄弟吧！
Burp~ Don't worry. When you're ready, just bring the trophy and come find us!
听说合影又要喊一遍，豹豹…扑通…？
I heard we're shouting for the group photo again, seal seal... splash...?
小白居然还没念对，是「豹豹碰碰大作战」啦！
Snowy still didn't get it right, it's Seal Slammers!
小白，难道是想说，一只豹豹跳进水，扑通？
Snowy, do you mean one seal jumps into the water, splash?
两只豹豹跳进水，扑通扑通？
Two seals jump into the water, splish-splash?
诶？是缇宁说话把大家冻住了吗？
Eh? Did Trinnon's words freeze everyone in place?
比赛结束了，泡泡，还要回生命花园吗？
The competition is over. Do I still need to go back to the Garden of Life?
你是怎么想的呢？泡泡。想要跟灰宝一起，还是想和小奇美拉们一起，你自己来决定。
What's your decision, Bubbles? Do you want to team up with Grayie, or would you prefer to stick with the little chimeras? It's your call.
嗷呜！泡泡已经能和其他小奇美拉和平相处了，但我想留在{NICKNAME}的战队里！
Awoo! Bubbles can already get along with the other little chimeras just fine, but I want to stay with {NICKNAME}'s team!
我就知道，灰宝是泡泡心中真正的「大英雄」。
I knew it. Grayie is the true great hero in Bubbles' heart.
咳…因为泡泡精力旺盛而烦恼的奇美拉饲养员们，也可以悄悄松口气了。
Ahem... The chimera caretakers who've been troubled by Bubbles' boundless energy can finally let out a sigh of relief.
我…到底是没赶上最后的比赛啊，咳咳……
I... I really missed the final match, didn't I? Ahem..
吾师，我已经有了新的对策。
Master, I've come up with a new strategy.
下次，我要邀请他们去高温浴池，那里才是我们悬锋人的主场。
Next time, I'll invite them to the high-temperature bath. That's us Kremnoans' true home turf.
Bold and full of potential! What a clever plan!
冠军你来啦！我想要一张合照……
Champion, you've arrived! I'd love a photo with you...
你闭嘴吧。{NICKNAME}，小心这家伙，和他合照后，你就会变成「超级英雄」沐浴皂的代言人了。
Shut up. {NICKNAME}, be careful with this one. After a photo with him, you'll end up as the ambassador for Superhero Shower Soap.
伴着水漫琴舒缓的节奏，浴场里传来了吟游诗人的歌声…
The soothing rhythm of the water lyre blended with the voice of the bard in the bath...
「赐我纯金的瓯盏，赐我比金子更珍贵的佳酿…」
"Grant me a golden wine cup, and a brew more precious than gold..."
「赐我此日的欢乐，使我忘记昨日的忧愁…」
"Grant me today's joy, so I may forget the sorrows of yesterday..."
嗝~我数一二三，请大家一起喊「豹豹碰碰大作战」！
Burp, I'll count to three, and everyone shouts with me: "Seal Slammers"!
好啦！全部就位，都准备好了吗？
Alright! Everyone in position, are you all ready?
「铭记命运吧，尽管健忘的神偶尔也会忘记它，以此来捉弄世人…」
"Remember fate, though even the gods occasionally forget it to play tricks on the world..."
「欢歌肆饮吧，让那宁静与悲哀的归塞纳托斯，热情与欢笑的归法吉娜。」
"Sing and drink with abandon. Return the quiet sorrows to Thanatos, and let the passion and laughter of Phagousa fill the air."
对了！其实，我们的比赛正式名字是「豹豹碰碰好玩到不行的水上小海豹冲撞对战」…终于找到机会和大家再说一遍了。
Oh, and by the way! The official name of our competition is "So Dang Fun Seal Bumping Duel Challenge Seal Slammers"... finally got the chance to say it again.
与此同时，在奥赫玛某处……
At the same time, somewhere in Okhema...
哦？是你啊，裁缝女，等到这时候才出声。不会是现在想起来要抓我吧？
Oh? It's you, seamstress. You've waited for quite a while before speaking. Don't tell me that you've just remembered to catch me now.
…不惜编造出所谓的预言梦，也要在众目睽睽之下偷走「金海豹杯」，给我个理由。
...You fabricated a prophetic dream just to steal the Gold Seal Cup before everyone's eyes. Tell me why.
你是在问一个著名小偷为什么要偷东西？所以，你到底在期待什么答案？
You're asking why a notorious thief is stealing? What kind of answer are you expecting?
想偷你花重金打造的宝贝，还需要理由吗？那么大的一个金灿灿的东西，多诱人哪！我贼心不死，跃跃欲试，不行吗？
Do I need a reason to steal your precious treasure? A huge sparkling gold object like this, what a temptation! Old habits die hard and there's no harm in trying, right?
你还是和从前一个德行，嗯，现在我已经确定了。
You're still the same as before. Hmm, now I'm sure.
…这还需要「怪盗的品行测试」吗？我早就知道你在用奖杯钓鱼执法了！你不也和从前一样？还是那么多弯弯绕绕的手段……
...Do you really need to test a thief's virtue? I already knew that you were baiting me with the trophy! You haven't changed at all either. Still the same with your elusive methods...
哎，你就坦率一点吧，裁缝女。你其实是在担心，经过千年时光，我跟你一样慢慢流失了人性，变成所谓「非人非神」的怪物了吧？
Ah, just be honest, seamstress. You're worried about whether I've slowly lost my humanity after a millennium, and whether I've also become a monster "neither human nor divine" just like you.
…千年来，我与吾师相伴时间更多，总能互相看顾。而你，赛法利娅，消失了那么久，我总得想些办法，搞清楚你是否也承受着心力磨损的苦楚……

...In my thousand years, I've spent a long time with my teacher, taking care of one another. Yet, Cifera, you've disappeared for a long time. I had to find a way to figure out if you were also suffering as your spirit wore away.
别说这些，听着怪肉麻的！
Enough with all this! How mushy!
很可惜，我从来就没变。千年前我会偷走你的宝贝，千年后我大发慈悲，照偷不误。
What a pity that I haven't changed at all! I would steal from you a thousand years ago, and rejoice! I would still steal from you a thousand years later.
我可是活得比你有滋有味多了！你要是有空关心我，不如多关心关心你自己吧！
I lead a far more exciting life than you! If you've got the time to worry about me, worry about yourself instead!
戳到痛处了？算了，我也给你交个底吧——
Did I hit a nerve? Forget it, I'll be honest with you —
我想近距离交个手，探一探这位{NICKNAME}到底是个什么样的人，怎么就搅和到了你的逐火大业里，让你不惜花重金也要找我出手帮忙。
I want to fight {NICKNAME} up close and find out what kind of person {F#she}{M#he} is. How did {F#she}{M#he} meddle with your Flame-Chase cause and get you to spend a fortune for my help?
呵，那败在{F#她}{M#他}手中的怪盗大人，现在有结论了吗？
Hah, then pray tell, master thief who was defeated by {F#her}{M#him}. What's your conclusion?
哼哼，{NICKNAME}嘛，算是个有趣的{F#女孩}{M#男孩}。
——不过，我只是输了比赛，可没承认自己真的败了。
— But I've only lost the competition. I didn't admit that I had been truly defeated.
嗯？什么意思？你还回去的奖杯……
Hmm? What does that mean? Are you saying the trophy that you returned...
还的到底是真品还是仿品，你自己猜一猜喽！
Is it real or counterfeit? Take a guess for yourself!
小灰，你来啦！*我们*想问问你，最近有没有做什么<color=#dbc291ff>特别的梦</color>呢？
Little Gray, you're here! We want to ask you — have you had any... special dreams lately?
我睡眠质量好，一般不做梦。
I sleep well, so I don't usually dream.
上次旅行刚做完「太一之梦」。
I just had the "Ena's Dream" during my last trip.
换句话说，到奥赫玛之后没怎么做梦？
So, you haven't had any dreams since arriving in Okhema?
阿雅和*我们*都担心，小灰接受了{RUBY_B#岁月之泰坦}欧洛尼斯{RUBY_E#}的祝福后，会不会得到具有启示作用的<color=#dbc291ff>预言梦</color>。
We and Agy are worried that after receiving the blessing of {RUBY_B#Time Titan}Oronyx{RUBY_E#}, you might have had some prophetic dreams.
Prophetic dreams? What is a "prophetic dream"?
举个例子，奥赫玛历史上曾有位联军统帅做过一个梦：梦见一只雄鹰飞来，抓起了母鹿和它的幼崽，最后这只雄鹰却被乌鸦攻击，并被啄死。

For example, in Okhema's history, there was a general of the alliance who once had a dream: In the dream, an eagle swooped down, and caught a doe and her fawn, but was attacked and pecked to death by crows in the end.
而后他才知道那是一场有关战争的<color=#dbc291ff>预言</color>——雄鹰代表联军，母鹿和幼崽代表敌人，乌鸦则象征着战争的残酷和无常。

After that, he realized that dream was a <color=#dbc291ff>prophecy</color> about the war. The eagle represented the allied forces, the doe and her fawn represented the enemies and their allies, and the crows symbolized the cruelty and unpredictability of war.
那是一场战争进程和结局的<color=#dbc291ff>预言</color>。雄鹰代表着联军，母鹿和幼崽代表敌人及其盟友，乌鸦则象征着战争的残酷和不确定性。

That dream was a <color=#dbc291ff>prophecy</color> of the course and outcome of a war. The eagle represented the allied forces, the doe and her fawn represented the enemies and their allies, and the crows symbolized the cruelty and unpredictability of war.
梦中一切，都在现实中实现了…如果小灰有过类似的梦境，要千万留意呀。
Everything in the dream came true in reality... If you had a similar dream, Little Gray, you should pay close attention.
小灰没有印象，那我们就不担心了。阿雅，既然一切如常，该说说我们的正事了吧？
Little Gray doesn't remember anything, so we won't worry. Agy, since everything is fine, let's talk shop, shall we?
这是一件郑重的事情，一年的欢喜月又到了——信仰{RUBY_B#法吉娜}欢宴之神{RUBY_E#}的密底斯泰歇人打算在三季海庭举办一场<color=#dbc291ff>水上狂欢节</color>。

This is serious business. It's the Month of Joy once again — followers of {RUBY_B#Phagousa}the God of Banquets{RUBY_E#} from Mythemis are planning to hold a <color=#dbc291ff>Water Carnival</color> at the Court of Seasons.
名字叫作…<color=#dbc291ff>「豹豹碰碰大作战」</color>。
我以奥赫玛「金织」的名义，托大工匠哈托努斯打造了一樽<color=#dbc291ff>「金海豹杯」</color>，作为比赛胜者的奖赏——
By the name of the "Goldweaver" of Okhema, I've commissioned the Grand Craftsman Chartonus to create a <color=#dbc291ff>"Gold Seal Cup"</color> to be awarded to the winner of the competition —
这是一场盛会，也许我们的客人会感兴趣？
This is a grand event. Perhaps our distinguished guest might be interested?
Sounds like I've asked the right person.
阿格莱雅大人发动了钞能力！
Lady Aglaea uses her kaching superpower again!
一点心意，只能算是东道主的薄礼。
It's a small token. Just a humble gesture from the host.
又是一堆小解谜？我不想玩啊！
Another bunch of puzzle minigames? I'm not in the mood for that!
放心，这并非是解谜，而是竞赛。
Don't worry. This isn't a puzzle — it's a competition.
尽管远方的黑潮尚在威胁，但我们也希望奥赫玛的公民们，能借着比赛，畅快地宣泄心中压抑已久的情绪。
Even though the threat of black tide still looms, we hope that the citizens of Okhema can use this competition to release the pent-up emotions they've been holding in for so long.
作为黄金裔的贵客，我也希望你能尽情借此深入领略一番奥赫玛的风情。
As the esteemed guest of the Chrysos Heirs, I hope you can immerse yourself into the culture of Okhema with this experience.
如果小灰感兴趣的话，明天就去浴场报名比赛吧。
If Little Gray is interested, sign up at the baths tomorrow.
时间也不早了，希望小灰有个好梦。*我们*告辞了，期待明天和你赛场见哦！
It's getting late. Hope you have a good dream tonight, Little Gray. We'll take our leave now. See you at the venue tomorrow!
So the real plot unfolds now?
虽然这个名字，还真是法吉娜信徒的品味，不过，阿雅给的奖励可是很郑！重！的哦！
Though that name really does have the taste of Phagousa's disciples, the reward from Agy is quite... serious!
阳光有些刺眼，不过…你早有准备——眼罩，正是为了此刻而存在的。
The sun is a bit blinding, but... you came prepared — your eye mask is just for this moment.
晚安，希望今晚能有<color=#dbc291ff>预言梦</color>。
Good night, and maybe there will be a <color=#dbc291ff>prophetic dream</color> tonight.
<unbreak>也许是借由阿格莱雅和缇宝的暗示，你的*预言梦*——它来了。</unbreak>
Perhaps influenced by the hints from Aglaea and Tribbie, your prophetic dream has arrived.
我是欢宴与海洋之泰坦，满溢之杯，法吉娜。我正在呼唤你，{NICKNAME}。
I am Phagousa, the Titan of Banquets and Oceans, Chalice of Plenty. I am calling you, {NICKNAME}.
哎，什么情况？你给我干哪儿来了，这还是我的浴宫吗？
Huh, what's going on? Where did you take me? Is this still my bath chamber?
这，是你的<color=#dbc291ff>预言梦</color>。而你{NICKNAME}，是「预言之子」。
This is your <color=#dbc291ff>prophetic dream</color>. And you, {NICKNAME}, are the "Child of Prophecy."
看看你的周围吧。一夜之间，奥赫玛的人类水平下降了一万倍——
Look around. In one night, the humans in Okhema have decreased their capacities by ten thousandfold—
全人类都退化成了小海豹，就连黄金裔们也不能幸免。
All humans have regressed into baby seals. Even the Chrysos Heirs are not spared.
你要肩负起「预言之子」的责任，你要去拯救他们。
You must take up the responsibility of the Child of Prophecy. You must save them.
这样的危机是不是有点激进了？
Isn't this crisis a little extreme?
翁法罗斯的危机从来不止于一种。
The crisis of Amphoreus is never just one thing.
那人类能是小海豹进化来的吗？
Then are humans evolved from baby seals?
翁法罗斯可没有那么严谨的进化论。
Amphoreus doesn't care about such strict theories of evolution.
所以，为什么法吉娜会找上我？
So, why did you come to me, Phagousa?
那是因为，你是能够拯救所有小海豹的「预言之子」。
Because you are the Child of Prophecy who can save all the baby seals.
<color=#dbc291ff>而你要去参加「豹豹碰碰大作战」，并获得最终的冠军奖杯。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>And you must take part in Seal Slammers and win the final trophy.</color>
如此一来，所有的人类，所有的{RUBY_B#法吉娜圣兽}小海豹{RUBY_E#}才会得到拯救。
Only then will all the humans and all the {RUBY_B#Sacred Beasts of Phagousa}baby seals{RUBY_E#} be saved.
…不信任我的预言吗？你若心存猜疑，小海豹的危机终将到来。我，在此预言——
...You don't believe in my prophecy? If you keep up your doubts and hesitations, the baby seal crisis will become inevitable. I hereby prophesize —
<color=#eb4d3dff>你若不能取得奖杯，你将永远变成小海豹。</color>
<color=#eb4d3dff>If you don't win the trophy, you will turn into a baby seal and stay that way forever.</color>
怎么还有条失败路线的预言？
How can there be a prophecy for the bad end?
总得有一条预言要实现，这样比较严谨。
There has to be one prophecy that will come true — that's more rigorous.
…感觉成为一只小海豹也不错。
...Becoming a baby seal doesn't seem that bad.
倘若预言也不能使你警醒起来，我会让你在梦里切身体会一番。
If even the prophecy doesn't alarm you, then I'll make you experience it in the dream.
突然你感觉像是从高处摔了下来，掉在了地面上。
Suddenly, you feel like you're falling from a great height, crashing onto the ground.
o((◉ω◉ ! )o「救命！我怎么变成海豹了？！」)∋
o((◉ω◉ ! )o "Help! Why did I turn into a seal!?" )∋
现在，你是否能够深刻理解*这迫在眉睫的危机*呢？
Now, do you understand the imminent danger?
You haven't understood it at all.
你若失败，你会变成小海豹，而我无法保证你会变成怎样的小海豹——
If you fail, you'll become a baby seal, and I can't guarantee what kind of baby seal you'll turn into.
你变成这样活蹦乱跳、会说会笑的小海豹，基础概率是<unbreak>0.6%</unbreak>。
The base chance of you turning into a lively, speaking, and laughing baby seal is <unbreak>0.6%</unbreak>.
而你变成那些<color=#eb4d3dff>不会说不会笑、摆在货架上的小海豹</color>，基础概率是<color=#eb4d3dff><unbreak>99.4%</unbreak></color>。
However, the base chance of you turning into an <color=#eb4d3dff>inert and passive baby seal for display on the shelves</color> is <color=#eb4d3dff><unbreak>99.4%</unbreak></color>.
…我们闲聊太久了，快看！你的敌人已经来了！
...We've spent too long chit-chatting. Look, your enemy is here!
Baby seals, your end is neigh!
那是迫害海豹王国的邪恶统领——黑厄！
That's Pie-non — the evil mastermind trying to bring down the Seal Kingdom!
我就是黑厄，看啊！我与这些归降于我的小海豹叛徒们，组成了「黑厄势力」！
I am Pie-non. Behold my legion of baby seal turncoats! Together, we are Pie-non's Legion!
o((^'ω´^ )o「吼吼吼，臣服于我们黑厄大人吧」)∋
