Don't insult my character. I have nothing to do with this! I'm only interested in shiny things that make jingly noises. Any mischief that doesn't pay well is beneath me.
小飞儿确实是这个性格，阿雅说这就叫「懒」。
True. That's how Little Ciphy is. Agy said this is called "being lazy."
这怎么叫「懒」呢，这叫有计划有选择…缇宝阿姐等你长大以后就明白了。
How is this considered "lazy"? This is being strategic and having good judgment... Big sis Tribbie, you'll understand when you grow up.
这么说吧，我确实注意到有人干坏事了。既然是拿钱办事，需要我把人抓过来吗？
Tell you what — I did notice someone doing something they shouldn't. Since you're a paying customer, do you need me to catch them for you?
小飞儿怎么突然这么好心？
Little Ciphy found kindness in her heart?
这是好心吗？这是我收了钱。
难道不用我亲自跑图去抓？
I don't have to leg it myself this time?
原来你是喜欢跑图的那种类型啊？
我来给大家都节约点时间吧。别眨眼，猫猫快递，马上就寄——
I'll save some time for everyone. Don't blink, the cat express will be right back—
一枚硬币高高抛起，赛飞儿消失了。片刻后，她接住了正在下落的硬币，并带回了…
A coin was tossed high in the air, and Cipher disappeared. After a moment, she caught the falling coin and brought it back...
钱，我拿到了；人，我抓住了。
I got my money, and here's your baddie.
诶？！什、什么情况？我刚才…是在这里吗？
Wh—What!? What's going on? Was I here just now?
啊，缇宝大人！这是在…「豹豹碰碰大作战」？
Oh, Lady Tribbie! You're doing the... Seal Slammers, yes?
*我们*听说{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}会平等地惩罚每个毁坏宴会的家伙，对于这一点，你没有什么要说的吗？
We heard that {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa{RUBY_E#} punishes every party spoiler without prejudice. Do you have anything to say on this point?
对不起！我…我承认，我在浴盐里萃入了木屑、煤渣…黑夏果的汁水，把它们倒进了浴池。
I'm sorry! I... I confess. I mixed the wood shavings, coal dust, and juice from black summer berries into the bath salts. Then I poured it all into the waters.
可、可我这么做是有原因的——
B—But I did that for a reason!
我做了一个预言梦！但是梦的内容我不能说，打死我也不说……
I had a prophetic dream! But I can't say what it was, no matter how much you threaten me...
缇宝阿姐别为难他了，毕竟…我也做了一个预言梦，而且，也不能说出预言的内容。
Big sis, go easy on him. I... also had a prophetic dream, of which I can't speak about.
呵呵，看来灰子你也做了一个不能说的那种预言梦吧。
Hah. Looks like Gray Mystery is in the same boat concerning this unspeakable dream.
预言…难道说，你是因为预言，才指名要和我组队吗……
A prophecy... Is that why you specifically wanted to team up with me?
请不要问得太仔细了，泡泡。
Please, Bubbles. I can't say more.
当然是因为泡泡实力强大啊…
It's because Bubbles is super strong, obviously.
可能是因为泡泡戴着墨镜，你看不出来，它的眼中划过了一丝阴翳。
Maybe it's the sunglasses, but you missed the brief gloom that crossed Bubbles' eyes.
既是如此，*我们*也不方便细问，如果有可以讲出口的，请一定要告诉*我们*。
If that's the case, then we won't pursue it. However, if there's anything you can share, please do tell us.
走了走了！我们有缘再见了。不过嘛，有言在先——
Well then, job's done! We'll see each other when we see each other again. There's one last thing I want to say, though —
我可不会被*不讲道理的预言*左右，所以…我不会帮你的哟，灰子！
I certainly won't get dragged around by some arbitrary prophecy. So... you're on your own with this one, Gray Mystery!
短暂的休赛期结束，浴池被清理干净，受到影响的小海豹也得到了照顾。
The short break has ended. The baths are cleaned, and the affected baby seals are cared for.
感谢大家宽容理解！低温浴池已经恢复了原样，我们的比赛，现在继续——
Thank you all for your patience and understanding! The cold bath is restored, and now let's continue with the tournament —
About time! I'm pumped and ready.
Can I have five more minutes?
{NICKNAME}选手，你可来了。你听说了吗？最近{RUBY_B#海洋之泰坦}法吉娜{RUBY_E#}的预言被传得沸沸扬扬的，说着什么，「金杯终破碎，无人成冠军」。
{NICKNAME}, you're finally back. Did you hear? Lately, {RUBY_B#Ocean Titan}Phagousa's{RUBY_E#} prophecy has been making waves. It went something like, "the golden trophy shatters with no champion."
不摆出来，更容易引起怀疑。
It's more likely to raise suspicions if you don't...
看不到奖杯，我就不比赛了。
If I can't see the trophy, I'm going to quit the competition.
按照*我们*的想法，与其为预言担惊受怕，不如堂堂正正地摆出来。退一万步，还有阿雅的金线呢！
According to our idea, instead of being worried and afraid of the prophecy, display it openly. If all else fails, we still have Agy's golden thread!
好，就听缇宝大人的。淘汰赛的时候，我们就拿出来。
Very well, if that is what Lady Tribbie wishes. Then we'll reveal it during the elimination rounds.
别管什么预言了，{NICKNAME}选手，你的比赛我都看了，你很有才华和实力。
Forget the prophecy, I watched all of your matches, {NICKNAME}. You have true talent and skill.
现在，<color=#dbc291ff>「豹豹碰碰大作战•究极进化版」</color>对你正式开放了。
So now, the <color=#dbc291ff>Seal Slammers: Ultimate Evolution</color> is officially open to you.
「豹豹碰碰大作战」是出于欢乐的目的，让所有人都能享受小海豹冲撞的乐趣，换言之——轻轻松松没有压力。
Seal Slammers is designed so that everyone can enjoy the fun of bumping baby seals together. In other words, it's a stress-free experience.
「豹豹碰碰大作战•究极进化版」则是精心设计的挑战，每一关对战的小海豹都由大哥我亲自搭配，还有不同的难度等级，适合真正的强者。

Seal Slammers: Ultimate Evolution, however, includes carefully crafted challenges. I've arranged the baby seal lineup for each stage by hand, complete with an array of difficulties. A challenge for true masters.
Don't I need <unbreak>20</unbreak> baby seals for that?
大哥不是拘泥于规则的人，既然你通过了前面的考验，拥有多少只小海豹已经不重要了。
I'm not so stubborn about the rules. Since you've already passed the previous challenges, it hardly matters how many baby seals you have.
So I just need to talk to you?
没错，你要是对自己的实力有自信，来浴场找我吧。
That's right. If you're confident about your skills, come find me at the baths.
淘汰赛就要开始了。不过，如果你有空，我们也可以去挑战一下阿水菲斯！你来决定。
The elimination rounds are about to begin, but if you have time to spare, we can also try challenging Aquafis. The decision is yours!
啊？原来{NICKNAME}早就听说这个预言了。
Ah? So {NICKNAME} already knows about the prophecy?
是吗？哈哈，还是第一次听说。
Really? Haha, first time I've heard this.
我们一直在纠结，要不要把「金海豹杯」摆出来。浴场里人多眼杂的，万一它像预言里那样发生什么意外，可怎么办？
We've been debating whether we should display the Gold Seal Cup. It's so crowded in the baths. What if something happens to it like the prophecy says?
观众们果然很在意奖杯呢！
As expected, the audience is very interested in the trophy!
但也有不少观众在质疑，怎么一直没有看到奖杯，是不是真的破碎了。
However, many in the audience are asking why they haven't seen the trophy yet, wondering if it's really shattered.
哇！小灰这么笃信自己能拿冠军吗？
Wow! Is Little Gray that sure about winning the championship?
该死！上了小贼的当。拜托了，{NICKNAME}，一定要把达利安的徽章追回来啊！
Darn it! I fell for the sneaky thief's trick. Please, {NICKNAME}, you've got to get Dorian's badge back!
哎哟哎哟，疼、疼，慢点。算您厉害！
Oh no, oh no, it hurts, slow down. Fine, you win, you're amazing!
可这枚徽章不巧被我吞进肚子里了，我努努力应该能排出来。
Unfortunately, I've swallowed the badge. If I try hard enough, I should be able to get it out.
不过，得给我点时间吧——至少需要五个工作日！
But I'll need some time — at least five business days!
Don't say that, it's downright disgusting...
徽章咱不要了，直接比赛吧。
Forget the badge, let's just get to the competition.
不错，咱们也不是那种规矩死板的比赛，达利安选手，准备开始比赛吧？
Well, we're not the type of competition to stick strictly to the rules. Contestant Dorian, are you ready to begin?
So if you forfeit, does that mean I win?
You can't escape, you can't escape...
我希望出战选手，<color=#dbc291ff>更换为巴特鲁斯</color>。
I'd like to substitute the contestant, <color=#dbc291ff>replace with Bartholos</color>.
达利安选手！这不是正中下怀了吗？
Dorian! Isn't this just what they were hoping for?
偶遇{NICKNAME}，强如怪物，我自知拼尽全力，无法战胜。
I ran into {NICKNAME}, as strong as a beast. I know even if I tried my best, I can't win.
巴特鲁斯，你要为我，偷下胜利，作为补偿。
Bartholos, take the victory for me, as my compensation.
桀桀桀，不就是怕自己输得太丢份，想让我替你赢一场吗？
Hehehe, you're just afraid of losing face and want me to win it for you, huh?
话都说到这个份上了，那我——参加比赛就是了。
Well, since you've made it so clear, then I'll — just enter the competition.
那就比吧，反正都是手下败将。
Let's fight then. After all, you'll all lose to me.
可恶，是新的小海豹指挥官。
Darn, it's the new baby seal commander.
我不同意，我并非无法战胜！
…别谦虚了，{NICKNAME}选手，恐怕巴特鲁斯也未必能让你使出全力。
...Don't be humble, {NICKNAME}. Even Bartholos might not be able to bring out your full power.
既然征得双方同意，我们就破例一次，临时更换比赛选手，让诸位尽兴！
Since both sides agree, we'll make an exception this time and temporarily swap the contestants, so everyone can have a good time!
大地兽席地而坐。如同沉默的大地一般，它一言不发。
The dromas sits motionless, as silent as the earth itself, saying nothing.
据说这是它「非暴力、不合作」的抗议方式。
It's said to be its way of protesting, "non-violence, non-cooperation."
我有红土饲料，你能离开吗？
I've got some Redsoil Feed, could you leave now?
哎呀呀，据说因为「山之民」达利安被「贼灵」替代了，大地兽感到不满，特来抗议哪！
Ah, they say that because Dorian, the Mountain Dweller, was replaced by the Spirithief, the dromas is upset and has come to protest!
特地选在休赛期出现，也算是比较友善的抗议吧。
It chose the off-season to make its appearance, which is a relatively friendly form of protest, I suppose.
如果*我们*没猜错…这就是预言中的「巨兽卧沉渊」吧？
If we're not mistaken... this is the "giant beast rests in the abyss" mentioned in the prophecy, right?
有请预言专家缇宁大人！
Let's call on the prophecy expert, Lady Trinnon!
预言中提到「黑潮蚀清波」，浴池就被黑色浴盐污染了。
The prophecy said "black tide muddles clear waters," and the bath had been tainted with black bath salts.
预言中提到「巨兽卧沉渊」，大地兽就出现在这里了。
It mentioned "giant beast rests in the abyss," and here the dromas stands before us.
This... this prophecy feels too real!
这是因为，人心会被预言煽动，把事情推向「当众预言成真」的结果。
That's because the prophecy has stirred the people's hearts, causing things to incline toward "the prophecy fulfilling itself before everyone's eyes."
在翁法罗斯的历史里，也有过太多无论预言真假，都可能造成「真实的冲突」的事情。
In Amphoreus's history, there were plenty of things that could cause "real conflicts," regardless if the prophecies were true or not.
我明白了，只要预言散播得足够广，无形之中就会有人去实现它，使它应验…？
I understand now. As long as the prophecy is spread far and wide, someone out there is bound to fulfill it, making it come true...?
这可怎么办？前面的两条已经依次应验，现在只差最后一条了——「金海豹杯」真的会碎掉吗？
What should we do? The two previous prophecies have already come true, there's only the last one left — will the Gold Seal Cup really be broken?
有裁缝女和缇宝阿姐两位半神坐镇，你们怕什么？
With our two demigods, the seamstress and big sis around, what are you afraid of?
感受到大家炽热的目光。
I can feel everyone's eager, burning stares.
各位，我有一个翁法罗斯梦！
Everyone, I have a vision of Amphoreus!
...Sorry, but I still can't share it.
那我就狠狠挠你胳肢窝，直到你讲出来……
Then I'll tickle you until you spill it...
请相信*我们*，你不会承受任何代价。
Please believe in us. We won't let you pay any price.
一番心理建设后，你将预言梦的全程讲了出来…然而，你并没有变成一只小海豹。
After some mental preparation, you explained the entire process of the prophetic dream... Yet, you didn't transform into a baby seal.
果然，变成小海豹的「代价」也是虚假的。但小灰会遇见奇美拉泡泡，和一位身手矫健的「游侠」，一同对抗金杯破碎的命运？
Of course, the "price" of becoming a baby seal is false too. However, will Little Gray meet Chimera Bubbles and a nimble "ranger," to defy the destiny of the breaking trophy?
嗷呜～尽管了解了{NICKNAME}不能说出口的原因，但现在泡泡心里还是很受伤……
Awoo~ Even though I now understand why {NICKNAME} can't speak of it, I still feel a little hurt inside...
我们可以悄悄替换掉奖杯！
We could secretly swap out the trophy!
直接把奖杯发给我如何？
How about just handing the trophy to me directly?
不，比赛的冠军还是得通过比赛决出。
No, the champion has to be crowned through the competition itself.
找个地方把奖杯藏起来吧。
Let's hide the trophy somewhere safe.
马上就是冠军赛了…不能一直藏下去。
The championship is almost here... we can't hide it forever.
不如我亲手将奖杯打碎吧。
What if I shatter the trophy myself?
别放弃啊，让我们再想想。
Don't give up just yet, let's brainstorm some more.
你们备好一个赝品奖杯，我用一瞬间的神速把真正的奖杯替换下来。这样一来，就算有人听信了假预言去搞破坏，也不知道破坏掉的是假的咯！

Prepare a fake trophy, and I'll use a single instant to switch it with the real trophy. That way, even if anyone believes the false prophecy and breaks the trophy, they won't know that they've broken a fake!
但前提是解除*裁缝女的金线*——它只信赖你们密底斯泰歇三兄弟呀！
But the issue is dispelling the seamstress's golden thread — it only listens to you three Mythemis brothers!
解除金线好说，不过奖杯的位置这么显眼，要是不想被人发现我们的动作……
Dispelling the golden thread is straightforward, but the trophy is so conspicuous — if we don't want anyone to notice what we're up to...
各位，泡泡有一个想法，既能把大家的注意力吸引过来，又能打破{NICKNAME}的预言梦。
Everyone, Bubbles has an idea, it'll draw everyone's attention and also break {NICKNAME}'s prophetic dream.
我好像猜到了…但是为什么？
I think I know why... but what's the reason?
Did I... did I do something wrong?
Bubbles, oh my dear Bubbles, don't go—!
You look at Bubbles, your expression complicated...
嗷呜，泡泡的决定绝不是临时起意，{NICKNAME}不必挽留了，希望你能好好利用……
Awoo... I definitely didn't just decide this on a whim, {NICKNAME}. No need to beg me to stay — hopefully you'll make good use of this chance...
太感人了！为了泡泡的良苦用心，我们举办一场隆重的转队发布会吧。赛飞儿大人，到时候我会准备好赝品，这个机会就交给你了。
How touching! In light of Bubbles's efforts, let's hold a grand press conference for the team transfer. Lady Cipher, I'll have prepared a replica by then. We'll leave the switch to you.
嗷呜…{NICKNAME}，我知道你有话要说，不如我们在发布会上聊吧。
Awoo... {NICKNAME}, I know you've got something to say — how about we discuss it at the press conference?
什么？又出现了新的预言？
嗯，除了「金杯终破碎，无人成冠军」，最近*我们*又从浴场观众口中分别听到了「黑潮蚀清波」、「巨兽卧沉渊」……
Indeed. Apart from "the golden trophy shatters with no champion," we have heard two more at the baths: "black tide muddles clear waters" and "giant beast rests in the abyss"...
别担心，大家，*我们*以半神之名保证，所谓「三道灾厄」是假的。
Don't worry, everyone. In the name of the demigods, we assure you that these "three calamities" are merely fabrications.
不过，*我们*无法预料，奥赫玛的公民当中会不会有人顺应预言去行动。而且目前听到的内容，恐怕还并非预言的全貌。
However, we cannot foresee whether any Okhema citizens might act on these prophecies. Besides, what we've heard may only be part of the whole prophecy.
（法吉娜的预言梦中，还包括「寻找伙伴」，以及……）
(In Phagousa's prophetic dream, there was also "look for your companions," and...)
灰子，你到底听到了什么预言？说出来大家对照一下？
Come on, Gray Mystery, what prophecy did you hear exactly? Why don't you share it with everyone?
预言里出现了自相矛盾的部分，这部分倒是似真似假……
There are contradictory elements in the prophecy, making it hard to distinguish truth from fiction...
这个「游侠」的称号听着好耳熟，不会是说我吧？
Rangers? That title rings a bell. Are they referring to me?
难道我真的要被*不讲道理的预言*左右，跟你一起充当拯救奖杯的英雄？啧！还真是无聊的过家家。
Do I really have to let some arbitrary prophecy push me into playing hero with you to save some trophy? Tch! What a childish game.
Since you took Tribbie's payment anyway...
You've helped once, what's one more time?
两位有什么好的计划吗？
Got any good ideas, you two?
不错！灰子，和我想的一样。
Great minds think alike, eh, Gray Mystery?
近日！随着「豹豹碰碰大作战」赛程日趋火热，小奇美拉「泡泡」的转队风波成为公民们关注的舆论焦点。
Breaking news! As Seal Slammers heats up, the uproar over Bubbles the little chimera's team transfer has become a hot topic among citizens.
浴场的观众将目光紧紧地盯在你们的身上。
The audience at the baths stares at you intently.
这是一场荣誉与金钱的角逐，还是一场梦想和野心的纠葛呢？今天我们有幸采访到了泡泡和{NICKNAME}，来跟大家打个招呼——
Is this a contest of honor and wealth, or a clash of dreams and ambition? Today we're fortunate to interview Bubbles and {NICKNAME}. Say hello to everyone—
大家好，我是奇美拉泡泡。
Hello everyone, I'm Bubbles the Chimera.
...Hello, everyone. I'm... not feeling so great.
泡泡你好，方便透露一下「转队」的原因是什么吗？是遇到了不公正的对待、严苛的合约条款、有摩擦的豹友关系，还是…有其他尚未披露的细节？请告诉我。
Bubbles, could you tell us the reason behind your team transference? Was it unfair treatment, a harsh contract, conflicts with teammates, or...some other undisclosed details? Fill us in.
嗷呜？都没有，{NICKNAME}一直是我信赖的伙伴！
Awoo? None of that. {NICKNAME} has always been a partner I trust!
只是，在和缇宁大人交手后，我有了新的感触……
It's only that... after having faced off against Lady Trinnon, I had some new insights...
嗷呜…{NICKNAME}你知道吗，泡泡一直很怀疑，{NICKNAME}选我做伙伴，真的是因为相信我吗？
Awoo... You know, {NICKNAME}, Bubbles has always been suspicious... Did you choose me as your partner because you believed in me?
虽然一路我们都在赢，但得知这是「预言的安排」后，泡泡很失落……
I know we've been winning all the way, but knowing this is "the prophecy's arrangement," Bubbles feels disappointed...
泡泡想凭实力成为{NICKNAME}的伙伴，而不是靠预言。尤其是见证了缇宁大人参赛的心路历程后，泡泡认为，自己也应该像她那样「独当一面」！

Bubbles wants to use their own true potential to become {NICKNAME}'s partner, not just because of the prophecy. Especially after witnessing Lady Trinnon's motivations and experiences during the competition. Bubbles thinks that they should be like her and assume personal responsibility!
离开你以后，泡泡会用新的实绩证明自己！让{NICKNAME}发自内心地认可泡泡。
Once Bubbles leaves you, Bubbles will prove themself with new accomplishments! This will let {NICKNAME} recognize me wholeheartedly.
原来如此，我尊重你的选择。
I see. I respect your choice.
够爽快，泡泡果然没看错你。
Right on. I knew I was right about you!
不！泡泡你带我走吧，泡泡…
No! Bubbles, take me with you, Bubbles...
...{NICKNAME}... please don't ask me to stay anymore.
虽然泡泡戴着墨镜你可能看不见，但它已经泪眼朦胧了。
Although I'm wearing sunglasses, and you might not notice, tears are welling in my eyes.
墨镜是我的保护色！在下只是个笨拙的奇美拉…但在下心意坚决……
The sunglasses are my camouflage! I'm just a clumsy chimera... but my resolve is firm...
那么泡泡，有什么话想对{NICKNAME}选手，以及你曾经的豹友们说吗？
So Bubbles, is there anything you want to say to {NICKNAME} or your former teammates?
你知道的，有时候做出决定总是很难，经过了很多轮对战后的思考，我决定把我的天赋带到风堇的小海豹战队。
You know, making a decision can be tough. After a lot of matches and reflection, I decided to take my talents to Hyacine's baby seal squad.
至于「大力海豹」，以及其他小海豹们，我祝它们一切顺利！赛场见。
As for the "Mega Seals" and the other baby seals, I wish them all the best! See you on the field.
最后一个问题，离开{NICKNAME}，你有信心拿到「金海豹杯」吗？
One last question: After leaving {NICKNAME}, are you confident you can win the "Gold Seal Cup"?
当然，我想赢下冠军，我觉得我能在那里做到。
Of course, I want to win the championship. I think I can pull it off there.
所以，「金海豹杯」…金海豹…糟了！那么大一个奖杯不见了！
So, the "Gold Seal Cup"... the golden seal... Oh no! That huge trophy is gone!
Was that... was that how it was supposed to go?
临近休赛期结束，「替换奖杯」的计划彻底宣告失败。
As we neared the end of the off-season, the "trophy swap" plan ended in utter failure.
…赛飞儿阁下在我解除了金线的固定之后，她就带着奖杯从我眼前瞬间消失了。
... After I dispelled the golden thread's tether, Lady Cipher vanished from in front of me with the trophy.
我还在原地等赛飞儿阁下回来呢，结果、结果她再也没有回来了。
I stood there waiting for Lady Cipher to return, but in the end... she never came back.
阿格莱雅大人你看，这位黄金裔大人究竟是何方神圣……
Lady Aglaea, what do you think — just who is this Chrysos Heir...?
…我早就觉得赛飞儿很可疑了。
...I've long suspected that Cipher was suspicious.
「诡计」的半神，赛飞儿，她的出现就是「诡计」本身。
Cipher is the demigod of "Trickery" — her presence is trickery in itself.
阿格莱雅你的防猫装置失效了…
Aglaea, your cat repellent device has failed...
我从未指望过金线能防住翁法罗斯最狡猾的贼——赛飞儿。
I never expected the golden thread could stop Amphoreus's most cunning thief — Cipher.
事情的起因、经过，我已经听吾师说过了。
I've already heard the whole story from my teachers.
哼，千年的时光过去，她做事的风格还是没有变。
Hmph. A thousand years have passed, and her methods still haven't changed.
在被揭穿之前，「诡计」有着接近「神谕」的效力——换句话说，从一开始她就盯上了「金海豹杯」，随后她用谎言给你展示了一个「预言梦」。
Until it's exposed, "Trickery" is almost like a prophecy in effect — that is, she targeted the Gold Seal Cup from the start, then used falsehoods to show you a prophetic dream.
没错，从你那荒唐的梦开始。
Exactly. It began with that ridiculous dream of yours.
那「金杯终破碎」的预言呢？
What about the prophecy that "the golden trophy shatters"?
它从始至终都不会破碎。
It was never going to break.
她编出了「三大灾厄」的预言，并将谎言藏在真言之中，让它们传播开来。
She fabricated a prophecy of "three great calamities," then hid lies among truths to let them spread.
随后又假装成「识破谎言」的好伙伴，让你们亲手将她偷不走的奖杯交给了她。
Then she pretended to be an ally who could "see through lies," tricking you into handing her the trophy she couldn't otherwise steal.
而现在，狡猾的小贼已经拿到她的玩具，不会再出现了。
And now, the cunning thief has her prize in hand. She won't appear again.
摆放奖杯的地方空荡荡，像是赛飞儿的嘲弄：嘿！你们争夺的东西，早进了我的宝库！
The spot for the trophy is completely empty, as if Cipher is mocking you: "Hey, the thing you fought over is already in my treasure trove!"
没看好奖杯，我们兄弟实在愧疚，请阿格莱雅大人原谅。
We failed to secure the trophy properly, and we brothers feel truly ashamed. Lady Aglaea, please forgive us.
也许…在冠军赛到来前，我们还有找到赛飞儿的可能性……
Perhaps... there's still a chance to find Cipher before the championship begins...
无妨，先以筹备比赛要紧。若因为奖杯失窃办不成比赛，就顾此失彼了。
No worries. Our first priority is getting ready for the match. If we can't hold the match because the trophy's stolen, that'd be a total loss.
被谎言梦欺骗，信赖的伙伴又离开了自己，{NICKNAME}，你还好吗？
You were deceived by a dream of lies, and your trusted partner left you — {NICKNAME}, are you alright?
虽然奖杯没有了，但还有冠军！
Even though the trophy's gone, the championship title is still up for grabs!
有些失落，但是比赛还得继续。
I'm a bit disappointed, but the match has to go on.
抱歉，我能感受到你的失落。
I'm sorry. I can sense how let down you feel.
<color=#dbc291ff>你一定会惩罚窃取奖杯的小贼，夺回你应得的荣誉。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You will surely punish the trophy thief and reclaim the honor that's rightfully yours.</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>你一定会找回离开自己的伙伴，与它再次并肩作战。</color>
<color=#dbc291ff>You will definitely find the partner who left you and fight alongside them again.</color>
这是{RUBY_B#阿格莱雅}「浪漫」的半神{RUBY_E#}予你的预言，你尽可以相信我。
This is the prophecy bestowed upon you by {RUBY_B#Aglaea}demigod of Romance{RUBY_E#}. You can believe me.
现在，专注于当下的比赛吧。
Now, focus on the upcoming match.
在几方期待、几方忐忑的心理中，时间照常流逝，来到了冠军赛。
With everyone's mixed anticipation and anxiety, time passed normally, and the championship arrived.
早些时候，在星穹列车上。
啊，{NICKNAME}乘客来了，我们刚准备找你呢帕。
Oh, Passenger {NICKNAME} is here, we were just looking for you!
话说回来，刚才有艘星际和平公司的货船送来了一份包裹，里面是这个写着「致银河球棒侠」箱子——应该是给你的。
Say, a freight skiff from the IPC just dropped off a package. Inside was a box labeled "To the Galactic Baseballer" — I assume it's meant for you.
是啊，造型很有科技感，不知道是做什么用的。
Yeah, it has this really sleek tech vibe. I'm curious what it's for.
My fans can be quite enthusiastic.
看上面的公司标志，应该不是粉丝礼物。
The IPC's insignia is on it, so it's probably not a fan gift.
应该等着我一起拆快递。
You should have waited for me before opening it.
它是寄给星穹列车的，结果打开之后才知道是给你的。
It was addressed to the Astral Express, though I only realized it was for you after opening it.
这万一是个炸弹怎么办…
What if it's actually a bomb...
你也太谨慎了。别担心，我做过安全检查。
That's a bit paranoid. Relax, I already ran a security check.
总之，既然正主来了，我们就一起把它打开看看吧——
Either way, since the actual receiver is here, let's open it up—
你打开箱盖，箱子内的屏幕也一并亮起。
When you lift the lid, a screen inside flickers to life.
…喂喂，信号测试，一二三四五六七——哦哦，有画面了！看来星际和平物流还是靠谱的，回头得给他们点个赞。
...Testing, testing, one two three four five six seven — oh nice, video's working! Looks like Interastral Peace Express really knows their stuff. Definitely giving them a thumbs up.
你好啊，无名客{NICKNAME}，还有列车组的成员们。我是丹克西，从遥远的帕拉黛星向你们发来问候。
Greetings, Nameless {NICKNAME} and other crew members of the Astral Express. This is Danksi, calling from the distant world of Paradoxe.
What do you need from us?
咳咳…我开发了一款以星穹列车为题材的游戏。换句话说，它是我为星穹列车献上的一份心意。
Ahem... I developed an Astral-Express-themed game. In other words, it's my little homage for the Astral Express.
当然！连入银轨的世界谁会没听过星穹列车？谁又会不知道无名客呢？
Absolutely! Every world connected to the silver rail knows about the Astral Express! And everyone knows about the Nameless!
<size=28>来体验一下吧！我一直都很喜欢你们的故事来着！</size>
<size=28>Try it out, please! I've always loved following your stories!</size>
What are you people up to?
维护必要的仪式感——原本我打算带大伙享受些咖啡和茶点，但是被一致拒绝了。
Maintain a necessary sense of ceremony — I wanted to bring everyone to enjoy some coffee, tea, and pastry, but it was unanimously rejected.
根据智库记载，过去的无名客们每完成一站旅程，就会举办一场开拓庆典。有时是茶话会，有时是厢内赛跑，有时甚至是骑士竞技……
According to the data bank, past Nameless members would throw a Trailblaze celebration after each stop. Sometimes, it's a tea party, sometimes it's a race, and sometimes even a knightly joust...
后来列车的乘客人数逐渐减少，这项传统也就不怎么被提及了。
But the number of passengers eventually waned, so this tradition has faded out.
我听说过帕拉黛星。那里原本是一个信奉「纯美」的星球，后来与星际和平娱乐签订契约，成了公司旗下的文化产业基地。
I've heard of Paradoxe. It was a planet that followed the Beauty before signing a contract with the Interastral Peace Entertainment, turning it into a cultural industry base under the IPC.
是啊，我的家族原本是帕拉黛星最受欢迎的艺术世家，出产过许多剧作。
That's right. My family used to be the most popular artistic aristocracy on Paradoxe with many theater works under our belt.
后来大伙都去看公司的《鸡窝头侦探》和《流星怪盗卢布朗》了，我们家也就逐渐没落了……
However, everyone watched the IPC's Tousled Detective and Leblanc: The Meteor Thief, so my family gradually declined...
游戏的试玩包就在这台机器里。它搭载着新款脑波系统，能让你全身心地投入虚拟世界…硬件方面已经做到最好了。
The game's demo package is in this device. It uses cutting-edge brainwave tech for full virtual immersion... Hardware-wise, it's the best you can get.
顺带一提，<color=#dbc291ff>我把初始角色都设置成了列车组成员</color>。
Also, <color=#dbc291ff>I've made all Initial Characters Express Crew members</color>.
倒是挺有仪式感的，正好赶上了「开拓」庆典……
That does add a dramatic value, just in time for the Trailblaze Celebration...
呵呵，不如就把它当成庆典的主题游戏吧。
Heheh, why not make it the featured game of the ceremony.
小三月发消息说她很快就到，{NICKNAME}，不如就由你先开始吧。
March said that she'll be here soon, {NICKNAME}, why don't we start with you?
若能借此机会重启「开拓」庆典，倒也是一件妙事。
If we can take this opportunity to restart the Trailblaze Ceremony, that'll be wonderful.
好久没玩这种小众独立游戏了，希望它的难度不会太高。
It's been a while since I played this type of niche indie game. I hope it's not too difficult.
我不排斥电子游戏。当然，也算不上擅长。
I don't dislike video games. Of course, I'm not exactly good at them either.
列车很少收到这么有趣的礼物，列车长也很好奇帕。
It's rare to receive such an interesting present in the Express, Pom-Pom thinks that it's unique.
没什么事的话，就来玩「星铁☆WORLD」吧——我刚起的名字。
Got a minute? Come try "Star Rail WORLD" — just came up with that name.
Let's play then. Like, right now.
Can we talk for a bit?
毕竟你们是IP版权方，聊上一千个系统时也没关系！
Sure, you're the IP owners. We can talk as long as you want, even a thousand system hours!
Explain to me again how it works?
哼哼~有没有想过，为什么游戏里会出现那么多你熟知的形象？说实话，其中有些面孔我也是第一次见。
Well, notice all those familiar faces in the game? Truth is, some are new even to me.
答案是——这台机器安装了业务巩固部的「截稿日辅助处理系统」。它可以激发、读取并记录人脑内的灵感，将它们形成场景，是创作者的不二帮手……

Here's why — it's equipped with the Business Consolidation Department's "Deadline Assistant Processing System." It captures, reads, and records creative inspiration right from your mind, turning them into scenes. Perfect for any creator...
这些灵感会储存在设备里，之后传输给我。可以说，你玩这个游戏的过程，就是在为我提供素材。
The device stores all that inspiration and sends it my way. So really, you're helping me gather material by playing.
你居然还用公司的产品？
So you're using IPC products yourself?
没办法，光凭我自己做不到嘛。有句星际格言怎么说的来着？「师夷长技以制夷」。
Well, I can't develop everything by myself, can I? You know the old Interastral saying: "Use your rivals' strengths against them."
我承认，现在的话，是公司比较强…但之后我会走出自己的路！
Sure, IPC might be ahead now... but I'll find my own path eventually!
总之，你只需要享受游戏就好，其他的我来考虑。
Anyway, just enjoy the game. Leave the rest to me.
为什么游戏是个嘉年华？
咱这游戏的原型是「星际文明成果展示大会」，每个琥珀纪都会在庇尔波因特举办两次。
This game is inspired by "Interastral Civilization Achievement Exhibition," an event held twice each Amber Era at Pier Point.
届时，受到邀请的各大星球都会拿出自己的特产，在会场上交流、买卖，热闹极了。至于为什么选它作题材……
During the event, all the invited planets bring their specialties to trade and share. It's pretty exciting. Now, the reason I chose this theme...
咳咳，其实是因为我没钱，机器的算力只能支持一个场景…不过这倒也是大伙喜欢的题材。
*ahem* Truth is, I'm short on funds, and the hardware can only process one scene... but people seem to like it.
我？我其实没什么故事可讲。毕竟我才不到四十岁，距离我们星球的成年还差了一半多呢。
Me? There's not much to say. At less than forty, I'm only halfway to being an adult on my planet.
我生在艺术世家，老爹却从来不让我动手创作。他说：「小树是不能结果子的。比起甘甜的红果，苦涩的青果既无价值，又会榨干潜力。」

I come from an artistic family, but my old man wouldn't let me create any work. "Young trees shouldn't bear fruit," he'd say. "Bitter green fruit is worthless and drains potential, unlike sweet ripe ones."
所以，我一直在欣赏别人的作品，没有半点产出。就像坐着别人的飞船横渡星海，却连船票都没买……
So I only watched others create works, never making my own. Like hitching a ride across the stars without paying for the ticket...
后来，星际和平公司的作品涌入星球，摧垮了老爹的心态。他不再嚷嚷着积累和艺术家的坚持，直接封笔隐退了，我也有了创作的自由。

Later, when IPC's works flooded our planet, it broke the old man. He quit talking about dedication and artistic integrity, and just retired completely. That's when I could finally create my own works.
但在决定做这部作品之前，我更多是个旁观者：看了许多别人的故事，自己却没有要表达的情感……
Before this project, I was just a spectator: hearing others' stories but having nothing of my own to say...
好在如今我还有机会补票，去成为那些伟大创作者的一员，把自己的名字填进片尾名单里…如果能做到的话。
But now I can finally pay my way, maybe join those great creators and see my name in the credits... if I made it.
Well, I think I've gotten to know you pretty well.
我还有大项目要谈，先走了。
I should get going — got some important business to discuss.
慢走，有空的时候记得回来看看我就行。
See you around. Feel free to visit anytime.
怎么样，还不赖吧？这只是教学关而已，后面会更加精彩。等你通关就知道了！
Pretty good, huh? And that's just the tutorial — wait till you see the rest. Clear it and find out!
对对，每个琥珀纪都会在庇尔波因特举办两次的那个。咱这游戏就是以它为灵感创作的。
That's right, the biannual event at Pier Point each Amber Era? That's what inspired this.
再加上星穹列车全明星，应该是能吸引不少玩家了吧，哈哈~
Throw in the Astral Express crew, and we've got ourselves a hit, haha~
我真的只用玩游戏就行了吗？
So all I have to do is play the game?
哈！不瞒你说，这台机器安装了业务巩固部的「截稿日辅助处理系统」。在你玩的同时，它会<color=#dbc291ff>搜集你们过去的开拓经历</color>，发给我当作参考。

Ha! Truth is, it's got the Business Consolidation Department's "Deadline Assistant Processing System." It <color=#dbc291ff>captures your past Trailblazing experiences</color>, sending them to me for reference.
可以说，你「玩游戏」的行为本身，就是在帮我完善它。你玩得越久，我就能积累越多的创作素材。
So really, just by playing, you're helping me improve the game. More gameplay gives me more material to work with.
如果想了解更多细节，之后可以随时找我，我会一五一十告诉你的。现在，你只需要享受游戏就好，其他的我来考虑。
If you need more details, ask away anytime — I'll explain everything. For now, just enjoy the game. I'll handle the rest.
So how do I clear this game?
呃…当前版本的话，<color=#dbc291ff>就是多赚钱、提升会场等级</color>，让展会变得更加热闹。对你来说小菜一碟啦~
Um... in this version, you just need to <color=#dbc291ff>earn money and level up the venue</color> to make the exhibition bustling. Should be easy for you~
正式发行之后，请务必寄给我一份。
When it's officially published, please send a copy to me.
我对电子游戏没那么擅长，但也能感受到创作者的一些巧思。
I'm not great at video games, but I can pick up the brilliant ideas the creator incorporated.
哎呀，要算的数好多，头有点晕了……
Ah, I'm dizzy from all these calculations...
这游戏的设定，让我想起了公司旗下的「星际文明成果展示大会」。
This game's setting reminds me of IPC's "Interastral Civilization Achievement Exhibition."
不过眼下这款游戏还不够完善，需要你们多玩一玩、提点改进建议才行。
But this game is still incomplete, so I need all of you to play it more and offer me some feedback.
你为什么要做这款游戏？
Why do you want to make this game?
我的故乡帕拉黛，是一个信奉「纯美」的星球。我的家族原本是帕拉黛星最受欢迎的艺术世家，出产过许多剧作。
My home planet Paradoxe follows the Beauty above all else. My family used to be the most popular artistic aristocracy, and produced many theater works.
后来大伙都去看公司的《鸡窝头侦探》和《流星怪盗卢布朗》了，我们家也就逐渐没落了……
However, everyone watched the IPC's Tousled Detective and Leblanc: The Meteor Thief, so my family gradually declined...
为了振兴家族，我要推出一部叫好又叫座的作品——思来想去，没什么比星穹列车题材的游戏更合适了。
To rejuvenate the family, I need to make something that's both popular and meaningful — and I realized nothing would work better than a game about the Astral Express.
本姑娘不太适合需要动脑子的游戏…先撤了。
I'm not the right person for games that require me to rack my brains... I'll excuse myself.
很久没有这么畅快地玩过了…可惜，成年人的世界除了游戏以外还有许多东西。有空的时候我们再一起玩吧。
It's been a long time since I've had such fun... Unfortunately, there's much more for adults to do aside from gaming. Let's play together again when we have the time.
既然这是寄给{NICKNAME}的礼物，不如就由{F#她}{M#他}来主玩吧。在这方面，我相信{NICKNAME}的判断。
Since it's a gift for {NICKNAME}, why don't we let {F#her}{M#him} be the main player? In this aspect, I trust {NICKNAME}'s judgment.
那就交给你了帕。别担心，列车长会一直陪着你的。
Then we'll leave it to you. Don't worry, Pom-Pom will always be with you.
让我看看…很好，现在搜集到的反馈已经足够，应该能做出一部完整的作品了。
Hmm... looks like I've got all the feedback now. This should make for quite a story.
虽然早就从广播里听说了列车的经历，但亲自看上一遍，还是不禁感慨——你们的开拓之旅可真精彩啊。
You know, I'd already heard about the Express' experiences through broadcasts, but watching these stories firsthand? I'm still so impressed — Your trailblazing expedition is truly exciting.
果然，一颗星球上的故事终究有限。唯有奔向宇宙，才能知晓寰宇的精彩。
As expected, there are limits to the stories in a single planet. We can only discover the brilliance of the cosmos when we travel the universe.
等做完手头的工作，我会把这部作品分享给更多人。之后只需要静待反响就好了。
Once I finish the work on hand, I'll share this creation with more people. All I need to do next is to patiently wait for reactions.
我要先去完善游戏内容了。于星海再会吧，朋友。真希望有天，我们能亲眼见到彼此啊。
I'll go ahead and optimize the game content now. See you in the starry seas, friend. Maybe we'll meet in person one day.
哦对了，公司的货船得过段时间才能去回收这台设备。在那之前，你还可以继续玩我的游戏。
Oh, and the company's freight skiff won't pick up this device for some time. The game's yours to play until then.

As a hub for young talent, Paperfold University is naturally one of our primary launch locations. Now, the console for Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King is right in front of you. Don't you want to give it a go?
Could you tell me about the game?
我想想…测试版中的故事是这样的：「小小的勇者辞别家乡，在无尽银河中漫游探险，寻找星际最强武器——传说中的球棒」。

Let me think... In the test version, the story goes like this: "The little hero bids farewell to their hometown and embarks on an endless adventure across the cosmos, seeking the strongest weapon — The legendary ball bat."
「在狡猾『公爵』的诡计下，正直的球棒侠一时不察，坠入了连通着茫茫多未知世界的黑洞。」
"Under the cunning tricks of the Duke, the righteous Baseballer is caught off guard and falls into a black hole that connects to countless unknown worlds."
而此次的冒险就将从这里开始——「在黑洞中，我们幸运的勇者反而因祸得福，知晓了最强球棒的真正所在——『黑斗篷魔王』的手中！」
And that's where the adventure begins — "In the black hole, our lucky hero, instead of perishing, discovers the true location of the Ultimate Bat — it's in the hands of the Black Cloak Demon King!"
「于是勇敢的球棒侠决定追寻魔王的足迹，向其发起挑战。」
"Thus, the brave Baseballer decides to follow the Demon King's trail and challenge them."
听起来是不是格外有趣？请相信——在制作游戏方面，我们团队是专业的。
Sounds pretty exciting, doesn't it? Believe me when I say — our team is professional when it comes to making games.
Can I still play the demo version?
当然！毕竟很多时候，游戏的DEMO版本也是种情怀的代表。
Of course! After all, the demo version of a game often holds a special place in the heart.

To make sure those who missed out don't feel left behind, we've recreated the beta version and named it Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Departure.

I couldn't agree more. So, in addition to rewards unlocked as you progress, players can also earn exclusive raccoon-themed avatar merchandise by unlocking certain achievements.
如何，心动不如行动，快去体验一下吧？
How about it? Why not act on that impulse and give it a shot?

Oh, looks like you've already finished it — congratulations! Mind sharing your thoughts on the game with me?
哈哈，能够获得如此之高的评价，实在是我们的荣幸。感谢您对《银河球棒侠：魔王篇》的喜爱——
Haha, getting such high praise is truly an honor. Thank you for your love of Galactic Baseballer: Demon King—
对于一位愚者而言，人们的欢笑可是最诚挚的赞许与认可。
For a Fool, the laughter of people is the sincerest form of recognition.
这个嘛，毕竟游戏的体量摆在那里…我个人对这个项目的定位是「贵精不贵多」——
Well, given the scope of the game... Personally, I've always considered this project to be "quality over quantity."
早在《银河球棒侠传说》立项之初，我们就将开发重点放在了游玩体验上，因此在正式版的制作中更注重玩法的打磨，希望能做到「小而精」，而非「量大管饱」。

We've focused on the player experience from the very start of Legend of the Galactic Baseballer's development. So we really perfected the gameplay for the official version, aiming for "small but refined," not "big and overwhelming."
说不好会收到律师函吗？
Could I get a lawyer's letter for saying I didn't like it?
哦…你提醒我了，我这就去联系法务部——
Oh... you've reminded me. I'll contact legal right away —
哈哈，开个玩笑。请放心，我们可是正经项目，从不搞那些邪门歪道。
Haha, just kidding. Don't worry, we are a legitimate project. We don't do anything underhanded.
毕竟，一款优秀的游戏从不惧怕意见与批评——恶意刷差评除外。
After all, a great game never fears feedback or criticism — except for maliciously negative reviews.
那么除此之外，在体验过全部流程之后，你对于本游戏还有什么疑问吗？
So, besides that, do you have any other questions after experiencing the whole game?
就我个人而言，当然希望会有，无论是新作还是DLC。
Personally? I hope so, whether it's a new game or DLC.
不过这取决于游戏的销量与口碑——毕竟我是个商人，而你也清楚，在梦境里进行开发的费用可是极为高昂。
But that all depends on the sales and reception — after all, I'm a businessman, and you know how expensive it is to develop in the Dreamscape.
这个嘛…当然是你自己啊，我的朋友。
Well... of course, it was you, my friend.
为了增加游戏的代入感，我们在正式版中使用了最新的梦境技术，能够在玩家的潜意识中「打捞」出一些印象深刻的碎片，并以此为原型生成怪物或关卡。

To enhance the immersion, we've used the latest Dreamscape tech in the official version, which allows us to "extract" deep impressions from the player's subconscious and use them to create monsters or stages.
当然，请不用担心隐私问题——我们有专门的保密协议。要知道，无论作为一名愚者还是私商，「讲信誉」都是我最基本的准则。
But don't worry about privacy concerns — we have strict confidentiality agreements. Whether as a Fool or a private businessperson, "keeping one's word" is my fundamental principle.
为什么不是银河笔杆子侠？
Why not the Cosmos's Penman Hero?
关于这件事…其实我有认真考虑过，将笔刷作为武器确实是个有趣的设定，令人始料未及的剧情发展也非常符合我的审美。
About that... I seriously thought it over. A pen as a weapon is a fun idea, and the unexpected plot twists fit my aesthetic perfectly.
但考虑到我们游戏的核心玩法与之并不匹配，最终只能忍痛放弃了。
But considering the game's core mechanics, it just didn't quite match, so I had to reluctantly let it go.
嗯…不过或许这么说能让你感到好受些：「讲理的叫不醒装睡的，球棒底下出真知——战斗爽才是重点。」
Hmm... But maybe this will make you feel better: "Reasonable arguments can't wake those who pretend to sleep, but true wisdom comes from the bat — fighting is what truly matters."
I don't have any other questions.
最后一个问题——对于《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》，你还有什么期待？
Last question — what are you looking forward to in Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King?
Can the story go on a little longer?
哈哈，下次一定、下次一定…如果游戏后续的反响足够好，我们可能会考虑开发同IP下的其它作品。
Haha, we'll definitely make it happen next time... if the response to the game is good enough, we might consider developing other works under the same IP.
或许其中就会有以剧情为主的类型也说不定——总要尝试些全新的赛道不是吗？
Maybe there'll even be one with more focus on the story — after all, we've got to try something new, no?
后续更新优化有保障吗？
Is there a guarantee for future updates and improvements?
当然，我们可不是那种圈完钱就跑路的无良开发商。
Of course, we're not the kind of shady developers who vanish into thin air after getting the money.
即便没办法像业界的某些知名项目那样，每年更新七八个大补丁，但日常的维护与优化还是没问题的。
Even if we can't churn out seven or eight major updates every year like some big-name projects, regular maintenance and optimization? That's no problem at all.
I want to play the next game now!
哈哈，借你吉言——请放心，如果后续有开发计划，我们一定会将其如期奉上。
Haha, I'll take that as a compliment — rest assured, if there's a development plan for the future, we'll definitely deliver it on time.
毕竟「跳票」这种事情，对商人的信誉而言可是百害而无一利的。
After all, delays are a reputation killer for any business. There's absolutely no benefit in that.
好，你的意见我都认真记下了，时间不早，我得赶回去和开发团队进行总结评估。
Got it, I've made note of your feedback. It's getting late, I need to head back and do a wrap-up with the dev team.
请允许我先行一步——当然，上线项目的持续运营很重要，我会在摊位附近留下一个全息投影，和我的手机直接相通，有什么疑惑尽管问便是。

Please, allow me to take my leave first — of course, the continued operation of the project is important. I'll leave a hologram projection near the booth, connected directly to my phone. If you have any questions, feel free to ask.
啊，还有…这个可不能忘：请收好，专门为「银河球棒侠」准备的额外大礼包——<color=#dbc291ff>「崇高道德的赞许」</color>！
Ah, and... can't forget this: Please accept the special bonus gift prepared for the Galactic Baseballer — <color=#dbc291ff>"Praise of High Morals"</color>!
哈哈，感谢你的赞美。这正是对{RUBY_B#「愚者」}我们{RUBY_E#}最好的褒奖。
Haha, thanks for the compliment. That's the best praise ever for {RUBY_B#the Fools}us{RUBY_E#}.
对了，<color=#dbc291ff>那台测试版的游戏机现在已经修好了</color>，你要是感兴趣，不妨再去体验一下？
By the way, <color=#dbc291ff>that test version of the game console has been fixed now</color>. If you're interested, you should give it another try!
Alright, alright, maybe next time for sure...
哈哈，祝你游玩愉快！那么，愿我们于欢声笑语中再会！
Haha, enjoy your gaming! Let's meet again in laughter and fun!
Could you tell me about the game?
我想想…测试版中的故事是这样的：「小小的勇者辞别家乡，在无尽银河中漫游探险、寻找星际最强武器——传说中的球棒」。

Let me think... In the test version, the story goes like this: "The little hero bids farewell to their hometown and embarks on an endless adventure across the galaxy, seeking the legendary strongest weapon — the Bat."
「在狡猾『公爵』的诡计下，正直的球棒侠一时不察，坠入了连通着茫茫多未知世界的黑洞。」
"Under the cunning tricks of the Duke, the righteous Baseballer is caught off guard and falls into a black hole that connects to countless unknown worlds."
而此次的冒险就将从这里开始——「在黑洞中，我们幸运的勇者反而因祸得福，知晓了最强球棒的真正所在——『黑斗篷魔王』的手中！」
And that's where the adventure begins — "In the black hole, our lucky hero, instead of perishing, discovers the true location of the Ultimate Bat — it's in the hands of the Black Cloak Demon King!"
「于是勇敢的球棒侠决定追寻魔王的足迹，向其发起挑战。」
"Thus, the brave Baseballer decides to follow the Demon King's trail and challenge them."
两台街机那个是哪个来着？
Which of the arcade machines is which again?
如果想体验最新的《银河球棒侠传说：魔王篇》，就认准这台；
If you want to experience the latest "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Demon King," look for this one.
要是想重温之前的《银河球棒侠传说：启程篇》，请使用这台。
If you want to relive the previous "Legend of the Galactic Baseballer: Departure," use this one.
That's all I wanted to know.
好的，我的投影会一直在这里，有问题可以随时来找我。
Alright, my projection will be here. If you have any questions, feel free to come find me.
哪来的小东西，敢在我面前撒野……
Where did this little brazen dolt come from?
嘁，还以为是什么厉害对手，原来是只小浣熊。
Tch. And I thought it was some powerful opponent. It's just a little raccoon.
直面魔王的怒火吧！你就是虫子！
Face the rage of the Demon King, you worm!
你就只有这么点能耐吗，简直自寻死路！
Is this all you can do? You're just gonna die!
Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
黑斗篷结界（低配版）——启动！
Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
什么银河球棒侠，不过如此嘛。来呀，继续打我啊！
Is this all the Galactic Baseballer is? Come! Keep fighting me!
Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
时间差不多咯…任务完成，打卡，下班！
Time's almost up... Job's done. Clocking out!
Demon King's Minions: I'm The Trap
…还真给骗过来了？行吧，那就速战速决——大伙一起上，争取早点收工！
...The trick worked? Well, let's end this then — Everyone, go get them together! We'll try to wrap this one up quick!
…嘶…我只是想找份工作，没打算…送命啊……
...Hiss ...I just wanted a job, not to... die...
我瞧瞧手表…啊，下班时间到了！不打了不打了，继续打也没加班费。撤退！
Lemme check the time... Ah, it's time to clock out! No more fighting! I won't get overtime pay anyway! Retreat!
Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
不是？！我的工作只是负责当诱饵啊。都下班了，你怎么还在追我！
Hey!? My job was just to be bait! I've gone off work, so stop chasing me!
Demon King's Minions: I'm The Bait
——永别了，世界！等等…工伤能申请赔偿的吧？
— Farewell, sweet world! Wait... Can I claim compensation for a work injury?
果然，你和其他想挑战我的人都不一样……
You are indeed different from all the others who've tried to challenge me...
你很勇敢，也有足够的智慧。踏遍整个银河，千辛万苦寻到这里，想必你也不希望草草收场吧？
You have both courage and wisdom. Having traversed the entire cosmos and found this place after many trials, you wouldn't want to wrap this up too quickly either, right?
——来，到我的王座前来，面对你命定的结局吧！
— Come before my throne, and face your destined end!
…瞧啊。威震全银河的球棒侠，来到了我的王座前，想要发起挑战！
...Look, the baseballer who's famous throughout the cosmos has arrived before my throne and intends to challenge me!
莫非…你真以为能胜得过我？
Could it be that you really believe... you can beat me?
先击碎我的防御再说吧！
Why don't you break my defense first?
斗篷…我最爱的斗篷…呜呜呜……
My cape... My favorite cape... Waaaaaah...
啊啊啊啊！我彻底破防了，作为代价，你将要承受失去心爱之物的魔王的怒火！
Aaaaaah! I've had enough. The price you must pay is to face the rage of the Demon King, who has lost his greatest love!
Stand still and let me grind you into dust!
早就说过，你根本不是我的对手！
I've told you! You're no match for me!
既然你诚心诚意的发问了——
Prepare for trouble, since you asked nicely—
Demon King's Minions: Spray of Inspiration
我们就咕哩咕哩地告诉你！
And make it double, we'll tell you readily!
为了防止邪恶统治被破坏，为了守护世界的和平，我们要将你埋葬在这满是糖分的星球！
To protect the evil government from facing destruction! To uphold the peace within our population! We will bury you in this sucrose-filled planet!
一切献给——伟大的「黑斗篷魔王」！
All for... the great Black Cloak Demon King!
Demon King's Minions: Spray of Inspiration
挚友啊！你崇高的信念，就由我来继承——
My friend! I shall inherit the mantle of your noble belief —
我将解放银河间最为强大的力量……
I will release the most powerful force in the entire cosmos...
用你手中的球棒好好感受吧——这无尽的恨意！
Feel it with the bat in your hands — Feel this endless hatred!
啊…我的斗篷，真希望我们永远都不要分开……
Ahh... My cape... I wish we'll never part...
恭喜，你成功击败了魔王，但银河不会因此而变得和平…你的冒险，还没有结束……
Congrats, you've succeeded in defeating the Demon King, but the cosmos will not see peace... your adventures will continue...
呵。就到这吧，属于这个舞台的时间已经到了。
Heh. Let's call it a day here. This stage's time is up.
毁掉心爱斗篷的仇，我记下了。总有天，我会再来找你的……
I'll remember how you destroyed my beloved cape. One day, I'll come back for you...
{NICKNAME}阁下，「极速杯」球笼竞速锦标赛已经拖了很久了，我们还在琢磨您要是不来这比赛可怎么办啊？
Dear esteemed {NICKNAME}, the "Speed Cup" Spheroid Racing tournament has been delayed for quite some time now. We were starting to wonder, "What would we do if you didn't show up for the race?"
还好您总算来了，我这就去宣布比赛正式开始！
Thankfully, you've showed up! I'll announce the official start of the race right away!
等等，这活动是什么情况？
What, what's up with this event?
什么什么情况？您不是报名了吗？奇怪，我这里明明有您的报名表啊？
What what what? Didn't you sign up? Strange, I have your name on the roster right here?
有奖金吗？有的话直接开始！
Is there a prize? If so, let's get started!
You're quick to the point. Please, follow me!
训练场已为您腾出来了，我带您试试车，对了，我看您的报名表上好像没登记赛车？奇怪，怎么查不到您提交的赛车信息，呃，您有准备自己的赛车吗？

The training grounds have been cleared for you. I'll take you for a test drive. By the way, I noticed that your registration form doesn't seem to list a race car. Strange, I couldn't find any record of you submitting one... Uh, did you bring your own car?
场地内突然响起震耳的广播通知。
A deafening broadcast announcement suddenly echoed across the venue.
<color=#dbc291ff>「巡海大鲨鱼」号</color>选手已被取消参赛资格！
<color=#dbc291ff>The contestant of Sea Hunter Shark</color> has been disqualified from the competition!
…等等，我收到新消息。您认识「巡海大鲨鱼」选手吗？他想把赛车托付给您。
...Wait, I just received new information. Do you know the contestant for Sea Hunter Shark? He wants to entrust his race car to you.
也算是赶巧了，我见您名下没有赛车，刚刚还在为您要用什么赛车而发愁呢。
Well, that's quite a coincidence. I just noticed you didn't have a registered race car and was wondering what you'd be driving.
就用它试训吧？我可以在旁指导您，帮您适应下它——毕竟是手动挡，你们年轻人可能用不惯。
Why not use it for a test run? I can guide you from the side and help you get used to it. After all, it's a manual transmission, and you younger folks might not be accustomed to that.
试训赛道已经准备好了，我们这就出发？
The test track is ready. Shall we head out now?
Hold on a moment, I'm not ready yet...
好的，您准备好了随时喊我就行。
Alright, just let me know when you're ready.
…嗯？看您这表情，难道这报名表有问题？呃，现在比赛已经开始了，大家都在等您上场，您可千万别退赛啊，求求了！
...Hm? Judging from your expression, might this list be wrong? Agh. The match is already starting, everyone is waiting for you to arrive. Please don't back out! Please!
这比赛等您系上安全带后立刻开始！怎么样，您方便落座吗？我们很着急。
The race will start as soon as you strap in! How do you like it? Ready to sit down? We're about to start.
Enough about the chit-chat, just start the race already!
您准备好了我们这就开始。
We're ready to go as soon as you are.
Hold on, let me catch my breath...
没人能靠踩刹车赢下比赛，您要是准备好了就来叫我吧。
No one's winning this race by tapping the brakes. If you're ready, just call out to me.
太棒了！您的驾驶天赋真是令人惊叹，完全不像是第一次驾驶球笼赛车。
Amazing! Your driving skills are impressive — this doesn't feel like your first time driving a Spheroid racer.
对了，您这辆<color=#dbc291ff>「巡海大鲨鱼」号</color>跟您报名登记的球笼时候不太一样，得亏是那位选手出了许多情况……
By the way, this <color=#dbc291ff>Sea Hunter Shark model</color> you've got here doesn't match the one you signed up with. Lucky for you, that other racer had some issues...
离下一场比赛还有些时间，请您稍事休息，等比赛开始了会有全场通知……
There's some time before the next race, so please take a break. We'll make a public announcement when the race starts...
...Sign up? When did I sign up?
您没报名？让我查一下…是这样的，您的报名是通过一个匿名终端完成的。
You didn't sign up? Let me check... Ah, it looks like your registration was done through an anonymous terminal.
哦！看来是有黑客帮您报的名。先说好，「极速杯」对此免责啊！
Oh! Looks like a hacker signed you up. Just so you know, "Speed Cup" takes no responsibility for that!
不用说了，大家都知道是谁了。
No need to say anything, we all know who did it.
全银河难道就只有一个黑客吗？
Is there only one hacker in the entire Cosmos?
我谨代表家族恳请您不要退出比赛。您想想，您是什么名望与身份…
On behalf of The Family, I beg you not to quit the race. Think about the prestige and status you have...
我们愿意为您提供专属训练、赛车支持和额外奖励，这报名报得多值呀！
We're willing to provide exclusive training, race car support, and extra rewards. What a deal this registration is!
求求你，别退出比赛，比赛主办方什么都会做的。
Please, don't quit the race. The organizers will do whatever it takes.
「巡海大鲨鱼」号究竟发生了什么？
What happened to Sea Hunter Shark?
您应该认识「巡海大鲨鱼」选手吧？他被取消参赛资格了，临走前把赛车托付给您了。
You must know the Sea Hunter Shark racer, right? He's been disqualified, and before leaving, he entrusted his car to you.
好像…公司说他是通缉犯。
I think... the IPC said he's a wanted criminal.
他来报名时可温柔了，一口一个「爱你」「宝贝」的，大家都很喜欢他。
He was such a gentleman when signing up, calling everyone "fudge" and "son of a nice lady" and whatnot, everyone really liked him.
就是这车吧，也不知道怎么改造的——它加装了脉冲炮，攻击性很强就算了，还自带「技能语音」，希望您不要介意。
It's this car, right? I don't know what modifications it has, but — it's got a pulse cannon, which is pretty aggressive, and it even has sounds for the ability. Hope you don't mind.
您放心，您是大人物，您的专属球笼赛车正在加紧安排！
Don't worry, you're a VIP. Your exclusive Spheroid racer is being arranged right now!
在那之前，您就将就将就吧，毕竟是通缉犯的车——至少它很快，对吧？
In the meantime, just make do with this one — after all, it's a wanted criminal's car. At least it's fast, right?
感觉这比赛也没那么…火爆吧？
This race doesn't seem... that popular, does it?
Ah, you don't know the whole story.
「极速杯」报名火爆，早就已经淘汰过一批资质不足的选手了。
The "Speed Cup" sign-ups were so popular that we already eliminated a batch of underqualified racers.
至于为什么唯独缺「您」，并非是比赛少人，而是缺少「重量级嘉宾」！
As for why we were trying to get you to join, it's not because there aren't enough racers, but because we're missing a big-name guest!
要是换作他人，我们根本就不等，立刻取消比赛资格。您的话…我们得等。
If it were anyone else, we wouldn't wait at all, we'd disqualify them immediately. But for you... we are pleased to wait.
您放心，比赛异常火爆，奖金也异常高…您要是拿了冠军，也会异常开心！
Don't worry. The race is extremely popular, and the prize money is extremely large... And if you win the championship, you'll be extremely happy!
不多问了，直接开始比赛吧。
No more questions, let's just start the race.
Great! Wishing you a good start!
接下来的海选赛要求您限时完成赛道，并保持较高名次，才能进入下一轮。
The next qualifier requires you to complete the course within a time limit while maintaining a high rank to move on to the next round.
废话不多说，我这就带您去赛场！
Enough talk, let me take you to the track!
这…报名系统是公司制作的，我们也没有权限，实在抱歉。
Uh... the registration system is run by the IPC, and we don't have access to it. Sorry about that.
{NICKNAME}贵宾，恭喜您进入下一轮海选。
{NICKNAME}, congratulations! You've advanced to the next round of qualifiers.
尤其是那个「排水渠过弯」，哇，我都看呆了！
Especially that Gutter Run, wow, I was stunned!
顺带一提，那辆「巡海大鲨鱼」号发动机过热，我们已经帮您送修了。
By the way, the engine on the Sea Hunter Shark overheated, and we've already sent it in for repairs.
不过，您不必担心！您的专属球笼赛车已经送来了。
But don't worry! Your exclusive Spheroid racer has already arrived.
是根据您的个人风格定做的！{NICKNAME}专属球笼赛车！
It's customized to your personal style! Your very own Spheroid racer!
下一关的赛道会更加复杂，接下来的对手来头也不小，希望它能帮到您。
The next track will be more complex, and your opponents will be tougher. I hope it'll help you out.
您的对手是一支特殊的参赛组合，他们通过公司审核和名单公示才获准参赛。很有钱，花重金找公司定制球笼赛车。
Your opponents are a special team. They passed the IPC's screening and were announced on the roster. They're very wealthy and spent a lot to have their Spheroid racer custom-made.
注册名为「伟大的黑塔女士值得拥有这么努力的真爱粉丝应援会」，简称「黑•粉」号。
They registered the car as "The Great Madam Herta Deserves Such a Dedicated Fan Club That Truly Adores Her," lovingly shortened as the "Hertadore."
这支队伍砸了重金找公司定制赛车，连其他选手的赛车交付都被推迟了，所以大家都管他们叫「钞人战队」。
This team poured a lot of money into their custom car, and even delayed delivery of other racers' cars. That's why everyone calls them the "Fast & Prosperous."
我的专属球笼赛车，谁安排的？
My exclusive Spheroid racer, who arranged that?
这是根据您的试训数据与个人风格打造的，很好开的！
It was designed based on your trial data and personal style. Very easy to drive!
再说了，这是您登记注册的球笼赛车…哦，我想起来了，您说您没登记过。
Besides, this is the racer you registered for... Oh, wait, you said you didn't register.
说不定也是那位好心的黑客下单的？真好啊，那位黑客一定是您的熟人吧！
Maybe that kind-hearted hacker placed the order? So nice. I bet that hacker is a close friend of yours!
Not just a friend, but more like a family.
好到想和她再见一面呢…
We're so close that I wish to see her again...
呵呵，原来如此，我就不继续打听了。
Haha, I see. I won't pry any further.
油门已经焊死了，开始比赛吧。
Get the pedal to the metal and start the race already.
让我们见识见识真正的「速度与激情」吧，祝您旗开得胜！
Let's see some real fast and furious, shall we? Wishing you a great start!
不愧是{NICKNAME}，佩佩费劲全力也没追上你。
As expected of {NICKNAME}, even Peppy couldn't catch up with you after giving it all!
对啊，「黑•粉」号是特意为佩佩定制的。
Yep, the "Hertadore" was specially customized for Peppy.
你们这算是危险驾驶吧？
怎么会呢？我可是很注意佩佩的安全的。
Of course not! I'm very careful about Peppy's safety.
佩佩示意你触碰它背包某处，你按下按钮—— 「联觉信标已激活。」
Peppy gestures for you to press a certain spot on his backpack, and you push the button — "Synesthesia Beacon Activated."
（不愧是{NICKNAME}，你的车技太牛啦，佩佩四手开车都追不上，你简直是匹诺康尼车神！）
(As expected of {NICKNAME}, your driving skills are amazing. Peppy couldn't catch up, even with four "hands" on the wheel. You're a true Penaconian driving legend!)
…没想到会在这里遇上你们俩？
...Didn't expect to run into you two here!
佩佩想玩赛车很久了，至于我…过来给黑塔空间站打打广告，算是工作休闲两不耽误。
Peppy's been wanting to race for a while. As for me... I'm just here to advertise for Herta Space Station. Work–life balance, you know?
（为了参赛，我们可费了不少功夫呢！）
(We put a lot of effort into entering the race!)
组委会起初是不同意佩佩参赛的…可惜我还准备了两台球笼赛车呢——
The committee initially didn't want Peppy to race... Too bad I had two Spheroid racers ready—
（「大•黑•粉」号和「黑•粉」号，都是以黑塔女士本人为灵感设计的，汪！）
("The Hertadore" model and "Hertadore" model are both inspired by Madam Herta herself, woof!)
可惜组委会要求非人生物必须有监护人陪同……
Unfortunately, the committee required non-human participants to have a guardian present...
还好找了律师团，果然能花钱能解决的问题都不叫问题。
But luckily, I found a legal team. No wonder they say problems that can be resolved with money are never problems.
我被著名黑客按头参加比赛了。
A famous hacker strong-armed me into joining the tournament.
之前骇入空间站的那个？
The one who hacked the space station before?
（汪，这背后会不会有什么阴谋？ {NICKNAME}你要多加小心！）
(Woof! Something feels off about this... {NICKNAME}, you better watch your back!)
我们关系不错，不用担心。
（关系再不错，但帮别人报名比赛还是有点不太好。）
(Even if you're cool, signing someone up without asking is shady.)
Seems she's kinda casual about this...
（是吧，就跟她擅自骇入空间站一样，这不太好。）
(Exactly. Like when she hacked the space station on a whim. Not cool.)
总之…出门在外，还是保护好自己。实在不行，就跟我们一起回空间站吧。

Ahahaha! Our champion is young, and a bit too excited, but I think you can all get what {F#s}he meant — Did we hear that? Remember the joy you feel on the racetrack and win happiness for yourselves! You need to enjoy the challenge!

With the game launching soon, the IPC will set up the original arcade store on your property, {TEXTJOIN#87}, since you're both a Penacony shareholder and beta testing partner! And don't worry — it'll be completely under your ownership!
一切经营费用，一切经营管理，都不需要您亲自操心…您只需要在这里每天打游戏，躺着挣钱就可以了！
No need to worry about any expenses or management headaches... Just show up, play some games, and collect your earnings while chilling out!
咱们事不宜迟，现在就立刻体验一下这次的新内容吧！
Let's not waste another second — time to try out the new content!
来来来，我已经等不及了！
为了恭贺新店开业，慈玉女士也授权了「翡翠小鸟」赠予咱们这家「元祖店」！
To celebrate our grand opening, Lady Bonajade has graciously granted our original store the right to use the Jadebird!
凡是来「{TEXTJOIN#87}」的游客，都将有机会免费体验它。真是太棒了，不是吗？
Anyone who visits {TEXTJOIN#87} gets to experience it for free! Amazing, right?
事不宜迟，咱们这就把「街机厅」开起来吧！别让我们的客人等太久了！

感觉你们好像一直很着急！
Why are you in such a rush?
哎呀，老板您有所不知，现在街机厅的玩家就喜欢快速上手的活动！

合着这半天，还没开店呢？

咱们还等着您到店剪彩呢，那现在算是天赐良机…咱们立刻开店。

您就在一旁玩着游戏等待，咱们的筑梦师工程小队立刻展开施工——

「折纸小鸟对对碰•元祖店」的施工十分顺利，你刚进匹配界面，便已完工了。

可算赶上了…真是千钧一发啊！多亏我福大命大…当然，也少不了你的功劳。

{NICKNAME}，我的{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}，救救，救救！这匹诺康尼有邪物作祟啊……
{NICKNAME}, my {F#bestie}{M#bro}, HELP ME! Something seriously evil is happening in Penacony!

名为<color=#dbc291ff>「不打游戏我就要死了」</color>的诅咒！

虽然你们只能听到可爱的两声「啾啾」，但它实际上在说「不和我继续玩下去的话，就去死吧！我会像抽油烟机一样把你的灵魂全部抽走……」

虽然你们只能听到可爱的两声「啾啾」，但它实际上在说「你休想摆脱我的掌控，你还是抓紧时间打游戏吧，这样才能活下去……」

你别担心，毕竟这里是街机厅！

...Talk about perfect timing, Miss Qingque. We just set up this "arcade" for everyone to enjoy, which solves your emergency perfectly.

…不过感谢纯美女神伊德莉拉，我们也结识了不少侠义之士正在赶来的路上，他们之中肯定有人能帮助到你！

等等！什么叫「对不起，我没能保护好你」啊喂！你不会真的要……

Alright. We're going to open for business...
Don't worry, Qingque. I've got your back.
我就知道能指望你{F#好姐妹}{M#好兄弟}！

别啾啦！江湖救急！！性命攸关！！！

总之没时间解释了！这边的街机是你的吧？快快快——先让我打两把，不然就来不及了！

Let The Great Qing play the arcade machine right away.
裳裳，这幽灵小鸟确实有几分能耐。
Shangshang, I'll admit it, this Ghost Bird's got some skills.
这不只是说明我们仨…都不擅长打游戏吗？我本来就够菜了，没想到你俩比我还菜。

看来，转型成为游戏实况博主的计划要推迟了……

嘁嘁嘁，不就是赢了几场游戏而已嘛，有什么好得意的？老子看你也嚣张不了多久了。
Tsk tsk tsk, winning a couple rounds doesn't mean you get to act smug. I doubt you'll stay on top for long.
光是打赢它也没用，它会赖皮。
Just winning won't cut it. That thing plays dirty.
哼，老子我当然知道，有谁比咱们十王司更了解这些邪门歪道呢……
Hmph, like I didn't know that already. Who would know these fiends' ways better than us folks from the Ten-Lords Commission?
捉鬼小队只是过来打游戏的吗？
Was the ghost-hunting squad just here to play games?
亏你还是捉鬼小队一员，老子我教教你，打游戏也可以是赛博捉鬼。
And you call yourself part of the ghost-hunting squad? Let me show you — gaming can be cyber ghostbusting!
藿藿你是不是尾巴大爷假扮的？
Huohuo, are you Mr. Tail in disguise?
...Oh? Am I that bad at acting?
藿藿我呀，我…呸呸呸，大爷我不演了，这到底是在演给谁看啊！
Huohuo's scared - I mean, ugh, fine! I give up! This act's over! Who am I even putting on a show for, huh!?
青雀小姐别担心，真正的藿藿应该找到你在现实酒店的房间了。
Don't worry, Miss Qingque, the real Huohuo should've already found your hotel room in reality by now.
呵呵，急什么，你真以为我跟个那榆木脑袋似的，傻了吧唧地想靠打游戏收拾它？
Heh, relax. You really thought I was some blockhead trying to beat this thing with video games?
行了，闲话到此为止，小怂包应该搞定了——！
Alright, enough chatter, the scaredy-cat should've handled things by now!
幽灵小鸟就像是泄了气的气球，掉落在地上。青雀和波提欧也顺利地恢复了原状。
The Ghost Bird falls to the ground like a deflated balloon. Qingque and Boothill also return to their normal forms.
尾巴大爷，灵符生效了！看来这只幽灵小鸟也是逃窜的岁阳吧！
Mr. Tail, the talisman worked! Looks like this Ghost Bird was another one of those runaway heliobi!
差不多得了，叫「岁阳」也罢，叫「神圣呜呜伯」也罢，本大爷根本不在乎，现在咱们只用管怎么处理它——
Whether you call it "Heliobus" or "Holy Wubbaboo," I don't care. All that matters now is how we deal with it—
就这样带回仙舟也怪麻烦的，要不我嗷呜一口把它给吃了？
Dragging it back to the Xianzhou sounds like a pain. What if I just gulp it down right here?
求饶也没用，你问问他们答不答应！
Begging won't help. Ask them if they're okay with it!
呃…我无所谓，只要别让它再去祸害人就行了。现在我唯一的想法就是，短时间内，我再也不想碰「折纸小鸟对对碰」了。
Uh... I don't really care, as long as it doesn't go around causing trouble anymore. Honestly, the only thing on my mind is: I don't want to touch Origami Bird Clash again. Not for a long, long time.
哼，既然你们都没什么想法，不如让我赏它颗枪子？放心，我一向很准。
Hmph. If none of you have a better idea, how about I finish it with a bullet? Don't worry, I never miss.
别吓唬它了，波提欧兄弟。既然是在挚友的街机厅里，不如问问{F#她}{M#他}的意见？
Don't scare it, Boothill. Since we're in our dear friend's arcade, why don't we let {F#her}{M#him} decide?
它这么爱玩，我正好缺个店员…
It's clearly obsessed with gaming, and I just so happen to be short on staff now...
对哦！要是能留在你这里，它岂不是想玩多久就玩多久。
Oh right! If it stays here, it can play all day long.
它必须在我的街机厅打工赎罪！
It has to work off its crimes at my arcade!
自己犯下的错自己弥补，在下支持球棒•忍者的决定。
You have to clean up the mess you made. I support Baseball Bat Ninja's decision.
不愧是我的挚友，我也赞同你那符合「纯美」精神的决定！
Spoken like a true friend! I, too, support your choice — it's perfectly in line with the spirit of "the Beauty"!
…算了，既然仙舟小妹的事情解决了，我也不打算在这傻呆着了，那就回头见吧。
...Whatever. Since the issue with the Xianzhou girl's been resolved, I'm not sticking around anymore. Catch you all later.
银枪•修罗殿下，你变成折纸小鸟时确实可爱，需要看看在下拍摄的照片吗？
Lord Silvergun Shura, you were adorable as an Origami Bird. Would you like to see the photos I took?
闭嘴，看我现在就把你的照片爱了！
Shut it. I'm gonna put holes in those photos now!
谢谢你们，亲爱的友友们，真是帮大忙了！
Thank you so much, my dearest friends. You really saved the day!
既然顺利结束了，干脆我们到黄金的时刻到处逛逛吧？
Now that everything's settled, how about we take a stroll around Golden Hour?
哎，裳裳啊，我怕你把自己给逛丢了。
Oh, Shangshang, I'm worried you'll end up getting lost out there.
我…我才刚来，诶？！这就要去出门逛街了吗？感觉街上人会很多的样子……
I... I just got here, eh!? We're heading out already? The streets look packed...
来都来了，去好好玩玩吧！
Well, since we're here, might as well enjoy ourselves!
{F#你这小姑娘}{M#你小子}记得忙完了多陪藿藿她们玩，别以为我们大老远跑来一趟就是帮你们解决问题的，你还是先想想打算怎么招待我们吧！

{F#Girl}{M#Boy}, once you're done with your errands, make sure to spend some time with Huohuo and the others! Don't think we traveled all this way just to fix your mess. We're expecting proper hospitality, you hear?
让我来招待各位吧，这次也是给各位添了不少麻烦！正好让我离这些街机也远一些！
Allow me to host everyone this time. I've caused enough trouble already! Besides, it's a good excuse to get away from those arcade machines!
…而{NICKNAME}，等你回到罗浮，我也一定好好招待你的！
...And {NICKNAME}, once you're back on the Luofu, I'll give you a proper welcome too!
大家都走了呢，抱歉，请让我来服务尊贵的您吧……
Everyone's gone... Please allow me to serve you, esteemed guest...
等等，什么情况？！你会说话？
Wait, what the heck!? You can talk!?
我发现自己并不是真正的折纸小鸟。
I've realized I'm not really an Origami Bird after all.
吓我一跳，你在这好好上班吧！
You gave me a scare! Just behave and get back to work!
遵命，老板。你人真是太好了，老板。
Understood, boss. You're seriously the best, boss.
之前狠狠地打街机，我也赚了不少，请您收下，就当作是我的赔礼吧。
I racked up quite a bit earlier playing those arcade machines. Please accept this as a token of my apology.
我已经想明白了，我不会纠缠着别人成为我的朋友了。因为来玩游戏的，都是朋友。
I've made up my mind. I won't cling to others and force them to be my friends anymore, because anyone who's here to game is already a friend.
虽然但是，{NICKNAME}老板，这街机老好玩了，你有空的话也去多打几局吧。
That said, Boss {NICKNAME}, this arcade game is super fun. If you have time, you should definitely play a few more rounds.
Would you like to start a game now?
先让我打两把游戏吧{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，有什么话待会再说！
Let me squeeze in a couple of rounds first, {F#sister}{M#brother}. We'll talk later!
…幽灵小鸟问你，是不是也想和它做「朋友」？
...The Ghost Bird is asking if you want to be its "friend" too.
还他宝贝的磨蹭什么呢？
What the fudge are you waiting for?
我有种预感，挚友，事情不会这么简单地结束……
I've got a bad feeling about this, my friend. I don't think things will end so simply...
怎么办，{F#姐妹}{M#兄弟}，我可一点都不想变成折纸小鸟啊……
What do we do, {F#sister}{M#brother}? I really don't want to turn into an Origami Bird...
幽灵小鸟说，其实更希望我去陪伴它…别随随便便说出那么可怕的话啊喂！
The Ghost Bird says it just wants me to stay and keep it company... Don't say something that creepy so casually!
是我的错觉吗，挚友…变成折纸小鸟之后，波提欧兄弟似乎更加「纯美」了？
Is it just me, my friend... or has Boothill become even more aligned with the Beauty since turning into an Origami Bird?
请放心，在下定不负所托！
Rest assured, I won't let you down!
放心吧，本大爷出马，手到擒来。
Relax! With me around, it's a cakewalk.
怎么样？{NICKNAME}老板，有空来玩一局吗？
So, boss {NICKNAME}, how about a round when you're free?
你将波提欧小鸟摆放在街机上
You place Bootbird on the arcade machine
你将青雀小鸟摆放在街机上
You place Qingqird on the arcade machine
消这个，对…不是，旁边那个！
Use this one, yes... No! The other one!
Shut it! If you're so good, do it yourself!
Fine, I'll do it myself. Move out of the way!
这玩意怎么还有网络延迟？！
打不过怎么不找自己的问题…
Don't you think you're the problem if you can't win?
不愧是您！这娴熟而精准的操作，一看就是老玩家了。
As expected of you! That smooth, pinpoint precision — you're clearly a veteran.
那么现在就立刻来体验一下这次的新内容吧！
Then let's jump right in and experience the new update!
呦，好久不见。听小姑娘说，你现在已经是圣杯的主人了？
Hey, it's been a while. The girl said that you're now the owner of the Holy Grail?
奥帝这老矮子也是会做生意，等到「圣杯」既没法响应愿望，也没法召唤英灵了，才把这麻烦送了个顺水人情。
That old shorty, Oti, sure knows how to do business. He only decided to pass the problem off as a favor when the Holy Grail stopped granting wishes or summoning Heroic Spirits.
这不等于把宝箱里的珠宝偷走，甩了个破烂箱子出去吗？
Isn't that just like stealing the jewels from a treasure chest and tossing out the empty, broken box?
Lancer啦，Lancer。虽说咱确实和你有过些不快的回忆，怎么也算是托负过后背的战友吧？
Lancer. Sure, we've had some not-so-great memories, but we've fought together too. Doesn't that count for something?
就这么把我忘了可不太厚道。
Forgetting me so easily is rather rude.
谁知道呢？多半是冗余的魔力和「战斗续行」的能力导致的。大家都消散之后，单单把我留了下来。
Who knows? It's probably the result of some excess magical energy and the "Battle Continuation" ability. After everyone else vanished, I was the one left behind.
现在看来，一时半会儿还回不了英灵座。
Seems like I won't be heading back to the Throne of Heroes anytime soon.
一段附赠的人生，就当是「圣杯」的怜悯吧。
I'll consider these extra life hours as a gift of mercy from the Holy Grail.
圣杯已经完全没用了吗？
Is the Holy Grail completely useless now?
理论上应该如此。现在的「圣杯」只剩下了外形，内在已经和这片梦境的本质，也就是你们说的「忆质」融为一体。
Theoretically, yes. The Holy Grail's form remains, but its core has merged with the nature of this dream world, what you call "memoria."
可那位螺丝咕姆不知道做了什么手脚，竟提炼出了仪式的一部分，将其制作成了特殊的拟似装置。
But that Screwllum... I'm not sure what tricks he pulled, but he somehow extracted part of the ritual and turned it into a special simulation device.
不得不说，这个世界，也有着了不得的魔术师啊。
I have to admit... this world has some truly incredible mages.
There are only about eighty or so of them, I think.
Mechanical rituals. Cyber magecraft. Same thing.
总而言之，改造后的「圣杯」保留了原有的对抗逻辑，以及匹诺康尼十二时刻的残存信息。
Anyway, the modified Holy Grail still carries the original competition's logic, along with the lingering data of the Penaconian Twelve Hours.
只要，接入？现代词语还真让人不习惯。只要接入「圣杯」，就能在梦泡里重现匹诺康尼的「圣杯战争」。

As long as... you "connect"? It's still hard to get used to the modern terminology. Anyway, as long as you connect to the Holy Grail, you can relive the Penaconian Holy Grail War in this dream bubble.
按他的说法，它将以使用者的记忆为媒介，载入命途行者的模拟数据。
According to him, it will fill in the simulation data of the Pathstriders using the user's memory as a medium.
你或许能在「圣杯」里遇上不少老朋友，但我对此实在是没什么兴趣。
You may meet many old friends in the Holy Grail, but I'm honestly not interested.
英雄们斗技游戏的{RUBY_B#英灵殿}瓦尔哈拉{RUBY_E#}？我还不想那么早去那儿呢。不过，确实会比没有纷争的{RUBY_B#Meg Mell}常乐原野{RUBY_E#}更适合我也说不定。

The heroes' arena in {RUBY_B#the Temple of Heroes}Valhalla{RUBY_E#}? Not ready to visit there just yet. Though I suppose it might fit me more than the peaceful {RUBY_B#Meg Mell}Elysian Fields{RUBY_E#}.
好了，螺丝咕姆先生让我传的话我已经传到了，该继续去外面挥霍剩余的时间了。
Anyway, I've delivered Mr. Screwllum's message. It's time to waste the rest of my days outside.
至于剩下的东西，用你自己的眼睛去看吧。
As for the rest, go and take a look for yourself.
（这家伙跑得也太快了，算了，还是自己看看改造后的圣杯有什么变化吧。）
(He's quick to run. Forget it. I'll check out what's changed in the modified Holy Grail.)
So, how's life treating you these days?
不得不说，匹诺康尼可真是个好地方，尤其是这儿的酒吧。就连波提欧兄弟，也对这儿的口味赞不绝口。
I've got to say, Penacony is quite the place, especially the bar. Even my bro Boothill's been raving about the drinks.
Where did you get the money from?
别用这种眼神看我，我可是在机动球大赛上拿了个冠军，还顺便替猎犬家系把噩梦边境的怪物都清剿了个干净。
Don't give me that look. I won a championship at the Roboball Contest and helped the Bloodhound Family clear out the monsters on the Nightmare's borders.
他们私底下都管我叫大哥呢…猎犬和猛犬，倒也算种缘分。
They all call me "Big Brother" in private. The Bloodhound Family and the Hound... seems like fate brought us together.
说起来，你在这儿似乎是个大人物？在酒吧调酒的舒翁小姐，你应该也认识吧。
By the way, you seem like quite an important person around here? You know Ms. Siobhan, the bartender?
I'm not playing matchmaker for you.
那可真是位美人儿啊，风趣幽默，光是想想，就能顶上满满一杯的美酒。
She's quite the beauty, huh? Witty and charming. Just the thought of her rivals a glass of fine wine.
I'm pretty witty too, you know.
You talk about drinking with minors?
Think any further and you'll get drunk.
算了，大人的情愫，和你这小孩子说了，也不会懂的。
Forget it. A child like you won't understand how we adults feel, even if I explain it to you.
认识你也有段日子了，不管你认不认，至少我打心眼里觉得你算是值得交往的朋友。来，这点东西，就当是给你的礼物了——可别嫌弃啊。
I've known you for a while now. Whether you admit it or not, I consider you a friend worth having. Here, take this. Just a little gift — don't turn it down.
（有段时间没见到Lancer了，也不知道他最近在干什么。）
(It's been a while since I last saw Lancer. I wonder what he's up to.)
（以他的性子，多半还混在舒翁的酒吧里吧。）
(With his personality, he's probably still hanging out at Siobhan's bar.)
（Lancer似乎不在，不过，这里什么时候多了个<color=#dbc291ff>梦泡</color>？）
(Lancer doesn't seem to be here, but when did another <color=#dbc291ff>dream bubble</color> appear?)
我打算去「蓝调的时刻」逛逛，你这小孩子就别跟过来啦。
I'm planning to check out the Blue Hour. You shouldn't follow me, kid.
下次见吧，祝你做个好梦。
See you next time, and hope you have sweet dreams.
还是老样子，一杯「黄金国」，对吧？
Still the same old? A glass of El Dorado, right?
舒翁小姐，那饮料的味道太烈了。今天的话，换杯「长眠不醒」吧。
Ms. Siobhan, that drink's a bit too strong. Let's go with The Big Sleep today.
金色的美梦已经足够了。余下的这点时间，也只是「圣杯」的一点馈赠而已。
The golden dream is more than enough for me. The rest of this time is just a gift from the Holy Grail.
你还是爱说些大家听不懂的话。不过，倒也挺有趣的。
You've got a way of saying things no one understands. But... it's kind of intriguing.
舒翁背过身去，糖浆、冰块和酒杯碰撞，迸发出晶莹的交响乐。
Siobhan turns away. The sound of syrup, ice, and glass clinking together is like a crystal symphony.
蓝发的异乡英雄笑着倚在吧台上，逐渐变得透明，直到消散在不存在的风里。
The blue-haired foreign hero leans against the bar with a smile, slowly becoming transparent, until he vanishes into the wind that didn't exist.
那个忆泡…他是你的朋友吗？
That Memory Bubble... Is he your friend?
We've been through so much together.
无论是猎犬还是猛犬，小狗都总是喜欢不告而别呢……
Whether it's the Bloodhound or the Hound, pups always seem to leave without saying a word...
要久违地来一杯吗？我请客。
How about a long-overdue drink? My treat.
就当是替匹诺康尼表示感谢吧，一杯「长眠不醒」，敬，往日的幽灵。
Consider it a token of gratitude on behalf of Penacony. A glass of "The Big Sleep" to the ghosts of the past.
奥帝…先生！我肯定是吃错了药，才会信你的那些鬼话！
Mr. Oti...! I must've been insane to believe your nonsense!
不仅没抢到圣杯，还被巡海游侠打得半身不遂。我被耽误的工时、全勤奖、医药费还有精神损失费，你准备怎么赔我？
I didn't just lose the Holy Grail. I got brutalized by a Galaxy Ranger! How are you going to compensate me for my lost hours, full attendance bonus, medical bills, and emotional distress?
嚯嗬嗬嗬，别着急嘛，斯科特先生。我老奥帝做生意向来遵守一个原则，那就是绝不让合作伙伴吃亏。
Hohoho, take it easy, Mr. Skott. I always stick to one rule when it comes to business: I never let my partners take a loss.
看看你的账户，这场演出的片酬应该已经打到账上了。
Check your account. Your payment for the performance should've been transferred.
我就知道！老奥帝先生您德高望重、雅量非凡，不会亏待我这可怜巴巴的小喽啰。
I knew it! Mr. Oti, as a respected and generous man, you'd never leave a poor little guy like me hanging.
您看，我千里迢迢地过来，也没给您带什么特产，一点公司医院的石膏，还望您笑纳。
You see, I traveled all this way and didn't get the time to bring anything special for you. This is a little plaster from the IPC hospital. Hope you'll like it.
不必拘谨——正巧，咱们的老朋友也来了，你也和{F#她}{M#他}打打招呼吧。
Don't be shy — as luck would have it, our old friend is here too. Go ahead and say hello to {F#her}{M#him}.
放心吧，我肯定死在你后头。
Oh, don't worry. I'll definitely only die after you do.
So, what sound are we going to have you make this time?
你又过来干什么？今天我可没有招惹你。
What do you want this time? I didn't mess with you today.
嚯嗬嗬嗬，斯科特先生，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}多半是来找我算账的。
Hohoho, Mr. Skott, I'd wager {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME} is here to settle a score with me.
I wanna punch you in the face.
当然可以。但我这满是褶皱的脸皮，如果脏了股东的手，就得不偿失了。
Be my guest. But this wrinkly old face of mine? Might not be worth dirtying a shareholder's hand.
是啊，声势浩大地搞出一场「圣杯战争」，不仅没实现愿望，丢了一大笔赔偿金，还给公司和克劳克影业打了免费广告。
Yeah, we kicked off this flashy Holy Grail War, didn't get our wish, racked up a fat compensation bill, and gave the IPC and Clock Studios free publicity.
但真是这样吗？那些被吸引来的游客，总不会是假的吧？
But was it really all for nothing? Those tourists who showed up sure looked real enough.
为钟表小子花钱也罢，为鸢尾花的表演花钱也罢，哪怕把钱投进公司的店铺，只要在匹诺康尼消费，就总有一份钱会流进我的口袋。
Whether they're paying for Clockie, the Iris shows, or just shopping in the stores — every penny spent in Penacony ends with a little slice in my pocket.
更多的消费者，才是名为匹诺康尼的「圣杯」需要的燃料。
More consumers — that's the fuel this so-called Holy Grail of Penacony truly runs on.
往好处想，身为股东的你，不也能从中分得一杯羹吗？
Look on the bright side: You're a shareholder, right? Means you get a slice of the pie too.
You're not worried this'll blow up in your face?
Oh, that's so nice of you.
时候不早了，{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，想必你还有比同一位无趣的老人闲聊更重要的事吧？
It's getting late, {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}. I'm sure you've got better things to do than chat with a boring old man like me.
如果还有什么想问的，我也可以为你解答一二。
If you've got questions, I can spare a few answers.
可以摸摸你头上的绒球吗？
Can I touch the fluff ball on your head?

免得你问个不停，我事先作个说明吧。
Before you start ceaselessly asking questions, let me explain.
我收到一位求学者的邀请，希望能得到我点拨的机会。我见不得蠢材，但这家伙孜孜不倦，求知若渴…往我的邮箱里塞满了荒唐的问题。
I received an invitation from a scholar, asking for my guidance. I can't stand fools, but this one is persistent and eager to learn... and flooded my inbox with ridiculous questions.
「龙尊角里的力量就是角动量吗？」「岁阳是绿色的是不是能光合作用？」「到底是锤子还是胸口碎的大石？」
"Is the power in the high elder's horn just angular momentum?" "Heliobi are green, can they perform photosynthesis?" "Was it the hammer or the chest that smashed boulder slabs?"
Somehow, this all feels a bit too familiar...
Doesn't sound like someone from around here.
我不奢望一次面谈能让这家伙醍醐灌顶，但要是能放过我的邮箱，我也就谢天谢地了。
I don't expect one conversation to work miracles, but if it stops them from flooding my inbox, I'll gladly take it.
