Mirror, mirror, floating there, who holds beauty and wisdom beyond compare?
连接至匹诺康尼网络，根据本地点赞量最高的回答——当然是知更鸟女士。
Connecting to the Penacony network. Based on the most-liked answer at this location — the answer is, of course, Miss Robin.
（趁黑塔教第四面镜什么是*客观*的工夫，给调饮起个名好了。）
(While Herta's busy teaching the Fourth Mirror a thing or two about being objective, might as well name the drink.)
算是无聊生活里不错的调味剂吧。不过，闹腾不出什么水花。
A decent little spice in an otherwise boring life. But still, it won't make much of a splash.
被人谈论是很糟糕的事，但更糟糕的是根本没人谈论。
Being talked about sucks. But being ignored is even worse.
（嗯，就这样，把调饮的名字和效果记录下来吧。）
(Alright, that's it. Just jot down the drink names and effects.)
人偶把感官信标接收到的数据发给我了。嗯，看起来味道不错。
The puppet just sent me the latest sensory beacon data. Hmm, seems the flavor was decent.
（这个配方或许还有发掘的空间……）
(This recipe might have more potential to explore...)
相比于小白鼠，我更习惯当掌控一切的观察者。请吧，你可以让人偶再试试。
I prefer being the all-seeing observer over being a test subject. Go ahead, you can let the puppet try again.
为黑塔女士服务，我的荣幸！
It's an honor to serve Madam Herta!
这个配方暂时先试到这里吧。
Let's call it a day for this recipe trial.
人偶给了我最新的感官数据。一切正常，只是理智指标略微有些混乱。
The puppet provided updated sensory feedback. Everything checks out, though the rationality index is slightly unstable.
今天的实验就到此为止吧，做得还不错，姑且对你表示赞扬。
That's all for today's experiment. You did fairly well. Consider that a compliment for you.
这个配方就试到这里吧。
Let's stop testing this recipe here.
一切准备就绪，可以开张了！
All set up and ready to open!
今天会遇见什么样的客人呢……
I wonder who'll walk through that door today...
你朝走廊的尽头张望，想一睹为快。回廊空空荡荡的，没有透露任何秘密。
You peek down the hallway, curious to catch a glimpse. But it's empty and reveals no secret.
Guess that means it's chill time...
Hey! What are you looking at?
站在吧台里左顾右盼、鬼鬼祟祟…小灰毛，你又偷吃什么了？
Sneaking around behind the bar, shifty eyes and all... What'd you sneak a bite of this time, Gray Hair?
I was pretending to admire the view.
花火大人听到了些小道消息，在我的地盘上，竟然冒出了个兜售古怪调饮的家伙。
Word on the street is that some weird upstart has been peddling funky drinks on my turf.
这种咄咄怪事，我怎么能不来瞧瞧呢？
You think I'd let something that strange slide without coming to check it out?
Fame really does come with baggage, huh.
梦境里的大名人，窝在小酒吧里给人调饮…嘻，肯定有什么好玩的事瞒着我对吧？
The big-shot from the Dreamscape, slinging drinks in some back-alley dive? Heh, you've definitely been keeping something fun from me, I assume?
Well, since you're already here, why not have a drink?
嘿嘿，真聪明，我就是为这个来的~
Hehe, smart move! That's exactly why I came~
花火和你眼神相触，一丝不祥的预感从你的脑海中闪过。
Your eyes meet Sparkle's and suddenly, you get the sinking feeling something bad's about to happen.
反应过来时，你已经被踢到了吧台外。而对面，花火早已津津有味地翻看了一遍「特调配方」。
Before you can react, you're booted out from behind the bar. Sparkle's already flipping through the "Special Mix Recipes" on the other side.
有意思有意思，这种乐子竟然藏着掖着，真把我当外人了呀~
That's quite interesting. So you've been keeping all the fun to yourself? That's not how you treat a friend?
我也来调一杯吧，嗯…就试这份「梦乡」调饮好了。
Guess I'll mix one too. Hmm... let's see what this "Dreamland" drink is all about.
这位顾客，久等了！调酒大师花火的倾情巨献，要细细品味哦。
Thanks for waiting, dear guest! Here comes a handcrafted masterpiece by your master mixologist Sparkle. Sip it slow.
At this point, a lame joke is expected.
一位悲悼伶人和假面愚者在酒馆相遇了。几杯调饮下肚，悲悼伶人开始哭诉起来。
A Mourning Actor and a Masked Fool walk into a bar. After a few drinks, the Actor starts sobbing.
「我没有父母，没有朋友，更身无长物，只有这副该死的面具！」
"I have no parents, no friends, no possessions... just this darn mask!"
「不，朋友，你错了。」假面愚者拍拍他的肩膀，安慰道，「你现在连面具都没有了。」
"No, friend, you're mistaken." The Fool pats his shoulder and says, "Now you don't even have your mask."
您理解了吗？「悲悼」伶人又「被盗」了，令人黯然神伤。
Now the Mourning Actor's got nothing left. What a mourn-umental loss! Get it?
Nobody asked you for this joke.
这位顾客，你好，请有序排队，提前准备好取餐码。
Good day, dear customer! Please wait in line and have your pickup code ready.
I'm literally the only customer here.
这么快就适应客人的身份啦，小灰毛？别急，这就给你上餐~
Getting comfy in your customer role already, Gray Hair? Hold tight, your order's coming right up~
I never got a pickup code.
当然没有，因为我根本就没发呀。嘻嘻，这杯饮料就送给你吧~
Of course you didn't. I never sent one. Hehe~ this one's on the house!
请慢用，不好喝可以免费重做哦~
Enjoy. If it tastes off, I'll gladly make another one for free!
你喝下调饮，突然间眼前一黑。
You take a sip... and everything goes black.
此次征讨的并非宵小之辈，而是弹指间能碾碎星辰的一方绝灭大君……
We're not up against some petty thug this time. This is a Lord Ravager. It could crush the stars in the blink of an eye...
大君已至阵前，有劳「星穹」仙舟的{NICKNAME}将军统筹。将军，请校阅各仙舟事宜吧。
The Lord Ravager has arrived at the front line. General {NICKNAME} of the Xianzhou "Star Rail," the command is yours. Please review the mobilization across the Xianzhou ships.
Wait, I'm a General? For real?
呵呵，将军又在说笑了。大敌当前，还请将军指点阵前事宜。
Haha, you never fail to amuse us, General. But now's no time for jokes. Your leadership is needed more than ever.
你去给幽囚狱加几道门。
Go reinforce the Shackling Prison. Add a few extra doors while you're at it.
And don't forget to put on a few more locks.
多谢将军提醒。我会向十王司着重交代此事。
Thank you for the reminder, General. I'll make sure the Ten-Lords Commission gets the message loud and clear.
呵呵，{NICKNAME}将军仗义相助，老头子也不得不出一份力了。为此歼灭大君一役，朱明仙舟已向友邦求购矿石煤炭，并征用半数商舸，以添运力。

With you stepping up, General {NICKNAME}, even this old man can't sit idle. For the sake of this campaign to destroy a Lord Ravager, the Xianzhou Zhuming has already secured ore and coal shipments from our allies and seized half our merchant ships to boost logistics.
We'll send that Overlord running with its tail between its legs!
刀枪剑戟、甲胄丹药，均已齐备，必能确保物资供给无忧。
Knives, spears, swords, helmets, armor, and medicinal pellets are all prepped and ready. Supply lines are locked in.
Make sure there's extra SoulGlad. I'm hooked on that stuff.
呵呵，吃穿用度、诸般物事，自然也是少不了的。
Haha, don't worry. We've got all the creature comforts covered too.
亏得炎老解决后顾之忧，诸将士摩拳擦掌，士气愈发高涨了。
Thanks to master Huaiyan securing the rear, morale's through the roof. Our troops are fired up and ready to go.
曜青云骑皆已整装待发，只待{NICKNAME}将军一声令下，便能冲锋陷阵，斩将夺旗，与那大君一较高低。
The Yaoqing Cloud Knights are locked and loaded. Just say the word, General {NICKNAME}, and they'll charge headfirst into the fray!
能有诸位相助，优势在我！
With comrades like you at my side, victory's already halfway ours!
把本将军的竞锋舰炮拉过来！
将军所言极是。此外，探子也打探到了不少情报，有劳花火将军详述一二。
The General speaks wisely. Furthermore, our scouts have gathered quite a bit of intelligence. General Sparkle, would you kindly elaborate on the details?
So you're just casting yourself now?
怎么，你当得将军，我当不得？
What, you're allowed to be a general and I'm not?
咳…据刺探来的情报，这位绝灭大君可不简单哪。传闻里它生有獠牙四足，通体雪白，不出世则已，一出世便灾异横行，生灵涂炭。

Ahem... According to our sources, this Lord Ravager isn't your everyday monster. Rumor has it that it has four legs, fangs, and snow-white hide. It only appears in times of great chaos, bringing disaster wherever it goes.
Any chance we could get some useful intel?
哎，将军有所不知。细节决定成败，保不准小道消息里，就藏着制敌之道呢~
Come now, General. Victory lies in the details. Sometimes, it's those little rumors that hold the key to winning the war~
你说的这位大君，它是人吗？
This Overlord you're talking about... Is it even human?
哎，只要破坏力够强，是不是人形又有什么关系呢？
As long as it's destructive enough, who cares if it's human or not?
无妨。有诸位将军坐镇，仙舟上下一心、同仇敌忾，定能将那绝灭大君彻底剿灭！
Fair enough. With all of you holding the line, and the whole Xianzhou standing united, we will bring down that Lord Ravager!
Haha, being a general feels so amazing.
Far or near, we shall strike them down!
前线来报，敌军主力被尽数歼灭。但大敌仍作困兽之斗，率领残党直奔此处来了。
Urgent report! The enemy's main force has been obliterated. But the Overlord's not done yet. It's leading a desperate charge straight toward us.
Let it come. My bat's got a few words for it.
It's not leaving this place alive!
Behold! The mighty Overlord Peppy has arrived! Woof!
在这里的所有人，统统发配到「禁闭舱段」擦地板，一个不留！
Everyone here, straight to the seclusion zone. Grab a mop and start scrubbing. No exceptions!
How did you become the Lord Ravager!?
汪汪！没想到吧，因为这里是匹诺康尼——
Woof woof! Bet you didn't see that coming. This is Penacony!
每个人都能实现自己的梦想汪！
Here, anyone's dreams can come true, woof!
我打听到了它的出生年月、星座血型、饮食忌口，将军想听哪一个？
I even found its birthday, zodiac sign, blood type, and food allergies. Which one do you want, General?
你清醒过来，发现自己趴在桌子上睡着了。
You wake up, slumped over the table. Turns out you'd dozed off.
你醒啦，小灰毛？俗话说日有所思，夜有所梦。原来你每天都想着这些事呀。
Rise and shine, Gray Hair. Like they say, think about something all day, and you'll dream about it at night. So this is what's been on your mind, huh?
Whew, that was close. Got a little carried away there.
I didn't sleep talk, did I?
放心放心，花火将军什么都没听到哦~
Don't worry. General Sparkle didn't hear a thing~
我的这杯大作如何？好好想想，什么样的名字才能配得上它呢？
So? What do you think of my latest masterpiece? Come on, give it a name worthy of its greatness!
这个阵容太豪华了，是不花信用点能看的吗？
This lineup is insane! Are you sure we can watch this without using any credits?
戒断反应好严重，有时长是永久的体验卡就好了。
These withdrawal symptoms are brutal... If only it came with unlimited playtime.
你喝下调饮，突然间眼前一黑。
You take a sip... and everything goes black.
不是，给我读到哪个档来了？
Hold up, what save file did I just load into?
吧台失去了调饮师，如同神策府没有将军坐镇，可是天大的事。赶紧回去看看吧。
The bar's lost its drinksmith, just like the Seat of Divine Foresight without a general. That's a major issue. You'd better get back there, stat.
呵呵，年轻人真是精力充沛啊。
Heh, youth sure is something else.
临行前竟然还抽空兼职，是零花钱不够用了么？需不需要我替你找帕姆预支些？
Even squeezing in a side gig before heading out? Outta pocket money, are we? Want me to ask Pom-Pom for an advance?
我是一个兴趣使然的调饮师，不在乎这些身外之物。
I mix drinks purely for the thrill of it. Worldly possessions mean nothing to me.
我唯一的使命，就是调饮！姬子，杨叔，要不要试试我的手艺？
My one true calling is mixology! Himeko, Mr. Yang, care for a taste?
你气喘吁吁地向二人说明了原委。
Gasping for breath, you quickly fill them in on what just happened.
你说我是花火假扮的，我还说你是异星水魈变的呢。
You say I'm just Sparkle in disguise? Please. For all I know, you're a Xenohydro in cosplay.
嗯…愚者改头换面的本领的确了得，光凭外表，的确难以分辨。
Hmm... Gotta admit, those shapeshifting tricks are impressive. Can't judge by looks alone.
不如你们比比看，谁更像真正的{NICKNAME}吧？
How about a challenge? Let's see who pulls off a better impression of {NICKNAME}.
求之不得！输的一方，干脆人道毁灭好了吧。
Gladly! Loser gets vaporized. Nice and simple.
A clear conscience fears no crooked shadow.
That was a brutal move, Sparkle...
第一回合。请听题，当在路边偶遇垃圾桶，真正的{NICKNAME}会怎么做？
Round one. Here's your question: You're walking down the street and come across a trashcan. What would the real {NICKNAME} do?
那还用说，当然是掏一掏咯。
Isn't it obvious? Gotta dig in and see what's inside.
垃圾桶壁冰冰凉凉的，摸起来很舒服。
The walls of a trashcan can are cool to the touch — feels kinda nice, actually.
我们注定只能陪伴彼此走过人生的一小段旅程。现在，该向前看了。
We're destined to only accompany each other for a small part of life's journey. Now, it's time to look ahead.
听起来都是{NICKNAME}的作风…各计一分吧。
Sounds like something {NICKNAME} would say... one point to each of you.
第二回合。既然在酒吧，就问个有关调饮的问题吧，真正的{NICKNAME}最爱的饮品是……
Round two. Since we're in a bar, let's talk drinks. What's {NICKNAME}'s go-to beverage?
我不是仙人，但我从中也得到了快乐。
I'm no immortal, but that tea brings me joy.
三月七经常找我凑单，又是一个小细节。这下总该信我了吧！
March 7th always drags me into splitting orders with her. Just another detail proving I'm the real deal!
在匹诺康尼怎么能少了苏乐达呢。经典永不过时。
How could you not mention SoulGlad in Penacony? A timeless classic.
I'm cutting back on sugar recently...
我立志不喝饮料，目前已经坚持了整整半个系统时。
I swore off drinks. Haven't had one for half a system hour.
这个问题还用思考吗？当然是姬子姐姐的咖啡！
Do we even have to ask? Of course it's Himeko's coffee!
Correct answer. You get one point.
I like it too! I really do!
晚了！你喜欢并不是发自真心。
Too late! You're just saying that to win.
那么，比赛进行第三回合…真是胶着啊。真正的{NICKNAME}身手不凡，各自露一手给我们瞧瞧吧。
Now for round three... it's a tight match. Time to show off your skills — let's see what {NICKNAME} can really do!
终于到真刀真枪的环节了吗？
Finally, time for some real action!
你掏了掏背包…但本应放着球棒的地方空空如也。
You reach into your bag... but the spot where your bat should be is unoccupied.
你在找的，不会是这个吧？
Rules are made to be broken!
综合看来…我想谁是真正的{NICKNAME}，答案已经很明显了。
Well, taking everything into account... it's pretty clear who the real {NICKNAME} is.
谢谢各位评委，谢谢到场的嘉宾朋友和支持我的每一个人。也由衷地感谢惊梦酒吧，感谢酒馆，感谢星穹列车——
Thank you, judges. Thank you to our wonderful audience, and to everyone who believed in me. Special thanks to Dreamjolt Hostelry, to this fine establishment, and to the Astral Express—
胜负已经分明，你就不必再装了吧，花火小姐？
The game's over. No need to keep pretending, Sparkle.
But... I am the real one...
真正的死亡，是被人遗忘……
If I were Sparkle... that wouldn't be so bad.
谢谢大家，当然也谢谢我可敬的对手，我最好的榜样。
Thanks, everyone. And a special thanks to my worthy rival — my greatest inspiration.
请允许我郑重宣布，在模仿{NICKNAME}大赛上夺得冠军的是——
Now, allow me to announce the winner of the {NICKNAME} Impersonator Contest—
杨叔，你真是糊涂了，我站在这儿呢！
Mr. Yang, are you blind? I'm right here!
很遗憾，花火小姐，我没有选错。真正的{NICKNAME}，是绝不会说出「喜欢姬子的咖啡」这种话的。
I'm afraid not, Miss Sparkle. I chose correctly. The real {NICKNAME} would never say something like "I like Himeko's coffee."
…尽管我并不想承认这点。别太灰心，第二名付出的努力也应当受到奖励。
...Much as I hate to admit it. Don't be too discouraged, second place deserves a reward too.
还有这种好事，奖品是什么？
Now that's what I like to hear. What's the prize?
一杯你最爱的手调咖啡。
A fresh cup of your favorite hand-crafted coffee.
杨叔和姬子点了两杯调饮，主宾尽欢后，两人向你告别离去。
Mr. Yang and Himeko each ordered a drink. After a good laugh and some cheerful banter, they bid you farewell.
不，这是两个热爱咖啡的灵魂之间的共鸣！
No, this is a resonance between two coffee-loving souls!
还挺好玩的吧。小灰毛，这杯调饮是不是特别地超出想象？
Pretty fun, huh? So, Gray Hair, wasn't that drink just... wildly unexpected?
The effect is a little too direct, if you ask me.
可别小瞧它，没准是喝了后，就会「嗖」地传送到另一处的神奇调饮也说不定呢~
Don't underestimate it. Who knows, maybe it'll whisk you straight to another place like some kind of teleporting drink!
好啦，别在意这种细节，给它起个一听就非同凡响的名字吧？
Anyway, don't sweat the details and help me name it! Something catchy and out of this world!
这地方越来越像黑店了…配方再试下去，真担心猎犬查上门啊。
This place is starting to feel like a shady bar... If we keep testing recipes, the Bloodhounds will be knocking on our door.
年轻就是好，可以倒头就睡。
Youth really is a gift. You can fall asleep anywhere, anytime.
哇哦，这位顾客，你的运气可真好！
你是花火大人今天接待的*第一位*顾客，获得了「再来一杯」奖励！现在就兑奖吧？
You're Sparkle's first customer of the day — congrats! That means you win a bonus round: "One More Cup"! Ready to redeem?
感谢支持！我一定给你多加些料~
Thanks for the support! I'll throw in something extra special~
真扫兴，不是谁都有机会喝到花火大人的特调哦~
Boo, you're no fun! Not everyone gets to taste a Sparkle original~
好啦，你的宝贝「特调配方」还给你。我把试过的配方都记下了，不要太感谢我哦。
Alright, here's your precious "custom recipe" back. I wrote down all the combos we tried. You're welcome!
记住了，酒馆可是愚者的地盘，下回有什么好玩的，一定要先通知我！
Just remember: This tavern belongs to the Fools. If anything fun's going on, I better be the first to know!
…居然还写得有模有样的。在意想不到的时候认真，也是一种愚弄吗？
Huh. Surprisingly detailed. Maybe taking things seriously at random moments is her way of fooling people too?
这个配方就试到这里。是时候去复原最后一份「特调配方」了！
That's all I have for recipe-testing. Time to recreate the final "Special Mix Recipe"!
最后一份配方字迹模糊，已经几近空白，真的有可能复原吗？
The last recipe is so faded it's almost blank. Can it really be restored?
No point worrying about it. Let's open for business!
今天会遇见什么样的客人呢……
I wonder who'll walk through that door today...
酒吧内静悄悄的，想象中的顾客并没有出现。
The lounge is quiet. The expected guests never show up.
Every party comes to an end.
人生起起落落，不能期待每一刻都像节日那般精彩。
Life rises and falls. You can't expect every moment to feel like a celebration.
公司和家族不对付，经济不景气，大环境不好…总之，生意越来难做了。
The IPC and The Family are at odds, the economy's down, the broader environment is tough... all in all, business is harder than ever.
No one knows how much time has passed...
You're starting to feel a yawn coming on.
This job is far too easy.
你怀着成为一名调饮大师的志向背井离乡来到这里，却一整天游手好闲、无所事事地站在柜台后…难道你满意吗？
You left home dreaming of becoming a great drinksmith, yet here you are, spending your days idle behind the counter... Is this really what you wanted?
答案当然是——比起「开拓」，你更喜欢这样的生活！
The answer is clear. Compared to "Trailblazing," you enjoy this kind of life more!
难不成酒吧已经过气了？
Has the lounge already gone out of style?
时尚潮流的更迭迅速而残酷，你不禁开始同情起匹诺康尼所有的调饮师来。
Fashion trends shift with brutal speed, and you can't help but feel a twinge of sympathy for every drinksmith in Penacony.
No one knows how much time has passed...
Just a nap. Just for a moment.
不可以，马上就能领完奖励了，绝对不可以在这里结束！
No, you're so close to claiming your reward. Absolutely don't let it end here.
绝对不能在岗位上倒下！
尽管哈欠连天，但你是一个有职业素养的调饮师，会坚守岗位到最后一秒。
Even though you're yawning nonstop, you're a professional drinksmith. You'll stay at your post until the very last second.
最后…一秒…这是你意识清晰的最后一秒。糟糕，恐怕不会有人叫你起床。
The last... second... This is your final moment of clarity. Too bad, there may be no one around to wake you up.
Who knows how long has passed since...
阿斯德纳星系的某支边缘旋臂上，忆质包裹的梦中，又或者…旅途的又一站。
Somewhere on a remote spiral arm of the Asdana system, in a dream shrouded by memoria, or perhaps... just another stop along the journey.
这些答案，你更喜欢哪个？
I... how long was I asleep?
如我所见的，约莫十五分钟。至于在此之前，答案恐怕只有你自己知道了。
From when I started counting, about fifteen minutes. As for before that, I'm afraid only you can say.
这是梦吗？或许吧。答案只有你自己才能决定。
A dream? Maybe. Only you can decide.
嘘，不必告诉我，也不必对我的贸然来访感到讶异。投进湖心的石子总会泛起波澜，但余波终归需要有人来抚平。
Shh, there's no need to tell me, and no need to be surprised by my sudden appearance. A stone thrown into a lake will cause ripples, but those ripples eventually need someone to calm them.
当然…你也不必为此担心。
Still... it's not something you need to worry about.
你会知晓事情的全貌，但不是在今天。这是眼下我能给你的答案。
You'll learn the full picture, but not today. That's all I can say for now.
你瞧，匹诺康尼依旧安然无恙。我向你保证，你挂虑的事不会发生。
See? Penacony is still perfectly fine. I assure you, the thing you're worried about won't happen.
在告别之前，就像寻常的调饮师那样，把我当作偶然路过、且不会再来的过客，为我调一杯特饮，再说一番漫不经心的闲话吧。
Before we part, just do what any drinksmith would, treat me like a passerby who won't return. Fix me a special drink, and let's share a few idle words.
至于调出什么样的饮品，<color=#dbc291ff>就交给你自己选择。</color>
As for what kind of drink to prepare, <color=#dbc291ff>that's for you to decide.</color>
提问：星核猎手的藏身处在公司的打击下化为一片焦炭，为什么只有银狼的电脑安然无恙？
Question: The Stellaron Hunters' hideout was burned to ashes by an IPC strike, so why was Silver Wolf's computer the only thing left intact?
答案：因为她安装了「防火墙」。
呵呵…很有趣， 我会转述给她听。
Heh... amusing. I'll relay this to her.
液体沿着玻璃杯壁淌过她的嘴唇。复杂的神情在她的脸上酝酿…姑且可以视作满意？
The liquid slid along the edge of the glass and touched her lips. A complex look formed on her face... maybe that meant she was satisfied?
意料之外的味道呢…像是极光。
绚烂、美妙、捉摸不透。趣味盎然的享受，作为旅程的收尾，再好不过了。
Brilliant, beautiful, and elusive. A delightful experience, and a perfect way to end the journey.
我之前也去过不少地方，喝过不少饮品，有兴趣听听看吗？
I've traveled to many places before and tasted many drinks. Want to hear about them?
有一次，任务结束后，在公司物流舰的首席办公室，我按下了办公桌上的按钮。结果，智械侍者摇摇晃晃地送来了饮品。
After a mission, I once pressed a button in the executive office of an IPC logistics ship, and a wobbling Intellitron butler came in with a drink.
剧本上这么写，我们便这么做了。
The script said so, so we did it.
说起来奇怪…我已经很少考虑「为什么」。当命运把缘由和结果的间距拉长到匪夷所思的尺度，「为什么」就成了一个苍白无力的问题。
Funny thing... I've stopped thinking about "why." When destiny stretches the space between cause and effect to something absurd, "why" loses all meaning.
按常理，那是舰船的自毁按钮。但显然，他们没有按常理出牌。
Normally, it would be the ship's self-destruct trigger. But clearly, they weren't following the norm.
那是一杯无糖饮料，味道实在乏善可陈。矫饰欲望再声称它的无害，公司就爱做这种事。
It was a sugar-free drink, so it's dull and uninspired. The IPC loves to repackage desire and pretend it's harmless, that's their style.
还有一次，在某颗星球的极地，消退的引力搅动冰川的潮汐。我路过那里，顺手从深海翻涌上来的冰川表面凿下一块坚冰，放进了玻璃杯里。

Another time, I passed through the polar region of a planet where fading gravity churned the tides beneath the glaciers. I chipped off a chunk of ice rising from the deep sea and dropped it into a glass.
它的伴星碎了。至于原因，你得问萨姆。
Its companion star shattered. If you want the reason, ask SAM.
呵呵…银狼也问了这个问题。
Heh... Silver Wolf asked the same thing.
只记得很凉了。搭配那杯饮料倒是刚好。
I just remember it was cold. It went well with the drink.
当然还有我们常光顾的那颗星球。它有漫长的海岸线，变动不居的轴倾角让旅客能在一次漫步里体验不同的季节。
Then there's the planet we used to frequent. Long coastlines, an ever-shifting axial tilt that lets you feel the seasons change as you walk.
说起来有些狼狈，我们凑够身上所有的信用点，才在海边的小摊买到一打橘子汽水。
It was a bit of a mess, we scraped together all the credits we had just to buy a dozen orange sodas from a beach stall.
Even Stellaron Hunters can run out of money?
一些人兴高采烈地出了坏主意，一些人没来得及阻止，另一些人就已经执行完毕…最后，就会碰见这样捉襟见肘的时候。
Some people gleefully hatched a terrible plan, and some other people went through with it before a third group managed to stop it... That's how we ended up running out of funds.
We... The Stellaron Hunters of the time.
还能是什么，咸的海风、阳光和橘子的味道。
What else could it be? The flavor of salty sea breeze, sunlight, and oranges.
唔，不知不觉，剧本段落之间换行的空白就快结束了。
Mmph. Before you know it, the blank space between the script's segments has almost come to an end.
尽管总觉得时间匆匆，但走过的地方多了，就难免留下些回忆。
Though time always feels fleeting, the more places you wander, the more memories you gather.
今天的这杯，我也会好好记住。{NICKNAME}，<color=#dbc291ff>听我说——</color>
你未曾见过我。但玻璃杯里泛起的涟漪，会和漂泊的星光一样，为我们记下这瞬间。
You've never seen me, but the ripples in this glass, like the drifting starlight, will remember this moment for both of us.
这为我们增加了不少工作量。不过无关痛痒，最后刃处理了侍者，我处理了饮料。
It added a bit of work for us, but no harm done. In the end, Blade took care of the bartender, and I handled the drinks.
你醒转过来，发现自己趴在吧台上睡着了。零零散散来了些客人，但都默契地没有打扰你。
You stir awake, sprawled across the bar counter. A few scattered guests drifted in and out, all in tacit agreement not to disturb you.
So it really was a dream...
玻璃杯、吧匙、摇饮器，都安然地待在原地。没有证据证明卡芙卡未曾来过，就像没有痕迹证明她的确来过。
The glass, spoon, and shaker are all in place. Just as there's no proof Kafka never came, there's no trace she ever did.
但是方才调饮的配方依然清晰。你打算把它记录在「特调配方」的最后一页，作为整个宇宙最了解它的人，只有你有资格添上这一笔。

But the drink recipe remains vividly clear. You decide to record it on the final page of your "Signature Recipes." As the one who understands it better than anyone in the universe, only you are fit to leave this mark.
那么，给这杯调饮起个名字吧！
Most of the recipes have been tested out.
Time to collect my pay from Siobhan!
欢迎回来，亲爱的开拓者，调饮辛苦了。您需要来杯饮品、一些小食，还是一些新鲜的幽默？
Welcome back, dear Trailblazer. You've worked hard. Would you like a drink, some snacks, or a fresh bit of humor?
之前周末只有两天，不足以让我下车闲逛，但现在情况好多了。
Back then, weekends were only two days long, not nearly enough time to get off and explore. Things are much better now.
因为列车上又多了一个「星期日」。
Because there's an extra "Sunday" aboard the Astral Express.
哦，我需要提醒您注意：这只是一个笑话，星期日先生其实并不能延长周末。虽然他的确尝试过。
Oh, I should note, that's just a joke. Mr. Sunday doesn't actually extend the weekend, although he certainly tried.
舒翁女士说要替离去的友人照看孩子，因此把酒吧经营暂时托付给了我。而我，亲爱的开拓者，我只是个路过的酒保而已。
Miss Siobhan said she must care for a departed friend's child, so she entrusted the lounge to me for now. And I, dear Trailblazer, am merely a wandering drinksmith.
她又随机抓路人上班了。
She's pulled in a random passerby for work again.
舒翁女士临行前念念有词，我依稀听见她说「眠眠还留在热砂会场，得接它回家」…恐怕的确是非去不可的要事。
Before leaving, Miss Siobhan was muttering to herself. I faintly heard her say, "Sleepie is still at the Scorchsand Hall. I need to bring it home." Seems like it was something truly urgent.
哦，对了，亲爱的开拓者，听舒翁女士说，您正忙于钻研「特调配方」，我对此很感兴趣。既然您现在有空闲，或许我有幸能品尝一杯？
Oh, right, dear Trailblazer, I heard from Miss Siobhan that you've been working on some "Signature Recipes." That piqued my interest. Since you're free now, may I have the honor of tasting one?
学会新技能不露一手，如锦衣夜行。是时候让「闭嘴」瞧瞧你领悟的技术了。
To master a new skill and keep it hidden is like wearing fine robes in the dark. It's time for "Shush" to see what you've learned.
See you at the other bar.
Let's head to my home turf.
吧匙旋转，碰撞杯壁，声响清脆叮铃。
The spoon spins, tapping the side of the glass with a crisp clink.
提问：为什么舒翁强烈反对把自己的头像印在酒吧的玻璃杯上？
Question: Why does Siobhan only allow pictures of her face to be printed on their finest liquor glasses?
答案：因为那样她就会变成「杯壁小人」。
Answer: Because her mugshot isn't a cheap shot.
「闭嘴」尽力保持着顾客的矜持，但你分明看见难掩的欣赏从它的电子义眼中倾泻而出。
"Shush" tries to keep a guest's composure, but you clearly see admiration spilling from its electronic eye.
这份调饮的味道，竟如此熟悉。亲爱的开拓者，方便让我看一看配方的其余部分吗？
This flavor, it's surprisingly familiar. Dear Trailblazer, would you mind showing me the rest of the recipe?
唔…它的纸质与列车酒水单完全一致。存在这种可能性，它与最初来到匹诺康尼的无名客有关。
Hmm... its paper is identical to the Express's drink menu. It might be tied to the Nameless who first visited Penacony.
更大的可能…它出自列车当时的酒保，也就是敝人之手。
But more likely... it was crafted by the drinksmith aboard the Express at the time, that is, myself.
Next time, finish it before you publish it.
No wonder it feels so incoherent.
呵呵，不过时过境迁，我已经不是当时的我，这份配方也重重叠叠写满了后来者的见解。这故事简直可以拍一部电影，或许可以将它命名为：「叠中叠」。

Hehe, the only constant is change. I'm not who I was, and this recipe is now layered with the interpretations of those who followed. This story could be turned into a movie, maybe call it "Mission: Impour-sible."
哦，多么有大作潜质的名字呀！
看着星穹列车上的又一颗调饮新星冉冉升起，我的眼眶不禁湿润了。
Watching a new drinksmith star rise aboard the Astral Express, I can't help but feel a little emotional.
我不禁预见到这样一种可能：或许，今后您可以替我担任酒保，而由我来探索群星，踏上开拓之旅？
I can already imagine it: Maybe you'll take over as drinksmith one day, while I explore the stars and begin my own trailblazing expedition.
而我也会将您的调饮配方，带到脚步踏足的每一片土地。
And I'll bring your drink recipes with me, to every place I go.
You invite Topaz for a drink...
新抵达的审计团队效率很高，匹诺康尼的资产清算进展不错，总算有了些空闲时间。
That new audit squad works fast. Penacony's asset clearance is cruising along nicely. Finally, some breathing room.
既然应约来了，就请你替我调上一杯吧。
Since you called me here... mix me something special?
这杯调饮的作用是，让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>将自己的所知倾囊相授</color>！
This drink enables the drinker to <color=#dbc291ff>share all their knowledge when teaching</color>!
唔…工作里憋了太多不能说的内幕消息，不知为什么，喝了调饮之后，真想把它们一股脑说出来。
Hmm... I've got so many classified insider secrets bottled up from work. For some reason, after having this cocktail, I just wanna spill them all out.
这正是这杯调饮的效果。
好哇，原来在这儿等着我呢。
Oh, so you were waiting for me here.
有什么可分享的机密吗？
Got any juicy intel for me?
「以太战线」下版本哪个以太灵比较强势？
Which Aether Spirit's gonna dominate the next Aetherium Wars patch?
不过，每一次未经审批的信息泄露都可能引发轩然大波，我是一个成熟的职场人，对于所有问题，我的答案都只有一个——「无可奉告」！
However, every unauthorized information leak could cause a huge uproar. As a seasoned professional, I have only one answer to all questions — "No comment"!
你不知道有多少双眼睛正盯着这个位置。偷偷告诉你，之前叽米先生还私下向战略投资部递交了转岗申请呢。
You have no idea how many eyes are on this position. Let me tell you a secret: Mr. Owlbert even submitted a transfer application to the Strategic Investment Department in secret.
Enough to form a football team.
很可惜，叽米先生的申请被婉拒了。许多同事不能接受一只鸟有比自己有更高的职级。
Unfortunately, Mr. Owlbert's application was regrettably rejected. Many colleagues couldn't accept a bird having a higher rank than them.
呃…不对。这种机密，我是不是应该回答「无可奉告」才对？
Uh... Wait. Shouldn't I answer "No comment" for such confidential matters?
你邀请真理医生品尝调饮……
You invite Dr. Ratio for a drink...
老师老师，迴星港的迴字，有几种写法？
Teacher, how many names does the Stargazer Navalia have?
唉…{NICKNAME}，劳烦你替我调上一杯，润润喉咙吧。
*sigh* ...{NICKNAME}, please mix me a drink to moisten my throat.
这杯调饮的作用是，为饮用者带来<color=#dbc291ff>惊喜一刻</color>！
This drink helps the drinker <color=#dbc291ff>experience a moment of delight</color>!
一阵急促的来电声响起。
A sudden, urgent ringtone starts playing.
抱歉，稍等，我接一个电话。
Apologies, one moment, I need to take this call.
您好，是维里塔斯•拉帝奥先生吗？我很荣幸地通知您，您的学术成果得到了业界同仁的一致认可，被评选为「本琥珀纪最具影响力」的研究！
Hello, is this Veritas Ratio? I'm honored to inform you that your academic achievements have been unanimously recognized by peers and selected as the "Most Influential Research of This Amber Era"!
哇哦，教授，恭喜你！是不是会给你发一个大奖杯？
Wow, Professor, congratulations! Will they give you a big trophy?
呵，虚名浮利，不必在意。是我的哪项研究入选了？
Hah, just some vain fame and fleeting gains, nothing worth celebrating. Which of my papers was selected?
是《曲空间引擎原理》，《真蛰虫显隐基因遗传学》，还是《忆质能量转换方程》？
Is it Curved Space Engine Principles, True Sting Larva Dominant-Recessive Gene Genetics, or Memoria Energy Conversion Equations?
都不是，是您那本《石膏塑像的美学原理》，实在太精彩了！
None of those. It's your book Aesthetic Principles of Gypsum Sculptures, utterly brilliant!
真理医生面无表情地挂断了电话……
Dr. Ratio expressionlessly hangs up the phone...
这么厉害，我也要赶紧去买一本！
So impressive! I need to buy a copy immediately!
You invite Herta for a drink...
听说你的调饮实验又有新进展了？让人偶来尝尝看吧。
Heard you cooked up something new? Let the puppet sample it.
能被一位天才频频光顾，可不是每家店都这么幸运哦。
Not every establishment has the fortune to frequently receive genius, you know.
这杯调饮的作用是，让饮用者做<color=#dbc291ff>最超乎想象的美梦</color>！
美梦？待机状态人偶的后台会如何运行，这个问题我的确还没仔细考虑过。
Dreams? Never studied how Puppet OS runs during standby...
黑塔女士，当初课题组决定让你加入，是对你有更高的期待的。可我从你的报告里，却看不见任何创新点。
Madam Herta, when the research group decided to include you, we had higher expectations. Yet I see no innovation in your report.
能让你参加实验，本来就给了你一个锻炼的机会，你应该感激才对。不要太急功近利，时机到了，论文自然会让你署名。
Allowing you to join the experiment itself gave you a growth opportunity. You should be grateful. Don't rush for quick success. When the time comes, you'll naturally be listed as co-author.
黑塔女士，给我倒杯水来。怎么，我黑塔人偶说话不管用了是吗？
Madam Herta, bring me a glass of water. What's going on? Did my authority as a puppet lose effect?
可以下结论了：人偶不需要做梦，甚至没必要睡眠。
Conclusion: Puppets don't need dreams, nor even sleep.
You invite Sparkle for a drink...
花火驻场的惊梦酒吧再次开业啦。走过路过，不要错过哟。
Sparkle's Dreamjolt Hostelry is open again! Don't miss out if you're passing by.
您想要重温经典调饮，还是来一杯刚上新的全新配方呢？
Would you like a classic drink or a newly launched recipe?
这杯调饮的作用是，让饮用者<color=#dbc291ff>成长为潜意识里自己想成为的样子</color>。
This drink enables the drinker to <color=#dbc291ff>grow into their true essence, as they subconsciously aspire to be</color>.
哈哈，你就承认吧，你心里最想成为的人，就是花火大人我~
Haha, admit it. The person you most want to become is me, Miss Sparkle~
真有些受宠若惊呀。不过你放心，花火大人会当好榜样的。
I'm truly flattered. But rest assured, Miss Sparkle will set a good example.
我的心永远只属于星穹列车！
My heart belongs only to the Astral Express!
<size=28>星穹列车天下第一，舒适安全便捷无敌！</size>
<size=28>Astral Express rules the universe — comfortable, safe, convenient, unmatched!</size>
目光向我看齐，我宣布个事！
If everyone could please turn their eyes toward me, I have an announcement to make!
<size=28>I am Sparkle, I'm the strongest Sparkle!</size>
喂，不许顶着我的脸说这种话。给我变回来！
Hey! Don't say such things wearing my face. Turn back into yourself!
你邀请卡芙卡品尝调饮…但听筒后只传来一连串忙音。
You invite Kafka to taste the drink... but only hear a series of busy tones.
Busy, busy, guess staying busy isn't so bad.
让星核猎手在百忙中抽空来应约喝杯调饮，的确不大现实。
Can't expect a Stellaron Hunter to drop everything for drinks.
今后有机会再邀请她吧……
Or did I run out of credit?
你给自己充了些话费，但拨通电话后仍只听到熟悉的忙音。
You top up your own credit, but still hear the familiar busy tone after dialing.
你发现问题可能不出在自己：也可能是对方欠费了。
You realize the issue might not be yours: Perhaps the recipient has no credit.
希望「花火」不要整出什么「花活」来。
该向舒翁提交「特调配方」了，稍后再来调饮吧。
Time to submit the "Special Mix Recipe" to Siobhan. Drinksmithing can wait for a bit.
还有更重要的事，稍后再来调饮吧。
There are more important matters to attend to. We'll work on the drinks later.
看你好像很闲，我这儿正好有个「小」实验，你刚好能派上用场。
You seem to have time on your hands. I happen to have a tiny little experiment where you could be useful.
不会是用我来做实验吧？
Wait, I'm not going to be your test subject, am I?
我对在空间站看烟花秀没兴趣，你体内那颗星核，还是留着自己用吧。
I've got no interest in a space station fireworks display. That Stellaron inside you? Keep it for yourself.
不腻吗？你可以录下来回去听个够。
Doesn't that get old? Just record it if you want to hear it so badly.
我打算把自己的一部分记忆和知识数据化，上传到空间站的加密服务器，打造一个数字版的自己。
I'm going to digitize portions of my memory and knowledge into data, upload them to the space station's encrypted server, and create an AI copy of myself.
除了解答那些我懒得回答的无聊问题外，她还可以帮助艾丝妲管理空间站，甚至可能发现一些我都没注意到的有趣研究方向。
She'll answer the boring questions I'm too busy for, help Asta run the space station, and possibly discover interesting research directions I've missed.
毕竟机器不需要休息，也不会厌倦。当然，她永远比不上我，顶多算是我的一个影子。
The beauty of machines is they never need breaks or get tired of repetitive tasks. Naturally, she won't compare to the real me, she's merely a shadow of my brilliance.
这个「小黑塔」可不是永久存在的，我给她设了个有效期，等时效过了就把她格式化。毕竟，谁知道哪天这个数据库会被什么蠢货黑客骇进来呢？
And this Herta comes with an expiration date, after which she'll be completely erased. After all, you never know when some dim-witted hacker might attempt to break into the database.
So this is like... an AI Herta?
「AI黑塔」、「小黑塔」、「人类智慧结晶体黑塔mini」…你爱怎么叫都行。
"AI Herta," "Tiny Herta," "Crystallized Human Intelligence: Herta Mini"... call her whatever you like.
What exactly do you want me to do?
我想找你维护这个数字版的我，看看她能不能应付各种状况。
I need you to monitor this AI version of myself and see whether she can manage different scenarios.
我和艾丝妲准备了些杂活给你，有些是你需要收集的数据，有些是给数字黑塔的棘手问题，还有则是突发内容…嗯，我得看看她届时会有怎么样的反应。

Asta and I have lined up several tasks. Some involve data collection from your end, others are tricky problems to stress test AI Herta, and some are unexpected situations... I'm curious to see how she'll respond.
这些委托既是对数字黑塔的训练，也是对整个空间站的小小考验。
These tasks will train AI Herta while also putting the space station through its paces.
你得搭把手，协助空间站的小家伙们，确保这个实验最终平稳落地。
I'll need you to pitch in by helping the space station team ensure the experiment runs smoothly.
具体内容已经上传到你的终端了，我可不想在这里浪费时间一一解释。
I've uploaded the details to your terminal already. I don't want to waste time explaining everything here.
你还挺积极的，最近很空？没事干的话可以再测几次我的「模拟宇宙」。
Look at that eagerness. Been a slow week? If you're that desperate for something to do, you could always run a few more tests in my Simulated Universe.
Wait, don't I get a reward for this?
这种事情问艾丝妲，她会给你准备好的。
Talk to Asta about rewards. She'll take care of you.
我很好奇数字版的我会怎么评价你的表现。或许她会比我更宽容一些，毕竟她还没见识过太多蠢材。
I wonder how my AI version will assess your work. She might be more forgiving than I am, since she hasn't been exposed to as many fools yet.
别让我——或者说，别让「我们」失望。
So don't let me down, or should I say, don't let "us" down.
你还在这儿干什么？委托给你的事做完了吗？
What are you still doing here? Have you completed your assigned tasks yet?
没事做就去测试下「模拟宇宙」。
Got nothing to do? Then go run some tests in the Simulated Universe.
我们又见面了，{NICKNAME}，我已经等候多时了。
We meet again, {NICKNAME}. I've been waiting for you for quite a while.
Jade, what are you doing here?
当然是来谈一笔大生意的。
I'm here to discuss a lucrative partnership, naturally.
Since you're already here, how about lending me some money?
哦？你终于愿意把你家列车长抵押给我了吗？
Oh? Have you finally decided to put your conductor up as collateral?
直接说明来意吧，我带来了一次新的合作机会，或者说，一次特殊的典押。
Let's cut to the chase. I've brought you a new business opportunity, or rather a special pawn deal.
只不过在这次典押中，你才是那个提供资助的人。作为抵押物，我愿意以公司战略投资部的名义，向你承诺丰厚的回报。
Only this time, you're the one providing the funds. And as collateral, I'm willing to offer you generous returns, in the name of the IPC's Strategic Investment Department.
和公司沾边的事都不太好。
Nothing good ever comes from getting mixed up with the IPC.
没关系，你当然可以不信任公司，但你总可以相信金钱——信用点从不撒谎。
Not to worry, you don't have to trust the IPC, but you can always trust money. Credits never lie.
终于轮到资本求我的时候了！
Finally, it's time for the capitalists to come begging to me!
像你这样的高净值人士，向来是每位投资家趋之若鹜的优质合作伙伴。
High-net-worth individuals like you have always been the ideal partners every investor eagerly pursues.
呵…公司确实拥有遍布寰宇的庞大势力，但我们面对的是一片浩瀚无垠的宇宙市场，总会存在一些隐秘的角落，连资本的无形大手也无法掌控。

Hmm... while the IPC does have vast influence across the universe, we're dealing with a boundless cosmic market. There will always be hidden corners that even the invisible hand of capital cannot control.
而你作为一名无名客，曾经抵达过几颗危机四伏的星球，并且顺利解决了当地的大麻烦，所以公司觉得你是个不错的人选。
And as a Nameless, you've landed on several perilous planets and successfully resolved major crises there, which is why the IPC thinks you're a perfect candidate.
当然啦，我个人也对你很感兴趣。你当时在匹诺康尼的表现，可是给我留下了深刻的印象。
Of course, I'm quite interested in you personally. Your performance in Penacony left quite an impression on me.
Uh... I need to think about it.
理解，草率的决定是生意场上的大忌。
Of course. Hasty decisions are a cardinal sin in business.
说实话，我还是不太信任你。
To be honest, I still don't really trust you.
没关系，信任关系都是在合作中建构的。
Don't worry, trust is built through cooperation.
这里不是谈生意的地方，我们移步他处吧。
This isn't the place to talk shop. Let us adjourn to someplace else.
我们到了，这里你应该不陌生吧？
We're here. This place should be familiar to you, right?
我说砂金，你上把在搞什么啊？你真有好好计算过损益吗？
Hey Aventurine, what were you thinking last time? Did you even run the numbers?
哎呀，最后不是盈利了吗？盈利不就好了～
Come on, didn't we end up making a profit anyway? As long as it's a net profit, it's all good~
…我就不信你每次都能这么幸运。
...I doubt you'll get this lucky every time.
砂金、小叶琳娜，稍后再开复盘会吧，我们的客人到了。
Aventurine, little Jelena, the post-mortem can wait. Our guest has arrived.
哎呀，这不是我的老朋友嘛～
Well, well, if it isn't my old friend~
You're having a team-building session at Dewlight Pavilion?
我们只是暂时租用橡木家系的资产，来充当我们的临时办公室。这里设施也完备，交通也方便，非常合适。
We're just temporarily leasing the Oak Family's assets as our interim office. The facilities here are well-equipped, the location is convenient, and it's perfect for our needs.
况且住在这里的那位朋友，一时半刻也不会回来。这不得抓紧机会，让我享受享受他的生活？
Besides, that friend who lived here won't be back anytime soon. Why not seize this chance to get a taste of his lifestyle?
我以为要去庇尔波因特。
I thought we were going to Pier Point.
哈哈，去那里干什么？到处全是一群托帕那样的工作狂，没点生活情趣，连瓶好用的护发素都买不到。
Haha, what's the point of going there? It's full of workaholics like Topaz, with no sense of fun in life, and you can't even find a decent bottle of hair conditioner!
你趁机挤兑谁呢？我发质可好着呢！咳咳…庇尔波因特人多眼杂，可不是个干大事的地方，还是在咱们自家的地盘比较安心。

Who are you trying to pick on? My hair is perfectly fine! Ahem... Pier Point's too crowded with prying eyes, not the place for big moves. We're better off sticking to our own turf where we can breathe easy.
既然人到齐了，那我们就直入正题，聊聊合作内容吧。
Now that everyone's here, let's cut to the chase and talk about our collaboration.
这里正在进行「货币战争」项目的开发，我是项目负责人，托帕和砂金都是项目成员。
We're developing the Project: Currency Wars here. I'm the project lead, and both Topaz and Aventurine are project members.
War!? We're going to war again!?
不要害怕，是指商战啦～而且只是商战模拟器罢了。
Don't worry, I mean business warfare, and it's just a business simulator anyway.
经济我不懂，但打仗我在行。
I may not know economics, but warfare? That's my jam.
哈哈，这一点我们毫不怀疑。不过在这款商战模拟器里面，恐怕就用不上你那些「朴实无华」的商战手段了。
Haha, we have no doubt about that. However, in this business simulator, I'm afraid your "unembellished" tactics won't be of much use.
这里的战争指的是宇宙商战，你也知道「万界之癌」席卷了许多星球，给公司制造了不少坏账，清理起来颇有些难度。

When I say war, I mean corporate warfare across the universe. As you know, the "Cancer of All Worlds" has swept through many planets, creating a lot of bad debt for the IPC, and it's quite a headache to clean up.
我们的对手包括当地垄断财阀、丰饶信徒、反物质军团等等，一个个都不是善茬。他们不仅霸占公司的资产，甚至用武力驱逐公司员工。

Our opponents include local monopolistic tycoons, disciples of the Abundance, the Antimatter Legion, and more, none of them to be taken lightly. They've not only seized IPC's assets but have even used force to drive out IPC Workers.
在过去，因为缺乏经验和情报，战略投资部的每次行动都需要投入巨量的物力人力。
In the past, due to lack of experience and intelligence, every operation by the Strategic Investment Department required massive investments in resources and manpower.
而「货币战争」系统则可以模拟各种情况，帮助我们提前为不同形势做好准备。它的本质就是一台巨大的「坏账清算模拟器」。
The Currency Wars system can simulate various scenarios, helping us prepare for different situations in advance. In essence, it's a massive "Bad Debt Settlement Simulator."
还是换个简单点的说法吧——「企业战争模拟器」，非常好玩，你肯定会喜欢的。
In simpler terms, it is a "Corporate Warfare Simulator." It's super fun, and you'll definitely love it.
嗯，也可以这么理解。那么，{NICKNAME}，你是否愿意参与这个项目呢？
Hmm, you could say that. So, {NICKNAME}, would you be willing to take part in this project?
好哇！明智的决定～那咱们闲话少说，马上来体验一下初级测试吧。
Great! Smart choice~ Let's cut to the chase and jump right into the beginner's test.
看到那台正在开机的机器了么，那就是货币战争的操作台。
See that machine powering up? That's the control console for the Currency Wars.
放心，第一次会从最低难度开始，我们不仅会手把手教你熟悉系统，而且会额外以特殊的形式协助你。
Don't worry, we'll start with the lowest difficulty level. Not only will we guide you through the system step by step, we'll also provide special assistance along the way.
三位「石心十人」正在热烈地讨论着。粘性价格模型、矢量自动回归模型、逆向选择、实物期权、内生变量、外生变量、流动性陷阱…你听到了很多关键词，但一个也听不懂。

Three of the Ten Stonehearts are engaged in a heated discussion. Sticky price models, vector autoregressive models, adverse selection, real options, endogenous variables, exogenous variables, liquidity trap... You hear many keywords, but you don't understand a single one.
我果然没看错{NICKNAME}，刚才的表现真不错。
I knew I wasn't wrong about you, {NICKNAME}. That was quite impressive.
说真的，要不要考虑下直接加入战略投资部，凭你的天赋，很快就能升到高管。
Seriously, have you considered joining the Strategic Investment Department directly? With your talent, you could reach senior management in no time.
虽然只是道开胃菜，但以第一次参与测试的结果来说，确实堪称优秀。
Although it was just a warm-up, your results were truly excellent for a first-time participant.
不过，我还是想做一次小型复盘。{NICKNAME}，你觉得在刚才的测试中，击败竞争对手的决定因素是什么？
However, I'd still like to do a quick debrief. {NICKNAME}, what do you think was the decisive factor in defeating your opponent during the test just now?
哦？据我所知，对手可是个商场老手。
Oh? From what I know, our opponent is quite the business veteran.
这确实也算正确答案，自信是优秀投资者的必备品质。
That's also a correct answer. Self-confidence is an essential quality for any excellent investor.
That's right. That's an excellent answer.
资本市场就像一座华丽的展台，所有参与者不过是展柜里一颗颗等待被关注的宝石。谁能吸引最多的目光，谁自然就能攫取最多的利益。

The capital market is like a grand showcase in which all its participants are merely gems in the display case, waiting to be noticed. Whoever can draw the most attention will naturally seize the greatest gains.
但最耀眼的从来不是单颗宝石，能把众多宝石镶嵌成一件独一无二的珠宝，才有资格站在展台的最中央，俯视那些黯淡的失败者。

But the most dazzling has never been a single gem. Only those who can set many gems into a unique piece of jewelry deserve to stand at the center of the showcase, gazing down at those who have faded into obscurity.
所以挑选合适的人，组建完美的团队，是成功的基石。
So choosing the right people and building the perfect team is the cornerstone of success.
Hold on, let me take some notes...
希望能给到你一点帮助。
I didn't quite get that. Need to let it sink in.
没关系，在后续的测试中你会明白的。
Don't worry, you'll understand in the following tests.
看来你更喜欢单打独斗。
Looks like you prefer to work alone.
最有价值的资产是人——这倒确实是翡翠女士一以贯之的财富哲学。
People are the most valuable assets. That has definitely been Madam Jade's consistent philosophy on wealth.
是啊。财富、计谋、强运，这些说到底只是工具。想要致胜，最为关键的永远是「人的力量」。
Indeed. Wealth, schemes, and luck are merely tools in the end. If you want to achieve victory, the most crucial factor will always be the "power of people."
只是一点个人心得，就当是送给合作伙伴的一份小礼物吧。
Just a bit of personal insight. Consider it a small gift to my partner.
好了{NICKNAME}，你可以先休息下，我们要整理刚才的测试数据，之后还请你继续参加接下来的测试。
Alright, {NICKNAME}, you can take a break now. We need to organize the test data we just collected. After that, we'll need you to continue with the next round of test.
通过两次测试，你已经基本熟悉了「货币战争」的运行机制，更多细节可以在后续的深入测试中慢慢探索。
After two tests, you've become familiar with the basic mechanics of Currency Wars. You can explore more details in subsequent in-depth tests.
当然，我也会信守承诺，根据你的测试进度支付对应的报酬。
Of course, I'll keep my promise and pay you accordingly based on your test progress.
既然你已经可以开始独立工作了，那我和托帕也可以放心离开啦。
Now that you can work independently, Topaz and I can leave without any worries.
Leaving? You're not staying with me anymore?
Boohoo, you don't want me anymore!
虽然我也很想继续陪你进行模拟，但我们手头的工作实在太多。抱歉抱歉。
As much as I'd love to continue running simulations with you, we've got way too much work on our hands. We apologize.
我们的数据都存放在「货币战争」里，你可以在需要的时候借用我们的能力。下次见啦～
Our data is stored in Currency Wars. You can borrow our abilities whenever you need them. See you next time~
别担心，我暂时还会继续陪着你。在「货币战争」运行期间，我会一直在这里观察测试数据。如果有任何不懂的问题，你也可以随时找我。
Don't worry, I'll stick around with you for now. I'll be here monitoring the test data while Currency Wars is running. If you have any questions, feel free to ask me anytime.
别掉以轻心，真正的挑战还在后面。你马上就会见识到资本市场的残酷，那些想要把你手头资产吃干抹净的竞争对手，可是什么手段都用的出来。

Don't let your guard down. The real challenge is yet to come, and you're about to witness the brutality of the capital market firsthand. Your competitors will stop at nothing to strip you of every asset you own.
测试进度还顺利么，如果累了的话可以先休息一下。
How's the testing going? Feel free to take a break if you're getting tired.
如此复杂的项目，调动到公司内外的很多资源。不过，牵头的是我们战略投资部，博识学会承担了主要的研发工作。

This complex project has mobilized many resources both inside and outside the IPC. However, our Strategic Investment Department is taking the lead, with the Intelligentsia Guild handling the main R&D work.
当然，黑塔空间站也提供了一点技术支持，虽然天才看不上宇宙商业竞争这种小事，但没有理由会拒绝公司的赞助。
Of course, Herta Space Station also provided some technical support. Although geniuses might not care much about cosmic business competition, there's no reason to turn down IPC's sponsorship.
Where did the test data come from?
不要小看公司的情报搜集能力，虽然公司暂时还无法进入一些顽固市场，但是当地的市场洞察工作可是从来没有松懈过。
Don't underestimate IPC's intelligence gathering capabilities. Although the IPC hasn't yet penetrated some stubborn markets, we've never slacked off on our market insights in those regions.
就在我们谈话的此时此刻，无数调查员正潜伏在各个星球的交易市场，将当地的关键商业数据汇聚到「货币战争」。
As we speak, countless investigators are lurking in trading markets across different planets, gathering local critical business data for the Currency Wars.
不过难免会遇到数据空缺的时候，这时候我们会本着料敌从宽的原则，尽量提高测试难度。
However, we sometimes encounter missing data, and in such cases, we err on the side of overestimating our opponents, making the tests as challenging as possible.
总有一些自由贸易的漏网之鱼，发展出了独立于公司的商业体系，这种市场体量虽小，但对付起来并不容易。
There are always some free trade stragglers who develop business systems independent of the IPC. While these markets are small in scale, they're not exactly easy to deal with.
拿我之前处理的兰路思星域来说吧，他们曾长期接受公司投资，但是在一次反物质军团入侵后切断了贸易。等到公司击退军团，他们却拒绝了公司回收资产的要求。

Take the Lanlusian Segmentum I handled before as an example. They had long relied on IPC investment, but severed trade ties after an Antimatter Legion invasion. When the IPC drove back the Legion, they refused our demand to reclaim assets.
于是我上了点手段，虽然他们顶住了七次大规模倾销，但最后还是在公司舰队的火力瞄准下放弃了抵抗。
So I pulled some strings. Although they withstood seven massive dumping attempts, they finally gave up resisting when faced with the IPC fleet's aimed firepower.
哦，你别误会，像这种商战进化到热战的情况只是少数，我可是很爱惜「资产」的。
Oh, don't get me wrong. Cases where business wars evolve into hot wars are rare. I take very good care of my "assets," after all.
I have no questions right now.
资本市场瞬息万变，你有任何不懂的问题可以随时找我，我很乐意为你解答。
The capital market changes rapidly. If you have any questions, feel free to come to me anytime. I'll be happy to help you out.
Hey, I heard you've started back up again?
Shh — quiet! Who told you that?
为什么又开始鉴定遗物了？
Why did you start doing appraisals again?
顺应市场需求而已。<color=#dbc291ff>「古代遗迹」</color>里出土了那么多宝贝，我不鉴定还有谁能鉴定呢？
I'm just meeting the demands of the market. Someone needs to appraise all those treasures being dug up out from the <color=#dbc291ff>ancient ruins</color>. Why not me?
Why so mysterious about everything though?
我巴列维的名声在外，开张这种事可不能公开讲，不然又要有麻烦找上门了。
Because I, Balaway, have a reputation to protect here. Getting back into this line of business isn't anything you want publicly known, otherwise I'll be up to my neck in it — again.
丑话说在前头，假如你带来的不是<color=#dbc291ff>「古代遗迹」</color>的东西，依旧恕不接待。
I won't mince words with you: If you bring me something that isn't from the <color=#dbc291ff>ancient ruins</color>, I won't be interested.
What's up with the ancient ruins?
你不知道啊？矿工们开采矿脉时，挖出了巨大的地下遗迹。
Haven't you heard? When the mineral deposits were being prospected, a huge underground ruin was also dug up.
那应该是旧世界留下的建筑，里面埋了不少古代遗物，很多人都去寻宝了。
It's likely Old World architecture and has plenty of relics buried in it. Loads of relic hunters went there.
Why haven't you gone down yourself?
我才不去呢，只要别人能找到古代遗物，我就能赚到鉴定费，这不比亲自下场安稳多了？
That's not for me. I can just have other people bring me relics for a nice appraisal fee. Isn't that much safer than doing it myself?
真的能找到古代遗物吗？
Are there really ancient relics to be found there?
当然，我这几天见到的宝贝比之前一整年都多！
Of course. In the past week alone I've seen more treasure than the entire past year!
出于职业道德，我得提醒你一嘴：有人进了遗迹就没出来过，来鉴定的顾客也浑身是伤。
I'm ethically bound to advise you: Some people who go into those ruins never come back out, and some who bring me relics to appraise are covered head-to-toe in wounds.
你如果还感兴趣的话就去<color=#dbc291ff>大矿区</color>看看吧，要是找到了好东西可以给我看看，鉴定费好商量！
If you're still keen, head to the <color=#dbc291ff>Great Mine</color> and take a look. And if you find anything worth keeping, bring it over to me. Everything's negotiable!
Hmm, now this is a real pickle...
关你什么事…等等，看你这身行头，莫非你就是他们口中的「外来者」？怎么，你也是来寻宝的吗？
Mind your own business... Hang on — judging by your outfit, you must be one of them outsiders, right? What's up? Have you come looking for treasure, too?
那你可能要失望了，遗迹表层的宝贝已经没剩多少了。
Then you are gonna be disappointed. There's hardly any relics left anymore on the surface of the ruins.
那帮贪心的菜鸟寻宝者，根本不懂古代遗物的价值，都拿去便宜黑心商贩了。唉，真是浪费！
Those greedy rookies don't understand the true value of a relic. They just flog them off for cheap on the black market. *sigh* What a waste!
Aren't you a relic hunter yourself?
当然是，但我和一般的寻宝者不同。对于寻找古代遗物这项工作，我有五年以上的经验，大家都叫我「资深寻宝者」。
'Course I am — but I'm not like your average joe. I've got more than five years of experience in relic-hunting. They call me: Mr. Senior Treasure Hunter.
你和其他寻宝者有什么不同吗？
What makes you so different from the others?
熟能生巧，一项工作干久了自然就有更多心得。
Practice makes perfect. You'll get the hang of it after putting in lots of hours.
我能用最有效率的方式找到最珍贵的遗物，还能抓住常被别人忽视的寻宝机会。
I can find and excavate the most precious relics in the most efficient way, and I can grasp opportunities that other relic hunters often overlook.
Is five years all it takes to be considered a senior?
当然，这行风险太高了，不是跑到风雪交加的城外就是潜入危机四伏的遗迹，有时候还得想办法把东西卖出下层区……

Of course. This line of work is too risky. You're always running off to a snowstorm outside Belobog or sneaking into perilous ruins. Sometimes you even have to find ways to sell off a relic out of the Underworld...
面对严寒、机关、怪物的威胁和银鬃铁卫的严格管控，能平安干上个一两年就算了不起了。
You try going up against freezing cold, booby traps, monsters, and the watertight control of the Silvermane Guards — getting through two years is already an incredible effort.
像我这种有着五年经验的老手，当然够得上「资深寻宝者」的头衔了。
A veteran like me with five whole years of experience is certainly worthy of the title "Senior Treasure Hunter."
比如现在这个情况，菜鸟们找不到古代遗物就选择放弃了，殊不知遗迹下其实另藏玄机……
Take this current situation for example. Them rookies will just quit once they can't find any relics, but little do they know that there's a deeper enigma hidden beneath the ruins...
这…其实不该告诉你的，但听说外来者身手不凡，说不定你能帮忙。
It's... I shouldn't be telling you, but I heard outsiders have some special skills which might just come in handy.
据我观察，这座遗迹之下还有更大的空间，我能找到通往深处的路。可遗迹里危机重重，听说有几个人已经折在里头了。

Based on my observations, there should be an even larger space beneath these ruins. I can find the way to get down into the depths, but it's very hazardous. I heard a few people already croaked in there.
唉，虽说这个机会是我发现的，但我终究只是个冒险家，不是士兵…如果能有实力强大的护卫开路，我一定就能找到更多有价值的遗物……
*Sigh* I may have discovered this opportunity, but I'm just an adventurer, not a soldier... If I had a powerful guard to help escort me, I'd definitely be able to find more valuable relics...
说了这么多，你怎么没反应啊？我的意思是——我们可以合作！
How can you have no response after all I've said? I mean — we should team up!
你负责探路和保护我，我负责找古代遗物。到时候我把找到的东西卖个高价，我们五五分成，如何？
You take care of the pathfinding and protection, and I'll be in charge of finding the ancient relics. We'll sell anything later on at top price and split the profits fifty-fifty. How about it?
当然，下面的宝贝多着呢，咱俩一起发财！
Great. There're troves and troves of treasure down there. Let's get rich together!
Doesn't sound like the best deal to me.
你不会是觉得我的工作比你轻松吧？你知道在黑咕隆咚的地底，想找值钱的古代遗物有多难吗？就算你自个儿找到了好东西，也肯定会被无良买家坑的。

Do you think my job is easier than yours? Do you realize how difficult it is to find priceless ancient relics in the pitch-dark underground? Even if you did manage to find something good yourself, those unethical buyers would run circles around you.
行了，想清楚就来找我吧，我带你到遗迹里去。
Alright, come find me once you've had a think, and I'll take you down into the ruins.
时间不等人，咱们现在就出发吧？
Time waits for nobody. Shall we set off now?
是你啊，准备好去古代遗迹寻宝了吗？
Ah, it's you again. Ready to go treasure hunting down in the ancient ruins?
我想问关于古代遗迹的事。
I've got questions about the ancient ruins.
问吧，我很乐意为伙伴排忧解难！
Ask away. I'd be happy to help set you at ease, partner!
这个古代遗迹是怎么来的？
How did the ancient ruins come about?
都叫古代遗迹了，那当然是古代人造的呗。
We call it the ancient ruins because some ancient people built them.
你应该也听说过，在寒潮降临之前，天上来的怪物入侵了这里，这应该是那时古人留下的避难所。
You probably heard about how monsters from the sky invaded this place before the Eternal Freeze. This should be a kind of shelter for people back then.
我们能找到什么古代遗物？
What ancient relics could we find there?
说不准，古代遗物千奇百怪，很多东西我也叫不出名字。
I'm not sure. There're lots of varied and strange relics there, and I don't even know what most of these are called.
但不管找到什么，能卖个好价钱就行了，你说是吧？
But no matter what we find, what's important is that we can sell it for top money — right?
Is it dangerous in the ancient ruins?
当然，不危险我还至于找你帮忙吗？
Sure is. Otherwise, I wouldn't be asking you for help, would I?
遗迹里有不少怪物和失控的机兵，也有些不守规矩的同行会来抢你的成果，听说有人还看到了更可怕的东西……

There're lots of monsters and buggy automatons down there — not to mention some of my shady peers who won't hesitate to steal the fruits of our gains. And I've heard some talk about even more terrifying things...
不过也别太担心，风险高的地方收益也高，我相信你一定能找到法子解决！
But don't worry about it. Where there's a risk, there's a reward. I have faith in your problem-solving ability!
行，但最好赶紧动手，别让同行抢先了。
Sure, but it's best to act soon and prevent others from getting the drop on us.
嘿嘿，这次的成果不错，辛苦你了！
Hey, not a bad haul this time. Good job!
嗐，这对资深寻宝者来说算不了什么！
Ha, that's nothing to a senior treasure hunter.
你先休息一下，我接下来会开始挖掘通向更深处的通道。
Get some shut-eye. I'll start digging a passage down to the next level.
You don't seem to be working that hard.
哎哟，这话也太伤人了，我可是拼了命地在找宝贝啊。
Dang, that's hurtful! I've been scrambling to find treasure over here.
你现在倒是能歇着了，我可闲不下来。我还得继续往下找更深的遗迹呢！
You're able to take a break now, but I can't. I have to keep digging to find even more hidden ruins!
想必你已经熟悉遗迹中的环境了，更深处的区域宝物也会更多，但肯定更危险。
You probably get how ruins work now. All the best ruins are down there in the depths — but it's also more dangerous the deeper you go.
做好准备吧，想要寻宝就随时来找我！
Go get yourself ready, and come find me anytime you want to go hunting for relics!
哈哈，我果然没看错人。有你陪着，咱俩的探宝之旅真是无往不利！
Haha, so I was right after all. Together, our relic-hunting journey is gonna take on the world!
对了，之前探索过的遗迹可以继续「深入探索」，不过路径上想必会更加危险…就看你敢不敢了。
Oh yeah — you can continue to explore the ruin depths at any ruins that you've already been through, but things will become even more dangerous... It's all up to how brave you are.
果然越深处就越危险啊…还好有你，不然这些古代遗物就要变成咱的陪葬品了……
It's getting more and more dangerous the deeper we go... Lucky you're here, otherwise these relics would end up being our graves...
但和我之前设想的一样，越往深处走，发掘出来的古代遗物也就越值钱。现在可不是打退堂鼓的时候，准备去更深处的遗迹吧！
As predicted, we're seeing more valuable relics the deeper we go. Now's no time to give up. Let's drill on down to the depths!
哎，真不容易，没想到能一路挖到这么深的地方。
Whew, that took it out of me. I never imagined we'd end up so deep in one go.
以我的经验，再往下就是遗迹的最深处了…听说有人在那边遇到过可怕的机械巨人，和之前沿路碰见的杂兵完全不一样，你可一定得保护好我啊！

Based on my experience, the next one down is the bottom floor of the ruins... Somebody once said they saw a terrifying giant robot down there, completely different from any pawns that we met before. You have to protect me!
呼——不愧是你，居然能让咱俩全身而退！
Huh — you really ARE good. We managed to both get out of there in one piece!
这次差不多把遗迹翻了个底朝天，赚了这么多，估计其他寻宝者的后槽牙都要咬碎了！
This time we really looted every last scrap from that ruin, and we made a nice score. Those other relic hunters are gonna be steaming mad!
Doesn't seem like we'll be earning much from this...
呃…出钱的人可是那位「深蓝帅哥」，那哥们儿是我认识最靠谱的购货商了，他不可能坑咱们！
Ahem... The buyer is that guy called Tall, Blue, and Handsome. He's the most reliable trader I know, and he'd never swindle us!
他说最近出土的古代遗物太多了，物多则贱，你就知足吧！
He said there've been a lot of relics dug up recently and you know how that tanks the market. Be happy with your lot!
对了，不久之后我就要去其他地方寻宝了…在离开前，你要是想再进到遗迹里搜刮…啊不是，探索几趟，我也奉陪。
Oh yeah, I'm going off treasure-hunting somewhere else soon... Before I go, if you wanna go back in to hunt for relics one last time — ahh, I mean as many times you like — well, I'll be there!
说不定咱们之前还遗漏了什么好宝贝呢…你说是吧？
Perhaps there's something juicy that we missed before... What say you?
是你啊，准备好去古代遗迹寻宝了吗？
Ah, it's you again. Ready to go treasure hunting down in the ancient ruins?
我想问关于古代遗迹的事。
I've got questions about the ancient ruins.
问吧，我很乐意为伙伴排忧解难！
Ask away. I'd be happy to help set you at ease, partner!
这个古代遗迹是怎么来的？
How did the ancient ruins come about?
都叫古代遗迹了，那当然是古代人造的呗。
We call it the ancient ruins because some ancient people built them.
你应该也听说过，在寒潮降临之前，天上来的怪物入侵了这里，这应该是那时古人留下的避难所。
You probably heard about how monsters from the sky invaded this place before the Eternal Freeze. This should be a kind of shelter for people back then.
我们能找到什么古代遗物？
What ancient relics could we find there?
说不准，古代遗物千奇百怪，很多东西我也叫不出名字。
I'm not sure. There're lots of varied and strange relics there, and I don't even know what most of these are called.
但不管找到啥玩意儿，能卖个好价钱就行了，你说是吧？
But no matter what we find, what's important is that we can sell it for top money — right?
Is it dangerous in the ancient ruins?
这…危不危险你不都感受到了吗？
还好有你，不然还真就要栽在地下了…看吧，我就说你一定能找到法子解决！
Lucky I have you, otherwise I'd no doubt be six feet under... See, I told you I have faith in your problem-solving ability!
Thoughts after the treasure hunting is over.
坦白讲，这次真是我寻宝经历里最刺激的一次！以前遇到怪物只能开溜，这次却能一路闯到底……
To be completely honest, this has been the most thrilling treasure hunt in all my years! Previously I'd have to run away whenever I run into a monster, but this time we made it to the very bottom...
你真是合格的寻宝者护卫，今后有机会再合作啊！
You really are a first-rate relic-hunter bodyguard! Let's team up again if we ever get the chance!
行，反正已经探到最深处了，想再进去就随时找我吧！
Okay, in any case, we've already reached the bottom. So just hit me up if you want to go down again!
Let's go hunt for relics down in the depths!
上层的东西都被挖空了，我们去下面看看吧！
Everything on the surface has all been carved out. Let's take a look further down!
别别别，你没听说底下有怪物吗？
No no no, haven't you heard about the monsters down there?
怕什么？我可是搏击俱乐部排行榜的三百强选手！
So what? I'm top <unbreak>300</unbreak> on the Fight Club leaderboard!
排行榜一共才多少人…就算能打赢，先下去不就是给后面的人开路嘛，多亏啊！
There're probably only <unbreak>300</unbreak> fighters there... And even if we go down and win, we're just doing all the work for the next person coming along. That's not worth it!
可恶，那个叫阿克赛的家伙赚了那么多，我也要下去！
Darn it, that guy Aksay got so much loot... I wanna go down right now!
别别别，宝贝都被他挖走了，还下去犯这个险干吗？
No no no, he's cleared out all the treasure. Why take that risk and go down there?
要不是你拦着我，挖出宝贝的就是我！
I'd have dug those treasures out already if you hadn't stopped me!
要不是我拦着你，估计你就得被他挖出来了……
You'd be dug out alright if I hadn't stopped you...
这个古代遗物是干什么的？
What is this relic used for?
大哥，刚刚挖出来个奇怪的玩意，要不要拿给巴列维看看？
Bro, I just dug up this weird thing. Wanna go show it to Balaway?
浪费那个钱干啥？我来看看就行！这个东西有扳机，还能喷热风……
And waste our money on that guy? I can handle this just fine! This thing... has a trigger, and it can spray out hot air...
当然，这看上去就是个武器，应该叫…「热风炮」！古代的武器可不得了，估计比银鬃铁卫的大炮还狠！
Of course! Why, it looks like a weapon... Probably a Hot-Air Pistol! These ancient weapons are incredible. I bet it's way more vicious than a Silvermane cannon!
真的吗？咱们拿着它去遗迹深处闯闯吧！
Really? Let's take it down for a test run in the lower depths!
大哥，你没事吧？我给巴列维看了，他说这东西可能是用来风干头发的……
Bro, are you okay? I took it to Balaway for a look, and he reckoned that it might just be used to dry ancient people's hair...
唉，怪不得。对着怪物吹了半天，一点威力都没有，差点把命丢了！
Ah, so that's why... I blew it at a monster for quite a while but it didn't do a thing, and I almost lost my life!
是啊，让这玩意害惨了！巴列维说他出五十冬城盾回收，要不卖了吧？
Yeah, curse this darn thing! Balaway offered me <unbreak>50</unbreak> shield to recycle it. Should we sell it to him?
卖什么卖，留着吧，以后洗完头还能用。
Sell it? No way. Let's keep it for the next time we wash our hair.
Is there anything I can do?
哈，来得倒挺快。我做了个小插件，用它来存档一些有用的数据，{NICKNAME}，你帮我测下存档功能就行，我会给你报酬的。为了考虑你，这个插件也做得很好玩，感激我吧。

You're quick. Well, I've made a small plugin to save important data. {NICKNAME}, assist me in testing its file-saving function, and I'll pay for your service. You should appreciate that I make the plugin fun for you.
这还要我解释？你可以用它存档你已有的祝福。不过嘛，测试好功能后，我会用它去收集你的脑内神经电波，封存你脑中的部分数据。
Do I have to explain that? You can use it to store your Blessing. Just so you know, I'll use it to collect your brainwave and seal off some data in your brain after the test.
为什么记录我的神经电波？
Why do you need my brainwave?
你的脑内推演生成了许多莫名其妙的星球，我们想从中挑选点有用的东西；换句话来说，你脑子里的废料太多了！
You have imagined a lot of bizarre planets in your head, and we'd like to filter out some useful info. In other words, you've got too much nonsense in your brain!
所以，阮•梅想做点实验，先弄点数据保存在插件里，方便我们和螺丝咕姆做下一次大型改进！我不想剧透，反正你期待着就是了。

So, Ruan Mei plans to run an experiment. We'll store some data in the plugin for the next large-scale update that we and Screwllum deliver! I don't want to spoil the surprise. Anyway, just look forward to it.
What kind of data is stored?
祝福，你见过的人，和一些战斗啰。当然，这些都是给你用来练手的，用来推演星神的重要数据我还在下载，不过不着急。
Blessings, people you've met, and some battles. Of course, these are to help you get the hang of things. I'm still downloading the important data used to deduce the Aeon. There's no rush.
I don't have any other questions.
I heard you're looking for me...
嗐，您瞧在下这脑袋，尽想着评书了，怎么把这茬儿给忘了。想起来了，在下确实是有求于您。
Ah, would you look at this brain of mine? Lost in my storytelling world again, how could I just forget about that? Which reminds me — I have a favor to ask you.
这段时日咱们仙舟发生了不少事，又是建木生发，又是药王秘传兴风作浪…新闻上都说，能平息这些灾难，您{NICKNAME}功不可没。

There's been a lot going on aboard the Xianzhou recently, with the Ambrosial Arbor's new growth and those Disciples of Sanctus Medicus causing a ruckus... And all the news feeds report that you've played no small part, {NICKNAME}, in keeping the peace.
但市面上暂时还没有人以此为题材产出过什么文艺作品，在下这不就想着能捷足先登，狠狠赚一点票房吗。
But there's no literature out there on the market right now really capitalizing on this. I'm just thinking, why not get ahead of the curve and make a bit of a killing at the box office, hmm?
所以在下才请您过来，讲讲您的英雄故事。在下要是拿到了您这位当事人的第一手材料，那必然能创作出一折精彩的评书啊！
And so, I humbly invite you to tell me of your heroic exploits. I'll definitely spin out a brilliant story if I could just get my hands on those first-hand accounts of yours!
就为了这点小事叫我过来啊…
You summoned me for this triviality?
把剧情给你讲一遍就行了呗？
So, you want a recap of what happened?
Wonderful! If you could be so kind!
西衍先生拿出手机，准备记录下你讲的故事。
Mr. Xiyan takes out his phone and prepares to record your tales.
「这个男人叫做老杨，这个女人叫做小七…」你学着网上「三分钟看完托蝶幻境」的方式，讲起了自己的罗浮冒险记。

"In a world where memes and cringe collide, one Trailblazer must rise to the challenge! It all started with this cute girl known as Little Miss March... and then some old wise man called Grandpa Yang..." You rattle off your journey so far aboard the Luofu in a deep dramatic voice, adopting the style of the hit web drama "3-Minute Butterfly Immersia."
从初到仙舟，到血战幻胧…你尽可能将故事讲得跌宕起伏，可西衍先生的注意力却愈发涣散。

From your arrival on the Xianzhou to your bloody battle with Phantylia, you do your best to cover all the ups and downs and twists and turns of your story... But Mr. Xiyan's attention span seems to be waning.
讲到「云霞紫府会战」这一节时，他甚至将手机横了过来——大概是偷偷玩起了帝垣琼玉。
He even turned his phone sideways during "The Battle of Evemist Mansion" — no doubt to sneak in a couple of hands of Celestial Jade.
「这个{M#男人}{F#女人}自号『银河球棒侠』，此刻{F#她}{M#他}正与祸乱仙舟的药王秘传魁首对峙…而这，将是一场事关生死的较量！」

"This {M#man}{F#woman} who called {M#him}{F#her}self "Galactic Baseballer" was locked in a heated battle against the master primus of the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus... And for the Xianzhou, this was a battle for life and death!"
你讲完了，西衍先生也神色一喜——这老小子和牌了。
You finally finish telling your story, and Mr. Xiyan looks pretty pleased, too — this old fox has apparently played a winning hand.
胡了？不，我是说，结束了？别这样看着我，在下确实一直在认真听您讲故事。
Good game... Ahem, I mean, good story! You are done there with the story, right? Don't look at me like that. I've been listening attentively the whole time.
但是吧，您的故事虽然…不能算无趣吧，却有逻辑复杂、情节平淡、看开头知结尾等等诸多问题在内……

Your story, however, has some issues: Even though the plot is not that boring, it's written in a way that is overstretched, underwhelming, and predictable. I can see where it's going from a mile away...
But that's how it happened! It's a true story!
在下也说句真话您别不爱听：真实的故事谁爱看啊！想看真实的故事，直接去看新闻就好了啊！
Let me tell you the truth, hard as it is to hear: Who cares about the truth!? If you want the truth, just go and watch the news instead!
把钱结了，咱们还是朋友。
Whatever~ Just pay me the money for my story, and we can still be on friendly terms.
哎呀您别生气呀，在下不是这个意思……
Come on. Don't be like that. I didn't mean it like that...

I just feel that if you want your legend to pass far and wide throughout the Luofu — or even all of Xianzhou, — then we'll need to take some creative liberties.

您知道仙舟上流行的幻戏吧？呃，搁公司那头也许该叫交互式幻境体验。喝，那里面的战斗，可刺激多了。什么飞檐走壁、时空断裂，要什么有什么……

You know about the Immersia genre we have here on the Xianzhou, right? Or perhaps it should be called an interactive fantasy experience, despite what IPC thinks. Well, those fights are exhilarating. Leaping onto roofs and over walls, splitting open time and space, anything goes...
总而言之啊，我觉得这个故事，缺乏吸引观众的刺激要素！
Overall, I think this story is lacking a few exciting elements that we need to draw in the audience!
但它的商业潜力无限，怎么办呢…这样吧…请您稍等一下，在下找个东西给您。

这个东西，干咱们这行的称之为「主角模板」。据说是某位幻戏社的编剧发明的编剧工业化神器。
This thing is what we in the industry call a Protagonist Model. Legend has it that some Immersia troupe has invented this magical tool for industrial-scale screenwriting.
虽说一千个无名客心里会有一千个阿基维利的形象，但也许您听说过…人类一直传诵的经典传说和故事的主角们拢共就那么几十种。

And even though Akivili takes on thousands of different forms within thousands of different Nameless, you may have heard that... Actually, there're only a dozen or so archetypal protagonists recycled through these classic legends and tales.
可见，吸引人的故事是有规律可循的。而这东西便是就此应运而生。
This shows that there are rules to follow when telling an alluring story. And that's how this thing rose to meet the occasion.
您瞅瞅，只要给主角的英雄之旅中安排好各种奇遇，再让主角在这个过程中获得各种神奇的能力和宝物…最后华丽地战胜强敌！一个精彩的故事就这么成了！

Take a gander. All you have to do is set up a diverse range of encounters for a protagonist along a Hero's Journey, and let the protagonist gain various mystical abilities and treasures... Before magnificently defeating a powerful foe! That's how you make a wonderful story!
解释起来还是有些苍白，您直接拿着看看吧。

总而言之，「主角模板」就是这样一个简单好用的神器…只要照它的套路指引，就可以创作出令听众血脉偾张、欲罢不能的评书。
In short, the Protagonist Model is like a simple magic wand... So long as you follow its patterns, you can easily craft pulse-racing heart-pumping stories for your audience.
这样吧，咱们一起去一趟您战斗过的地方——丹鼎司。故地重游，一定可以激发出咱们的灵感，将这个「主角模板」充实起来。
How about this — you and I hit up a site of your former battles: The Alchemy Commission. Revisiting old haunts will definitely get the creative juices flowing. Let's flesh out this Protagonist Model.
Fine, I'll humor you, since I'm such a nice and helpful protagonist.
怎么事情越来越麻烦了…

别这么说嘛！在下可以加钱～您跟在下过不去，也别跟钱过不去啊！

Alright! Let's push on then to the Alchemy Commission~
如果在下没记错的话，您这场冒险的大决战，就是从云霞紫府这边开始的吧？

Why are we going straight to this decisive battle?
哎！您有所不知，观众时间宝贵，耐心是越发少了，大家恨不得一分钟看完一部戏。故事推进太慢可是创作大忌。
Ah, you don't understand. You see, the audience's time is precious, and their patience ever thinning. People want it all to be over in a minute, a whole show. Slow-paced storytelling is a big no-no.
连咱们说书的都得随客人的习惯来，开头一段暖场，啪地一下就直接切入最精彩的段落。
Even we storytellers have to take our cues from the audience. Get them warmed up with an icebreaker, then with a snap, we'll cut straight to the most exciting part.
按您的说法，您在这儿和同伴一起挑战了药王秘传的魁首。这场大战中可有遇到什么艰难波折？又或者，她施了什么妖法诡计，教各位求生不得求死不能？

You said that this was where you and your companions fought against the master primus of the Sanctus Medicus. Was there any conflict that you encountered here? Or perhaps, did she stoop to any dastardly tricks to really put you in between a rock and a hard place?
I just walked up and started fighting.
她也算不上什么麻烦的对手…

这、这如何能够？一场大战若没些奇遇困难，怎么能显出精彩呢…？

且容在下构思片刻…啊，有了！

Listen up — "The Legion was in cahoots with the master primus of the Sanctus Medicus. Using their arcane powers, they activated elixir cauldrons to spew forth venomous vapors as they tried to take out {NICKNAME} and the other munificent heroes in one fell swoop!"
「一时间丹鼎司内妖氛弥漫，纵使强如{NICKNAME}，也力不能支，难以应对……」
"For a moment, a mesmerizing miasma filled the air at the Alchemy Commission. Despite the vigor and strength of {NICKNAME}, it was too much to deal with and simply overwhelming..."
「情势百般危急，{NICKNAME}与{F#她}{M#他}的同伴不得不暂且退避，再思良策…」
"The situation grew so grave that {NICKNAME} and {F#her}{M#his} companions concocted a genius plan..."
「进退维谷之际，忽然醒觉此处乃是丹鼎司，本是炼就灵丹妙药的福地！」
"Stuck between a rock and a hard place, the realization suddenly dawned that this was still the Alchemy Commission: A paradise known for forging the elixir of life!"
「药王秘传既得烬灭祸祖的恩赐，那我等亦可从丹鼎司中求取仙丹，洗髓伐毛，脱胎换骨，凭空增加个数百甲子的功力！」

"The Disciples of Sanctus Medicus have received their mandate from the Ruin Author. We though can strive for a miracle pill from the Alchemy Commission, turning over a new leaf to be born anew through generations of cultivated power!"

"Once put together, these three divine ingredients can be concocted into the Elixir of Dragon Oil, which can make you be born anew and achieve transcendence."

不不不，那不是机巧鸟，那是您至真至纯、不受引力束缚的心灵，在初代司鼎的幻境中呈现出的结果。可不能按照机巧鸟的逻辑来理解呀。

No no no, that's not actually a cycrane. It's the result of your true, pure, unfettered soul projected into the first Cauldron Master's fantasia. You can't really think of it in terms of a normal cycrane.
你胡编乱造也得有个度…
There is a limit to suspension of disbelief, you know...
观众不就好这口吗？这年头娱乐行业竞争这么激烈，咱们这些靠一张嘴吹的，凭什么和天花乱坠的幻戏抢夺用户啊？答案只有一个，离谱！

It's what the audience wants, though. Competition in entertainment circles is so fierce these days. How are we storytellers supposed to compete with all the razzle-dazzle and hype of something like immersia? There's only one answer: Manufactured outrage!
You're just making it all up as you go, aren't you?
咱说书先生，不就靠这个来赚钱糊口吗？
Isn't that how we storytellers earn our crust, day in day out?
这年头娱乐行业竞争这么激烈，咱们这些靠一张嘴吹的，凭什么和天花乱坠的幻戏抢夺用户啊？答案只有一个，离谱！

幻戏做不到的我能说，幻戏不敢编的我能说。反正吹牛不上税，说出来的话就像一阵风……
I can say all the stuff they can't do in immersia. And I can say what they don't dare say in immersia. Anyway, there's no tax on bragging, and words have a habit of disappearing like the wind...
Ahem, back to the topic at hand...
「至此，{NICKNAME}已经拿到了炼制『九转升天丹』所需要的全部三味药材…接下来，只要在丹炉中将三味药材九转烧炼，便可获得这脱胎换骨的神丹了！」

"Previously, our hero {NICKNAME} acquired all three medicinal herbs required to concoct the Elixir of Dragon Oil... All that remained was to cast the ingredients in the elixir crucible and this miracle elixir would be {F#hers}{M#his}!"
「至此，{NICKNAME}已经拿到了炼制『九转升天丹』所需要的全部三味药材…接下来，只要在丹炉中将三味药材九转烧炼，便可获得这脱胎换骨的神丹了！」

"Previously, our hero {NICKNAME} acquired all three medicinal herbs required to concoct the Elixir of Dragon Oil... All that remained was to cast the ingredients in the elixir crucible and this miracle elixir would be {F#hers}{M#his}!"
「{NICKNAME}将三味药材依次投进了丹炉中。先是『冰火玄莲』，它身上蕴含的至温至寒，在丹炉中调和为一，迸发出无穷的自然伟力。」
"{NICKNAME} placed the three medicinal herbs into the crucible, one by one. First came the Icefire Lotus: Its fiery heat and blasting cold blended together, bursting out infinite natural force."
「接着是『生灭灵芝』，它有无相生，将使冰与火的矛盾得以长久共存。」
"Next, came the Life-Death Polypore: Its quantum impermanence stabilizes the paradox inherent in the lotus."

"Finally, {NICKNAME} tossed the Whirlbolt Pneumatophore into the crucible. With a flash of thunder and lightning, out of the blue an entire thunderstorm formed inside one square inch of the crucible!"
「{NICKNAME}鼓起勇气，将手探入雷雨之中。片刻之后，一颗散发着绚烂色彩的丹药便被{NICKNAME}取了出来。」
"{NICKNAME} plucked up the courage to reach a hand into the storm. After a while, {NICKNAME}'s hand pulled out a sparkling medicinal pellet."

"And that, my friend, is what leads a mortal onto the path of IMMORTALITY..." Uh oh! No no no no... I shouldn't have used that word on the Xianzhou... "Anyways... It's basically a miracle drug that makes you be born anew and achieve transcendence. Behold, the Elixir of Dragon Oil!"
「{NICKNAME}吞下神丹，顿时觉得身体轻盈仿若云朵，肌肉充盈恰似牡牛，顷刻间可飞驰三千里，抬手便能举起万斤鼎！」
"{NICKNAME} swallowed the miracle elixir, and instantly felt as light as a feather but as strong as an ox. Our hero could leap thirty thousand miles in a second, or lift up ten thousand tons!"

"{NICKNAME} knew, now was the time to settle the score with those pathetic, detestable Disciples of Sanctus Medicus wreaking havoc on the Xianzhou."
怎么听着感觉我就是药王秘传…
The way you tell it makes me sound like I'm a Disciple of Sanctus Medicus...
这里面到底谁是反派啊…
嗐，瞧您这话说的…力量没有善恶，人才有。厨刀是在厨师手里，还是在凶徒手里，那肯定是不一样的。
Ha, listen to yourself... Power in and of itself knows no good or bad. Only people do. Is a kitchen knife evil when it's in the hands of a chef or when it's in the hands of a murderer?
「闲话少叙！请列位看官倾耳听！下一段便是重头戏——『丹鼎司浩劫终难逃，无名客血战寿瘟妖』！」

"Less idle chit-chat! Please ladies and gentlemen, esteemed guests: Lend me your ears! Next up we have the main feature: 'Calamity Ensnares Commission of Alchemy, Nameless Battles Author of Plagues!'"
哎呀，这样一来，这折子戏就算是完成了……

What happened to the fight against the Plagues Author demon?
嗐，这您有所不知，在咱们编剧行业，最难写的莫过于主角的成长…主角的成长有了着落，要多来几场血战还不简单！

Ah, you don't understand. The most difficult thing for us screenwriters is the protagonist's development... Once the protagonist's character is settled, it's gonna be so easy to just write in as many battles as you want!
这样，这儿不是落笔写稿的好地方…您先跟我回一趟星槎海，待我把今天的故事和灵感整理一下，咱们来聊聊战斗的戏码。
Look, this isn't exactly the best writing place for us... Come back to the Starskiff Haven with me, and after I process all of today's inspiration, we can chat more about combat details.
你可瞧见那些灵气氤氲、闪闪发亮的光点？

这边是你进入幻境的目的，将这些丹药统统收入囊中！

你获得了「冰火玄莲」，可喜可贺。
You got an Icefire Lotus. Well done.
Careful, don't get caught by monsters!
这边是你进入幻境的目的，将这些丹药统统收入囊中！

你获得了「生灭灵芝」，可喜可贺。

「随着所有禁制都被{NICKNAME}破除，初代司鼎的秘宝也终于显露了出来……」
"As all the containment mechanisms were gradually lifted by {NICKNAME}, the secret treasure of the first Cauldron Master was revealed..."

You see, you can't take care of much when you're busy. I almost forgot we agreed to meet.
这段时间在下也没闲着，一直在构思接下来的情节。但确实有个问题，在下一直没找到解决方案……
I've been keeping myself busy, coming up with the rest of the plot. But we may have a problem to which I haven't been able to find an answer yet...
按您原本的冒险故事…剿灭了那些药王秘传，居然立刻就和绝灭大君照面决战了。这故事进展展开的也太快了吧？

Based on your original story... After taking out the Disciples of Sanctus Medicus, you almost immediately fought your decisive battle against the Lord Ravager Phantylia. Don't you think that's pushing the story along too fast?
真要按照这个结构写个评书出来，一天就能讲完了，根本轮不到我拍一拍醒木，说「且听下回分解」，然后骗他们第二天再来买票啊。

If that's all I had, why, I'd finish telling this story in a single session. I wouldn't get the chance to set up one of my cliffhangers goading everyone into buying tickets for tomorrow. "Stay tuned for next time with Mr. Xiyan..."
而且啊，按这个做法，剧情里的「主角模板」也不够完善啊。所以在下有个思路，不知道可不可行，想和您商量一下……
And I tell you what, the Protagonist Model isn't perfect enough if we do the plot this way. So, I've come up with an idea. I'm not sure what you think, so I'd like to run it by you...
无名客不止您一个，那几位英雄也都在这段冒险中贡献了自己的力量。是否有可能，把别人的事迹移花接木到您身上？

Nameless, you're not the only one, right? Those other heroes have also thrown themselves into this adventure. Is it possible to perhaps fudge things a little so that YOU will be the one doing those deeds?
Wouldn't that make me a fraud!?
对喽，就是这么回事！呃，不对……
Yeah, but... I mean, uh, no...?
在下的意思是，能不能把「无名客」的事迹汇聚到同一个典型人物上？
What I mean is, could some of the Nameless' heroic deeds be pulled together and attributed to a single archetypal character?
这样塑造一个典型人物，观众老爷们也更容易情感代入，是这个道理吧？
Creating archetypes like this makes it easier for our audience to become emotionally involved. How about it?

您有这觉悟，我老高兴了。
