你向西衍先生讲起了丹恒一路追赶你们，以及他在鳞渊境中遭遇的冒险。
You fill in Mr. Xiyan about Dan Heng chasing you all the way, and the adventures he has encountered at Scalegorge Waterscape.
你这龙尊的故事倒是有意思，只是颇有些棘手。枝蔓横生，条缕纷乱。和我自己编的那些云上五骁的传奇可差远了。

This high elder story of yours is interesting, but a little tricky to pull off. It branches off in all directions with some red herrings. It's way different from the masterpieces I've personally written about the High-Cloud Quintet.
所以，需要大刀阔斧地改编！除了头尾，统统砍掉，也许还能写一个好故事。
Therefore, a drastic adaptation is required! We'll cut off everything apart from the beginning and the end. Maybe we can fix this story after all.
在下有点眉目了…走吧，咱们亲自去一趟鳞渊境，也许在那个龙尊造像下面，咱们都会更有灵感。
I've got a rough idea... Let's go to Scalegorge Waterscape then. Perhaps we'll be able to find our inspiration beneath the Statue of the High Elder.
您看看，在下光是看着这雄伟的龙尊造像，灵感就跟瀑布似的，刷啦啦地涌进了脑子啊！
Drink it in. Just looking at this magnificent Statue of the High Elder causes inspiration to flood my brain like a waterfall!
Then why don't you tell me a story, storyteller?
I think they call that going "soft in the head."
这进的哪里是水啊，这是评书话本的大河、口传文学的湍流！
I wasn't being literal. I mean torrents of storytelling swirling into a waterfall of literature!
「话说，这{NICKNAME}服下『九转升天丹』后，果然功力大涨。可绝灭大君乃是烬灭令使，岂是区区凡人所能及？」
"It's said that {NICKNAME}'s powers surged after taking the Elixir of Dragon Oil. But alas, the Lord Ravager was still an Emanator of the Ruin Author. How could a mere mortal hope to contend?"
「此时{NICKNAME}想到，持明族乃是龙祖后裔，持明龙尊自然也身怀星神伟力…若能借到龙尊之力，必能使自己神功大成。」

"It was then that {NICKNAME} realized the Vidyadhara were descendants of dragons, whose high elders naturally possessed Aeonic powers... And if those powers could be borrowed, transcendence shall be achieved!"
你不是说吃了丹药就行吗？
Wait a minute, didn't you say taking the elixir would be enough already?
Didn't I already achieve transcendence by taking that dragon oil elixir?
嗐，这些都是文学上的「夸张」手法！在下就学于曜青著名的高等学府「行风璧海」，乃是科班出身的文人，下笔必有章法，绝不会给您乱写的。
Hey, ever hear of hyperbole? I studied at the Royal Academy on the Yaoqing and I'm a professional playwright by trade. My writing has structure, and I would never be sloppy.
咳咳…「内有神丹脱胎换骨，外有龙尊之力护体，莫说是个小小的令使，就算烬灭祸祖本人，也未必是{NICKNAME}的对手！」
Ahem... "With the miracle elixir flowing internally and the high elder's power protecting externally, a mere Emanator — or even the Ruin Author themselves — would prove no match for {NICKNAME}!"
也不知纳努克同不同意…
I'm not so sure Nanook would agree with you...
细节您不要太在意！都说了，这是初稿，之后还要润色改稿的。您主要看故事内容就好。
Forget about the details! I told you, this is just the first draft, and we'll revise it later. Just focus on the main plot.
嗯…回归正题，这段故事，应当从您在龙尊造像寻找线索开始讲起。
Hmm... Back to the topic at hand, please. This scene should begin with you searching for clues around the Statue of the High Elder.
在整个故事中加上这段冒险，肯定能把这个「主角模板」充实起来。
Dropping adventure into every scene of the plot will definitely help us flesh out this Protagonist Model.
估计咱俩又要像上次一样，折腾大半天。所以您还是去稍作一下准备吧，吃点东西垫垫肚子，或者上个洗手间之类的。
I reckon this'll take the better half of a day just like last time. So why don't you go off and get ready? Fortify that stomach of yours or go to the bathroom first.
等您准备好了，就来这里找我吧。
Come find me when you're ready.
How's it going? Ready to start?
好的，您慢慢准备，在下随时可以开始。
Alright, take your time. I'm ready when you are.
你闯入鳞渊境，就是要向我讨要龙尊的力量吗？可笑，这等东西岂是外族人所能讨要的吗？
Did you break into Scalegorge Waterscape to try and beg me for the power of the high elder? You're joking! Is this some kind of outworlder joke?
抬头看看罢！我就在你身前！毋要视而不见！
Up here! I'm right in front of you! Don't turn a blind eye to me!
我乃龙尊雨别造像，久沐日精月华而禀灵性。
I am the statue of Yubie the high elder. Steeped in the essence of moonlight, I have taken consciousness.
你身为外族，既不认得我是谁，又怎敢贸然前来求取龙尊之力？呵…这力量绝不能给你！
You're an outworlder who doesn't even know who I am, yet you dare come here to claim the power of the high elder so rashly? Heh... You'll never get your hands on it!
Fine, I don't even want it.
这么容易放弃吗？无名客难道不应该是一群坚韧不拔的旅者吗？
Quitting so soon? I thought the Nameless were supposed to be tenacious and indomitable?
Can't you bend the rules this once, pleaaase~
这是要是能靠「通融一下」就解决的问题，持明族也不至于落到如今这般田地了。
If this was something that could just be "bent," then the Vidyadhara wouldn't find ourselves in our current predicament.
行了！我本以为你身为无名客，多少也见过些世面，结果竟如此大惊小怪！
Fine! I foolishly believed that you, as Nameless, would be a well-traveled connoisseur but it seemed you were rather finicky, shall we say!
唉…我也不过是一座雕像罢了，也没什么资格对你说教。
Sigh... But then again I'm nothing more than a statue. I can hardly lecture you.
这样吧…只要你能通过我的试炼，获得我的承认。我就赐予你当下需要的东西。
What about... I set a trial for you. Pass it, and you'll gain my recognition. I'll then grant you whatever your wish is.
若没有试炼，我该怎么知道你是否值得我帮助呢？
Without a trial, how would I know whether you were worthy of my help?
呵…现在还不是许愿的时候。等你完成了试炼，我们再来讨论这个话题吧。
Heh... Now's not the time for making wishes. We can talk about this again once you complete the trial.
我的愿望是再要三个愿望！
My wish is for three more wishes!
我可不是什么万能的许愿机。等你完成了试炼，我们再来讨论这个话题吧。
I'm not some genie in a lamp. We can talk about this again once you complete the trial.
数百年前，龙尊丹枫误入歧途，掀起「饮月之乱」，在鳞渊境中留下了无数满怀遗恨的蜃影。
Centuries ago, Dan Feng the high elder got led astray in life, triggering the Sedition of Imbibitor Lunae and leaving countless Mirage Echoes filled with hatred throughout Scalegorge Waterscape.
其中有那么几个蜃影执着于歹毒的恨意，屡衅事端，让人们不堪其扰。请你解决掉那些满怀恶意的蜃影，正好当做是对你的试炼了。

A few of them still cling to vicious hatred, causing all kinds of ruckus that's really starting to get to people. Please get rid of these ill-willed Mirage Echoes — that's the trial that I have for you.
出发吧。那蜃影积怨不小，流毒无穷。切记小心行事。
Go forth. They have their grievances, and their vileness knows no end. Tread carefully.
应该算是解决了吧？回去和那个雕像报告吧。
That should be it, right? Time to go back and report in to that statue.
鳞渊境的怨气散去了一些…想来你已完成了试炼。无名客果然名不虚传……
The grievances hanging over Scalegorge Waterscape have cleared a little... I think you have indeed completed the trial. You really do live up to the moniker of the Nameless...
既然你顺利完成了第一项试炼，那么接下来，就该是第二项试炼了。
Now that you've completed the first trial, now it's time for the second trial.
Just exactly how many trials are there now!?
你这是要给我十三试炼呢？
You're making me do all the Thirteen Labors, aren't you?
别担心，这便是最后一场试炼了。
Don't worry. This will be your final trial.
丹枫被囚前，将自己所拥至宝藏入鳞渊境的深处，并留下遗言——
Before his imprisonment, Dan Feng buried all of his treasure deep within Scalegorge Waterscape. They say that before he set out, he spoke these words—
想要龙尊秘宝吗？想要的话…
"I wish not for dominion, yet I cannot watch the common folks suffer!"
总之，第二场试炼便是希望你能寻回至宝，令其物归原主，重定天命。
Anyway, the second trial is to find the treasure, return it to its original owner, and reset the wheels of fate.
我只知道那些宝物大致的方位，却不知道它们的具体位置。
I only know the general vicinity of the treasure but not the exact location of everything.
「{NICKNAME}一到这里，就感受到龙祖的气息在空中弥散…{M#他}{F#她}心中暗想：这大概就是龙尊秘宝的所在地吧！」
"When {NICKNAME} arrived at this place, {M#he}{F#she} immediately smelled the presence of Long in the air and thought: This must be where the secret treasures of the high elder lies!"
真的假的…我鼻子这么灵？让我瞧瞧，这附近有什么能藏宝贝的地方。
Really? Is my sense of smell that good? Let me see if there's any place to hide a treasure.
这应该就是丹枫留下的宝藏了。拿去找雕像交差吧。
This looks like one of Dan Feng's treasure items. Report back with it to the statue.
行了，行了，你别砸了，停！停一下！
Fine, fine. Don't break it, stop! Please stop!
我再不出来，鳞渊境就让你拆成白地了！
Had I stay put a bit longer, Scalegorge Waterscape would have been razed to the ground by you!
Hey! Don't interupt! I'm trailblazin' here!
你这是寻宝？你这是破坏古迹！
You call that trailblazing? You're trail destroying!
是我看走眼了，这古老的龙宫禁不起你这么折腾。
I made an error in judgment. This old Dragon Palace cannot withstand this kind of abuse.
我认可你的{RUBY_B#破坏力}赤诚之心{RUBY_E#}了，这个测试就跳过吧，跳过。
Lemme just acknowledge your {RUBY_B#destructive power}Heartfelt Devotion{RUBY_E#}. And now let's just skip this part of the trial.
回龙尊造像那里找我吧…咱们直接进行下一步就好。
Come back to the Statue of the High Elder and find me... We can go straight to the next step.
我果然没有看错你。能完成这些试炼，说明你是一个值得信赖的人。
So I was right about you. Being able to complete these trials proves you a trustworthy person.
Really? Sure you don't want a couple more trials?
Well said! You sure have good taste, I'll give you that!
道之为物，其变有三。既然通过了前两项试炼，那我就将最后、也是最重要的考验托付给你——先别急着说我不讲信用……
The truth always comes in threes. You may have passed the first two trials, but now comes the final and most important test — and please don't tell me that I'm not trusting...
因为这第三项考验便是你所寻求的答案，龙尊之力。

碎星绝尘剑似乎是它之前的名字，这把神兵随着龙尊沦为罪囚而蒙尘受辱。而今得你妙手重铸，不如重新为它起个名字吧？

Star-Shattering Blade of Truth is this weapon's old name, and it's been dragged through the mud since the fall of the high elder. Now that you've re-cast it with skill and precision, why not give it a new name too?
「碎星绝尘剑」，剑出星碎，万古绝尘！端的是好名字！
Star-Shattering Blade of Truth: Slash at the stars, and leave foes shattered. A grandiose and elaborate name!
言简意赅，不落窠臼！大，宝，剑！端的是好名字！
Concise, but unconventional! Big, sword... Truly a splendid name!
我就知道{NICKNAME}也是满腹才学啊，此剑如风有灵，如月照影，正合其名「风灵月影」，端的是好名字！

Ha! I always knew that the great {NICKNAME} was a very cultured {F#young lady}{M#young man}. This blade is more than just a physical weapon — it connects, deciphers, and even modifies the rules of the world itself. An unusual but fitting name!
虚数内能便携式战术激光炮！
Imaginary Intra-Kinetic Portable Tactical Laser Cannon!
等等，这…「激光炮」是什么东西啊？
Hang on... What's this "laser cannon" about?
虚数内能便携式战术激光炮！
Imaginary Intra-Kinetic Portable Tactical Laser Cannon!
可…可按照我这设定，这东西原本可叫做碎星绝尘剑啊！
But... But based on my screenplay, this should be called the Star-Shattering Blade of Truth!
谁说「碎星绝尘剑」就不能是一门激光炮了？现在市面上都是些乏善可陈的仙侠幻戏，观众早就看腻了。
Who said the Star-Shattering Blade of Truth can't actually be a laser cannon? The market is saturated with boring superhero Immersia, and the audience wants something new.
咱们推陈出新，在这儿给它冒出一个{TEXTJOIN#61}，给他们一点小小的科幻震撼！我说小衍，你这剧本还想不想卖咱们幻戏社了？
Out with the old and in with the new. Let's use {TEXTJOIN#61} here and give them a bit of a sci-fi shock! How about it, Xiyan — or aren't you interested in selling us this script anymore?
行吧，我犟不过您二位…{TEXTJOIN#61}就{TEXTJOIN#61}吧……
Fine. You two are simply too much... If {TEXTJOIN#61} is what you want, then {TEXTJOIN#61} it is...
「{TEXTJOIN#61}重临世间，{NICKNAME}光是握住它，就觉得自己所向披靡。」
"{TEXTJOIN#61}, reborn once more, settled in {NICKNAME}'s hand — who suddenly felt invincible."
「内有『九转升天丹』脱胎换骨，外有持明龙尊强援臂助，手中还有足以毁天灭地的神兵利器{TEXTJOIN#61}！」
"With the dragon oil elixir flowing internally and the Vidyadhara high elder's power protecting externally, our hero gripped onto this world-destroying divine blade, {TEXTJOIN#61}!"
「此时，在{NICKNAME}心中只有一个念头——消灭绝灭大君，保得仙舟万代太平。」
"At this time, there is only one thought in {NICKNAME}'s head - The Lord Ravager must be destroyed so the Xianzhou can remain in peace."
「随着幻胧的身体轰然倒下，仙舟罗浮的灾难也暂告一段落了…然而，正当{NICKNAME}与{TEXTJOIN#59}准备庆贺时，隐藏在深处的邪恶造物却伸出了魔爪！」

"As Phantylia's body crashed down, the crisis of the Xianzhou Luofu came to an end for now... However, just as {NICKNAME} and {TEXTJOIN#59} were getting ready to celebrate, an evil creature lurking deep within the depths reached out its malevolent talons!"
哎呀，您别着急嘛。之前都说了很多次了嘛，战斗桥段在下分分钟就可以写完，不要急，我等一下就写。
Ah, don't worry. I've told you many times already — the battle scenes write themselves. It's fine. I'll finish them up later.
Phantylia does not look like THAT!
嗐…这我可是完全按照您的描述设计的！背后长着植物、身形非常巨大、看起来特别凶恶……
Hey... This was based on your descriptions! Plants on the back, monstrously huge, ferocious...
算了，{NICKNAME}，别计较了，就当是艺术加工吧。真要长得像绝灭大君那么可怕，拍成幻戏的成本也要提高不少。

Forget it, {NICKNAME}. Just forget about that. Treat it as part of the artistic process. The budget for shooting Immersia would shoot through the roof if we really wanted to capture a ferocious and accurate likeness of the Lord Ravager.
对对对，你先别计较这些…等我之后再做修改。咳咳，在下还是先继续给故事收个尾啊……
Yes, that's right. Don't worry about these details... I'll revise them later. Ahem, I'll keep going and bring the story to its denouement, then...
「面对前所未有的强敌，开拓者与持明龙尊的命运，究竟会走向何方呢？下一折便是最终决战——『仙舟民同悲万古尘，开拓者星落长乐天』！」

"Faced with an enemy of unprecedented power, what will become of the Trailblazer and the high elder of the Vidyadhara? The next scene is our final decisive battle: Xianzhou Laments Woes of Age, Trailblazer Fails Sanctum of Exaltation!"
Wait a sec, why do I fail in this!?
Hey, that title is a spoiler!
哎呀，就是一点点下集预告的小噱头罢了…在下才不舍得真给您写死呢。呼…感谢您二位的协助！在下这个台本啊，总算是写完了。

Come on, it's just a little gimmick for the next scene's preview... I'm not really going to kill you off. ...Whew, finally finished it. Thank you both for your help! This script of mine is pretty much done now.
那看起来没我什么事了？我先回去了啊。等你这边定稿了，记得发给幻戏社那边同步一下。
Looks like I'm not needed anymore, right? I'll head off, then. Remember to send us the revisions once you're done so that we can sync up.
哎！一定，一定。至于{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}…您应该还是准备亲眼看着在下把结局写完吧。那在下立刻动笔，绝不耽误您的时间。
Ah, yes, definitely! As for {M#Mister}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}... You're still waiting to see me wrap up the story, right? I'll get writing immediately. I would never dream of wasting your time.
西衍先生开始奋笔疾书，这次他写得眉飞色舞…大概是因为被相中了版权，心情特别好吧。
Mr. Xiyan begins scribbling furiously, and this time he radiates with delight... He's probably in such good spirits because he's managed to get some cash from this IP.
不一会儿，他昂起自己骄傲的头颅，将稿子给了你。
Shortly after, he raises his proud head and hands over the manuscript to you.
现在最后一折戏，也就是咱们这个故事的大结局，「仙舟民同悲万古尘，开拓者星落长乐天」也彻底写完了。期待您通读全本之后，能给在下提一些重要的意见。

Now the final scene, the epic finale of our story, has finally been completed: Xianzhou Laments Woes of Age, Trailblazer Fails Sanctum of Exaltation! I hope you can give me some feedback once you read through it.
嗐！在下差点忘了，今天晚上在下还要和幻戏社的编剧们一起吃饭呢，哈哈，可能这下是真的要发达咯！
Hey, I almost forgot! I'm having dinner tonight with some of the playwrights from the Mellow-Golden-Mayor Immersia Club. Haha, maybe I really am going to make it on the big stage!
在下要赶紧回趟家，洗洗脸、刮刮胡子、换身衣裳…咱们下次再见吧！
I have to get home, wash up, shave, change my clothes... So much to do. See you next time!
除此之外，我还随手写了一些您在仙舟各处冒险挑战的外传小故事，您得空可以来我这儿读一读，评说一番，也好让我能把它编篡进咱们这一整出《开拓豪侠传》的话本里。

Aside from that, I have also written down some side stories of your adventures on the Xianzhou. Feel free to come have a read when you have the time, give some comments, and help me include them into the Legend of the Trailblazer.
{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}，《开拓豪侠传》这一整个话本我还在编撰润色呢。
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, I'm still fleshing out the stories in the Legend of the Trailblazer.
顺带我又编了些外传故事，您有没有兴趣试听？
By the way, I made up a few side stories. Would you like to hear them?
药材在炉鼎中翻滚沸腾着，引得洞天穹顶上阵阵雷霆大作…半晌，「九转升天丹」出炉了。
The medicinal herbs boiled around in the elixir cauldron, causing thunderclaps to form on the dome above... Soon, the Elixir of Dragon Oil had been concocted.
您快开始为新任龙尊接生吧，马上就是这段故事的高潮部分了！
You are about to begin delivery of the next high elder. The climax of this story is about to start!
Phantylia, it's time to settle the score once and for all!
Come and get it, puny worms!
我依稀记得…藏宝图应该就在这附近了……
I vaguely remember... The treasure map ought to be around here somewhere...
真是辛苦您帮我整理思绪，收集灵感，我这就开动。
Thank you for helping me sort out my thoughts and get some inspiration. I'll start right away.
西衍先生拿起他的稿本，奋笔疾书。
Mr. Xiyan took out his notebook and began scribbling at a furious pace.
不一会儿，他志得意满地将稿子给了你。
Shortly after, he handed over the manuscript to you, filled with satisfaction.
在下已经把「无名客血战寿瘟妖」的部分写好了。
I've already written the part about "Nameless Battles Author of Plagues."
对喽，这一路咱们的主角——也就是您，历经奇遇，服食灵丹，我得在这「主角模板」上再添几笔，免得下回忘了。

That's right. Our protagonist on this quest — that is, you — has experienced all these adventures and taken this elixir of life. I have to add a few strokes to this Protagonist Model so that it's not forgotten next time.
说起来，今天走这一遭，我脑袋里多了不少灵感。
Speaking of which, I was left with tons of inspiration rattling around in my head after today's trip.
我想以您在仙舟上的冒险为蓝本，写些旁支的冒险传奇。把您的主角模板给好好扩充一下，再写个几场<color=#dbc291ff>您的挑战故事</color>，您一定得赏脸听听。

I'd like to use some of your side adventures on the Xianzhou as material to write some side stories. It'll help flesh out your Protagonist Model, so I'll write out some of <color=#dbc291ff>Your Challenging Adventures</color>. Why don't you listen and tell me what you think?
听说你有特殊委派交给我…
I heard that you've got a special assignment for me...
哦？想不到艾丝妲站长推荐的特派员，是你这个年轻人。
Oh? I didn't think the Lead Researcher's task force would be someone as young as you.
也是好事。像你这种局外人，没办法对我的整个大局造成影响……
But that's fine. An outsider like you has no way of interfering with my master plan...
你一定要说这么多谜语吗？
Are you done speaking in riddles?
以你的「理解」层次，或许我的这些前辈经验的确是「谜语」吧。
Based on your level of "understanding," perhaps my seniority and experience really does seem like a "riddle."
所以到底是什么特殊委派？
哎，现在的年轻人，真是静不下心来听前辈分享经验。
Oh, young people these days. They just can't stay still and listen to a senior share their rich experience.
算了，既然你只关心那些无聊的「特殊委派」，那我就给你解释解释吧。
Forget it. Since you only care about those boring "assignments," let me explain.
空间站的效率你也知道，过了这么久，灾后复兴工作进度还是很缓慢。而那些负责执行的家伙说，自己是因为权限过低无权处理，才会拖这么久。

I'm sure even you know about efficiency here on the space station. Post-disaster recovery work is still going very slowly. And the guys in charge said it's because their access level is too low, and they don't have the appropriate authority.
而那些有高级权限的科员呢？要么年纪大了不方便亲自出马，要么任务繁重没心思顾及这些小事。所以没办法提供有效支持。

And what about those researchers with high-level access? They're either too old to help out in person, or they're working on something too huge to bother stooping down to this low level. So there's no way to provide any effective support.
他们这些借口，你懂就好。结果上来说，就是某个管事人向艾丝妲站长提出申请，想要一名符合权限要求的「特派员」，完成这部分特殊的委托——因此，你来了。

You know, those are just their excuses. At the end of the day, it's basically a supervisor wanting a "special agent" with the right permits to complete those special assignments, and they put in an application with the Lead Researcher for such a person — and that's why you are here.
而很不幸，我被要求负责协助这名「特派员」完成工作，处理一些文件整理的内容。
And rather unfortunately, I was asked to support this "Task Force" in getting things done as well as to handle all the paperwork.
根据我的整理结果，有一个好消息和一个坏消息要告诉你。
And based on this paperwork, I've got good news and bad news to tell ya.
好消息是，这些委托其实都不算困难，顶多只是有些麻烦。
The good news: This assignment isn't hard at all. It's just a slight hassle at worst.
而坏消息是…我手头上临时又被分配了其他的工作。所以我能提供的协助，到此为止。
And the bad news is... I've been tasked with some other urgent work. So this is about all the support I can offer you for now.
具体的工作内容我已经发送给你了，之后自己看着办吧。
I've sent the specific work details to you, so you can figure things out yourself later.
哦，辛苦了。酬劳发放的流程不涉及我这边，如果核对之后有任何问题可以直接找艾丝妲站长处理。
Oh, great job. Remuneration isn't part of my job scope. Check things over and if you have any questions, go ask Lead Researcher Asta directly.
原来你是来跟我说这件事的啊…那我不太有空，抱歉。
So, that's what you want to talk with me about... Then I don't have the time. Sorry.
哎哟，这位客官，总算把你盼来了。
之前我碰见个热心的云骑姑娘，是你的朋友对吧？
I met a warmhearted Cloud Knight lady not long ago. She's your friend, right?
嗯，前不久她和商会的小秘书来找过我。
Yeah, she and Miss Secretary of the merchant guild came by a while ago.
有件事想麻烦你，我想录几段评书放在店里，可是我与那几位先生都不熟，不知能否拜托你替我到现场录上几段？

Hmm... Can I ask you for a favor? I'm thinking of playing some storytelling shows in my store, but I don't know any of the performers. Would you please go to their live show and record a few pieces for me?
Do you want to become a storyteller yourself?
不是，我只是想用评书录音来吸引游客。
No, not at all. I just want to attract more tourists with those recordings.
I don't know them well, either.
啊？那位云骑军的小姑娘可是向我推荐你来着……
Really? But that Cloud Knight lady recommended you to me...
哎哟，我只是有些担心，我要是加入商会的物流系统，开始做外卖生意了，那我这儿的老主顾怎么办……
You know, I'm just worried about my regulars. What if I join the guild's logistics network and start providing takeout food? What will happen to them...?
长此以往，谁还会光顾我这摊子呢？
Will anyone come to my stall in the long run?
那就不出摊，省力又省心。
You could shut down the dine-in stall and save the trouble.
那怎么行，这个摊子我支起来多少年了，主打的就是新鲜出炉这一点。要是关掉摊子专职做外卖…这么多年的心血岂不是白费了？
But this stall has been my bread and butter for years. Freshly baked snacks are my specialty, and if I shut down my stall and do takeout, all those years of hard work will go down the drain, right?
不会的，仙舟上念旧的人多。
No worries. I'm sure your regulars will still come to your stall.
机巧鸟配送那么方便，仙舟的年轻人都喜欢在家点外卖，以后的事，谁知道呢。
But cycrane delivery is just so convenient these days. With all those young folks ordering takeout at home, who knows what will happen in the future?
横竖都是赚钱，别在意细节！
Never mind the details! At the end of the day, it's all about making money, right?
话可不能这么说，钱固然重要，但还不足以与我和老主顾之间的友谊相比。而且，我开摊是想不断精进我的手艺。我要想挣钱，早就找个店当点心师傅去了。

That's not the case. To me, my relationship with my regulars is way more important than just making money. Plus, I started this stall to hone my skills, not just to earn a buck. If I really wanted to make a kill, I could have worked as a snack master at a fancy restaurant.
我听说素裳姑娘说，阿来和阿往是曲艺界的新星，放我家这摊子上说上几段也不算失礼。
Sushang mentioned Back'n & Forth to me. They're up-and-comers in the storytelling industry, and I think they'd be a great fit for my stall.
倒是那西衍先生，他可是说书的名家大拿，要是能拿到他的录音，就算是老主顾也没有什么可抱怨的！麻烦你帮我去录一下试试吧！
And let's not forget Mr. Xiyan, a well-known storyteller. My regulars would love his recordings! Please, I really could use your help!
我听说那西衍先生，还有阿来和阿往两位先生，都是罗浮上擅说书的好手，要是能录上他们的评书，我这客流量肯定不愁！麻烦你帮我去录一下吧！
I heard that Mr. Xiyan and Back'n & Forth are famous storytellers on this ship. Their recordings will definitely attract new customers to my stall! Please, help me get their recordings!
唷，合着观众老爷今天不想当观众了。
Alas, looks like our audience has some other ideas today.
嗐，损别人可以，损观众老爷可不行。传出去定让人笑话咱俩小年轻的不会办事。
Come on, it's one thing to joke about others and a whole different thing to joke about our audience. If we do that, we'll end up becoming the joke in this business.
Yeah, you laugh at your customer...
And you end up a bummer!
办事不牢！等等，打住打住，咱俩可都没尾巴，合着这属于是见人先来个大马趴，当给观众老爷的见面礼了！
And you'll be broke! Wait, wait, we're not making terrible jokes. We're straying from the point, so let's get back to the folks!
How about I record the crosstalk improv you just had?
还是算了吧，方才那段内容，和咱俩自身不贴合，而且没什么意思。
Nah, forget it. It's terrible, not catchy at all.
Can you guys give me a definite answer?
您别急，我俩得商量一下才行。
Not so fast. We'll have to talk about it.
现在观众老爷想要个授权…
Now your audience wants a "yes" answer...
好说好说，方才是即兴演出，我们定会给您一个答复。
Don't worry. We were just improvising, and you'll get an answer from us soon.
好了，这即兴段子还得改，我们先不谈这个，谈谈正事。我觉得录音的事听上去没啥问题，不过我一个人说了可不算，还得问问我搭档的意见。
There's still much room for our improvisation, but let's put it on hold for now. The recording thing sounds good to me, but I need my partner's opinion before making a final decision.
我觉着…这事恐怕不得行咯。
Well... I'm not sure about that...
为啥啊，这位可是咱们的老观众了，你就算不同意，高低得给个正当理由不是，光驳人家面子，倒显得咱俩无情无义了。
But why not? It's just doing our regular customer a favor, right? A flat-out rejection will make us seem heartless.
嗐，咱也不是那薄情寡义之人，咱们也算是熟人，我就直说了吧——我和阿来呢，是相声爱好者，资历尚浅，也没什么拿得出手的作品。
It's not like I want to reject your request outright, but Back'n and I are just crosstalk lovers. We don't have enough experience to put on a great show yet.
——有是有，也就那么几段编排好的，比我兜里的钱还干净。
We've put on a few decent shows, but that's all about it. To be frank, we've had fewer successful performances than the coins in my pocket.
给这金人巷高阿姨的摊子录音，目的是增加客流量，但我可不敢打包票，咱俩的相声能吸引到多少人流。
I just can't guarantee that our crosstalk comedy will really attract any customers for Tall Auntie's stall in Aurum Alley.
就是，别瞧着咱们哥俩年纪比你大，但讲相声这事也不算经验丰富，要是先在潜在观众那儿留下什么负面印象，那多不好。
Yeah, we might be older than you, but we don't have much more experience in crosstalk performance. We just don't want to leave any negative impressions on our potential audience.
要不你俩去现场表演表演？
Why don't you guys do live performances instead?
哪有那个时间呐，我俩只是相声爱好者，工作日咱俩还得在码头干活呢。
Because we simply don't have the time. We're just crosstalk lovers, and we've got work to do at the dock on work days.
放心，报酬少不了你们的。
Don't worry. You will be generously paid.
瞧您说的，我像是稀罕报酬的人吗？咱们可都是有正经工作的。
Hah, do we look like we are solely motivated by money? We've got our own jobs to do.
我是他发小兼同事，他这人我最了解了，相声本就图一乐，他自个儿打心底可不觉得能靠这档子事挣钱发财。
I've known him since I was a kid, and I know him well. He gets into the crosstalk industry for fun, and he doesn't really expect us to hit it big with our performances.
我觉得是你们想太多了…
I think you guys are overthinking things...
咱们这还在上升期，凡事自然得谨慎才好。
As newcomers in this industry, we can't be too careful with our new career.
您呐，也高低体谅一下我俩的难处，就甭为难咱俩了。
Yeah, please understand our concerns and don't make things too difficult for us.
还是请回吧，要是想听段子，我们倒是无任欢迎。
Please don't bring up the recording thing again, but if you ever want to listen to our crosstalk, you're always welcome here.
（他俩态度这么坚决…哎，直接去西衍先生那儿碰碰运气吧。）
(There is no room for negotiation in this matter, it seems. Maybe I should just try my luck with Mr. Xiyan.)
原来如此，好说好说。我原本就给「不夜侯」准备了些话本，你们那边想用尽管录就是了。
I see your point. Actually I've prepared some shows for the Sleepless Earl. Feel free to record them if you want.
西衍先生声情并茂地录了几段评书……
Mr. Xiyan puts a lot of emotion into his performance...
能多些听众总是好的，没落的艺术总得有条活路。
It's always great to have more listeners. An art form that's in decline deserves a chance to survive.
嗯？你怎么在叹气，莫不是在下方才的评书出了什么问题？还是说你有什么别的问题？
Hmm? Why are you sighing? Is there anything wrong with my performance? Or are you worried about something else?
（向他讲述被阿来阿往拒绝一事）
(Tell him that you were rejected by Back'n & Forth.)
相声啊，和说书一样渐渐没落了，他们这么谨慎也情有可原，毕竟这年头光靠说相声可养不活自己。

Well, crosstalk, just like storytelling, seems to be on the decline these days. I totally understand why they are so cautious. After all, crosstalk shows aren't exactly a reliable source of income anymore.
不过他们到底是新人，经验不足，思维陷入误区倒也正常。你要是录制他们的相声，在下倒是有个法子能将他俩劝回来。
But they're new and inexperienced, so it's natural for them to have misunderstandings about the industry. If you want to record their crosstalk shows, I have a way to persuade them.
此事说来简单，你只是被他们拉入他们的惯性思维里去了。
It's simple, actually. You were just pulled into their way of thinking.
不敢当不敢当，在下也只是有些经验之谈。
I wouldn't go so far as to say I'm going to "enlighten" you, but I do have a thing or two to share with you.
...How about us two record a crosstalk show together?
我见这次初试啼声也是个机会，咱们还是留给那两位相声新人吧。
Hmm, perhaps not. This would be a great opportunity for the two up-and-coming crosstalk comedians.
无论是相声还是说书，都是得面向观众不断训练。这就跟云骑军的日常训练一样，得多跑多练。
Whether it's crosstalk or storytelling, it's all about constant practice in front of the audience. It's just like the Cloud Knights' daily training.
他俩局限在一个地方表演，反而不是好事——不过他们还有工作嘛，情有可原。其实说白了，相声就得不断接受观众的反馈，不断改进。

Always performing in the same place can actually be detrimental to their growth, although I understand that they still have jobs to do. Honing crosstalk skills is all about accepting feedback from the audience and making constant improvements.
有了这录音表演，反倒是好事，这意味着会有更多的「听众」。他们大可以反过来利用听众来试验自己的新段子，定期回访听听大家的意见，总比闭门造车好。

Recording their performance could be beneficial for them, as it means they'll have a bigger audience to test out their new materials and get more feedback. This is way better than talking to themselves!
确实…哎，不对，我确实个什么劲儿。抱歉，在下方才嘴瓢了一下，请见谅。
Indeed... Ugh, my bad, I didn't mean to come off as arrogant. Sorry about that.
有道理，我这就去找他们。
That makes sense. I'll talk with them again.
嗯，不过你先别急，我还有话没说完。
Hang on. There's one more thing I'd like to say.
方才说的你记下了吧？你直接跟他们解释这个原理，他们自然会懂的。
You remember what I said, right? Just tell my words to them and they'll understand.
若是还不松口，那你就报上我的名头，说金人巷那边要是想开我的话本专场，想借他们的相声录音来热热场子。
And if they're still hesitant, just tell them that I'm planning to start a storytelling show in Aurum Alley, and that I'd like to use their crosstalk as a warm-up act.
有道理，他说得对，也怪我，我怎么就没想到呢。
Hmm, yeah, he's got a point. I should've realized that sooner.
亡羊补牢也不算晚，况且，能给西衍先生热场子，这可是想都不敢想的机会啊。
It's never too late to make things right. Plus, I'd do anything for a chance to give a warm-up performance for Mr. Xiyan.
要是我夜里梦见的，第二天醒来保管哈喇子淌满一枕头。
If I ever got a chance to do this in my dreams, I'd wake myself up from laughing so hard.
Then what are we waiting for?
行！咱俩这就来秀几段绝活——
等赶明儿有空了，我俩一定会登门拜访一下，顺带么，也收集一波听众的反馈。
We'll swing by Tall Auntie's stall when we're free and get some feedback from our audience.
好勒，您慢点走，回去替我们给店主阿姨说声谢谢嗷。
Yeah, take your time, and please convey our thanks to her.
高阿姨把我叫了过来，看来高阿姨与码头建立合作一事，进展顺利？
Since you called me over, Tall Auntie, looks like you've agreed to cooperate with the dock, I assume?
顺利顺利，我还麻烦了{NICKNAME}去问录音的事，不知道进展如何了？
Yeah, I have. I wonder if {NICKNAME} has brought me the recordings I needed?
I've got the recordings you asked for.
哎哟，太感谢了！稍等我先试试……
Thank you so much! Let me try it out...
高阿姨将录音放入播放设备中。
Tall Auntie puts the recording into her playback device.
辛苦你了，有了这玩意的帮忙，客流量一定少不了。
Thank you for your help! With these recordings, we'll definitely get more customers.
我所担忧的事已经被解决，那我自然得说到做到。麻烦小秘书那个…物流规划，是这个说法没错吧？高阿姨记性不好。
Now that my worries have been resolved, I've got to keep my promise. It's about... oh, what was it again... logistics planning, right? Apologies, I have a terrible memory.
没错，就是这个，既然高阿姨都这么说了，那就麻烦{NICKNAME}将「小吃铺」纳入到物流规划之中吧，这样码头就会有新的运单了。
Yeah, that's the thing. Since Tall Auntie already mentioned it, then {NICKNAME}, please add the Food Stall into the logistics plan. This way, the docks can get some new orders soon.
谢谢你，{NICKNAME}。对了，我听素裳姑娘说，他们几位还有不少作品，你要是感兴趣啊，可以到他们那儿再瞧瞧。
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. By the way, Sushang told me that those performers have prepared more shows. Feel free to drop by and check them out if you're interested.
在你的帮助下，光顾小吃摊的人越来越多。
Thanks to your aid, more and more people are visiting the Food Stall.
这顾客的心意真是难懂——呃，我不是说你，抱歉，只是有感而发。
Customers are truly a beast to try and understand — oh, I'm not referring to you, sorry. I just had to vent.
明曦姑娘来找过我说过商会的事，我大体上是支持的，能把生意做大是好事，但也得谨慎行事。所以我就去做了个市场调研，收集潜在顾客的口味喜好。

Mingxi shared her thoughts on the merchant guild with me, and I am in agreement with most of her ideas. It's always a good thing to make the pie bigger, right? So I decided to do some market research to get a better sense of what my potential customers are into.
可这结果一收集出来，我发现大家的口味真是古怪，两极分化极为严重，要么就嫌「烈焰浓茶」茶味淡，要么就是说「烈焰浓茶」不够「烈」。
But after collecting the results, I realized that their tastes are really polarized. Either they think my Flaming Potent Tea tastes too bland or too strong.
你可以研发几种不同的。
Why don't you develop several flavors?
哈，这就是典型的外行人思维，我是打算调整配方不假，可这配方比例怎么调？
Ha! That's a typical layperson's suggestion. I do plan on tweaking my recipe, but I'm not sure how to do it yet.
我这小本买卖，研发成本有限，「几种」真是说得轻松……
I'm running a small business and my budget is limited. I can't just "develop several flavors"...
So, which part of the customers are you going to listen to?
哈，这就是我所头疼的地方了——顾客的意见都很重要，但是要听谁的才好呢？
See, that's what gives me a headache! Customers' opinions are important, but whose opinions should I prioritize?
Too bland? Just add some alcohol!
哎！哎哎哎，您怎么把我心里话说出来了！
Hey! Hey, hey! That's exactly what I would be doing if I could!
但是对不住，地衡司颁发的经营许可还有商品税率注定了咱这儿卖的只能是茶，您明白的对吧？
But unfortunately, I can't. According to the regulations issued by the Realm-Keeping Commission, we can only sell tea to customers. You surely know that, right?
相逢即是缘，干脆就找阁下做次口味测试吧，也算是名正言顺地请你喝两杯。
But now that you're here, why not try my new recipes? Feel free to enjoy them. It's on the house.
我正巧按不同的配比，研制了三种全新的「烈焰浓茶」，还请你来试试，然后告诉我你的感受。
I happen to have developed three new recipes for Flaming Potent Tea in different ratios. Please try them and tell me how you feel.
杜老板端来了一杯「烈焰浓茶」。
Boss Du brings you a mug of Flaming Potent Tea.
这杯的比例是九比一，为那些嫌「烈焰浓茶」不够「烈」的客户调制而成。
This one, with a ratio of nine to one, is prepared for those who think my tea is too bland.
你将茶一饮而尽，辛辣的口感令你怀疑你喉咙是否在燃烧。
As you chug down the tea, its spicy taste sets your throat ablaze.
你闭上眼使劲忍耐，那股火热的焦灼感滑落至胃部，过了许久，你才终于适应了这种强烈的肠胃道刺激感。
You close your eyes and try to hold back the burning sensation that slides down to your stomach. It takes a long time before you finally get used to the irritation in your stomach.
你睁开眼睛，强烈刺激带来的生理泪水令你眼眶通红，你忽然发现眼前的一切失去了原有的光鲜。巨鲸在你脑海中歌唱…下浮…跳跃…旋转，直至眼前突然漆黑一片。

You open your eyes, red from the tears caused by the intense sensations. All the colors in the world fade before your eyes. You hear the song of a giant whale in your head. You feel yourself floating... jumping... and spinning... until everything suddenly goes black in your vision.
好了，世界总算清静下来了，这是你倒下前脑海中闪过的最后一丝念头——
"Well, at least the world has become quiet again..." That is the last thought that flashes through your mind before you collapse.
吓死我了，我以为你出什么事了，刚才你忽然喝着喝着就倒了。
Oh, you're awake! Thank goodness! You just passed out while drinking the tea! I thought you kicked the bucket or something!
正打算把你往店门口外搬呢…还好你醒了，看来没什么大碍了。
I was trying to move you out of my tea house... but now that you've woken up, I guess everything is okay.
这么说来，方才那方子是要不得了。来，再尝尝这个，我换了道七比三的方子，保管不会出事！
Looks like that recipe is not going to work. Well, I've got another one for you to try! This one has a ratio of seven to three, so it's totally safe!
吸取了前一杯的教训，你浅尝了一口，辛辣的口感依旧存在，但随即又被淡淡的茶叶清香味遮掩。
Having learned your lesson, you take a sip of the new tea. While it's still a bit intense, the taste is quickly overtaken by its aromatic tea flavor.
你观察了数息，发现喝起来口感顺滑，并无不适，你忍不住一口一口地喝下去。
You wait for a while and don't feel any discomfort, so you start chugging it down.
你觉得自己此刻舒爽极了，像在柔软的云朵间漂浮，仰卧，来回起坐。你捧起一朵云砸向你的同伴三月七……
You feel incredibly comfortable almost as if you were floating among soft clouds. You grab a cluster of clouds and playfully toss it at your companion March 7th...
「等等，三月七？」你意识到不对，猛地抬头望向眼前人，却意外发现茶庄的老板竟有好几位之多，他们长得一模一样，就连说话声也完全一致。

"Wait, March 7th?" At that moment, you realize that something is wrong, shooting a questioning glance at the tea house owner standing in front of you. To your astonishment, you see several identical-looking owners, all speaking to you in the exact same tone.
「可是为何我先前没发现…他竟有这么多孪生兄弟？」你为自己的观察力之低下而恼怒，你不明白为什么这么明显的事你此前竟从未留意过。
"But why didn't I notice earlier that he had so many siblings?" Frustrated by your lack of observation, you don't understand why you've never noticed something so obvious before.
你开始迷茫，继而是某种不可名状的后怕与懊恼，你不明白除此以外，仙舟上还有多少秘密摆在你眼前却又无法察觉，这究竟是你的失误，亦或是旁人的精心安排……

Your mind is filled with bewilderment, followed by an unexplainable sense of fear and regret. You can't help but contemplate how many secrets might be right in front of your eyes yet remain unnoticed by you. Is this truly because of your lack of observation? Or could it be that someone else is pulling the strings...?
醒一醒，你还听得到吗？{NICKNAME}？这是几，你看得到吗？
Wake up, {NICKNAME}! Are you still with me? How many fingers do you see?
醒了就好醒了就好，没想到你这么……
Ah, finally, you've woken up. I didn't expect that you would just...
哎算了，不提这个了，这七比三的方子又失败咯。我给你换了个最低配比五五开的新品，你来尝尝？最后一杯了，要是还不行我就放弃研发新品了。
Ah, forget it. So, this recipe is another failure, it seems. Well... how about the last one, a drink with only a one to one ratio? If this fails, too, I might as well give up developing new products.
你慢慢地将这杯「烈焰浓茶」喝下肚，先前的两次新品已经令你吸取了足够多的教训。
Having learned so much from the previous two mugs, you take your time and slowly drink this last mug of Flaming Potent Tea.
你清晰地感受着它的口感，一半像泉水，甘甜可口，一半像是火焰，灼热滚烫。两者合二为一，顺着食道渐渐下落，温润而平静。
It tastes like a miraculous mix of sweet spring water and searing flame. The calm yet warm liquid slowly descends your esophagus, providing a comforting sensation.
你抬头看了看杜老板，不确定，又瞥了瞥。这才敢确定你没有出现任何幻觉，现在你终于可以长舒一口气——你确信这就是最适合你的「烈焰浓茶」配比。

Uncertain, you throw a few more glances at Boss Du, making sure that you aren't hallucinating. Finally, you let out a sigh of relief — you are pretty sure that this is the best Flaming Potent Tea recipe for you.
怎么样，你感觉如何？要是有哪里不舒服记得要告诉我，实在不行我去把丹鼎司的医士喊过来。
How are you feeling? Let me know if you feel bad in any way, and I'll call the healers from the Alchemy Commission if I have to.
…我倒不知道我们家「烈焰浓茶」还有这种效果，发出这种评价的…你是头一个。
...Well, I didn't know my Flaming Potent Tea could have such an effect. You're the first to make... such a remark.
咦，这么看来这个比例是没问题的。我明白了，之后的新品我就在这个比例上慢慢调整口味和配方吧。
Looks like this recipe is just right. I see. I'll make further adjustments based on this one, then.
谢谢你啊，{NICKNAME}。有你在我这儿亲身试茶，我这才有底气去研发新品。我看小秘书已经过来了，你们那个物流规划，要怎么做来着？

Thank you for trying out my new recipes, {NICKNAME}. Thanks to you, now I've plucked my courage to develop new products. Oh, looks like Miss Secretary has arrived! So, what are your plans about logistics planning?
我看你们喝得开心，根本就没注意到我…哎，那就麻烦{NICKNAME}将「杜氏茶庄」纳入到物流规划之中吧，这样码头就会有新的运单了。
You were too focused on enjoying tea to notice me... {NICKNAME}, please add Du's Teahouse into the logistics plan so the docks can get some new orders.
哈哈，我这茶庄别没有，就是茶水多。很高兴与商会建立正式的合作。
Haha, can't argue with that. Everyone loves my tea after all. Anyway, I'm glad to formally establish a cooperation with the merchant guild.
嗯嗯，希望我们接下来也能合作愉快，让更多的人尝到茶庄的烈焰浓茶。
Absolutely! I hope that our cooperation will be fruitful and bring your tasty Flaming Potent Tea to an even larger customer base.
我听商会的明曦姑娘提起过你，你们是打算用码头把各家店的货发到其他地方去。
I heard about you from Mingxi of the Merchant Guild. You're planning to use the docks to ship the stores' goods to other delves.
像我们茶庄，做外卖生意是最合适不过的，不过……
For stores like my teahouse, doing business by way of delivery is pretty appropriate. However...
在你的帮助下，光顾杜氏茶庄的人越来越多。
Thanks to your aid, more and more people are visiting Du's Teahouse.
This store doesn't have fantastic ratings...
你是{NICKNAME}对吧，正巧我有件事……
You are {NICKNAME}, right? It just so happens that I have something...
我们好像也不是很熟吧。
Wait, have we ever met before?
哎，贵人多忘事，我先前在小秘书那儿见过你几面，不过你可能没什么印象了……
Yeah, we've met a few times at Miss Secretary's office, but perhaps you don't remember me anymore...
Oh, it's you. How can I help?
太好了，我有件小事想麻烦你，不过你放心，托人办事总得有点表示，这点人情世故我还是懂的。
To be honest, I was hoping you could do me a small favor. Don't worry. I'll make it worth your while.
呃，不会占用你很多时间的，你要不再考虑一下？
Well, I won't take up much of your time. Maybe you'd like to reconsider?
是这样的，我家这店原是卖文玩的，但这些年来总有化外民来我店里「淘宝」，说什么在这里低价淘到了古董。
Here's the thing: My store sells fandangles, but lately, more and more Outworlders have been flooding in, claiming they've bought precious antiques at low prices.
久而久之，大家就把我这店当成是古董店了。商会的人也劝我尽早转型，我寻思这里头的利润确实大，做成一单就能歇息好久，可比卖文玩清闲。

Over time, people have started to see my store as an antique shop, and even the merchant guild has been recommending that I officially make the switch. To be honest, selling antiques is more lucrative than selling fandangles, and it would give me more time to relax.
但是要转型，就等于重新开业，想把店铺的名头打响可不容易，我想了半天也没想出个所以然来。

The thing is, if I were to make the switch, it would be like opening a whole new shop, and I'd have to start from scratch and build up a new customer base. I've been thinking about it, but I haven't quite figured out how to do it yet.
最后还是小秘书给我出了个主意，她这计划挺好，就是需要个人来搭把手。
In the end, Miss Secretary came up with a great idea, and now I need someone to help me execute it.
That's why you've come to me?
嗐，我本来是想找素裳姑娘帮忙的，但我看她也挺忙的，只好来麻烦你了。
Well, I was planning to ask Sushang for help, but she was too busy. So I was wondering if I could perhaps trouble you instead?
But I know nothing about antiques...
这个很简单的，若不是小机巧鸟做不来，我也不至于麻烦你了。
It's simple. I wouldn't have asked you if my little cycrane could do it.
转型有风险，商业需谨慎。
This would be a risky leap. Think twice before you act.
放心好了，试错期又没多长，横竖不过十几年，一眨眼的功夫罢了。要真失败了，那就继续卖文玩呗。
No worries. It'll only take me a dozen years to try it out and see if this plan works. And if it doesn't, I can always go back to selling fandangles.
其实我先前已经试营业过一段时间，起初客流量还可以，可没过多久，就无人问津了。
Honestly, I've tried it before, but my customer base just slowly disappeared over time.
我原来没当回事，可渐渐的在我们文玩圈子里也听到了些风声，我出去一打听，嗐——
At first, I thought it was just bad luck, but then the same thing happened in my fandangles circle as well. So I started asking around, and I found out... tsk...
这帮子化外民一会儿说我卖假货，一会儿说我不懂行，一传十十传百的，我这店名声就臭了。
It turns out that some ignorant Outworlders have been spreading rumors that I don't know anything about antiques and that I've been selling fake antiques. That's how my reputation got tarnished.
你该不会真的卖假货吧？
You're not selling fake antiques, are you?
我怎么会干这种事，就算我敢这么做，地衡司也不会放过我的，在咱们仙舟上开店可得遵守规章制度。
Come on! How could I even do that? Even if I wanted to, the Realm-Keeping Commission wouldn't let me get away with it. All the stores on the Xianzhou ship have to follow the rules and regulations.
你看着的确不像懂行的。
Well, you do give off the impression that you know nothing about antiques.
你这人怎么说话的，面相又不能反应一个人的学问。
Hey! It's unfair to judge someone solely based on their appearance.
干脆结业，回家继承家产去。
Why don't you just close your shop and inherit your family fortune?
这怎么行呢，我不开店我就连接待同好的地儿都没有了。
If I were to do that, I wouldn't even have a place for my fellow curio enthusiasts.
哎，你是有所不知了，我一个土生土长的仙舟人，一开始就没搞懂化外民口中的「古董」到底是个什么定义。
You just don't get it. I mean, I was born and raised on this Xianzhou ship, and I just can't wrap my head around how those Outworlders define "antiques."
几十年的文玩，工艺又新又好，他们认为这不是古董。可那几百年的文玩，我看着不是掉漆就是缺胳膊少腿的，我卖之前还得重新喷漆上色，他们倒觉得我在糟蹋古董。

Some fandangles made a few decades ago can have amazing craftsmanship, but those outsiders don't even consider them to be true antiques. Meanwhile, some fandangles made centuries ago are so dilapidated that I have to repaint them to make them presentable, but then those same outsiders accuse me of destroying antiques.
我就纳闷了，几十年和一两百年有什么区别，不都是弹指一挥间嘛。
I mean, what's the big deal between antiques from decades ago and centuries ago? It's all just a fleeting amount of time, isn't it?
还好，明曦姑娘听闻我这差点砸了招牌，过来帮了我个大忙——她带我去借来了谛听，靠这玩意侦测文玩的年限，我正好也练练眼力。
Thankfully, Mingxi heard about my predicament and helped me. She lent me a Diting that allows me to figure out the origin year of my fandangles.
现在眼力劲儿我是有了，就是还缺点人气——所以，我打算在店门口这儿搞一个「真假鉴宝」的活动。
Now all I need is a little boost in popularity, and that's why I'm planning to host a treasure appraisal event right in front of my store.
简单来说就是，把待鉴定的古董摆在门口，用谛听来识别具体的年限。年限短的属于假古董，那就直接砸烂，最后留下真古董。

Here's the plan: I'll place the antiques to be appraised at the door and use Diting to figure out their origin year. If they were made just a few decades ago, I'll smash them. That way, only antiques made centuries ago would be left in my store.
现在嘛，我想请你帮个忙，来先预排一次节目，好让我心里有个底儿。
Now I need you to help me with the rehearsal so that I'll know what the real event will be like.
我没有古董，拿什么鉴宝？
But I don't even have antiques. How am I supposed to appraise them?
这个你不用担心，都包在我身上，我从库房里整理了一堆库存出来，有古董也有普通文玩，我们家多少年的积累了，量大管饱！
No need to worry about that. I've brought out a whole bunch of antiques and ordinary fandangles from my family's warehouse, so you'll have plenty to smash at the upcoming show!
So, all I need to do is to smash them all?
别别别，你别急，虽然是得砸，但是你得用谛听找到真正的古董才行。
No, no. You'll need to use Diting to find out the true antiques and smash only the fake ones.
等等，我先把「真假鉴宝」节目的宝贝请出来——
Hold on a second. Let me show you the antiques we'll be using in the event.
说再多都是虚的，你上手实践一下就知道是怎么回事了——
Try it yourself and you'll see what it's all about.
我找了不少关系，这才借来了谛听。这小家伙能测定物件的年限，用来鉴别古董真假是再合适不过了。
Here, I got this Diting through some connections. This little guy will help you figure out the origin year of objects, so you'll know which antiques to smash.
有了它，你就能即刻看到结果。说再多都是虚的，你上手实践一下就知道是怎么回事了。
Follow its guidance and you won't make mistakes. Well, just try it yourself and you'll see what to do.
来，你对着这两个罐子开启谛听的鉴定功能试试——
Activate your Diting and use its "Appraise" feature on these jars.
鉴定开启后，物件本身起了反应的就是真的，毫无反应的就是假的。
While "Appraise" is activated, the jar that responds is the genuine one, and the other is the fake one.
好了，现在你该知道哪个是真古董，哪个是假货了吧？
Well, now you should know which is the genuine antique and which is fake, right?
现在，把那个假的砸掉，真的别碰啊！
Now, smash the fake one. And don't touch the genuine one!
好了好了，剩下那个真的你别动啊。
All right, all right. Just leave the genuine one alone.
现在时机正好，我去喊点人来，希望这次「鉴宝」活动能圆满举行吧……
It's about time to get this show on the road. I'll gather up some folks here. Fingers crossed that this event will be a success...
打着鉴宝节目的噱头，泊阳成功招徕了几位潜在顾客。
With the gimmick of a treasure appraisal event, Boyang has attracted a few potential customers.
这是什么节目？「公司」的真人秀吗？
What's with the setup? An IPC reality show?
好像是罗浮本地节目吧，应该和公司的电视台没关系。
No, I don't think it has anything to do with IPC. A local Luofu event, it seems.
俗话都说，真的假不了，假的真不了。本次「鉴宝」活动由我们「清玩斋」独家举办，各位观众，有请我们的鉴宝人{NICKNAME}——
As the saying goes, the fake can never be real! This treasure appraisal event is hosted by Elegance Pagoda! Now, here comes our appraiser, {NICKNAME} —
（看样子现在该轮到我大显身手了。）
(Now it's time to show what I'm made of!)
嚯，鉴定为——假！请记住，我们「清玩斋」对假货一直保持零容忍的态度！
Whew, this one is... fake! Just a friendly reminder that here at Elegance Pagoda, we have a zero-tolerance policy for fakes!
这究竟是怎么看出来的，神奇！
This is amazing! How did the appraiser spot that?
Wait... what are you doing? Stop it! STOP!
Hahaha, now this is starting to get fun!
…咳咳，看来我们的「鉴宝人」有些激动了。大家放心，委托人提供的物件如有遭遇类似情况，我们一定会照价补偿…补偿从「鉴宝人」的劳务费里扣！

...Ahem, it seems our "appraiser" got a bit too carried away. But rest assured, if we accidentally break a genuine antique, we will definitely compensate for it... and we'll be taking the cost out of our appraiser's paycheck!
挺有意思的，但愿别太贵……
Sounds interesting. I hope their antiques aren't too expensive...
Yeah, we can go check it out later.
太感谢你了，刚才真是多亏有你啊。
Oh, I just can't thank you enough.
辛苦你了，有了鉴宝活动，我们店的名声总算是有救了，之后的生意想必也会好转起来。
Thanks to your performance, my reputation has taken a turn for the better. I'm sure the business will improve over time.
我刚才也看得津津有味的，泊阳老板也和我这边谈好了合作事宜，事不宜迟，那就麻烦{NICKNAME}将「清玩斋」纳入到物流规划之中吧，这样码头就会有新的运单了。
That was fantastic. Boyang and I have worked out all the details of our cooperation. {NICKNAME}, please add Elegance Pagoda into the logistics plan so the docks can get some new orders.
哎哟，我说什么来着，就这跟你说话的功夫，玉兆后台上就一直在弹订单消息了。
Oh, what a pleasant surprise! I've been receiving orders via my jade abacus just as we're talking!
多亏了你和小秘书的帮忙啊，有码头在，发货也方便些…啊抱歉，刚刚在想生意上的事想得太入神了，客人催得急，我先去忙了，回头再聊。

I'm so grateful to you and Miss Secretary for all your help. With the dock provided by the guild, shipping will become more convenient... Oops, sorry, I got a bit too caught up in business talk. Anyway, I should probably go attend to my customers now. Thanks again, and I'll see you later!
还好没砸到，这可是真货啊，幸亏我提前贴了标签…记住，砸假的！
Wow, lucky it didn't get smashed. That's the real deal right there. Thank goodness I labeled it earlier... Remember, smash the fake one!
当你回来的时候，恰好碰见了明曦前来拜访。
As you're returning, you happen to run into Mingxi coming over for a visit.
在你的帮助下，光顾清玩斋的人越来越多。
Thanks to your aid, more and more people are visiting Elegance Pagoda.
明曦受到小天的邀请而来，恰好听到了你的「激辩」。
Mingxi arrives at Little Tian's invitation and was just in time to hear your "heated argument."
当你忙完跑堂，回过神来，明曦已经受邀来到美馔阁了。
When you finally have some downtime after serving the customers, Mingxi had already arrived at Delicacy Pavilion.
当你还在回味「烈焰浓茶」时，明曦已经受邀来到杜氏茶庄了。
While you were still savoring the Flaming Potent Tea, Mingxi had already arrived at Du's Teahouse.
围观群众渐渐散去，你注意到明曦已经受邀来到清玩斋了。
As the onlookers gradually scatter, you notice that Mingxi had already arrived at Elegance Pagoda.
站住，我要用我爸爸送给我的超强以太灵打赢你！
Stop right there! I will defeat you with the super powerful Aether Spirit my dad gave me!
你说…爸爸是不是不想让我玩以太战线啊？
Do you think... my dad was trying to discourage me from playing Aetherium Wars?
银鬃铁卫在此，前方禁止通行！
Silvermane Guards, reporting for duty! No passage up ahead!
对不起，我不是铁卫…在现实中当不成银鬃铁卫，就只能在游戏里过把瘾了。
Sorry, I'm not actually a Silvermane Guard... I couldn't become one in real life, so I can only fantasize in games.
你也是以太战线的玩家吗？跟我来场以太灵对战吧！
You play Aetherium Wars too? Let's have an Aether Spirit battle!
不要问为什么，对上了眼神就要一决高下，这是以太战线的规矩！
Don't ask me why! When our eyes meet, we have to battle, that's the rule of Aetherium Wars!
可恶，居然又输了…看来只跟玩家对战是没法变强的，得去刷点游离数据了。
Drats, I lost again... I'll never get stronger just battling other people, I need to go farm some roaming data.
也给你个建议，如果不想发生对战，就躲着点其他玩家吧。
Let me give you a suggestion: If you don't want to battle, you should try and avoid other players.
天天在决胜乐园巡逻，大家都在玩以太战线，看得我心都痒了…趁长官不在，跟我来一把对决吧！
I spend every day patrolling the Victory Zone while everyone plays Aetherium Wars, I can't bear it anymore... The Captain's not here at the moment, you'll battle me, won't you?
我、我这是故意让你赢了，你可要知恩图报，别跟长官告发我啊！
I—I let you win on purpose! You can repay me by not telling the Captain about this!
等等，让我研究一下你的以太灵吧！
Wait, let me research your Aether Spirit!
你的以太灵好特别啊…只要跟别人对战就能见到各种珍稀生物，以太战线还真是方便。
Your Aether Spirit is exceptional... Aetherium Wars is so convenient, all I have to do is battle people and I can see all sorts of rare creatures!
可恶，机巧以太灵只是在这个赛季削弱了一点数值，玩家就都说它们是废物…我要亲自证明，机巧不是废物！
Tsk! Ingenium Aether Spirits only have got nerfed a little this season and players are saying they're trash... I will personally prove that they are not!
果然输了…算了！它们强不强又如何呢？设计者随时都能修改以太灵的能力，但永远修改不了我对它们的喜爱！
So I did still lose... Forget it! Who cares if they are strong or weak? The designers can rebalance Aether Spirits however they want, they will never change my love for them!
嘿，来场对决吧，随便玩玩就行。
Hey, let's battle. Just a casual match is fine.
哎呀，输赢都无所谓，玩游戏不就是为了开心嘛。
Ah, who cares about winning or losing? Gaming is about having fun!
喂，你是新手？让我这个开服元老来给你上一课吧！
Hey, are you a newbie? I've been playing since the beginning, I'll show you a thing or two!
唉，我居然连新手都打不过了，好怀念刚开服的时候，虽然游戏里只有几个以太灵，还有一堆漏洞，但肯定比现在有趣…曾经的快乐已经一去不返了，你这种新手是不会懂的……

Ahh, even a noob beat me! I miss when the server had just opened... There may have only been a few Aether Spirits in the game and loads of bugs, but it was way more fun than it is now! I'll never get the joy of those days back, noobs nowadays just won't get it...
哼哼，我托人买来了极品以太灵的数据，就拿你试试威力如何吧！
Hehe, I got someone to buy me premium Aether Spirit data. I'll test out their strength on you!
可恶，都怪这游戏充钱不能变得更强，不然我才不会输给你！
Curses! If this game was pay-to-win, I'd never lose to you!
诶，客人，要买本以太战线的攻略吗？至于这攻略靠不靠谱…咱们来场对战就知道了！
Hey there, buddy! Wanna buy some guidebooks for the Aetherium Wars? As for whether or not it's reliable... How about we have a showdown to find out?
哎哟，居然输了，难道这是上个版本的攻略？客人，不好意思啊，等我进了新货再来吧。
Ah, I can't believe I lost! Is this a strategy guidebook for the last update? My apologies, dear customer, please find me again when I've updated my stock.
我已经分析过了这款游戏的所有数据，制定出了胜率最高的战略，你是必败无疑的！
I have already analyzed all of the data in this game and created the strategy with the highest win percentage. Your defeat is inevitable!
看来光分析数据是不够的，还得经过实战检验啊……
It seems analyzing data isn't enough, I also need real battle experience...
以太战线真是太好玩了，我已经熬夜玩了三天了…跟我来场对决吧，我赢一把就睡……
Aetherium Wars is so much fun, I've already been playing for three days straight... Battle me! If I win, I'll get some sleep...
哈——哈欠…看来还不能睡，等会儿再打一把，赢一把就睡……
Yaaawn... Looks like I can't sleep yet. Battle me again! If I win, I'll get some sleep...
科学的力量好厉害！不需要任何电子终端，只要拿着以太硬币就能开始对战！
The power of science is amazing! We don't need any electronic terminals, we just need to hold our Aether Coins to start a battle!
我居然输了，一定是游戏机制不够科学……
I can't believe I lost. The game mechanisms can't be true to real science...
你要倒霉了，我手里的可是最强大的以太灵，见识下虚卒们的厉害吧！
You're out of luck! I have the strongest Aether Spirits around. I'll show you the power of my Voidrangers!
可恶，从原型设定上来说，虚卒可是反物质军团的战士，怎么会打不过其他以太灵呢？游戏的制作组也太不严谨了！
Blast! Looking at the prototype settings, Voidrangers are Antimatter Legion warriors, how can they not defeat other Aether Spirits? The game devs are a mess!
请留步，这位朋友，玩了这么久的以太战线，你难道就没有感到过一丝反感吗？这些以太灵虽然只是数据，但谁又能否定数据的权益呢？
Hold it right there. My friend, having played Aetherium Wars for all this time, do you not feel a little disgust? Aethers may only be data, but can we really deny data their own rights?
命令以太灵互相厮杀，让玩家从中取乐，真是太残忍了…如果你还没有感觉，就跟我来一场对决吧，在战斗中好好感受一下以太灵的痛苦！

Ordering Aether Spirits to massacre each other for the entertainment of players, it's just too cruel... If you have not felt it yet, come and battle with me. I will show you the true suffering of the Aether Spirits!
能有这样的实力，一定是伤害了不少弱小的以太灵吧，希望你能好好思考我的话…不多说了，还有许多玩家需要我用战斗去启迪呢。

To have power like yours, you must have harmed many weak Aether Spirits. I hope that you will reflect on what I have said... I shall say no more, there are many more players that need me to enlighten them in battle.
总算遇到玩家了，快快快，打完这把我就得去写作业了！
I finally found a player! Quick, quick! I have to go and do my homework as soon as we're done!
每天就这么点时间能玩游戏，居然还输了，呜呜呜……
I only get this little time to play every day, and I lost!? Waaaa...
别急着走啊，来看看我的机兵吧！
Don't rush off, come and look at my automatons!
在现实里我一个机兵都买不起，但在以太战线里我收集了好多机兵，以太战线真是太棒了！
In the real world, I can't even afford a single automaton. But, in the world of Aetherium Wars, I have collected many! Aetherium Wars is the best!
忙了一天，终于能休息了，来跟我打一场对战吧！
It's been a long day, finally I get to relax. Come, have a battle with me!
输就输了吧，每天工作这么累，能玩会儿以太战线就是生活中唯一的乐趣了。
Well, a loss is a loss. I work so hard every day, getting to play Aetherium Wars is my one joy in life.
你听说了吗？只要用特定的以太灵进行九十九次对战，就会刷出隐藏的以太灵！
Have you heard? If you use specific Aether Spirits in ninety-nine battles, a secret Aether Spirit will spawn!
这已经是第一百次对战了，难道传闻是骗人的……
That was my hundredth battle... Were the rumors just a lie...?
先别走，呃…我要说什么来着……对了，跟我来一场「以太电线」的对决吧！
Don't go, uhh... What was I going to say...? Oh, yeah! Let's have an "Eater Room Wards" battle!
哎哟，这游戏的机制也太难了，根本记不住啊……
Ah, this game is so confusing, I can't remember any of this...
你坐在了你认为正确的马桶上，期待着持有凭证的呜呜伯出现……
You sit on what you thought was the right toilet, patiently waiting for the Wubbaboo to appear with the pass...
……你在马桶上坐了很久，什么也没有发生，看来你找的不对。
...You've been sitting for a long time and nothing has happened. Looks like you're in the wrong place.
突然你感到身下传来一股强大的力量，眼前一片黑。
Suddenly, you feel a powerful force from below you and your vision goes black.
再次睁开双眼，你发现自己来到了一个陌生的地方，呜呜伯出现在了你的眼前。
When you once again open your eyes, you realize you've arrived in an unfamiliar place, with the Wubbaboo before you.
再次睁开双眼，你发现自己来到了一个陌生的地方。
When you once again open your eyes, you realize you've arrived in an unfamiliar place.
潜爆机兵已报废，请重新挑战
The Automaton Stealth Bomb has been disabled. Please restart the challenge
超出挑战区域，请重新挑战
You have left the challenge area. Please restart the challenge
你们将潜爆机兵装进了矿车…
They loaded the Automaton Stealth Bomb into the mine cart...
…维尔德？这谁呀？《以太战线》又是啥？
游戏推广，看起来还挺有意思。
It's an ad for a game. Looks pretty cool.
没什么，又是个推销的罢了。
唔…利用公司最尖端的以太复印技术，将您见过的任何生物记录在以太硬币中……
Hmm... using the IPC's cutting-edge Aether copying technology, we can record any creature you've seen inside of an Aether Coin...
再打印出来，与其他玩家切磋对战…让以太灵伙伴为您争取荣誉……
Just print it out and compete against other players — let your Aether Spirits fight for your glory...
Ooh... Seems pretty neat, don't you think?
I gotta say, sounds pretty cool.
对吧对吧，我早就知道你也是个重度游戏爱好者！咱俩要不顺路去看看？
Right? I knew you were a gamer! Wanna check it out on the way?
不然呢，我是真的很感兴趣！咱俩要不顺路去看看？
I mean... Yeah? Wanna check it out on the way?
太好啦！先前只听说过星核猎手的那位小姑娘有着这套技术——这次说不定能近距离观摩一下。
Awesome! I've heard that Stellaron Hunter girl uses this kind of tech — maybe we can see it in action.
你仔细想想，是以太复印欸！这套技术，我只在星核猎手那位小姑娘手里看到过……
Seriously, think about it, it's Aether copying! I've only ever heard of that Stellaron Hunter girl using this kind of tech.
走吧走吧，就当是陪我啦！
Come on, let's go. Just think of it as... keeping me company for a while!
铆钉镇的商业广场，对吧？事不宜迟，赶快出发~
It's at the Rivet Town Plaza, right? Let's hit the road, there's no time like the present!
{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}！我就知道你们一定会来！
来吧来吧，聊聊《以太战线》——我可是十八年老玩家了！你们有什么想要了解的，我一定知无不言！
Come on, let's chat about Aetherium Wars! I've been playing it for <unbreak>18</unbreak> years, so ask me anything — I'll tell you everything I know!
What kind of game is this, exactly?
这到底是个什么游戏呀？能麻烦你再给我们介绍一下嘛？
Yeah! Can you give us an overview?
不麻烦、不麻烦！只要是以太战线，我介绍多少遍都不嫌烦！
Why, it'd be my pleasure! I could talk to you about Aetherium Wars all day!
《以太战线》——看这名字您就明白了。这是一款基于「以太复印」技术，以「以太硬币」为载体的集换式卡牌对战游戏。
Aetherium Wars — the name says it all. It's a collectible card game that uses Aether copying tech, and Aether Coins are what you use to play.
通过这枚「以太硬币」，玩家可以将自己遇见的生物以「以太」的形式存储下来——还能将其实体化为「以太灵」与其他玩家「对决」。
Using an Aether Coin, players can store creatures they've encountered in the form of an Aether — and then manifest them as Aether Spirits to battle against other players.
「收集，对决，养成，升级」——这就是我们以太战线的宣传口号！
"Collect, Battle, Train, and Upgrade" — that's Aetherium Wars motto!
公司竟然也懂「以太复印」技术嘛？我还以为这是朋克洛德的骇客们才玩得转的东西呢。
I never expected the Corporation to know anything about Aether copying tech! I thought that was something only Punklordian hackers could handle.
哈哈，您说得对。这套技术本身发源自朋克洛德，但在公司和博识学会的不懈努力下，我们也初步了解了如何编辑以太。

Haha, you're right. The technology itself originated from Punklorde, but with the relentless efforts of the IPC and the Intelligentsia Guild, we've also gained a basic understanding of how to edit Aether.
不过，我们暂时还做不到像那群骇客一样随意篡改现实数据…但请相信我，这一天总会来的！
We might not be able to manipulate the data of reality as easily as those hackers can, but we're not far behind!
我看还是别来了吧…听起来怪危险的。
I think it'd be better if the IPC avoided it... it sounds pretty dangerous.
你短信里说的那个「星际决胜庆典」——那是什么？
Mm, you mentioned something about the "Interastral Tournament Festival" — what is that?
好问题！这场庆典实际上是「以太战线竞技协会」在每赛季末举行的、面向全宇宙玩家的竞技赛事。
Great question! The festival is actually a tournament organized by the Aetherium Wars Gaming Association at the end of each season, and is open to players from across the universe.
宇宙各地的玩家将在这段时间内齐聚一堂，相互交流，共同享受游戏的快乐！
Gamers will come together to relax, share tips and tricks, and have a blast playing the game!
不过，由于星核阻塞星际通路的缘故，本次庆典临时改为了线上观赛模式——
However, due to Stellarons blocking interstellar routes, the festival was changed to online attendance at the last minute...
——尽管如此，对于那些执意想要到场观赛的观众，我们的线下会场依旧会向他们开放！
Nevertheless, for those who insist on attending in person, our offline venue is still open to them.
…这协会办事还挺人性化的嘛。
Sounds like the association really cares about their players.
你从哪里拿到我的号码的？
How did you get my number?
{NICKNAME}，别难为人家啦。「公司」的名声会变成现在这样，也不是他一个人导致的。
Ugh, do we have to start an interrogation right now? I know the IPC aren't exactly our friends, but that's not just his fault.
我们想要体验这款游戏。
We want to try the game out.
对对对，我们很感兴趣——那，我们在哪里可以体验到这款游戏？
That's right! Any idea where we can give it a spin?
<size=36>我终于有成功把这游戏推销出去的一天了！</size>
<size=36>I finally managed to successfully promote the game!</size>
呃…有那么困难吗？难道是因为这游戏不好玩……
Uh... is it that difficult? Wait, does this game suck?
不不不，我只是…哎呀，身为老玩家的感动，你们恐怕很难理解吧！
No, no, of course not. It's just... as someone who's been playing this game for so long... I guess it's hard for those who haven't played it to understand.
我以自己的名誉做担保，这是全宇宙最尖端的娱乐形式！不好玩，你们找我！
I swear on my reputation that this game is truly the best form of entertainment out there! I'll take the rap if you don't like it!
事不宜迟，既然二位有兴趣，我就带着二位前往庆典服务大厅注册账号吧。跟我来，这边请！
There's no time to waste! Since you're both interested, let me take you to the Festival Service Hall to register your accounts. This way!
二位，请看！这里就是本届「星际决胜庆典」的舞台。
Take a look, this is where the Interastral Tournament Festival will be held this year.
为了让重新焕发生机的雅利洛-Ⅵ更快赶上流行趋势，竞技协会特意选择了这颗星球……
The Aetherium Wars Gaming Association specifically chose this planet to help rejuvenate it and bring it up to date with the latest trends...
不错，不错…一切都在按计划执行。
Good, good... Everything is going according to plan.
哈，维尔德！我正在想你去哪儿了呢——
Ha, Wilder! I was just wondering where you'd got to...
竟然还带来了{M#一位英俊的先生和这位美丽的小姐}{F#两位美丽的小姐}！欢迎光临我的竞技场！
...and you brought along {M#a handsome gentleman and a beautiful young lady}{F#two beautiful young ladies}! Welcome to my arena!
如果我没猜错，两位就是{NICKNAME}和三月七，对吗？
If I'm not mistaken, you're the trailblazers, right?
难道两位也是听说了「星际决胜庆典」，想要前来一展身手么？
So, I presume you two have heard about the Interastral Tournament Festival? Have you come to show off your skills?
喂，{NICKNAME}…你看他的面具，挺酷的呀？
Psst, {NICKNAME} look at his mask! Pretty cool, don't you think?
Correct! Where do we sign up?
哈哈哈，果然如我所料——你和传闻中描述的一模一样！
Hahaha, just as I expected — you're exactly as they say in the rumors!
你怎么知道我们的名字？
How did you know who we are?
这不重要，朋友。重要的是我们在这里相遇了！
It doesn't matter, my friend. What matters is that we're now acquainted!
面具怪人——还不快快报上名来！
Haha, look at me, forgetting my manners.
忘记自我介绍了——鄙人名叫乔瓦尼•迪•乔尔吉奥•达•艾普瑟隆——来自艾普瑟隆的小小私商，本届「星际决胜庆典」的全权赞助人……
My name is Giovanni di Giorgio da Epsilon, a humble private trader from Epsilon, and the sole sponsor of this year's Interastral Tournament Festival...
...If there's anything I can do for you, don't hesitate to ask.
感谢您的自我介绍，乔瓦尼•迪•乔…什么什么先生。
Thanks for introducing yourself, Mr. Giovanni Di... something something...
您听起来是个厉害的大人物…怎么会出现在这里呢？
You seem like a pretty important person. What brings you to this kind of place?
哈哈哈，无伤大雅、无伤大雅！我反而很喜欢三月小姐这直率的性格。
Hahaha, no harm done! Your candid personality is charming, Miss March.
不愧是拯救了贝洛伯格的开拓者！您果然如此敏锐，不同凡响！
You truly live up to your reputation as the saviors of Belobog. Such keen insight!
能把面具摘了让我看看不？
Can you take off your mask, so I can get a better look at you?
哈哈哈，您果然很幽默！但很可惜，这副面具事关我的生命安全——就让我们为彼此留些私人空间，好吗？
Hahaha, how humorous! As much as I'd like to oblige, this mask is a necessary precaution for me. Let's leave something to the imagination, shall we?
接下来，就让我回答一下三月小姐的问题吧——如您所见，「星际决胜庆典」即将在这颗美丽的冰雪星球举办……
Now, let me answer Miss March's question — as you can see, the Interastral Tournament Festival is about to be held on this beautiful icy planet...
而我作为本次赛事的全权赞助人，前来大赛会场检查运营状况，也是顺理成章。
...and as the sole sponsor of this event, it's only natural for me to come to the tournament venue and check on its operations.
再者，我也想认识认识大赛的玩家，还有二位——在这茫茫宇宙里做生意，朋友总不嫌多。
Furthermore, I'd also like to get to know the players of the tournament, including yourselves. One can never have too many friends when it comes to doing business in this vast universe of ours.
如果二位还愿意赏光叫我一声朋友，那可真是我莫大的荣幸了！
If you'd be willing to call me "friend," it would be a great honor to have you as such!
唔…这家伙虽然戴着面具，一副怪里怪气的样子，还是个大人物……
Hmm... weird mask, strange vibes, a little out of touch...
但他好像没有恶意，还挺平易近人的。你怎么看，{NICKNAME}？
A toast to our new friendship!
嗯，我也相信你的判断。那就请多指教啦，乔瓦尼先生。
I suppose... Pleasure to meet you, Mr. Giovanni.
哈哈，能交到你们这样的朋友，今天真是我人生中最快乐的日子了。
Haha, to have made friends like you — what a joyous day.
嗯，我也有点担心这个…但我确实感受不到他的恶意欸。
Yeah... but he really doesn't seem like a bad guy.
哈哈，我理解！既然如此，那就让我再多展示一些诚意吧。
Haha, I understand your sentiment! In that case, allow me to show you a little more sincerity.
那还请务必按月付我朋友费…
Monthly friendship payments are due on the first of each month...
Is that all you care about!?
哈哈哈哈，{NICKNAME}{M#先生}{F#小姐}竟比我还会开玩笑！我就当这是您答应鄙人的不情之请了，如何？
Hahahaha, that's a good one, {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}! You're even funnier than I imagined! I'll take that as an acceptance of our friendship!
那就请多指教啦，乔瓦尼先生。
Pleasure to meet you, Mr. Giovanni.
关于《以太战线》这款游戏，想必维尔德已经为你们介绍清楚了。那么，有关「星际决胜庆典」的部分，就让我来解答你们的疑惑吧！
I believe Wilder has already filled you in on Aetherium Wars, but if you have any questions about the Interastral Tournament Festival, I'll be more than happy to answer them for you!
乔瓦尼先生，这是我分内的工作，还请让我来……
Mr. Giovanni, let me take care of it, it's my job, after all...
没关系，维尔德！难得交到了朋友，不让我来介绍怎么能行呢——你先去忙其他事吧，接下来由我为两位做向导就好。
Don't worry, Wilder! It's only natural that I introduce the festival to my new friends here. You can go ahead and attend to other matters while I show these two around.
多谢乔瓦尼先生！我先告辞了。
Thank you, Mr. Giovanni! I'll be off, then.
请两位尽管向我提问吧——有关大赛会场和「星际决胜庆典」，你们有什么想要了解的内容吗？
Feel free to ask me about the Interastral Tournament Festival and the venue. Is there anything in particular you'd like to know?
这里？是贝洛伯格的武器试验场——至少七百年之前是。
Belobog's weapon testing ground — at least it was <unbreak>700</unbreak> years ago.
在修复这里的过程中，我们发现了许多条尘封的自动机兵流水线。几百年前，贝洛伯格人就是在这片场地里测试机兵性能的。

While renovating this place, we stumbled upon quite a few automaton production lines, all covered in thick layers of dust. Several hundred years ago, the people of Belobog tested the performance of their combat automatons here.
至于现在，在我的赞助下，公司和以太战线竞技协会将这里改造成了大赛的比赛场地——换句话说，这现在是属于我的「竞技场」了。

But now, under my sponsorship, the IPC and the Aetherium Wars Gaming Association have transformed this place into the competition venue for the tournament — in other words, this place is now my "arena."

当然合规！这项工程可是得到贝洛伯格建筑行会会长和文化大臣亲自批准的——
Of course! This project has been approved personally by the president of the Belobog Architecture Guild and the Minister of Culture.
至于他们是否得到了那位大守护者的首肯…这我就不方便过问了。
As for whether they received the approval of the Supreme Guardian, well, that's beyond my knowledge and involvement.
以上就是我所能提供的全部信息了。你还有任何疑问吗？
That's all I can share about that at the moment. Is there anything else you'd like to know?

当然！看到底下的巨大圆盘了吗？等到庆典锦标赛正式开幕时，这里就会成为以太战线玩家们证明自己实力的舞台了。

Indeed! Have you seen the big circular platform down below? When the championship commences, this space will serve as the arena for Aetherium Wars players to showcase their skills, and where they'll vie for supremacy.
在庆典举行期间，你可以在这里与来自宇宙各地的玩家交流心得，养成自己的「以太灵」，相互切磋——
During the festival, you'll have the chance to mingle with players from all over the universe, share experiences, level up your Aether Spirits, and challenge each other.
——哦，抱歉，我的失误。本次赛事由于众所周知的星核问题，许多玩家将无法实地到场…所以，你恐怕只能见到些熟悉面孔了。

Ah yes, my apologies. I should have mentioned this earlier, but because of the well-known Stellaron problem, many players won't be able to attend in person... So, it's likely you'll mostly encounter familiar faces during the event.
很简单！首先，你们需要在这个庆典服务大厅的终端上注册你的账号——据我所知，你们还没有属于自己的游戏账号，对吧？
It's simple! First, you need to register your account at a terminal in this Festival Service Hall. Oh, you haven't created one, correct?
在那之后，我会向各位仔细介绍本届庆典的内容…至于现在，就让我们留个悬念吧。
After you've successfully created and registered your account, I'll delve into all the details of the festival... But for now, you'll have to deal with the suspense for just a little bit longer.
总觉得背后有什么阴谋…
Why do I feel like you're up to something?
哈哈哈，太过疑神疑鬼对身体可不好。

放心，我只不过是热衷于享受游戏的快乐，更想看看玩家们为此相互竞争、携手共进的样子——
Rest assured, I'm just passionate about gaming. I love observing how players compete and cooperate with each other.
除此之外，我没有其他任何想法了：我可以向你保证——以我的名誉和这副面具起誓！
I have no hidden agendas, I can assure you of that — I swear on my reputation and my mask!
说了这么多，可以先让我们实际体验一下这个游戏嘛？只是听你嘴上介绍，我还是有点摸不着头脑欸。

当然没问题！这样，我会破例把自己的以太灵借给你，让你好好体验一把「对决」的快乐……
Why of course, not a problem! I'll make an exception just for you. You can borrow my Aether Spirits and experience the thrill of battle...
…嗯？那里怎么闹哄哄的…发生什么事了？
喂！臭小子！把你手里那硬币交出来！
Hey, twerp! Hand over that coin!
你这小屁孩，从小手脚就不干净，长大后还得了？
You little brat — who said you could touch this?
B—But this is mine, I found it on the ground...
哎，你们几个，差不多得了！欺负小孩算什么本事？
Hey, that's enough! Picking on a kid, are we?
外来者姐姐！他们、他们好像很危险……

I say, my IPC friends, I can see how captivated you are by that coin. Am I right in assuming that you're also Aetherium Wars players?
哪儿来的面具男？我是不是玩家关你什么事？
Where did mask-dude come from? And what does it have to do with you whether I'm a player or not?
就是就是！关你什么事？戴着面具鬼鬼祟祟，你怕不是个变态吧？
Exactly! What's it to you? Sneaking around with a mask on — you must be some kind of creep.
呵呵，我是说——既然各位都是玩家，何不按照以太战线的规则进行一场「对决」呢？
Hehe, what I'm getting at is this — since you're both players, why not have a showdown to settle the matter? Following the proper rules of the game, of course.
我提议，让{M#这位先生和三月小姐}{F#这两位小姐}代替这位小朋友向你们发起挑战——
But, instead of this young boy, I propose that {M#this gentleman and Miss March}{F#these two young ladies} be the challengers.
如果{M#他们}{F#她们}输了，这枚硬币自然是各位的战利品，任各位随意处置……
If they lose, the coin will naturally become yours, and you can do as you wish with it...
但如果你们输了，就只好麻烦你们收起獠牙，至少别在我的竞技场里惹是生非——不知各位意下如何？
...but if you lose, I would kindly ask that you gracefully accept defeat and refrain from causing any more trouble in my arena. Are we all in agreement?
嘿，我就知道你会这么选！
Hah! I had a feeling you'd say that!
But I've never played this game before...
没关系，乔瓦尼先生肯定会指导我们的——对吧？
Not to worry! Mr. Giovanni will explain it all, right?
哈哈哈，那是自然！我一定不遗余力，协助二位旗开得胜。

How about I use a bat to resolve our differences?

答应我，不要做无趣的人，好吗？
Let's all agree to keep things peaceful and enjoyable.
乔瓦尼先生说得对！正好，我们也借这个机会，体验体验这款游戏吧。
Mr. Giovanni is right! Now's our chance to check out this game and see if it lives up to the hype.
给，{NICKNAME}，这是几只最初级的以太灵——你可以利用它们来熟悉节奏规则。
Here are a few beginner-level Aether Spirits for you, {NICKNAME}. They'll help you get the hang of the game's pace and rules.
再者，如果二位客人连这种等级的以太灵都解决不了…那你们可能确实不太适合这款游戏。
If you have trouble handling these beginner spirits... it might indicate that this game isn't the best choice for you.
该、该死，竟敢看不起我们——
我们一定要让你们尝尝「托帕后援团」成员的厉害！
You're in for a rude awakening — prepare to face the might of "Topaz's Support Squad!"
好啦，那群坏蛋都被我们赶跑了！你没事吧，埃里克？
We sure showed those troublemakers who's boss! Are you okay, Eric?
我、我没事…谢谢外来者姐姐！
你没事就好。所以，公司的员工为什么来威胁你呢？
Good. Why were those IPC workers threatening you?
是啊，我也想问——他们怎么会来威胁一个小孩子？
I was wondering the same thing. Why would they pick on someone half their size?
This game is way too easy.
哎呀，不愧是你——不过胜利感言还是等下再说吧。
Here we go.... Let's save the victory speeches for later.
所以，埃里克，他们怎么会来威胁你呢？发生什么事了？
So, Eric, why did they threaten you like that. What happened?
我、我也不知道…我只是偶然在路上捡到了这枚硬币……

嗯…单看硬币外表是看不出什么名堂，也不知道是谁遗失的。
Hmm... based on the appearance of the coin alone, it's difficult to discern any significance. As for who it belongs to — that's also a mystery.
他们还说什么了吗——比如，和「托帕」相关的事？
对啊，他们提到了托帕小姐的名字！到底是怎么一回事？
Yeah, they mentioned Miss Topaz! What's that all about?
我想起来了！他们说过，自己是那位「托帕」的后援团成员…还说要把全宇宙最强力的以太灵全都搜刮过来，送给「托帕」…这样她就能在庆典上连冠了！

Oh, I know! They said they were members of Miss Topaz's "support squad"... They said they'd gather the strongest Aether Spirits from across the universe and give them to her... so she could win the tournament!
啊？！托帕小姐她…居然这么不择手段？

我想大概是某种误会。我和托帕小姐有些交集，这不是她的待人接物之道。
I think there must be some kind of misunderstanding. I have had some interactions with Miss Topaz, and this doesn't seem like her way of dealing with people.
那也就是说，这枚硬币不属于托帕——那它的主人是谁呢？硬币上好像也没有相关信息……
I suppose that means this coin doesn't belong to Miss Topaz after all. I wonder whose it could be... it doesn't seem to have any info on it...
的确。这枚以太硬币上没有任何跟原主人有关的信息…想物归原主恐怕很难。
Indeed. There is no information on the Aether Coin that could help us trace it back to its owner... It seems returning it to its rightful owner will be quite the challenge.
这枚硬币，还是交给外来者{M#哥哥姐姐}{F#姐姐们}吧。
I think it'd be better if you kept it.
喂，对小孩子你也毫不客气啊！
Hey, have you forgotten your manners?
我不知道这是什么，也不懂那个什么「战线」该怎么玩……
...I have no clue what this is or how to play that "Aetherium Wars" thingy...
如果是{M#哥哥姐姐}{F#姐姐们}的话，一定能好好利用上这枚硬币吧？
I bet you guys can find a better use for this coin than me.
原来如此，既然埃里克这么说了…那看来只好由我们来保管了。乔瓦尼先生觉得呢？
I see. Well, when you put it that way... looks like we'll hold onto it for now. What do you think, Mr. Giovanni?
我没有任何意见——「交换」、「养成」，这都是《以太战线》游戏的一环。你们就好好利用这枚硬币吧。
I have no objections. After all, "trading" and "training" are all part of Aetherium Wars. I say why not put the coin to good use?
那，就交给{M#哥哥姐姐}{F#姐姐们}了！我先回家了，老爹还在家里等着我呢。
It's settled then! I need to go home now, my dad's still waiting for me.

走，我们去找下一个谜题吧～
Let's go find the next one~
嗯～这个纹样也被我们搞定了。
走吧～我们去找下一个纹样！
Let's look for the next one!
家人，你终于来了！要是缺了你，咱们这支「捉鬼小队」可就缺了一个强大战力！
Yo, what's up! You're finally here! Without you, our ghost-hunting squad would be nothing!
论战斗，我也是很靠谱的啊！
Hey, I'm a reliable squad member too!
嘿嘿，是啊，裳裳你醒着的时候最靠谱了！
Sure, when you're not passed out in fear! Hehe...
小桂子，你要是再讽刺我…我、我就再也不配合你表演胸口碎大石了！
Cut it out — if you keep teasing me, I—I... I'm not gonna perform my boulder-smashing trick for you anymore!
这捉鬼小队是怎么回事？
What's this ghost-hunting squad all about?
记录在案正确的名称应当是「十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组」。
The official name is the "Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobi Containment Breach Incident."
这是由十王颁旨所成立的队伍名目。想邀请前不久绥园灾异事件后安然无恙的几位，以各位最擅长的方式寻找并镇伏岁阳。

That was the name given to us by decree of the Ten Lords. Since we managed to survive the Fyxestroll Garden incident, the Ten Lords decided to entrust us with hunting down and subduing the heliobi using our special skills.
By decree of the Ten Lords?
嗯，此事是由十王亲自下诏促成。虽然我并没有得到更多理由，但多半也能猜到其中的原因。
That's right — this expedition was commissioned by the Ten Lords themselves. I am unsure as to why they attached so much importance to this endeavor, but I have a theory.
藿藿是判官，我是云骑，十王司有调遣责无旁贷。{NICKNAME}嘛，也是为罗浮出过力流过汗的天外友人……

Huohuo is a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission and I'm a Cloud Knight — we must answer the call to the best of our abilities. And {NICKNAME} is an outworlder who's done great things for the sake of the Xianzhou...
但怎么把小桂子这样的群众也给拉下水了？这多危险！
But why did Little Gui have to get dragged into this? This mission is too dangerous for a civilian!
…我明白了，你是嫌我帮不上忙，只会给你们添乱是吧？
...I get it. You don't think I have any special skills, so I'll just get in the way?
仙舟上一花一草皆有意义，桂小姐自然有她的过人之处：身为抛头露面的街头艺人，网络上的主播，她非常清楚如何扩展咱们需要的消息来源。

Every flower and tree on the Xianzhou is significant in its own way — Miss Gui has her own strengths too. As a famous street performer and livestreamer, she has precisely the skills we need to acquire intel for our mission.
I don't have any more questions.
我已劳烦桂小姐在某个网站上设立了账号，以解决诡事奇闻为由头，为各位行动提供信源。
Miss Gui has set up a social media account under the guise of investigating paranormal phenomena and unexplained mysteries... we can use it to gather intel for our mission.
裳裳，听见了吗！这回的我岂止是有用，简直是有用。能有机会作为十王司的鹰犬帮上大家的忙，真是太好了！
You hear that, Sushang! I'm a key member of the squad! They said I could be a Ten-Lords Commission intelligence hawk!
呃，虽然我没什么文化，但「鹰犬」不是什么好词儿吧？
Uh... I might not be a scholar, but I don't think calling someone a "hawk" is a compliment.
判官藿藿受命调遣各位，在岁阳相关的专业问题上，请你们务必配合她的指挥。
The Ten-Lords Commission has specially entrusted Judge Huohuo with commanding the ghost-hunting squad, so please make sure to follow her lead in all matters related to the heliobi.
我…我明白了，藿藿一定会不辱使命的。
...Th—That's right. I won't let us down.
寒鸦交待完捉鬼小队的事，便离开继续处理绥园事务了。
After Hanya delivered the task to the ghost-hunting squad, she left to continue resolving matters at Fyxestroll Garden.
藿藿大人，咱们开始行动吧？
Captain Huohuo, should we start the ghost hunt now?
大、大人？你还是叫我藿藿吧。
C—Captain? You can just call me Huohuo.
寒鸦小姐让我来带领大家，我也很意外。
I'm really surprised that Madam Hanya asked me to be the leader of the ghost-hunting squad.
尾巴消失以后，我本以为自己会被辞退的。但不知为何……总之，我一定尽力而为，不给大家拖后腿！
After Tail disappeared, I thought for sure the Commission would ask me to resign, but for some reason... A—Anyway, I'll do my best to carry out my duties!
We're all counting on you, Judge Huohuo.
其实，我也不知道现在的我能不能帮上各位的忙……
Actually, I'm not sure if I can be helpful anymore...
尾巴消失以后，我本以为自己会被辞退的。但不知为何…寒鸦小姐让我来带领大家，我也很意外。
After Tail disappeared, I thought for sure the Commission would ask me to resign... but for some reason, Madam Hanya asked me to be the leader of the ghost-hunting squad.
总之，我一定尽力而为，不给大家拖后腿！
A—Anyway, I'll do my best to carry out my duties!
言归正传…除了被镇伏在绥园里的浮烟，洪炉破碎后，还有不少岁阳逃逸在外。
As for our mission... Cirrus was locked up in Fyxestroll Garden, but there were a lot of other heliobi that escaped after the Creation Furnace was broken.
按照十王司对岁阳习性的理解，它们多半会往人居稠密的地带寻找宿主。所到之处一定会有许多不能解释的「灵异事件」。

According to the Ten-Lords Commission's understanding of heliobi behavior, they tend to roam densely populated areas in search of hosts... and wherever they go, there are bound to be reports of "supernatural phenomena."
桂小姐，能否展示一下那个网站？
Little Gui, can you show us the website we'll be using for intel?
「罗浮杂…」小桂子，这「罗浮杂蛆」是个什么网站啊？怎么叫这么个名字？
Let's see... Ghast—ly Grayv... ee? Ghastly Gravy!? What kind of website is that?
Ugh, it's Ghostly Grove, not Ghastly Gravy!
「罗浮杂俎」是罗浮仙舟上规模最大的灵异爱好者网站，所有喜欢怪力乱神的罗浮人都知道它。
Ghostly Grove is the most renowned website for paranormal enthusiasts on the Luofu. Everyone who loves the mysterious and the unexplained knows about it.
网站上一直有人在分享自己的灵异经历，我之前也常去那上面看「见鬼实录」来锻炼胆量……
I used to go there to read first-hand accounts of ghost sightings whenever I needed to build up my courage.
我们想借这个网站获取信息，再打着解决灵异事件的幌子暗中调查。
We can get our leads from this website and then investigate them posing as paranormal investigators.
毕竟冥差大张旗鼓挨家挨户的搜索，不但效率低下，还会引起人们惊慌，激化岁阳对宿主的控制。

That means we can operate more efficiently, and with a low profile... If people started to see a spiritfarer making door-to-door visits, they might begin to panic... and that would give the heliobi even more power over their hosts.
因为我刚注册，粉丝还很少。根据我在其他平台的经验，等到粉丝多起来，就会有很多人来贡献各种灵异事件的消息。
Look, I'm a new user, so I only have a few followers on this site... but based on past experience, once you get a following, people start flooding you with stories and news about paranormal activity.
What if all the leads we get turn out to be fake?
装神弄鬼多半都是人为的。
A lot of paranormal activity is just people in costumes.
其实还挺难的。有的信息一眼假，但有的信息嘛…仅凭网上的只言片语恐怕很难分辨。
We have our work cut out for us, that's for sure. Sometimes a lead is obviously fake, but other times... it's hard to tell from just a few words on the Internet.
毕竟有些人为了吸引流量，真是什么瞎话都能编得出来。
After all, some people will make up all kinds of nonsense to attract attention.
所以还是得亲自上前线确认咯？
So we still have to go out and fact-check the leads?
嗯，不止咱们几个，十王司的冥差们也会暗行调查。
Mm. Plus, the spiritfarers from the Ten-Lords Commission will be carrying out their own investigation in secret as well.
吸引关注…小桂子倒是很擅长，她平日里经常用我来表演杂技什么的…但在这灵异爱好者网站上，该怎么涨粉呢？

Speaking of attracting attention... how do we get a following on a paranormal activity website? Sounds like Little Gui's department — she used me in some of her performances just to draw a bigger crowd.
简单，咱们把捉鬼……呃我是说「镇伏岁阳」的过程实录发出去就好了！我们现在可是给十王司当差，谁手上还能有比我们更劲爆的料啊？

That's the easy part — we just post some videos of us ghost hunting... Uh, I mean, subduing heliobi! We're working for the Ten-Lord's Commission after all — we're gonna have the best content out there!
Will the Ten-Lords agree to this?
那位寒鸦小姐同意了呀。我和她说，我打算利用捉岁阳涨粉，再利用粉丝捉岁阳，形成一个正向生态循环…她说没问题。

Madam Hanya has already given us the green light. We'll record our heliobi-hunting expeditions to get more followers, and then use the intel from our followers to find more heliobi. It's like a vicious cycle... W—Wait — a virtuous cycle!
等等，这样一来岂不是违背了隐秘行事的原则？
Wait, aren't we supposed to be operating in secret?
而且岁阳以情绪为食，往往会操纵受害者暴露内心隐藏的一面…
Another thing we have to think about is that heliobi feed on the emotions of their hosts. They can even manipulate a host into revealing their deepest secrets...
把受害者的信息发到网上，会不会…造成一些二次伤害？我我我绝对没有批评你的意思…只是提出一些担忧。
Wouldn't posting a victim's personal information online... cause even more harm to the victim? I—I'm not trying to pick holes... just raising some concerns.
我的看法是，「隐秘行事」与「曝光灵异」可不冲突，倒不如说，这是同一件事。
The way I see it, "operating in secret" and "exposing the paranormal" go hand-in-hand.
隐去受害人姓名，只留下咱们几个镇伏鬼怪的英姿，拍些激烈战斗的留影，再配个带点刺激性的标题……
We won't reveal the names of any victims. We'll just post some pics and videos of the squad engaging in fierce battles with the supernatural! And then come up with some dramatic titles...
比如什么《阿芬探灵：云骑美少女夜路遇鬼，只用三秒钟她让妖魔后悔》。
Like: "Little Gui Investigates: Ghost Tries to Scare Young Cloud Knight Girl on Creepy Road — Gets Owned..." Y'know?
抓捕岁阳的行动被咱们渲染成一个个抓人眼球的娱乐视频。人们也会对类似的事件半信半疑，恐慌情绪一下子就消失了！
We'll turn the entire heliobi-hunting process into regular uploads. Viewers will see that there's nothing that scary about it, and there won't be any public panic!
没完了是吧，怎么又拐到我这来了！不过，我承认你说的很有道理。
Why are you looking at me? Want a medal or something...? It does kinda sound like a good idea...
当然啦，我知道大家对这个新型捉鬼方式不是很信任…那你们稍等一下啊，我来翻翻情报，咱们几人挑一个试试。
I feel like some of you aren't convinced by the whole online ghost-hunting thing... How about this — we take a look at the leads we have so far, and pick one to try out as a test run.
《偶然拍到了灵异照片》，这背景也太假了…《一直考不过星槎驾照是不是被诅咒了？》，别给自己找借口了……
"When You See It You'll Scream!" That's so cliche, with the arrow and everything... "Failed Your Starskiff Pilot Test? You're Cursed!" Tsk, people are always looking for excuses...
哎，{NICKNAME}，我正在筛选可疑的事件呢，你打算现在就开始咱们捉鬼小队的行动，还是大家伙聊聊天，增进增进了解？
{NICKNAME}, I'm trying to find some interesting leads. You ready to start ghost hunting, or do you wanna chat with the squad first?
说到灵异事件，还真让我找到了一条可疑消息。
