你们直接过来看吧，这帖子已经有不少回复了。
Take a look — this post is getting tons of comments.
「白露大人出逃」？这有什么好奇怪的，龙女大人不是三天两头出逃吗？
Lady Bailu disappeared? That's nothing new — she sneaks off all the time.
所以关键问题不是「出逃」啊，你看下文——
That's not the point — here, read this part...
「那位丹鼎司医士正要过去抓住白露大人，白露大人竟然凭空消失，让她扑了个空……」
"One of the healers from the Alchemy Commission had Lady Bailu cornered, but then she disappeared into thin air..."
从跟帖上来看，目击者不在少数。也没人听说过龙女大人会什么逃脱魔术吧？
Judging from the comments, there were several witnesses. Sure, Lady Bailu runs away all the time, but disappearing into thin air?
确实像是岁阳所为…岁阳本就擅长操弄感官，文献中也常有它们幻化身影，装神弄鬼的记载。
It looks like the work of a heliobus... The heliobi are masters of manipulating the senses. There are stories of heliobi changing their shape and appearance to disguise themselves as someone else.
那还等什么呢，咱们赶紧行动起来，找到目击者打听打听？
Okay, so what are we waiting for? Let's get moving and see if we can find some witnesses.
在出发之前，确实应该先做好情报上的准备。
Before we head out, let's make sure we have our intel in order.
如果能知晓岁阳想做什么，能做什么，对解救被附身的宿主应该会有很大的帮助。
If we can better understand what a heliobus wants to do — and what it's capable of doing — it'll be easier for us to help the victim.
向当事的目击者打听是个办法，但那些人对岁阳本身一无所知。我、我有个不成熟的想法…咱们手上还扣着另一个情报来源。
Interviewing witnesses might give us some clues, but they won't know anything about heliobi. I... I think I have an idea... We have another source of intel we could use...
对喔！那些岁阳在同一个单间里被关了那么久，肯定很了解这些狱友的脾气。
That's right! Those heliobi were locked up in the same space for ages! They probably got to know their fellow prisoners like the back of their... Huh, I guess they don't really have hands...
我听寒鸦小姐说，这坏东西被阵法困在这儿，正和判官僵着呢。它会配合咱们吗？
I heard from Miss Hanya that Cirrus is caught in a stalemate — the Evil Binding Matrix has trapped them. Will they really cooperate with us?
虽然一想到要去见浮烟…我、我就怕得要死…不过，我猜它一定很想见到我，吃了我。
Th—The thought of seeing Cirrus sends shivers down my spine... but I bet Cirrus would be eager to see me again... they'd devour me whole if they could.
它被尾巴摆了一道，心里一直耿耿于怀，只要咱们能激起它的好胜心，就能让它按我们的想法来行事。
I think Tail made a fool of Cirrus, and Cirrus has a held a grudge ever since. If we can get them worked up over it, we might be able to use them to our advantage.
I wanna chat for a bit first.
啊，无聊到令人心碎，连偶尔有飞虫掠过都成了乐趣。但这一次，有几只小飞虫一块找上门来了……
Ugh, this tedium... even the insects can't hold my attention any longer. I wonder if these ones will prove to be more entertaining?
浮烟，想找你了解点情况，请你配合一下我们的工作。
Cirrus, we've come to ask you a few questions. I hope you'll be cooperative.
哟，这不是一进绥园就昏了过去的小妹妹吗？几天不见，说话口气就硬成这样了？
Oh, if it isn't the little girl who fainted in Fyxestroll Garden the moment she encountered the heliobi? Already talking to me like a detective, are you?
嘿！我的剑呢？你你你给我等着……
Hey! Where's my sword? Y—You just wait...
嗯哼，这园子里想拿我开刀的人多了去了，要不你们商量商量排个先后？
Hmph, there are plenty of beings in this garden that would like to kill me... Why don't you line up one-by-one and take turns trying?
不、不可以…宿主是无辜的。
D—Don't be ridiculous... We can't allow the host to be harmed.
Don't let them get to you.
你说得对。忍一时风平浪静…退一步越想越气…
Okay, okay... I just wish I could teach them a lesson!
浮烟…因为一个小小的疏忽落败了，你…很不甘心吧？
Cirrus... you must be unhappy with how things turned out, right?
小狐狸，你想从我这儿得到什么？想知道那条看门狗的下落？抱歉，它早就灰•飞•烟•灭啦！
What do you want from me, little fox girl? You want to know what happened to the guard dog? He turned to ashes a long time ago!
我…不关心这些。倒是你…好不容易从洪炉里逃了出来。眼下有的岁阳在罗浮各处逍遥快活。你却要被困在这儿寸步难行…你甘心吗？

I... I don't care about that at all... but I can't help but notice — you managed to escape the furnace, and now you're stuck here, unable to move an inch, while the other heliobi are roaming around the Luofu enjoying themselves... Must be quite frustrating.
哈哈哈…你想要我帮助你们，出卖同类？
Hahaha... You want me to assist you and betray my own kind?
浮烟陷入了漫长的沉默，躲在冥差的双眼后，它反复打量着在场的每一个人，最后终于开口——
Cirrus stays silent, sizing everyone up through the eyes of the spiritfarer they possess. Finally, they decide to talk.
我有一个条件。我想重续当年大岁阳「燎原」与将军的胜负。只要你能把如今罗浮的将军带到我面前…一切都有可谈的余地。

...I can do that — under one condition... I wish to arrange a challenge — one akin to the struggle between the great heliobus Ignamar and the general of the Luofu. As long as you can bring me the current general... anything can be negotiated.
怎么，这就难倒你了？看来判官大人想和岁阳做交易的决心，还•不•够•啊！
What, is that too much to ask? It seems the judge here doesn't have what it takes to negotiate with a heliobus!
这家伙张口说的每个字都是在变着法拒绝你……
That's just another way of saying they don't want to cooperate...
哎？藿藿，你不会真的打算……
Huh? Wait, Huohuo, you can't seriously be thinking about—
成交，我会去神策府请将军来。
Deal! I'll submit a request to the Seat of Divine Foresight.
嗯？无名客、云骑、十王司判官还有街头艺人…这个组合倒是新奇。
Oh? What do we have here? A Nameless, a Cloud Knight, a Judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, and a street performer? Quite the group.
呀，将军大人居然认得我吗？没想到我竟然这么有名气了！
Wow, the general recognizes me? I didn't realize I was so famous!
哈哈，听我的侍卫彦卿提过。你可是罗浮上少有能令他失去佩剑，空手而返的人。
Haha, my retainer, Yanqing, has mentioned you. You are one of the only people on the Luofu that was able to deprive him of his sword.
我…我想起来了！真是对不住对不住。一时兴起表演了吞剑，结果散场时竟然忘了把那柄剑还给小哥。
Huh? Oh! I—I remember... I should apologize — I did a sword-swallowing performance on the spur of the moment, but forgot to return the sword to him when I left the stage...
所以，今天吹的是什么风，让几位聚到神策府来找我？
So, what wind has brought you to the Seat of Divine Foresight?
藿藿讲起了绥园中发生的岁阳灾异，以及浮烟的要求。
Huohuo tells Jing Yuan about the heliobi crisis and Cirrus' demand.
将军日理万机，十王司本不该拿岁阳的事情来打扰您。但任由那些妖物到处徘徊，恐怕……

General, we know you have important matters to attend to, and the Ten-Lords Commission shouldn't be bothering you with something as trivial as the heliobi... but if we allow those creatures to roam freely, I'm afraid...
嗯，我曾听闻过前代将军与精怪交战的逸话，还以为是随口编成的故事。没想到正主寻仇上门来了，只是找到我头上却有些冤枉了。

I heard stories of a skirmish between a previous general and a monster of sorts — I'd always assumed they were an old wives' tale. I never imagined the villain of such tales would come to my doorstep seeking revenge. I must say, it seems a bit unfair that I should assume the debt for a conflict I had no involvement in.
It wasn't your fight to begin with.
话说的不错！本着「谁污染，谁治理」的原则确该让当事人出马。但是……
Precisely! In principle, the instigator should bear the burden. Still...
看来{NICKNAME}是铁了心要我奉还人情了。
It would appear you are eager to see me assume the debt.
腾骁将军是我敬重的前辈，我克绍箕裘，自然不能旁观坐视。人家指明了要见罗浮的将军，那我就会会它。

General Teng Xiao is a venerated predecessor. If I am to honor his legacy, then sitting idly by is not an option. If an audience with the general of the Luofu is requested, then I will honor such a request.
将军，岁阳这邪物极其擅长占夺凡人的肉体，如果您有顾虑……
General, heliobi are vile creatures capable of taking over the bodies of mortals... If you're unsure...
多谢十王司为我考虑。我虽不擅长对付妖魔鬼怪，但岁阳逃逸，祸及仙舟黎庶，身为将军的我责无旁贷。

I appreciate the Ten-Lords Commission having such high regard for my welfare. It is true I am rather inexperienced when it comes to heliobi, but as general of the Luofu, I cannot look on while these fugitive creatures wreak havoc on the populace.
几位不妨先行一步，待批了手头的公文，我会立刻前往绥园。
I still have some paperwork that needs attending to — once I am finished, I will make my way to Fyxestroll Garden without delay.
我没在园子里见过你…人类，你是谁？
I have never seen this one before... Human, who are you?
岁阳，你不是心心念念想要重续与将军的战斗么？我应邀而来。
Heliobus, is it not your deepest wish to hold a rematch with the general of the Luofu? I have come to grant you an audience.
这位是腾骁将军…的继任者！
This is General Teng Xiao's successor!
浮烟，你想见的人，我们已为你请来了。如今坐镇神策府的，便是这位景元将军。
Cirrus, we have brought you the person you wish to see. This is General Jing Yuan, the one who now sits at the Seat of Divine Foresight.
...This is the current general of the Luofu?
一副刚刚睡醒的样子，看起来弱爆了好嘛。腾骁呢？他怎么选了这么个家伙来接任？不过，让仙舟人比武招选，重新决出个将军来也不现实。

Look at that expression — he's barely half-awake! Where is General Teng Xiao? Why did he choose such a lightweight to take over for him? I suppose it's already too late for the Xianzhou to rid themselves of this clown...
那么，景元将军，咱们就在这绥园里一决胜负如何？！若我获胜，就任我自由来去——
Very well then, General Jing Yuan — how about we settle our score right here in Fyxestroll Garden? If I win, I must be free to come and go as I please...
我只说「应邀而来」，却从没答应要和你一战。
I agreed to grant you an audience, not meet you in combat.
...What? You refuse? You won't fight me!?
他说为了重续当年的战斗而来到此处，却不应战，难道是变相承认我不战而胜？不对，在人类的逻辑里，不战和胜利不能划上等号……
He comes here after I demand a rematch, and won't even fight... Is he conceding that I already won? No, there can be no victory in eschewing combat — human logic negates it...
你误会了，我确实是为当年之战而来，只是…你还不配。
You misunderstand — I came for a rematch. It's just that... you are not a worthy opponent.
腾骁身为罗浮的将军，节制云骑；而燎原则是岁阳之首，号令群魔；二者如天覆地载，阴阳相薄，双方龙战实在是合情合理，合乎规矩。

Teng Xiao, as general of the Luofu, was commander-in-chief of the Cloud Knights. Ignamar commanded the heliobi. The two were as great as the sky and the earth — equally matched like yin and yang. It is only natural that they were worthy opponents.
而眼下，我乃是仙舟的将军，你却已不再是燎原，你不过是一介系狱囚犯。要想与我交战，须得按我的规矩，击败我的军队，杀到中军帐前，我才给你这个机会。

As it stands, I am the general of the Luofu... but you are no Ignamar. Merely a prisoner. If you wish to engage me in battle, you must follow my rules. Defeat my army — only then will I grant you the fight you seek.
没错，以此高台为限，你要击败我身后这四位朋友。
That's right. You must defeat my four companions gathered here — then you will have proved yourself a worthy opponent.
哎？我们？没没没没问题…吗？
Wait... he means us!? W—W—W—We'll be okay, right?
是啊，能靠武力解决的问题都不是问题。
That's right! For us, any problem that can be solved by force isn't a problem at all.
打就打呗，能靠武力解决的问题都不是问题。
We'll be fine! For us, any problem that can be solved by force isn't a problem at all.
Can we practice our masterstrokes first?
我年纪轻轻，将军怎么对我这么有信心啊？
Why is the general putting his trust in us? I'm too young to die!
...So I only need to beat your pawns here?
你可不要小看他们四人，这四位各个身怀绝技，斗志与耐性也是技惊四座。我只怕你拾掇不下。
It would serve you well not to underestimate them. They are as skilled in combat as they are tenacious in spirit. I worry they might pose a problem for you.
若你赢了，我便重续当年的对决。若是输了，你要回答他们一个问题——不可说谎，不可狡辩。成交？
If you win, you can have your rematch. If you lose, you will answer one question of their choice — no lies, no tricks. Can you accept these terms?
成交！就让我们以此高台为枰，以人为子，来一番较量！
It's a deal! The game is set — this platform will be our chessboard, and the fighters will be the pieces!
别得意，如果我拥有燎原的所有力量…怎么会败给你们！
Hmph, don't get complacent — if I had all of Ignamar's power, I'd never have lost to the likes of you!
胜败兵家事未期。若你想再来过，我可以随时奉陪，等候你不断挑战。当然，得赢过这四位才行。
Should you decide to try again, my offer still stands... but you must defeat them.
Then what are we waiting for!
且慢！在开始下一场战斗前，你要按约回答十王司一个问题。
Not so fast! Before we fight again, you need to answer one question, like you promised.
Pesky devil of a girl... Alright, what's your question?
你瞧瞧，这件事有没有可能是岁阳所为——
Look... is this something a heliobus could have done?
你们向浮烟展示了白露在金人巷突然失踪的传闻。
You show Cirrus the post about Bailu's sudden disappearance.
被封禁在洪炉里的岁阳多得很，每个都有可能。出于报复，出于好奇，出于饥饿…我怎么知道会是哪个拐走了你们的龙女？

There are countless heliobi that escaped from the Creation Furnace, and every one of them could have done such a thing. It could have been vengeance, curiosity, or simply hunger... So how would I know which one abducted your Dragon Lady?
不过，怀疑的对象，倒也不是没有。比如阿灼……
Of course, I do have my suspicions. For example, Luxie...
阿灼是个什么样的岁阳？
What kind of heliobus is Luxie?
这名字比其他岁阳幼稚一些。
Sounds like a childish name for a heliobus.
听着像是随口编的名字？
Sounds like a made-up name to me.
信不信由你，我可不像人类那般热爱谎言。
Disbelieve it if you like — that's up to you. Unlike humans, I get no joy from telling lies.
这家伙玩心极重，全不在意怎么操控凡人，一心只想着到处自由嬉戏。要说「燎原」分裂的碎片里，谁最可能干下诱拐你们家龙女的事情……也就只有它了。

Luxie loves mischief. They give no thought to interfering in mortal affairs — their only concerns are entertainment and freedom. Among all the fragments of Ignamar, the one most likely to abduct your precious Dragon Lady... would be Luxie.
封印千年至今，我们久久不曾品尝人类的喜怒哀乐，想必阿灼也一定迫不及待地到处溜达找个玩伴。

We were sealed away for a thousand years — it's been ages since we last tasted the joys and sorrows of the world of humans. I'm sure Luxie was eager to find a new friend and wander the world with them.
这坏东西的话多半是真的。岁阳的心性各不相同，全赖寄宿对象的性格熏染而成。
I think they're telling the truth... Heliobi do have different personalities, and they can be influenced by the personality of their host.
若是依附了好斗的战士，性格便渐渐好勇斗狠了起来；而要是遇上了玩心甚重的孩童，也就成了童心未泯的游灵。
If a heliobus possesses a great warrior, they might gradually take on a braver, fiercer persona... and if their host is a playful child, they may adopt a childlike spirit.
我瞧白露小姐经常逃家跑到金人巷来玩儿，感觉也是个渴望自由的小孩子啊。
Hmm... "wander the world with them." It sounds like Lady Bailu would've been an ideal target — she's always running off to play in Aurum Alley.
嗯，有了这条线索，事情办起来想必也能顺利多了。
Mm... This intel should be a big help.
喂！你们几个！赌约还没结束，再和我比一场！
Hey! We're not done here! You still owe me a fight!
We'll get to it sooner or later.
等办完差再来收拾你喔！
We have to run some errands first — be patient!
混蛋，赢了区区一场就神气活现！再来，再来啊！
You bunch of meat bags! One minor victory and you think you're something special! Come on, show me what you've got!
事情有了眉目，镇伏岁阳之事还要拜托诸位快快行动起来。
The clues are all pointing in the same direction now. It would be wise to strike while the iron is hot.
多谢将军，咱们这就出发吧！
Thank you for your help, general. Let's get going!
好几天没回金人巷了，回到老地盘，感觉还真是亲切呀。
Ahh, I haven't been here for a while — it's nice to be back in the old stomping ground.
那带路和打听都靠小桂子这个地头蛇啦。
Oh yeah? Since you're so familiar with the place, you can lead the way and conduct the interviews!
跟我说相声呢？嘴可真够贫的！
Did I hear something from the peanut gallery?
瞧那边，有两个人穿着丹鼎司的制服，应该是来找龙女的吧……
Look! Those two are wearing Alchemy Commission uniforms. They're probably looking for the Dragon Lady...
嗯，龙女凭空消失，他们想必也是一筹莫展。不过，咱们打听消息时，最好别透露身份，也别提岁阳附身的事情…搞不好会造成恐慌……

Lady Bailu disappeared into thin air — they must be pretty confused. Remember, we have to keep our identities secret when we interview them... and don't mention anything about the heliobi — people might start panicking...
嗯嗯，判官大人你可放心，如何同群众有效交流可是云骑的必修课～
Don't worry Judge Huohuo. Effective communication with the public is one of the basic skills of a Cloud Knight~
二位好啊！看衣着想必是丹鼎司的医士，在下是云骑士卒素裳。请问两位是在寻找突然失踪的龙女大人吗？

Hello there! Judging by your clothing, you two must be healers from the Alchemy Commission. My name is Sushang — I'm a Cloud Knight Soldier. Are you looking for the Dragon Lady who suddenly disappeared?
呃…怎么连云骑都给惊动了？年轻，是你打了报告嘛？
Uh... Even the Cloud Knights are getting involved? Did you file a report or something?
老成，我可是连地衡司都没给通知啊。这事儿透着邪门，报告了人家都当你哗众取宠呢。不是，云骑是怎么知道这事儿的？

Report? I haven't said a word to the Realm-Keeping Commission, let alone the Cloud Knights. People would think we were crazy if we reported this... There's something fishy going on — how did the Cloud Knights find out?
呃…问得好。是这样的，咱们是隶属于十……
Uh... Hah, good question! So, actually, we're affiliated with the Ten—
十小队！这是被派来负责巡街应对各种突发事件的云骑治安第十小队！两位懂吧，就是专派些愣头青去干苦差事的那种小队。
The Tenth Squad! Cloud Knight Security Squad Ten, to be precise, hehe... We patrol the streets and respond to all kinds of unexpected incidents! It's grunt work, essentially...
懂的懂的，咱们这不也是被差来干苦差事吗？
I can relate. We're no stranger to grunt work ourselves.
总之，我们听说了龙女消失的事情，就赶来看看能不能帮上些忙。
Anyway, we heard about the Dragon Lady's disappearance, so we hurried over to see if we could help.
哎哟，这边这位{NICKNAME}我认得，是星穹列车的人。我印象里听龙女大人提过{F#她}{M#他}的。
Oh! We know this {NICKNAME} here — {M#he's}{F#she's} from the Astral Express. I've heard the Dragon Lady mention {M#him}{F#her} before.
She and I are best buddies.
没错，我是她的长期饭票！
That's right, I'm her long-term meal ticket!
哎呀，你们肯帮忙，那是大大的好事。但我们俩其实还没搞清状况……
Well, it's great that you all are willing to help. But we haven't actually figured it out what exactly is going on...
是啊，我们本来已经抓到了龙女大人，嘿，没想到她砰地不见了。
Uh yeah, just when we had her cornered, the Dragon Lady disappeared with a "bang."
而且…我们在追龙女大人时，还看到了…两个她！真是莫名其妙啊。
And while we were chasing her, we saw two of her! It really is a mystery.
我就说吧！…但云吟术真能做到这个效果吗？
That's what I was just saying! ...But can cloudhymn magic really do that?
能啊，我身边这位…你别看她是狐人啊，她是仙舟一级非物质文化遗产评定专家，她对云吟超懂的好不好。下面，请藿专家为我们讲两句。

It sure can! This foxian beside me... well, she's actually the Xianzhou's top expert on intangible cultural heritage — she's super knowledgeable about cloudhymn magic. Huohuo, could you share some expert insight with us?
嗯…嗯？啊对！我是专专专家…能办到的！别说云吟，咱们狐族人表演戏法时也会玩弄些狐火之术，隐去身形的！

Huh? Umm... Ah, yes! I—I'm a very professional expert... and I'd be happy to share my expert knowledge! In fact, Cloudhymn magic isn't the only magic out there that can achieve such feats — we foxians can use our foxfire to make ourselves invisible!
Maybe you were experiencing double vision?
不至于啊，我俩加一块还不到五百岁呢。
I'm not even <unbreak>500</unbreak> years old yet! My eyes are as sharp as they come!
那就是工作太累了…丹鼎司医士救死扶伤，每天操劳过度，很容易产生幻觉的。作为仙舟行业道德的表率，您哥俩可得保重身体啊。

Hmm, maybe you're overworked. Alchemy Commission healers are saving people <unbreak>24</unbreak>/7 — I'd start seeing things too if I were that busy. As the face of medicinal mastery on the Xianzhou, you two need to be living healthier lifestyles.
小姑娘，你真是太懂我们了。等忙完这一阵，老成，咱哥俩得请个年假了。
Huh, you really get what we're up against... After this is behind us, I say we take a holiday and get rested up.
所以你们最后一次是在哪里见到的白露大人？
So where did you last see Lady Bailu?
就在旁边那条路啊。我总感觉那里有小孩儿在嬉笑的声音，是风声？
On that road there... and I swear I can hear a child giggling whenever I walk by. Must be the wind...
是错觉，这个红头发的姑娘说的一点儿也没错，咱们太累了。
You're just hearing things. That red-haired girl is right — we're overworked to the point of exhaustion.
两位好好歇着，由咱们帮你一块儿找找吧。白露小姐一定是瞧见你们到处找她，不敢出来了。有她的老朋友{NICKNAME}在，说不定她就愿意见人了呢？
Be sure to get some rest! We'll take over from here. Lady Bailu must have seen you and gone off to hide... but with her old friend {NICKNAME} here, maybe she'll be willing to come back out.
好的好的，那就麻烦你们了。
Fantastic. Well, we'll leave you to it.
白露小姐！白露小姐你在哪儿呀？
Lady Bailu! Lady Bailu, where are you?
龙女大人！出来一起玩儿啊！
Lady Bailu, come out and play with us!
这怎么有两…两个白露大人……
他们在叫咱们一块玩儿呢！
They're asking us to play with them!
傻瓜，他们是骗你的！肯定是要把你抓回去呢！
Silly-head, they're trying to trick you! They're just gonna catch you and take you back!
咱们不如玩个游戏，「别让人抓到」！
I know! Let's play a game called "don't let anyone catch us!"
鬼啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊啊！
姐姐你吓死我了…这两个一模一样的白露没惊到我，你嚎一嗓子差点没给我送走……
Seriously...? That ghost twin was one thing, but your screaming nearly sent me to the grave...
不好意思不好意思！说真的，虽然明知道这是岁阳作祟，但还是很吓人啊！
Ah, sorry! But seriously — I knew it was a heliobus, but seeing double Bailu like that sent shivers down my spine!
我、我完全理解素裳小姐…就算在十王司办差这么久，还是没法习惯这些妖怪搞出来的怪事。
I—It's okay, Miss. Sushang... I've worked in the Ten-Lords Commission for many years now, but I'm still not used to their tricks...
How do we catch them now?
只是岁阳屏蔽了我们的感官而已…找找看吧，她们一定还在附近。
They're eluding our senses, but they won't have gone far... We just need to look around.
声音好像就是从这个房间里发出来的。我打开门看看啊，各位小心。
It seems to be coming from this room. I'll open the door and take a look. Everyone, stay on high alert.
你试着打开这扇门，但门却像焊死了一样纹丝不动。
You try to open the door but it won't budge.
你试着撞开这扇门，但门却像焊死了一样纹丝不动。
You try to ram the door open but it won't budge.
你试着踢开这扇门，但门却像焊死了一样纹丝不动。你的脚很疼，非常疼。
You try to kick the door open, but it won't budge, and your feet hurt.
怪事…这难不成也是岁阳在作祟？
Strange... Is this also the work of the heliobus?
把来追它的人拒之于门外，好强的戒心。不过，既然知道它在哪儿出没，该是用上这个的时候了。
They must know that we're following... but now that we know its hiding spot, it's time to use this.
这个铃铛叫「同心火铃」，是绥园灾异后十王司捣鼓出来对付岁阳的道具。
This is the Harmonic Chime. It's an item that the Ten-Lords Commission forged to help deal with the heliobi after the Fyxestroll Garden incident.
岁阳会将无关人等排斥在幻境之外，独留受害者，但摇动这铃铛，能把咱们几人思考波长与岁阳同调。具体的原理我不多解释了，真要念说明书念完天也该黑了……

Heliobi create illusions to isolate their victims... but if we ring this chime, our thought-waves will synchronize with those of the heliobus. As for how it works... I'm afraid that would take the rest of the day to explain.
也就是说，现在的咱们被它当成了自己人，可以进到那家伙创造的幻境里去了？
In other words, we'll be able to enter the heliobus's illusion?
嗯，至于进去之后该怎么抓住那个阿灼，就要另想办法了。
Exactly... but once we're inside the illusion, we'll still have to figure out a way to catch Luxie.
{NICKNAME}，咱们几个里就你最厉害，就由你来负责开门吧……
{NICKNAME}, you're the powerhouse of this team, we'll leave the door to you.
我不是这个意思！我只是信任你的能力。
Mm... be careful not to hurt yourself.
I'm a jack of many trades, but master of none...
行了吧你，太谦虚可讨人嫌了啊。
Come on, you're too modest for your own good.
你准备好了就摇铃开门吧，我们一起冲进去。
When you're ready, ring the chime — we'll all charge in together.
I need a moment to get ready.
可别等太久啊，我担心她们又趁机逃到别处去。
Don't wait too long. They might make a run for it before we get there.
说句实话…阿灼似乎并不像印象中的其他岁阳那么危险。
Truth be told... Luxie didn't seem as evil as the other heliobi we've seen.
嗯嗯，这回除了运动量大了点，倒也没有到让人心跳停止的地步。不过要是多跑几圈，我得申请工伤了。
They sure made us run, though. If I ever have to run like that again on the job, I'm filing for worker's comp.
岁阳没有善恶之分，他们只是依照自己的欲望和情绪来行动。希望收服其他的岁阳时，也能这么轻松。
Heliobi don't really fall under "good" or "evil" — they just act according to their desires and emotions. I hope the others will be just as easy to subdue.
I nearly had a heart attack.
我也该去向两位辛苦找我的医助投案自首去了。
I should go surrender myself to those two medics — they were looking so hard to find me...
我们要把这个「灵异事件」的调查报告发到网上，来吸引更多粉丝为我们提供关于岁阳的消息……
We're going to make a post about this "paranormal incident" online to attract more followers — it'll help us get more intel.
你们向白露解释了「罗浮杂俎」的事。
You tell Bailu about the website Ghostly Grove
我明白了，不宜对外宣布「龙女被岁阳附体」，所以得隐去我的名字，另编一个夸张的标题？
Oh, I get it... We can't just tell the public that the Dragon Lady was possessed by a heliobus, right? So... we won't mention my name right? And we'll make up a headline?
没错，我们想把这件事渲染成灵异现象，越夸张越好，然后再对外宣称已被咱们这个小队顺利解决了！配上照片视频若干，一定能抓人眼球，换来更多的消息。

That's right, we wanna report this incident like it's a paranormal phenomenon — the more exaggerated the better — and then announce that it was solved by our ghost-hunting squad! Then we add on a few photos and videos — it'll be sure to get lots of views!
唔…这倒是没问题，只是我不知道该怎么编呢……
Um... That's great and all, but I'm not good at making stuff up on the spot...
{NICKNAME}！我之前在西衍先生那儿听过你联名创作的评书，感觉你挺擅长胡编乱造的！
{NICKNAME} I heard that you helped Mr. Xiyan write stories before — you must be an expert wordsmith!
这个账号不是你在经营吗？
Aren't you the one in charge of social media engagement?
群策群力嘛，快帮我想想法子！
It's all a team effort. Come on, help me think of something!
嗯…这个标题不错，各位觉得呢？那就这么决定了。
Hmmm... I say that's a good title. What does everyone think? Alrighty then, it's decided.
请白露小姐也早些回去，别让那两位医助等太久，他们也挺不容易的。
You should go back soon, Lady Bailu. Those two medics have had a rough day.
嗯嗯，谢谢几位。我先走啦～
Okay, I'm going back now. Thanks for the rescue~
总算是解决了一件岁阳危机！原来抓岁阳是这么累的一件事啊……
Case closed! I never knew catching heliobi would require so much work...
事情还没完全办妥。按照寒鸦大人的吩咐，咱们一旦收服了岁阳，就要立刻赶回绥园，把它锁进「束形却邪阵」的镇妖塔里。
We're not done yet... Madam Hanya said that once we've subdued a heliobus, we should return to Fyxestroll Garden and lock them inside one of the Evil Binding Matrix's suppression towers.
不知道网友们会作何反应，你们明白，再过段时间「罗浮杂俎」就会热闹起来。
I'm not sure how the online community will react, but you can bet the Ghostly Grove will be the talk of the town sooner or later.
这下终于彻底解决了！呼…可以好好休息一下了。
It's over! Whew... Now I can finally get some rest.
不过，游荡在外面的岁阳还有很多很多…我们也休息不了多久……
But there are still lots of heliobi roaming around out there... we can't rest for too long.
哦～咱这个账号粉丝数量猛涨啊！
Ooooh⁓! Our follower count has skyrocketed!
粉丝数多起来，果然就能收到一些新线索…你们看，我的战略没有错！
And as predicted, we got some new leads... Looks like my strategy is working like a treat!
等大伙休息得差不多了，就去看看这些线索吧。搞不好背后就有岁阳在作乱。
When everyone's rested and ready, let's go through the leads. Time to find another heliobus.
现在还是专心休息吧…抓岁阳的事，还是等我的心肺功能缓过劲来再说吧……
I'd rather focus on resting first... I need to wait for my heart rate to recover before I go chasing another heliobus.
捉鬼小队解散之后，聊天框开始闪动起来…
After the ghost-hunting squad disbanded, the chat starts to flash with activity...
剩下的事，一会在群里聊吧。
Let's continue in a group chat.
记得回去分享一下账号情况。
Remember to share the account updates.
无聊到令人心碎，连偶尔有飞虫掠过都成了乐趣。
This boredom is killing me... the only entertainment I have around here is watching the insects fly by.
啊，有只虫子飞来了，嗡嗡嗡，{F#她}{M#他}是来嘲笑我这束火焰，还是打算浪费唾沫星子试图用人类的道德感化我？就让咱们拭目以待吧……
Speaking of which, it seems one of them has come to visit me. I wonder, is {F#she}{M#he} here to taunt me, or implement some sort of restorative justice? We'll just have to wait and see...
十王司的判官既不打算抛弃自己的同僚，又不打算放我离开。
The Ten-Lords Commission judges won't abandon one of their own... but they won't let me off the hook either.
于是事情就成了无聊的耐力比拼。嘻嘻，不知道是仙舟人的寿命更长，还是岁阳的耐心更顽固……
So now I'm stuck here, condemned to eternal boredom. Hehe, I wonder which will last longer — the lifespan of my jailors, or the patience of a heliobus...
时间站在我这一边，只要仙舟人还不想扯下人性这块遮羞布。
In any case, time is on my side, so long as the Xianzhou are willing to maintain some facade of humanity.
What are your terms of surrender?
投降？我为什么要投降？在你眼中，我只是扣住了这个冥差作为残子，徒劳地负隅顽抗。
Surrender? Why would I do that? To you, I may as well be fighting an unwinnable battle — wasting my time away in someone else's body...
但在我眼里，这局棋还没到将死的一步呢，十王司无奈我何。棋局尚有翻盘的余地。
...but for me, the game has only just begun. The Ten-Lords Commission doesn't have any moves left... and I still have time to turn the game in my favor.
何况，在不久前你和那些判官差点就成了我的玩偶——要不是那条看门狗不知所谓地搅局……
You know, it wasn't that long ago that you and those judges would have become my pawns — if it wasn't for that meddling guard dog...
既然无话可说，就别烦我了，小东西。
If you have nothing to say, then run along and let me be.
{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}，见到您一切安好，甚是可喜。
{M#Mr.}{F#Miss} {NICKNAME}, it is good to see you are doing well.
绥园灾异一事，我受姐姐命令前去请回援助。在此期间，多亏了您在园中撑持，才令妖祸不致泛滥，小女子须向您致谢。

During the Fyxestroll Garden incident, my sister gave the order to seek reinforcements. It was thanks to your support in that critical moment that we were able to get the situation under control. I wanted to thank you.
而今这支小队伍，也需要您的帮助。
And now this small team needs your help, too.
姐姐在之前的战斗中，损伤甚重。
She sustained heavy injuries in the previous incident.
所幸姐姐是以机巧之身还阳行事。若回到棺中，由冥差们维护更新，不至于有损性命。但我依然很担心她。
Fortunately, my sister is using an ingenium body. As long as she returns to the coffin and is tended to by the spiritfarers, her life is not in jeopardy. I still worry about her, though.
血肉之躯会畏惧死伤，想要保全自己，但姐姐不会。她正渐渐脱离自己为人时的常识，将自己视为「工具」，毫不体恤地消耗自己的身体。

Creatures of flesh and blood fear death and will always strive to preserve their life... but not my sister. Her human instinct for survival is slipping away — she sees herself more as a "tool," driving her body to the point of total exhaustion.
每当看到她战斗，我都深感不忍。
Every time she fights like that, I can't bear to watch.
我们真的能比十王司更专业？
Can we really handle this better than the Ten-Lords Commission?
在其他事情上也许未必，但在岁阳一事上，答案已经很明了了。
In most matters, I would say no. But when dealing with heliobi... I think the answer is quite clear.
罗浮十王司长久以来专攻镇伏孽物，却对洪炉的危险疏于防范。此次变生腋肘，冥差与金人对岁阳无力拮抗，证明过去的伏魔手段已经不奏效了。

The Ten-Lords Commission have long specialized in suppressing abominations, but they were negligent in guarding against the dangers of the Creation Furnace. Once it became a problem, the spiritfarers and aurumatons were powerless against the heliobi, proving that the traditional means of subduing them were no longer effective.
反倒是许多年前我们无意间救下的女孩，成了击败浮烟的关键。世事真是奇妙。
As fate would have it, the girl we unwittingly rescued many years ago became the key to defeating Cirrus.
此事之后，我们打算与朱明仙舟通信。那座仙舟受帝弓神话的影响，人们与岁阳共生，又能不受其左右。吾等当能从那儿求得抵御岁阳之术。

After this is all settled, we intend to make contact with the Xianzhou Zhuming. That ship is under the influence of the mythical Reignbow Arbiter — the people there are able to coexist with the heliobi and at the same time be free from their manipulation. We hope that from them we can learn the art of breaking free from the influence of the heliobi.
Is it true that the Ten-Lords Commission is located in... the netherworld?
您真把我们当成与阳世不通音信的幽冥来客么？这份天真可爱得紧。
Did you really think we were messengers from another plane visiting the world of the living? Hehe, how cute of you.
就当是吧。与小女子靠得太近，会有损阳气喔。
And maybe we are... don't get too close, or you might turn into a ghost too.
十王司所在之地，是绝对的秘密。您为仙舟贡献良多，离这个秘密已然很近了。若想进一步知道，「捉鬼小队」的事情，要劳您多多费心了。

The precise location of the Ten-Lords Commission is highly confidential... but you have contributed much to the Xianzhou and are very close to the secret. If you wish to know more about it, I will have to ask you to spend time with our ghost-hunting squad.
明白，我就是仙舟奇兵队长。
This has to be the strangest group of people on the Xianzhou...
您说笑了。所谓能者多劳，多劳多得，此番盟助，十王司也会重重酬谢。
I would save the jokes for later! As the saying goes, with great work comes great rewards. The Ten-Lords Commission will compensate you accordingly.
小女子时常也在想，罗浮欠下无名客如许恩情，该拿什么来回报？
I've wondered at times what the Luofu should give the Nameless in return for their great deeds...
思来想去，实在没有答案。毕竟这可是十王与将军才能操心的事情。
Alas, questions like that are above my pay grade. That is for the Ten Lords and the General to figure out.
十王司判官的过去原是一律被抹去的，一入幽府，便不牵外缘了。
A judge of the Ten-Lords Commission has no past. Once one has entered the service of the commission, all links with the outside world are severed...
不过，你眼下已是这支小队的一员了，若要彼此合作，那么了解自然是少不得的一环。我就和你谈谈自己所知的一些秘辛旧事好了。
However, since you are now a member of the squad, and in the interest of everyone working together, it's best that we know each other a little better... — I'll tell you some of the secrets I know.
自从「燎原」与将军大战落败后，十王司受命封印分灵碎片。大部分岁阳都被收入造化洪炉，为其贻害而赎罪。

After Ignamar was defeated by the general in a great battle, the Ten-Lords Commission was ordered to seal away the heliobi fragments. To make them atone for their actions, most of the heliobi were sealed inside the Creation Furnace.
数十年前，十王司收到请求，有个狐人小姑娘的尾巴被一团无源怪火给吞噬了，于是我等奉命出巡，镇伏妖物。

Decades ago, the Ten-Lords Commission was asked to investigate an unusual case — a foxian girl's tail had been consumed by a strange fire of unknown origin... so we set out, ready to subdue whatever foul demon awaited us.
待我们赶到，才察觉这团火正是逃逸在外的岁阳。不知为何，「燎原」的分灵碎片中仍有漏网之鱼。
It turned out that the fire was none other than a heliobus. The remaining fragments of Ignamar — the heliobi — had found some way to escape from their furnace prison.
它的力量本已衰弱之极，却因小姑娘的一念之善而被留存了下来。它渐渐恢复了心智，重又燃起了试图操控人类的念头。

That heliobus's power was weakened to the brink of death, but he was kept alive thanks to the kindness of the foxian girl. Gradually, he regained his strength and rekindled his desire to manipulate humans.
我本该将岁阳连根祓除，送入洪炉。可惜那时藿藿的身子骨太过衰弱，为了能保住她的生命，我只能书写符敕，将那东西暂时镇伏在她体内。

Normally, I would have just purged the heliobus and sent it back into the furnace. But Huohuo's body was too frail and weak to perform a purging. The best I could do without harming her was to inscribe a talisman seal — enough to subdue the thing living inside her, at least for a while.
之后十王司将藿藿招募为冥差学徒，学习驱魔捉鬼的本事，这不仅是为了看护藿藿，也是为了时刻观察她是否有被夺舍的情况。

The Ten-Lords Commission took Huohuo in as a spiritfarer apprentice, teaching her the arts of purgation and ghost hunting. This way the Commission could keep an eye on Huohuo — and ensure that she wasn't taken over by the heliobus.
But Tail doesn't seem like an enemy.
也许这些年与藿藿漫长的相处，让它学会了人类怜惜的情感。虽然尾巴一直没有放弃过挣脱束缚或篡噬寄主，但至少它为了藿藿对抗了同族。

Perhaps all those long years with Huohuo have bestowed upon that heliobus some form of human compassion. Though Tail has never given up on attempting to break free of his bonds or usurping his host, he has fought against his own kind to protect Huohuo.
是啊，谁能想到尾巴牺牲自己战胜了浮烟呢？虽说岁阳之间没有同心同德的必然，但他愿意站在藿藿这边，已经说明了很多事情。

You could say that. Who would have thought Tail would have sacrificed himself to defeat Cirrus? Granted, heliobi have no obligation to be loyal to one another, but Tail's willingness to side with Huohuo is significant.
「捉鬼小队」的事情，要劳您多多费心了。若有什么疑问，藿藿可代小女子解答。
I leave the matters of the ghost-hunting squad in your hands. If you have further questions, just ask Huohuo.
小女子身为文职，要操劳案牍之事去了。唉唉，做不完，真的做不完啊……
As always, I have mountains of paperwork to finish... Piles of paper... I'll never get it all done...
小桂子，这回是公务，不比咱们平时在街头那些小打小闹。你可别再那么兴奋了——
Little Gui, this is official business — it's nothing like the street fights we're always dealing with. You can stop being so excited...
裳裳，你就放一百个心吧。现在的我，冷静地就像一台无情的冰箱！
Don't worry, Sushang. Right now, I'm cool as a cucumber inside a block of ice...!
听说你上一回打碎了十王司的法器，差一些……
I heard that you broke one of the Ten-Lords Commission's sacred instruments, and almost—
上一回被那坏东西操纵，是因为…呃是因为措手不及啊，没来得及提气防御！不许再说上一回啦，还不兴人家将功补过嘛。
Uhh, I was possessed, okay? That thing snuck up on me — I couldn't even react! I'll make up for it this time.
{NICKNAME}，你觉得这样搜索岁阳可行吗？
{NICKNAME}, do you think we can really catch heliobi this way?
The Internet is a very powerful tool.
That's what I'm worried about too — doesn't feel very reliable...
嗯…眼下也没有更好的方法……
I guess we have to give it a go... I don't see any other options.
不过，我觉得，如果是尾巴，凭它张扬的个性…还真有可能在网上留下些踪迹。
I can't help thinking that if Tail is out there, there'll be traces of him on the Internet. He had a big personality...
嗯…{NICKNAME}会不会觉得我在自找苦吃呢？明明过去也不待见那家伙。
Yes... Do you think I'm just getting myself into more trouble? It's not like we were good friends to begin with...
可是它消失以后，我的尾巴…我是指自己真正的尾巴也不见了。镜子里的自己怎么看都变得不习惯了，连干活都没什么力气……
...but when Tail disappeared, my tail — my real tail... it disappeared too. Now my reflection looks weird to me, and I hate work even more than before...
……说了许多借口，其实我只是很想念它。
...M—Maybe that's all just a bunch of excuses... The truth is... I miss him.
谢谢你…如果想要找到它，那现在可能是个好机会了。
Thank you... if we're ever going to find Tail, now's the best chance we have.
He might not be around anymore.
嗯…可能是跑了，也可能是四分五裂，彻底不再是「尾巴」了…但无论如何，我想知道它的下落。
Mm... I guess so. Maybe he ran away, or broke into tiny pieces... Either way, I'd like to know what happened to him.
不过，眼下咱们的任务可不是找它。当务之急是尽快镇伏那些外逃的岁阳。
O—Of course, finding Tail isn't our top priority right now — we need to catch and subdue all the fleeing escaped heliobi as soon as possible.
尾巴…唉，当务之急是尽快镇压那些还在作乱的岁阳。
Tail... The important thing right now is stopping the heliobi from causing chaos.
小桂子这个人很跳脱，但这只是因为她思维活跃…办起正经事来，她还是相当可靠的。
Little Gui's methods can be a little unorthodox, but that's just because she has a vivid imagination... When it comes to getting things done, she's actually pretty reliable.
怎么突然冒出这么一句？
Why did you suddenly feel the need to say that?
哈哈，有点怕你信不过她。总而言之不会有问题的，小桂子在她擅长的领域可是无敌的。
Haha, I'm worried you don't trust her plan. Just relax — Little Gui is unbeatable in her area of expertise.
You two seem to have a lot of history.
You two sure like getting each other into trouble...
那都是我们友谊的增稠剂！
That's just the sticky glop that holds friends together!
唉，那天小桂子拉我来绥园，是希望我保护她的，结果我就…被吓晕过去了……
Like the time Guinaifen dragged me to Fyxestroll Garden so I could protect her, but I was so scared I ended up fainting...
因为我不在，之后这家伙又惹出了那么多乱七八糟的事…我没有扛起阻止她乱来的责任。
While I was passed out, she went and caused all kinds of trouble... I neglected my duty of keeping her from making a mess of things.
我一定要一雪前耻！这次一定要保护好…嗯，还有看管好小桂子！
But I'll redeem myself this time! I'll make sure to protect her— uh, and also keep an eye on her...
话说回来，你为什么还要回来淌这趟浑水啊？岁阳可不好对付啊……
That being said, why did you decide to come back into this mess? Dealing with heliobi isn't an easy task...
似乎也没人征求过我的同意…
I'm not sure I was given the choice...
哈哈哈哈，对哦！好像确实没人问过你肯不肯加入这个捉鬼小队，就默认你是小队的一员了。
Hahahaha, oh yeah! No one asked you if you wanted to join the ghost hunting squad — we just took you in by default.
要不你再考虑一下？现在后悔还来得及！
Sure you don't wanna reconsider? It's not too late to change your mind!
Good point! May as well see it through!
I have a score to settle with Cirrus...
哦对，你好像也被岁阳附身过来着？那滋味应该不太好受吧？
Oh, that's right, you were possessed by a heliobus once before — guess it wasn't a pleasant experience, was it?
It was too short — I want to try it again.
哎呀，真是辛苦你了。没事，咱这次一起去给你报仇！让岁阳见识见识得罪错人的下场！
I'll bet, poor you... This time we're gonna avenge you! I'll show those heliobi what happens when they mess with my friend!
吓我一跳…没事，咱这次一起去给你报仇！让岁阳见识见识得罪仙舟人民好朋友的下场！
Ah! Can you not do that...? Don't worry, this time we're gonna avenge you! I'll show those heliobi what happens when they mess with my friend!
这不过是一份工作罢了。
You come for me, you best not miss.
这台词像是戏里酷劲十足的保镖会说的话。
What are you, a mob boss?
我就不能像你说的这么轻松了…毕竟我见到这些家伙腿肚子都会打颤，上一次还晕了过去，哈哈。你…不会笑话我吧。
You're brave, I'll give you that... Just seeing a heliobus makes me weak in the knees. You... won't laugh at me if I faint, right?
总之，一想到这些妖怪到处乱跑，我还是没法置身事外。尤其是它们之前还把我和小桂子吓得半死，这事可不能就这么算了。
Ugh, I can't stand the thought of those things roaming free. After what Little Gui and I went through, I'm not about to let them have their ghostly way.
我一定要一雪前耻！这次一定要保护好小桂子！
I have to redeem my honor this time! I have to protect Little Gui!
把如今罗浮的将军带到我面前，咱们或许可以谈谈。
Bring me the current general of the Luofu, and we can talk.
几位不妨先行一步，待批阅完手头的公文，我会立刻前往绥园。
As soon as I finish my paperwork for the day, I will make my way to Fyxestroll Garden. Please, go ahead of me.
Are you done running around yet?
I'm just stopping by to say hi.
呸，别太得意忘形了！你忘了自己可是曾被我凭依操纵，玩弄的不亦乐乎的傀儡吗？
Hah, spare me! Have you forgotten that I once controlled you like a puppet?
我已按约为你们提供了线索，怎么还是空手而归？
I provided you with information as promised — why am I still empty-handed?
哼，若不是为了再战一场的事就别来烦我！
Tsk, don't bother me again until you're ready to fight!
不过嘛，我打赌，你们之后一定会来求我的，咱们走着瞧。
You'll be begging for a rematch later... just you wait.
岁阳本是无根自在之火，可惜却因一念好奇，为人类所囿。可惜。
The heliobi are like a flame that burns eternal, with no need for sustenance. But alas, their curiosity got the best of them, and they became prisoners of humans. It is a pity.
与其说同情，不如说是关照。
...I lament that we share the same weaknesses.
我们与岁阳的处境并无不同，从拥有灵智的那一刻起，受欲念和本性驱使，注定要被束缚在自己的命途上，步向自己的结局。
Our situation is no different from that of the heliobi. From the moment we gain sentience, we are driven by desire and instinct, bound to our destiny, moving unceasingly towards our own demise.
Aren't you afraid we'll be defeated by them...
持节将兵，最重要的是对胜败的直觉。而各位令我有必胜的信心。
The most important thing in a soldier is one's intuition for victory or defeat. And you have given me confidence in victory.
浮烟为何执着于要与将军决斗…
Why is Cirrus so obsessed with fighting the general of the Luofu?
按古老的神话所载，仙舟曾面临大敌入侵，举族覆灭的绝境。为此，有位凡人英雄为了挽救危亡，不惜与岁阳之祖「燧皇」立下夺舍约定。

The ancient legends recount that the Xianzhou once faced an invasion by a great enemy that threatened the annihilation of every race aboard the Xianzhou ships. In order to save the Alliance, a hero made a pact with the Flint Emperor — the predecessor of all heliobi.
燧皇借出力量助战，而凡人与其追随者们若能凯旋，将会永远失去自己的身体。
The Flint Emperor would aid the Xianzhou in battle, and if they were victorious, the hero and their followers would lose their physical bodies for eternity.
那场大战结束后，英雄们无一生还，而燧皇也受了重创。这场交易便不了了之。人们也逐渐遗忘了这个故事。但岁阳却还记得。

When the fighting had ceased, none of the heroes survived, and the Flint Emperor was gravely wounded. Thus, the pact was unable to be fulfilled. As the centuries came and went, the story faded from memory. But the heliobi remember.
它们索偿此债，永世不忘。腾骁将军与燎原的大战，多半也是为此而起。
They hold claim to this debt for all time. The great battle between General Teng Xiao and Ignamar was fought largely for this reason.
You're not going back to the Seat of Divine Foresight?
「协助十王司镇伏岁阳。」这可是个特别正当的理由。
Aiding the Ten-Lords Commission in subduing the heliobi is a legitimate reason to take a leave of absence.
就当我给自己放个假吧，好好欣赏一下绥园，虽说这里的风真是透体寒凉啊。
I shall treat it as a vacation and enjoy the scenery of Fyxestroll Garden — though I must admit, the wind here does chill the bones.
唉…这龙女大人怎么动不动就跑…我能不能申请个「恶劣环境作业补贴」啊。
*sigh* Why does the Dragon Lady always have to run off... I swear they should be paying us extra for this...
就你屁话多。嫌苦你就申请调岗到随军医士吧。
Hah! I should get worker's comp for listening to you complaining all day. If you don't like the work, you can always transfer to the military.
哼，竟派出四个卒子羞辱我…
Hmph, trying to humiliate me with lowly pawns...
No matter then, I have my pawns to play...
让你们见识见识岁阳的奇术！
Now you will experience the might of the heliobi!
You know what, that might actually have been the case...
能听到笑声，但完全找不到人在哪里……
I can hear laughter, but where's it coming from...?
连我也开始觉得有点瘆人了……
Ugh, now I'm starting to get the heebie jeebies...
门后怎么是这么个地方？
I never thought this would be behind the door...
只是岁阳的障眼法罢了……
Remember, it's just a heliobus illusion...
喂，那边那个岁阳，快把白露大人放了！
Hey, you over there! Release Lady Bailu!
捣乱的家伙，咱们俩本来快快乐乐地在这儿玩耍呢！阿露她不想跟你们回家！
Don't be a bunch of fun-suckers! She doesn't wanna let anyone take her away!
阿灼，他们是来找我的。天色都暗了，我是不是该回去了？
Luxie, they came here looking for me... It's starting to get dark, maybe it's time for me to go back now?
阿露，咱们不是说好了吗，不让任何大人找到！也绝不跟他们回家。你…你怎么这么快就反悔了呀？
Lulu, didn't we say before that we wouldn't let any grown-ups find us? And never let them take us home? Why... why did you change your mind?
呃…你说得有道理！大人可以说话不算话，但咱们不能。
Hmm... you're right! Grown-ups break their promises, but we don't!
就是就是！你饿了的话，我可以给你变出吃不完的琼实鸟串；你渴了，我这儿有喝不完的星芋啵啵！
That's right! Remember, if you ever get hungry, I can conjure up anything you like — berrypheasant skewers, startaro bubble tea — you name it. We have it right here!
现在还不行喔。咱们先一起玩个游戏吧？几个坏家伙，听见了吗？你们也有份！
Not yet — why don't we play a game first? You bad guys over there, okay? You're gonna be in the game too!
阿露，咱们俩逃，只要不被这些坏大人抓到，我就把好吃的好喝的统统变给你！
Lulu, let's make a run for it — if we escape from them, I'll conjure up all of your favorite snacks and drinks!
好哇，那还等什么呢，开跑！
Wow! Then what are we waiting for? Let's go!
自由自在！一起玩到天昏地暗！
We're free from the grown-ups! We can play all day every day!
帝弓在上…这家伙跑得也太快了……
Whew... By the Arbiter... They sure know... how to run...
That's... the power of a... heliobus!
...Catch your breath... before you pass out...
咱们…咱们开个作战会议吧…我觉得这么穷追猛打不是个办法，要用脑袋……
Let's... let's try a new strategy... I don't think we can beat them like this. We need to use our heads...
……连裳裳这样的体力派也忍不住要用脑袋了！
...Sushang's... gonna use her head...? Now we're really done for...
那你…很棒棒哦！但是，可不可以把嘴角的白沫咽回去先。
Then... good for you! But you should probably catch your breath first... I could hear you panting from a mile away.
家人，你醒醒！把嘴角的白沫咽回去啊！
Ha, you're fine! Just take a breather...
就没人随身带个陷阱吗？
这又不是打猎，伤到白露小姐该怎么办？
Huh? We can't hunt the Dragon Lady like a wild beast...
等等，我有个法子！反过来试试如何？不去追逐白露小姐，而是等她自己跑过来！
Wait, I have an idea! How about we use a little reverse psychology? Instead of chasing Lady Bailu, we get her to come to us!
小桂子你说什么胡话呢，这小龙人像是会自己冲我们跑过来的样子吗？
Are you serious? Does that little dragon girl look like she's gonna come running over to us?
眼下的捉迷藏，让我想起小时候生活的那颗行星上，资源匮乏，想要吃点肉就得冒上巨大的危险，深入矿坑去狩猎一种叫浮鼬的动物。

Chasing Bailu around like this reminds me of something I saw back home when I was a child. On my home planet, resources were scarce, and if you wanted to eat meat you had to risk your life by going deep into the mines to hunt an animal called a sky mink.
浮鼬飞起来灵活的很，而且警觉，身手再好也很难抓住。
Sky minks fly so nimbly and are so alert that even the quickest of hands will have a hard time catching them.
怎么突然开始讲故事了？
Why are we having story time all of a sudden?
那你们后来吃没吃上肉？
Did you get the meat? How does the story end?
又到了小桂子的童年故事模式了。
别打岔，听我讲完。浮鼬的生态很特别，它会与一种叫鸣蜥的毒物共生在一处。外出觅食时，就让鸣蜥来保护自己的幼崽。

Ugh, don't interrupt! Hear me out. The sky mink's ecology is unique — it lives in symbiosis with a venomous creature called a shrieking lizard. When a sky mink goes out to feed, it lets the lizard protect its young.
所以我们就去鸟窝里抓鸣蜥。那家伙被抓住后，会用尖锐的叫声示警浮鼬回巢保护幼崽。不过这样一来，它也就落入了咱们手里。

So we used to go to sky mink nests to catch shrieking lizards, instead. When a shrieking lizard gets caught, it calls to the sky mink with a loud shriek to warn it to return to the nest and protect its young... which of course, led the sky mink right to us.
生存竞争是很公平的。鸣蜥的鼓囊和眼球会喷出剧毒，防护工作干得不好，许多小伙伴都把命搭了进去。
Well, the competition for survival went two ways — shrieking lizards spew out a potent venom, and failure to take proper precautions cost many a hunter their life.
也谈不上聪明。人为了活下去，什么难事都愿意做。鸣蜥的鼓囊和眼球会喷出剧毒，很多小伙伴都是为了吃上一口肉，把命给搭进去了。
I'd hesitate to call it that. Shrieking lizards spew out a potent venom — many people lost their lives trying to catch a tiny morsel of meat for dinner.
所以，听了半天，这故事和你说的法子有什么关系啊？
Nice story. But what's it got to do with chasing Lady Bailu?
我都讲得这么明白了！抓住其中一个，另一个就会自投罗网！
Isn't it obvious? If we can catch one Bailu, the other will come running to us!
我还记得之前判官大人手里有个名叫「藏月瓠」的宝贝，能吸锁岁阳…呃，就是被我打碎的那个…不知还在不在？

I remember one of the judges had a precious item called a Lunaumbra Gourd, which could absorb and imprison heliobi... Uh, come to think of it, I think that's the thing I smashed... I wonder if they fixed it?
葫芦我确实随身带着，但也得在岁阳靠得近时才能用上啊。
Actually, I have one with me, but it's only effective when a heliobus is close by.
要是你拿着藏月瓠在某个死角守株待兔，而剩下的人将白露小姐赶来这儿。
Nice! In that case, you can take the gourd and camp out in a corner — the rest of us will chase Lady Bailu back over here.
咱们抓住了白露小姐，那个岁阳就会现身落入我们的陷阱吗？岁阳是这么重情重义的东西吗？
If we catch Lady Bailu, will Luxie really follow her into our trap? Do heliobi really have a sense of loyalty to their victims?
谁知道呢？浮烟不是说阿灼是小孩子心性吗？就试试看吧。
Who knows? Cirrus said that Luxie is kinda childlike — it's worth a try.
放我出去！我不想被关在这里！
Lemme go! I don't wanna be locked in here!
白露大人…保持冷静，你被岁阳依附了，你的所思所想都不是你自己的念头。
Lady Bailu — please calm down. You're not yourself right now — you're being influenced by a heliobus.
胡说！胡说！我从小到大都没有什么玩伴，今天难得遇到一个，你们却要抓它……
You're lying! I never had playmates. Today I finally found one, and you guys are trying to take them away...
大人真是卑鄙啊，连小朋友难得的快乐时光也要夺走！
Grown-ups are so mean! As soon as they see children having fun, they wanna ruin it!
Hee-hee! I'm a big meany head!
快醒醒，别被它激发了愧疚的情绪。
Careful! Don't let them manipulate you.
老大，咱还是放了人质吧？
Yo boss, maybe we should let her off with a warning this time?
快醒醒，别被它激发了愧疚的情绪。
Careful! Don't let them manipulate you.
哇，这家伙果然自投罗网了。
Phew, sure enough, they walked right into our trap.
本想将你们一起带入快乐自由的儿童世界，不过既然你们执意要煞风景…就别怪阿灼用暴力来和你们对话啦！
Hmph, I was considering letting you join the club and have fun with us... but since you're so determined to spoil everything... I'm afraid we'll have to settle our differences through violence.
暴力，只有暴力才是你们这些大人唯一会说也唯一能听懂的语言，对吧！？就像你们每次教训孩子时那样！
Yes, violence, the only language you grown-ups know how to speak, right? The one you use when you're telling us off!
呜，对不起，阿露…我、我被大人教训了，我不能陪你玩了……
I'm sorry, Lulu... Th—The grown-ups won, I can't play with you anymore...
阿灼…不是拉勾说好了，绝不跟大人回去吗？大人可以说话不算话，小孩子这样也可以吗？
Luxie, we said we'd never go back with the grown-ups! They break their promises, but we can't!
可是，我也没办法呀。再长的嬉戏，也总有结束的那一刻。
There's nothing I can do about it... playtime can't go on forever...
不过，今天玩的很开心，下次再约吧！
...but we still had lots of fun — let's play again next time!
没有下一次啦！藿藿，拜托了。
There won't be a next time! Huohuo, you know what to do.
阿灼，下次见面…大概要很久以后了……
Luxie, how long before the next time we can play together?
咱们的人生很长的啦，从这个尺度上来看，不会有你想象得那么久～我暂时得跟这些大人走啦！
We both have many years ahead of us, so in that sense it won't be long at all... but for now I have to leave with these grown-ups!
好啦…白露小姐，时候不早了，该是回家的时候了。
Alright, alright. Lady Bailu, it's getting late — you need to go home now.
随着岁阳的消失，白露半睁半闭的眼睛渐渐恢复了清醒。
As the heliobus disappears, Bailu's eyes regain their clarity. She has retaken control of herself.
虽然记忆有些模糊，但我之前好像做了很多奇怪的事情……
I... everything's so fuzzy... Did I do something bad?
不用愧疚，白露小姐，就当是做了一场自由玩耍的梦吧，这不是你的错。
No need to feel bad, Lady Bailu. You were in a dreamworld — none of it was your fault.
可是…可是，大家为了我到处奔波…我还记得，真对不住。
But... but... I made everyone chase after me for so long... I shouldn't have done that...
被人管束，被人禁锢，就会想着要逃离，这不是天性吗。是那些总想着纠正行为的大人，那些觉得你该做什么的人有问题才是。

It's only natural to want to escape when strict rules are being forced on you. I know there are a lot of grown-ups trying to control you — telling you what you can and can't do... they're the ones to blame.
我都准备好了道歉的说辞…大姐姐，你把我的思路打乱了。
I was ready to apologize to everyone... but now you've made me forget what I wanted to say.
干嘛要道歉啊？我和你一样，虽然已经快成年了，不过还总是忍不住怀念小时候光着脚到处乱跑的日子。
Apologize for what? You know, you and me have a lot in common. I'm almost a grown-up now, but I still miss my childhood days and running about barefoot.
被大哥训斥、被要求干这干那、被要求成熟一点，接下来是反抗和逃跑，为了证明自己离开家人也能过得很好…所以，我在仙舟安顿了下来。

My big brother used to boss me around... He'd give me chores, constantly telling me to grow up, that kind of thing... Then one day, I decided to rebel. I ran away to prove that I could get by without my family... and eventually settled on the Xianzhou.
看来龙女也好，我这样的普通人也罢，大部分人生活的轨迹都很相似嘛。
Whether it's a Dragon Lady like you or an ordinary person like me, I feel like many people's lives follow a similar trajectory.
总有一天，白露小姐你也会有力量离开眼下这段人生，前往下一段生活的…所以我建议你好好珍惜它眼前的乐趣，而不要反复为它的烦恼而道歉。
One day, you'll have the strength to leave your current situation and move on to the next phase... In the meantime, I suggest you try and cherish the good rather than apologize for the bad.
大姐姐，你还挺会给人灌心灵鸡汤的嘛，不如来丹鼎司的医馆挂牌当个心理医士吧？
Hehe, alright, alright, I don't want everyone to feel too sorry for me... Hey, did you ever think about joining the Alchemy Commission as a psychotherapist?
呜，她真的是个逃家的孩子吗？怎么说起话来夹枪带棒的，好早熟啊。
Geez, and there I was pouring my heart out... Now I feel like this kid's lived longer than I have...
我说咱们还是别、别在这儿呆着了。这地方也太阴森了…咱们换个地方聊天好不好？
Umm, c—can we not linger around here too long? This place is really spooky... Maybe we can chat somewhere else?
藏月瓠已经设置好了，只要把白露小姐赶到这儿，我们就能抓住她……
The Lunaumbra Gourd is in place. If we can chase Lady Bailu to this spot, we should be able to catch her...
那…那个…一定要注意安全呀！
我就是想多出来玩一玩！我有什么错？
I just wanna play a little longer! What's so bad about that?
为什么我要按大人的方式来生活呢？
Why do I have to live the way grown-ups do?
大人们总说：「现在不要贪玩，等长大后再玩。」
Grown-ups are always saying "study now and have fun later..."
可我看丹鼎司那些大人也没时间玩啊！
...but the grown-ups I see at the Alchemy Commission never have time for fun!
让我开开心心玩一会儿不好吗！
Can't you just let me have some fun!?
大人们总是说大人的生活更辛苦，可这很奇怪诶？
Why do grown-ups always say that life is harder for them. So weird...
大人不也是从小孩子变来的吗？
为什么要和过去的自己去比较谁更辛苦呢？
Would you spoil the fun for younger you just because older you isn't happy?
为什么总要把这种我听不懂也理解不了的事情说给我听啊？
Why do they always talk about things I don't understand!
关上前面那扇门…她就只能往那个方向逃了……
That door over there is the only way out... We'd better close it...
一个临时的想法来了，你应该<color=#dbc291ff>关上这扇门</color>试试。
An idea pops up: You should try <color=#dbc291ff>closing this door</color>.
一个灵感突如其来，你应该<color=#dbc291ff>打开这扇门</color>试试。
A flash of inspiration hits: You should try <color=#dbc291ff>opening this door</color>.
如果世界上存在「正确」的命途，一定会对你投下赞许的目光吧。
If there exists the Path of "Correction" in this world, then they would surely cast approving glances upon you.
这里房间四通八达，<color=#dbc291ff>要不要关上其中几扇门呢？</color>
The rooms here are interconnected in all directions. <color=#dbc291ff>Should you close some of the doors?</color>
万事俱备，去吧，<color=#dbc291ff>将白露赶进藏月瓠的阵法之中</color>吧！
All is set. Now go on, <color=#dbc291ff>drive Bailu into the matrix of the Lunaumbra Gourd</color>!
万事俱备，去吧，<color=#dbc291ff>将白露赶进藏月瓠的阵法之中</color>吧！
All is set. Now go on, <color=#dbc291ff>drive Bailu into the matrix of the Lunaumbra Gourd</color>!
白露预判了你堵死路的想法，只要她跑得快，就可以为所欲为。
Bailu anticipated your attempt to block her path, but as long as she runs fast enough, she can do whatever she wants.
你好啊，{NICKNAME}，咱们开始今天的行动吧？
Hello. Let's get started with today's operations.
十王司下辖岁阳逃逸事件特别处理行动小组，简称捉鬼小队，又要振作精神开始干活了！耶！
The Ten-Lords Commission Special Operations Team for the Heliobus Containment Breach Incident — A.K.A the ghost-hunting squad — is ready for action! Yeahhh⁓!
看来只有咱俩还算精神…
Looks like we're the only ones in good spirits today...
为什么你的眼神和地衡司那些执事一样疲惫？
Yo, why the exhaustion? You look like the officers over at the Realm-Keeping Commission.
居然不是弹性工作时间？
Can I switch to a four-day week?
招工启事上从来没有说过这一点吧？不对，咱们哪儿有招工启事啊。
I don't think that was included in the job posting. Actually, I don't think there ever was a job posting.
困死了，小桂子你是吃了什么灵丹妙药，这么精力充沛？
I'm sleepy... Little Gui, what kind of magical elixir did you take to make you so energetic?
每次看到粉丝数蹭蹭往上跳，我就兴奋得睡不着，比喝下什么浓茶咖啡都管用。
Every time I see our follower count increase, I get so excited I can't even sleep — it works better than any kind of tea or coffee.
你是干这个的，我可不行。只要我一闭上眼，就梦见自己和白露小姐不断周旋周旋周旋…比亲自上阵还累人。
Well aren't you lucky. As soon as I closed my eyes, I dreamt of endless running and circling and chasing after Lady Bailu... it was even more exhausting than doing it in real life.
裳裳，你都睡了一整个白天了！
Sushang, you slept for an entire day!
抓鬼是个晚上出洞的活计，睡过一整个白天岂不是很合理。
Catching ghosts is a night job — it only makes sense to sleep during the day.
不如这样，你们就当我是睡魔缠身，把我镇压在床上，让我再睡上三五十个时辰，就当是向十王司交差了，如何？
I have an idea — how about we all just pretend that I've been possessed by a sleep ghost, let me sleep for another ten hours, and then call it a day's work?
这摆烂发言让我想起某人…
You sound like someone I know...
嗯，很像是被太卜司那位著名的牌手上了身。
A certain Celestial Jade-playing Divination Commission employee, perhaps...?
太卜司的牌手？太卜司不都是算卦的么。
Divination Commission? Celestial Jade? Shouldn't they be doing... divinations?
Sounds like you've spent time with Qingque...
啊，就是那位长乐天著名的牌手！我每次执行任务经过那儿，总能见到她雷打不动地和牌友们围城大战。
That's the Celestial Jade player over at Exalting Sanctum! Whenever I pass through on official business, I always see her with loads of other players.
连判官大人也知道她！她还真是闲名远播啊。
Even a judge knows her! Her reputation sure does precede her...
就是这个人啊。你们看这个帖子。
It's this girl. Here, look at this post.
…我工作还是很认真的好吧！至少不会理直气壮写什么「照例迟到」。
...I take my job seriously! I'd never post something like "late as usual" on a public forum.
素裳小姐的关注点好奇怪啊。
Miss Sushang, I think you missed the interesting part...
这条消息里的描述好离奇啊，似乎很符合岁阳寄生作祟的情况。如果连太卜司这样的机要部门也被岁阳占据，那可就麻烦了。

The description in this comment is really suspicious, it definitely sounds like heliobi activity to me... and if heliobi have managed to infiltrate the Divination Commission, that spells big trouble for the Luofu.
确实…感觉应该先联系一下青雀小姐，提醒她不要上班。
You're right... Maybe we should contact Miss Qingque and warn her not to go to work today.
Since when does she need reminding to skip work?
为了避免有人因为好奇心靠近危险区域，咱们还是得履行告知义务。
That's a good idea. We should send out a message, or people's curiosity will get the better of them.
你们将阿灼束缚在了阵法中…我还听见了其他岁阳在低鸣、震颤…渴望离开此处。
So, you imprisoned Luxie in the matrix... and I heard the cries of other heliobi longing to break free.
十王司的进展很顺利嘛。现在你们来见我，想必是又有所求咯？
It would seem the Ten-Lords Commission has everything under control... What is it you want from me?
Just came to vent some anger.
你该知道，你动不了我分毫的对吧？
Outside the confines of our agreement, you would be unwise to attack.
我承认你成功恶心到我了。
You have managed to disgust me still further...
按照将军与你所立的约定，一场胜利换一个问题。
One victory equals one question... don't forget the agreement you made with the general.
胜不胜利的，在战斗开始前可别那么笃定啊，小妹妹。没有尾巴帮你，收服岁阳的工作是不是有些力不从心了？
Don't be so sure of victory before the battle begins, young one. Without Tail to protect you, isn't subduing a heliobus a bit overwhelming for you?
只要你敞开心接纳我…我可以代替尾巴，我可以帮你。
You know, if you can accept me with an open heart... I can take his place and help you.
That's what I wanted to hear.
你在竭尽全力蛊惑我，看来你对胜负根本也没什么把握。
The fact that you're trying so hard to persuade me means that you're not sure of victory either.
要是你还有几分胜算，早就不顾一切地对我们几个露出獠牙了。我说的没错吧，浮烟？
If you were, you'd have devoured us without hesitation. Am I right, Cirrus?
那么，如你所愿。上枰厮杀吧，景元的棋子们！
Then have it your way — I'll destroy Jing Yuan's pawns here and now!
太卜司似乎被某个岁阳盘踞了，不知道你有什么头绪？
We think the Divination Commission has been infiltrated by a heliobus, but we don't know which one.
你们向浮烟讲述了太卜司的现状。
You tell Cirrus what's happening at the Divination Commission
会去往仙舟人窥测未来的地方…除了「犀焰」之外，应该不会有其他人了。
Entering the Xianzhou's window to the future... It must be none other than Keralum.
我知道它最爱纠缠那些先知和预言家们，喜欢与他们诘辩命运，看他们在随机和命定间痛苦徘徊。
They always relished hounding your prophets and seers with questions of destiny — watching them flounder between the random and the pre-ordained.
哈哈哈，你们人类脑壳里装的那坨蛋白质，计算效率实在太低，你们对命运的猜测只是类比和错觉罢了。
Hahaha, that pile of protein in your human skull is computationally inefficient — your conjectures on destiny are little more than analogies and illusions...
但咱们无形目不一样，当我们聚在一起共振然后观测，命运就像举火照明般清晰可见。
...but we, The Shapeless, are different. When we come together to harmonize and observe, destiny is clear and vivid as firelight cast into darkness.
与人争斗，能预测对手的进退行动，这样的能力最重要不过——所以，聚成「燎原」的岁阳中，犀焰司掌着鉴往知来，预测休咎的职能。
In warfare, nothing is more important than being able to predict your opponent's movements. Among the fragments of Ignamar, Keralum was in charge of knowing the past and predicting the future.
不过，据说犀焰曾预感到了失败的前兆，却不知为何，燎原还是无视了它的警告。
It is said that during that fateful battle, Keralum had a premonition of failure, but Ignamar ignored their warnings.
看起来这次的目标十分明确。咱们出发吧。
It looks like we have a clear target this time. Let's get going.
虽然我没有犀焰那般本领，但是，小狐狸…我预言，你迟早有一天会祈求我的帮助。
I may not have the same predictive power as Keralum, little fox girl... but one thing I do know is that sooner or later, you will beg for my help.
唷，你们来了啊！怎么连十王司的判官也来了？
Oh, you're here! Is that a Ten-Lords Commission judge?
我跟你讲，现在太卜司里面状况不太对啊，所有人都念念有词的，是准备职场下克上了吗？该不会是因为我无意中起了坏榜样的作用吧？
Something's amiss in the Divination Commission — everyone is mumbling to themselves. Is this some workforce overhaul? Did I set a bad example?
青雀小姐也太会联想了。不，这件事纯属意外。但要解释起来……
I—I'm afraid not, Miss Qingque. Something unexpected happened... I'm just not sure how to explain it...
太卜司可能被某种不明生物盘踞了，要是贸然闯进去，你也会成为受害者！
The Divination Commission may have been infiltrated by some unknown creature... If you rush in, you could become a target too!
素裳小姐，你忘了咱们行动的保密原则了吗！
Miss Sushang, we're supposed to be operating in secret!
轻描淡写反而会让青雀小姐意识不到眼下的状况有多危险。
I want Qingque to have an idea of the gravity of the situation.
算了，那东西应该拿青雀小姐这样无欲无求的性格也没法子吧。
Hmm... I suppose Miss Qingque should be safe enough — the one we're chasing probably has a more... complicated target...
虽然像是夸我，但听着…哎嘿，就当是在夸我吧。
That sounds like a compliment, but at the same time... Eh, I'll just take it as a compliment.
反正…反正眼下太卜司里出了些危险的状况，你不要进去就对了！
Well... anyway, there's a dangerous situation at the Divination Commission at the moment, so just don't go in there!
工作条件这么恶劣啊，叫人怎么专心工作嘛。
Good idea, with working conditions like these, I wouldn't be able to concentrate anyway...
我听工造司的阿伟说了，他们司部里也有个什么玩意儿泄漏了。好几个学徒都开始胡言乱语起来，超吓人…当然，也可能是出不了师毕不了业导致的。

I heard from Awei that the Artisanship Commission is also experiencing strange phenomena — several of the apprentices have started babbling nonsensically, it's kinda scary... Of course, it could just be a side-effect of being denied graduation.
那就拜托青雀小姐在这儿守着。
In that case, Miss Qingque, could you stand guard here for us while we investigate?
里头这么危险，我在这儿守着，不合适吧？
It doesn't seem like a good idea to just stand here under such dangerous circumstances, does it?
青雀小姐如果想离开，也不必为难…不对，难不成你要和我们一块进去吗？你也看到太卜司的情况了，咱们这一队人是专为解决此事而来的。
I mean, you could leave, but... Wait, are you thinking of coming with us? Didn't you see how bad the situation was...?
是是，都看到了。可我要是现在转身走了，不就变成旷工了吗？上班摸鱼归摸鱼，旷工可就不为太卜所容了。

Yeah, yeah, I've seen it alright... but if I leave now, won't that count as unauthorized absence? I can get away with slacking off, but the Master Diviner won't tolerate complete abandonment of my post.
再说，你们也需要一个熟悉太卜司的人来给你们带个路，搭把手什么的，对不对？咱们走吧。
Besides, you guys need someone familiar with the Divination Commission to show you the way, right? Then let's go.
穷观阵，怎么变成了这样……？
How did the Matrix of Prescience become like this?
你们看，符太卜站在穷观阵的中心，她在做什么？
Look, Diviner Fu is standing at the center of the Matrix of Prescience... what is she doing?
看她念念有词的模样，应该是跟过去一样，演算着航路或未来……
Judging by her chanting, I think she's performing navigation calculations, or divining...
但穷观阵却纹丝不动，不对劲，很不对劲。
But something's not right — the Matrix of Prescience isn't moving at all.
她应该已经被岁阳凭附了…
She's probably already been possessed by a heliobus...
岁阳…就是你们所说的危险吗？
A heliobus... is that the danger you were talking about?
我在书里读到过，「能自在幻化的星火之精，喜好操弄凡物的梦想和欲望」。你是说太卜被那种东西控制了…？

I read about them in a book. "Starfire Essence that can transform itself — enjoys manipulating the dreams and desires of mortals." You mean the Master Diviner is being controlled by something like that...?
该怎么才能让她醒过来？
How can we snap her out of it?
摇一摇「同心火铃」试试。我们在离太卜大人这么近的地方摇动铃铛，想必能进入她与岁阳共有的幻境中。
We could try ringing the Harmonic Chime... If we're close enough, we should be able to enter the heliobus's illusion.
不过，在走之前，我得帮这几位解决眼下太卜司面对的麻烦。要不然，别人还以为我是临危脱逃才被开除的呢。
But before I leave, I have to help these guests take care of some trouble here at the Commission. If I don't, people will think I was fired because of cowardice in the face of danger.
肃静！太卜司内，不得聒噪！
Silence! Idle chatter is not permitted in the Divination Commission!
…还是我们眼下该称呼你「犀焰」了？
...Or perhaps we should call you Keralum?
你们怎么称呼我并不重要，无论符玄还是犀焰，都是这太卜司唯一的主人。
It doesn't matter what you call me — I am the master of the Divination Commission.
眼下占卜的工作正进行到重要关头，容不得他人扰乱。就算是十王司的判官，星穹列车的客人，也不得在这儿放肆！
The current divination has reached a delicate stage, and no one is permitted to disturb it — not even a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission or a guest from the Astral Express!
青雀！又是你，是你把这些外人带进司部的吗？你把我平日里所立的规矩都当作耳旁风了吗？
Qingque! I have grown weary of your insubordination! Are you the one who brought these outsiders into the Commission? Have you turned a deaf ear to all the rules I've laid down?
Qingque, you are hereby expelled from the Commission!
可恶…一下子就让咱们减员一人！
Darn... Now we're down one person!
嘿嘿，我也觉得自己镇日游手好闲地不成体统，一边打牌一边拿着太卜司的薪俸…实在有些，那句话怎么说来着……
Eh-he, my days here really have been unproductive — loafing around outside and playing Celestial Jade — all while taking a Divination Commission salary. It's... how to put it...
倒也不是，毕竟交给我的事儿都有按时完成……
Not exactly, I do complete all my assigned work on time...
虽然不知道哪里不对，但这个词用在这儿肯定不太妥当……
That's not quite the right way to describe it...
Too much of a good thing?
我也觉得，这样的日子，小桂子我做梦都想过。
Sure sounds like it. I could only dream of having a cozy job like that.
是「浪费生命」。谢谢太卜大人推了我一把，既然您也觉得我不该留在这儿大材小用，我是该想法子做些改变了。

I would call it: Wasting my life away. Thank you, Master Diviner, for giving me the push I needed. Since you feel that my skills could be put to better use elsewhere, it's time for me to think about making some changes.
不过，在走之前，我得帮这几位解决眼下太卜司面对的麻烦。要不然，别人还以为我是临危脱逃才被开除的呢。
But before I leave, I have to help these guests take care of some trouble here at the Commission. If I don't, people will think I was fired because of cowardice in the face of danger.
接下来，接下来该如何是好？
What next? What do we do now?
嘿嘿，光顾着说些帅气的话了，到底怎样才能让太卜从走火入魔中脱离出来啊？
Hehe, giving a dramatic speech to my boss was cool and everything, but it's not gonna help her break free from the heliobus clouding her mind.
我也不知道。那个岁阳看起来不打算用迷境困住咱们，似乎也不想攻击我们……
I'm not sure what to do... The heliobus isn't trying to trap us inside the illusion, and it doesn't look interested in attacking us either...
走火入魔？本座很清醒，不如说从未如此清醒过。
"Clouding my mind"? I've never been of clearer mind than I am right now.
从现在开始，本座将全心全灵致力于推演仙舟联盟注定的未来，并将这些未来昭告天下，让人们都活得明明白白。
From now on, I will dedicate myself to divining the predetermined futures of the Xianzhou Alliance, and will make these futures known to the world so that all can live in clarity.
I think you've gone off the deep end...
...How is it possible to divine every future?
Since when is the future predetermined?
本座知道你要说什么。「人定胜天」、「自由意志」…但这些都不过是人类大脑产生的简单幻觉。从一开始，道路就只有一条。

I know what you want to say. Spare me the lecture on "human wisdom prevailing over nature" and those ridiculous notions of "free will"... These are but crude illusions created by the brain. From the beginning, there was only one path.
你，{NICKNAME}，你不过是一颗被星核猎手摆布的棋子罢了。
You, {NICKNAME}, you are nothing more than a pawn at the mercy of the Stellaron Hunters.
登上列车，与谁为敌，去往何处……这些你以为自己可以听凭心意自由做出的选择，不过是命运的道路上终将汇合的支流。

What day you boarded the Express, who your enemies are, where you go... These choices that you think you make freely of your own accord are mere tributaries... that will eventually converge on the path of destiny.
帮助仙舟击败幻胧的这次旅行，想必你深有体会吧？所有的结果早被那位隐于幕后的奴隶书写成了剧本。
Your journey to the Xianzhou, the defeat of Phantylia — all these were written into a script long ago by that slave to destiny, hidden in the shadows.
就像眼下，你所有的选择不过是——「挥舞球棒，向我冲来」、「大声却徒劳地驳斥我」、「一语不发地陷入沉默」这么几种。
Even in this very moment, your options are few: Ready your bat and charge at me, argue with me loudly and futilely, or fall into silence.
{NICKNAME}，别被她言中了！总会有其他选择的！
{NICKNAME}, don't let her words get to you! There are always other options!
(Ready your bat and charge at her)
运势涨落在离坎之间，寸功不竟，你不可能战胜我。
The rise and fall of the tides are dictated by the fire trigram and the water trigram — you are powerless against such a force. You have no hope of defeating me.
符玄的眼神中透露着失望。
Come back to me when you've thought it through.
符玄的眼神中透露着失望。
Come back to me when you've thought it through.
这些微不足道的选择，无法改变必然的命运。
Such trivial choices cannot change the inevitable.
如果你还不服气，本座可以拨冗为你演示究竟何为命中注定——用你人类的脑袋所能理解的方式。
If you're still not convinced, I can demonstrate to you the true nature of destiny — in a way that your human brain can comprehend.
如果你理解了关于命运的真相，现在离开还不迟，别再打扰本座的演算了！
If you have gained clarity on the true nature of destiny, you may leave... and stop interfering with my divinations!
Alright, make sure you're paying attention.
我…我没事。只是有些头疼。
I... I'm fine. Just a small headache, nothing more.
被岁阳寄生后，会有些不适的，不过服些丹药应该就能无恙了。
It's normal to experience some discomfort after being possessed by a heliobus, but nothing a few medicinal pellets can't take care of.
这团火就是犀焰吗？虽然没什么力量，但要是被缠上还真会令人陷入无止尽的绝望中呢。
Is that... Keralum? Hmph, they may not be the most powerful fragment, but becoming entangled in their illusion can lead to endless despair.
快些…快些将我…收入黑暗中……
Hurry... just hurry up and... seal me in the darkness...
我看到了，你们将我…收入了囚牢里……
I've foreseen what happens next... you're going to imprison me...
Qingque, thanks to you, the Divination Commission is safe again.
不客气啊太卜。对了，您刚刚在岁阳寄体时把我开除了，这个决定应该是动真格的吧。接下来要劳烦您老人家下达一纸书面通知，单方面解除合同。

No need to thank me, Master Diviner. By the way, while you were possessed, you fired me from the Commission, so... that counts, right? I'll have to ask you to give me written notice that my contract has been unilaterally terminated.
这样一来，以我在太卜司混的这些年资，能拿到一笔不小的赔偿呢…呼呼。
Then, with all the years I've spent in the Divination Commission, I'll be able to get a great severance package...
我都想好了，我要用这笔钱去开个牌馆，然后雇几个小工，终日食利，不劳而获展开新生活，哈哈。

...and I already planned what to do with all the money — I'm gonna open a gaming parlor, hire a couple of workers to run it, and spend the rest of my days living off the profits. I'll have started a new life without having lifted a finger, hehe.
这和刚才的青雀小姐根本就不是一个人吧？
唉，真是遗憾，本座之前说了不少胡话，早已一句都不记得了。
I see... What a pity, I don't recall anything I may or may not have said while possessed by the heliobus.
说起来，青雀，你为什么还在这儿，眼下你不该在书库值勤吗？
In any case, Qingque, why are you still here? Shouldn't you be on duty back at the repository?
啊？！太卜一诺千金，怎么能反悔呢？
Huh!? M—Master Diviner, you can't back out now!
当然可以，毕竟人生「总会有选择的」，这可是你教我的啊。
Of course I can. After all, there are always choices in life. You taught me that.
唉，真是拗不过。您先歇会儿，我摸…我是说我干活去啦。
I can't convince real you, let alone possessed you... Master Diviner, you should get some rest. I'm gonna go take a br— uh, I mean... get back to work...
符玄强撑精神四处检视，不用多时，太卜司勉强恢复了秩序。
Fu Xuan brings herself to inspect the commission, and order is soon restored.
做出了很多荒唐的事，真是颜面尽失。
My actions today brought great shame on the Divination Commission...
At least no one else got hurt.
嗯，只有本座受伤的命运达成了。
Yes, all is well, minus my headache...
幸好除了青雀，没人瞧见。
Don't worry, Qingque's the only witness in the Commission.
嗯嗯，本座得好好想想封口的法子了…说笑罢了。
Hmm, I shall have to think of a way to keep her from talking... Hehe, just kidding.
岁阳擅长顺着人的弱点趁虚而入…无论是谁都有弱点，这不是符玄大人的错。
Heliobi are good at finding people's weaknesses and exploiting them... Everyone has some kind of weakness — you're not to blame.
是啊，符玄大人只是受害者，千万不必自责了。
That's right — you were just a victim of the heliobus's trickery, Diviner Fu — no need to blame yourself.
I must express my sincere gratitude to all of you for your help.
也许有些不礼貌，但太卜司横遭磨难，本座还要回去主持大局，恕不远送。
Apologies, but the Divination Commission is in disarray at the moment. I must return and set things in order — I'm afraid I cannot see you off in person.
啊！稍等一下，还有一件事。
Wait! There's something we need to ask you.
你们向符玄解释了这次行动的细节。
You tell Fu Xuan the details of your operation.
「太卜被岁阳附体」这件事传出去不好听，我明白了。
Mm, I agree that "Master Diviner Gets Possessed" wouldn't make for a good headline...
本座倒是不在意你们怎么编派，只要隐去姓名和身份就行了。
I don't care how you spin the story, so long as you leave my name and identity out of it.
本座还有很多工作要处理，今天的恩情，就请容许本座留到他日再答谢吧。
I have many things to attend to — please allow me to save my thanks for another day.
那就不打扰了，接下来咱们也该回绥园把犀焰封禁起来了。
We won't delay you any longer. We need to go to Fyxestroll Garden and seal Keralum away.
驱除幽厉，拿捉精灵。在十王司冥差的协助下，你们封印了「藏月瓠」内岁阳。
Expel evil and capture stray spirits... With the support of the Ten-Lords Commission's spiritfarers, you seal the heliobus within the Lunaumbra Gourd.
看来你们的行动还挺顺利的。
It seems that your operations have met with some success.
我也在浏览「罗浮杂俎」上的种种奇闻轶事，有趣的很。
I've been browsing through some of the stories on Ghostly Grove myself — they make for good reading.
这么说你知道太卜的事？
Did you hear about the Master Diviner?
所谓善易者不卜。常年为仙舟卜算吉凶，难免会产生诸多心魔，被岁阳趁虚而入。好在有你们的帮助，符卿已安然度过此劫。

As the saying goes, serious divination concerns serious matters. It is inevitable that someone performing divination day in and day out for the Xianzhou would acquire inner demons, and heliobus can take advantage of those. Fortunately, with your help, Fu Xuan prevailed over her intruder.
What do you think about destiny?
你喜欢听人说书，看幻戏吗？
Do you enjoy listening to storytellers and watching immersia?
说书也好，幻戏也罢，所有故事的结局都是注定的，你该不会因此而放弃享受这些故事吧？
In both cases, tales have a predetermined ending — but you shouldn't let that stop you from enjoying them, should you?
人生和命运也是同样的道理。无论结局是否注定，都值得一过。
The same is true of life. Whether the end is predestined or not, it's worth living.
不打扰了，寒鸦小姐正在镇妖塔等着你们呢。
Very well, then. Miss Hanya is waiting for you by the suppression towers.
各位代表十王司弭平了太卜司中的灾异，功勋彪炳，令小女子也与有荣焉。我会上秉十王，表彰诸位。
On behalf of the Ten-Lords Commission, I commend you for your great service in resolving the Divination Commission crisis. I will honor all of you before the Ten Lords.
这一次全都是靠了青雀小姐的帮助，咱们才能顺利收伏犀焰。
...but we really couldn't have defeated Keralum without Miss Qingque's help.
没想到如符玄大人这般神机妙算的人杰，也会受岁阳蛊惑。
I didn't realize that one as skilled as Diviner Fu would also be susceptible to the power of the heliobi.
话说回来…我也能理解她的苦恼。毕竟我们都是在各自看不见的道路上分毫不差地前行着。
That said... I can understand her plight. After all, we are all moving forward on our own unseen paths... in no uncertain terms.
判官奉行十王诰谕，执行命令，却从没有人向我们解释其含义……
Judges are instructed by the Ten Lords to carry out their orders, but no one ever explains their meaning to us...
就像太卜大人无论看到何等残酷的、可怕的选择，只要有利于罗浮众生，她都要选择。
Just like the master diviner — no matter what cruel and horrible paths she foresaw, as long as it benefited the Luofu, she had to make a choice.
也许最终这些决策都是正确的，高瞻远瞩的，但我们毕竟也是血肉凡胎，还是会为做出选择的过程不由得感到痛苦。
Those choices may be correct and far-sighted, but we are, after all, flesh and blood, and we cannot help but agonize over the process of making them.
抱歉，小女子走神了，想必是案牍工作有损心识。今日之事已经完毕，还请各位好好休息吧！
I apologize, I was getting carried away. I think all the paperwork must have worn down my mental acuity. Today's business is finished. Please get some good rest!
对！今天就先解散吧，判官大人也是，可别把自己给累坏了。
Right! Let's call it a day. And you too, Judge Hanya — don't work yourself to death.
终于可以又躺回床上了。各位告辞啦。
It's finally time to get back to bed. Goodbye, everyone.
我也累坏了，晚些在群里聊吧。
I'm totally beat, too. Chat more in the group later.
记得回去分享一下账号情况。
Remember to share the account updates.
寂寞了？无事可做了？皮痒了？
Lonely? Nothing to do? Shall I wake you up?
If you have something to say then say it!
What do you think about destiny?
如果你敞开心扉接纳我，我可以带你去见证你的命运喔？
If you open your heart to me, I can take you to witness your destiny.
算了吧，我不喜欢两次品尝同一道菜，也不喜欢在同一个肉体里呆两次。
...Forget it. I don't like tasting the same dish twice — the same goes for possessions.
You're the one who brought it up.
既然你想聊命运？那么不妨告诉你，我从来不去想那种东西。
If it's destiny you wish to discuss, I might as well tell you that I never think on it, or anything of the sort.
世间万物都有结束的那一天。可能兆亿年后，也可能明天下午，可能是因为纳努克的卒子，也可能是虚无的一声哈欠，或者其他什么理由……

Everything in this world will come to an end. It could be a trillion years from now, or tomorrow afternoon. It could be as a result of Nanook's pawns, or a sigh from the Nihility, or something else entirely...
这个宇宙总会走向终结，什么长生种短生种都要一起完蛋。这个是不可动摇的事实。
Eventually, this universe will be over, and all the species — long and short-life together — all of them will end up in the same place. It is inevitable.
可是知道了这个事实又能怎么样呢？它和你有什么关系？
But does the knowledge of this fact change anything? What does it have to do with you?
对于火焰来说，我不会因为要在宇宙热寂时熄灭就停止眼下的燃烧；就像你不会因为明天仙舟要沉没而放弃今晚的晚饭。

If you knew the Luofu were to perish tomorrow, would you skip dinner tonight? The flame of the heliobi will be extinguished in the hot silence of the universe... but that won't stop me from burning today...
命运…鱼儿为何要操心河流流向哪儿？
Destiny... why should a fish worry about where the river flows?
浮烟神游物外，不再回应你的提问。
Cirrus seems lost in thought, not answering any more questions.
I just came by to look around.
我也许该向你收参观的票钱了。
You should be paying me for the privilege.
时来天地皆同力，运去英雄不自由……
When times are good, heaven and earth work in harmony. When times are bad, even heroes struggle for freedom...
My apologies for rambling on just now...
今日之事已经完毕，请各位好好休息吧！
Today's work is finished! Please make sure to get some rest!
通知完毕，是不是该去太卜司看看情况了？
Notification sent. I guess now we should go to the Divination Commission and see what's going on?
老规矩，先试试向浮烟探探情况。
Mm, but let's talk to Cirrus again first.
不必为上一次胜利感到窃喜…
Don't let your previous victory go to your heads...
因为只要你们稍有闪失，我就会乘虚而入！
...the slightest misstep will be your undoing!
没有景元在身后看着，是否底气不足了？
Let's see how you perform without the general here to watch your back...
我会不断试探，不断挑战。
你们会疲劳、会气衰，而我不会。
Your mortal bodies will fatigue and breathe their last breath... and I will endure.
There are no variables in this world.
{NICKNAME}，离我近、近一点好吗？我、我有点害怕……
{NICKNAME}, s—stay close to me, okay? I'm... I'm a little scared...
愤怒也不能改变既定的命运。
Anger cannot change that which is already ordained by destiny.
只有进攻，没有防御，这便是你的战术吗？
All offense, no defense. Is that your strategy?
你的攻击不会落到我身上，只能殃及这些无辜的傀儡。
Your attacks won't land on me — only on these innocent puppets.
I see through your trickery! I see through every bit of it!
我会失败的！我不可能胜利！
I'm going to lose! Victory is beyond my reach!
为何，为何没有第二条路可走？
Why... why is there no alternative?
宇宙的一切早已被决定好了！
Everything in this universe is predetermined!
不，我…我不可能赢过他们…
No, I... I had no path to victory...
这是太卜司里咱们管它叫「寻径指津」的沙盘，是司部成员专用来推演理路，锻炼头脑用的游戏。太卜把咱们带到这儿来的用意是……？

This place is what the Divination Commission calls the "Pathfinder." It's a sandbox game that diviners use to simulate future paths and exercise our minds. But why did the Master Diviner bring us here?
You want to play a game with us?
这就是你要展示的命中注定？
Is this where you show us the true nature of destiny?
没错，「听我说」，{NICKNAME}。在这片小小迷宫中放入机巧，对其下令，它便会按令寻路，走向出口。这与身在命运之中的人类何其相似？

That's right. Now listen, {NICKNAME}. If you place an ingenium in this little maze and give it a command, it will find its way to the exit precisely as it was commanded to do so. Are humans not the same as they navigate the path of destiny set before them?
不过我猜你会回答「人并非机器」「世界不只一条道路」！
But you're probably thinking: "humans are not machines, there is more than one path in the universe!"
There is more than one path in the universe!
我们不过是更复杂更精密的机器罢了。
And yet machines we are — complex, sophisticated, but machines.
我们和这迷宫中的机巧一样，看不见太多的选择…我们只能循着最短的路线，在唯一的道路上穿行。
We are just like the ingenium in this maze — we have no options to speak of... We can only navigate one path — the one that takes us to our destination.
开始吧，把机巧引领到沙盘的出口，让我看看你们是怎么「选择命运」的。
Let's begin. Lead the ingenium to the exit. Show me how many choices destiny gives you.
总感觉我们好像被拉进岁阳的节奏里了……
It feels like we're just dancing to the heliobus's tune...
很好，你们的选择正如法眼所见。你们应该明白，这个谜题自始至终只有唯一的答案，这就像命运的道路只有一条！
Well done. Your choices are as the omniscia foresaw them. You should know that there was only one answer to this puzzle from the beginning, just as destiny has only one path!
This puzzle was designed by you.
没错，对于一个一开始就被设计好的谜题来说，任何其他选择都是毫无意义的错误。
Yes, for a puzzle that was designed from the start, choosing any other path would be a pointless mistake.
但宇宙并不是谁的游戏，也没有人为我们设计谜题等待解答，宇宙不存在唯一的解…身在其中的我们可以做任何事。
But the universe isn't someone's game, and no one is designing puzzles for us to solve. The universe doesn't have a single answer... we can do anything we want while we're in it.
哪怕是同样一天的工作，我可以躲在书库看闲书，也可以找人打牌。这就是自由。
Even if it's the same work every day, I can hide in the library and read a book or find someone to play Celestial Jade with... and that's freedom.
这么摆烂的事情能这么理直气壮的说出来，还让人觉得好有道理…太卜司的卜者，真有文化！
I never thought slacking off could convince me of anything... the sign of a true scholar! A diviner of the Divination Commission after all!
裳裳醒醒啊！你快要被摸鱼的岁阳侵占脑瓜了！
Sushang, snap out of it! A slacker heliobus is getting into your head!
青雀啊青雀，对于你而言，人生可以有看似无穷多的选择。那是因为，你的每一种选择，与你的每一天同样都是毫无意义的虚度。但对我来说，选择将会带来截然不同的后果。

Qingque, Qingque... For you, life may have a seemingly infinite number of choices. That is because your choices are simply different ways of slacking off and wasting time — they are of no consequence to anything... but for me, choices come with very real consequences.
呃，还真是太卜式毫无情商的发言呢……
That's the most "divinery" thing you've said so far...
本座身为罗浮仙舟的太卜，身负重责。我必须日复一日、日复一日地捋清纷繁复杂的命运之线，才能保全这座巨舰。
As the Master Diviner of the Luofu, I have a heavy responsibility. I must comb through the complex threads of destiny day after day, all for the preservation of this giant ship.
有些看似美好的岔路，向前望去也许是万劫不复的深渊；有些小径则深深没入了无法推算的黑暗。而到头来……
Some paths look promising, but lead to an abyss of despair. Then there are small trails that plunge deep into unimaginable darkness. And in the end...
我意识到，其实我们别无选择。只有踏上唯一的道路，只有奔向最优解，哪怕其中满是灰烬和苦涩。
...I realized that we have no real choices. There is only one path to follow, only one way to the optimal solution, even if it is paved with ashes and bitterness.
There is only one way — and there only ever was.
怎么办…我感觉咱们说服不了她。
What do we do... I don't think we can persuade her...
换一个复杂些的沙盘推演如何？
I have a proposal — why don't we try a more advanced sandbox?
这个游戏你想玩多久，想翻出什么花样，本座尽可以奉陪。
However long you want to play this game, and whatever tricks you try to pull, I'll happily play along.
用你们的「自由意志」把机巧带出沙盘吧。
Use your "free will" to guide the ingenium out of the sandbox.
这一次沙盘的路径虽有稍许变化，但一样简单得很。我想，太卜大人一定会说——
The path changed slightly, but it was just as simple. I'm sure the Master Diviner would say—
命运的道路只有这一条，你的选择就是早已注定的唯一答案。
Destiny only has one path. Your choices are just a predetermined solution to the puzzle.
我却不这么看，太卜大人，请将这沙盘重置，咱们再从头推演一回？
Actually, I don't think I agree. Master Diviner, let's reset the sandbox and give it another go, shall we?
再来一遍？就按着眼前的沙盘，原封不动地再来一次吗？再来一万遍结局也是注定的，因为道路从来只有一条。
Again? Do it all over again, exactly as it was? You can try it a million times over, and a million times over it is doomed to the same fate — because there is only one path.
我明白了…青雀，你还真是个有趣的孩子。
Hehe, I see what you're thinking, Qingque... you're an interesting one.
青雀小姐，我刚才偷偷盘算了一下，这道题确实只有一个解答。
Qingque, I've been thinking through the calculations for this puzzle — there really is only one solution.
这是犀焰设计的迷局…没用的，其中没有第二种解法。只要我们还在和它纠缠于所谓的「命运游戏」，它就是不可战胜的。
This maze was designed by Keralum. It's no use — there aren't any other solutions. As long as we're playing this so-called game of destiny, we can't win.
不，其中存在第二种选择。各位，永远都会有选择的。
No, there's a second choice. There will always be another choice.
{NICKNAME}, quick, say something to persuade her...
I see where she's going with this...
我也不知道她有什么打算…
