I have no clue what she's thinking...
这个沙盘当然有第二种解法。{NICKNAME}，接下来，我要说出我的念头。
Of course there's another solution to this sandbox. {NICKNAME}, listen to my idea.
There is more than one path...
虽然不知道青雀小姐会如何解决眼前这个问题，但判官不惜一切也要完成使命。
Miss Qingque, I don't know how you're planning to solve the puzzle... but I'll support this squad to the end...
算我一个，青雀小姐一定是想到了什么妙招。
Count me in. I'm sure Miss Qingque has something up her sleeve.
If we can help, I'm in.
需要的人手不多，两个就行。
I only need two people for my plan to work.
{NICKNAME}，能请你去沙盘上…大概那边那个位置上站一下吗？
{NICKNAME}, you go stand in the sandbox... right about that spot over there.
接下来，要麻烦判官小姐在另一边那个位置上站定就好，别发抖喔。
Next, Judge Huohuo, you stand on the other side — and stop shaking!
很好，这下第二条道路就出现了。
And now the second path appears.
被犀焰附身的太卜大人似乎比平时更容易生气，现在还是不要招惹她了。
The Keralum-possessed master diviner seems more easily enraged than she normally is. Maybe now's not the best time to bother her.
就像我为了输得体面一些而不停选择，太卜也在为了某个目标做出她的选择。
Even if I lose, I'll still make choices to lighten the loss — just like the Master Diviner is making choices for her own agenda.
这就是第二种解法，也是第二种选择，我为这个沙盘创造了不同的答案。
This is the other solution — the alternative choice. I created a new solution.
太卜大人，谜题不止你一人可以设计，而命运的道路上也绝不只有我一个人独行。
Master Diviner, you're not the only one who can design a puzzle, and I don't tread the path of destiny alone.
哼，哈哈哈哈…你以为唤人相助，就凭空创造了第二条道路？
...Hahahaha... you think that by calling on your companions for help, you created a new path out of thin air?
你不过是在偷换概念。这样的路线我可以为你编织出千条万条，可它们通向的是同一个尽头，这样的选择又有什么意义？
You're just playing with semantics. I could weave a thousand routes for you, but they lead to the same destination — so what significance is there in having a choice?
你根本不明白青雀的意思。
You don't even understand what Qingque is saying.
妖物，你呀你，完全不懂人类。
Creatures like you don't understand humans.
宇宙嘛，就像牌桌上的琼玉牌一样。洗牌完毕时，胜负大势往往早已注定。
The universe is like jade tiles on a game table. When the tiles are shuffled, the outcome is already predetermined.
虽然桌上打出了什么牌，牌山上还剩什么牌，旁边的人想做什么牌型，这些统统都是能算的。可是如果只有计算，一切就没那味儿了。

Which tiles can be played, which tiles are leftover, what kind of hand the person next to you is trying to make — all of these can be determined through calculations. But if everything is just a calculation, the game loses its flavor.
随机应变，兵来将挡，曲曲折折，山穷水复。是一些些计算，一些些未知，一些些失控构成了琼玉牌，也就是生活的真趣。

Randomness and adaptability, ambushing your opponent, twists and turns, the balance of the elements — it's a mix of calculations, unknowns, and loss of complete control that makes Celestial Jade the kind of game it is — and those are the same things that give life its color and vibrance.
如果眼前有个必输之局，我在牌桌上的「选择」就没有任何意义吗？不对，选择就是意义本身。
Do my "choices" at the game table mean nothing if I have a sure loss in front of me? No — the choices are what make the game meaningful in the first place.
你刚才说了吧，太卜必须日复一日、日复一日地捋清纷繁复杂的命运之线，才能保全这座巨舰。
You were right when you said that as Master Diviner, you must comb through the complex threads of destiny day after day, all for the preservation of this giant ship.
在宇宙这场只有输家的牌局里，她不停选择不停挣扎，只为了能让罗浮仙舟多向前航行一秒。嘿嘿，她真是我心目中最棒的牌手。

In this vast universe — a game where there are only losers — our Master Diviner is making endless choices, fighting against the odds just so the Luofu can safely travel for another day. Hehe, in my book she's the best player there is.
像太卜这样的人，又怎么会为命中注定的困惑而无端自寻烦恼呢？
Why would someone as talented as the Master Diviner go through the trouble of making endless choices if the end result is predetermined?
岁阳，你不能理解人类的乐趣。你被囚禁在了命定论的幻觉中无法解脱，所以你希望每一个窥探未来的人都要承受和你相同的痛苦。

Heliobus, you cannot fathom the joys of humanity. You are imprisoned by the illusion of destiny, unable to free yourself, and you want everyone who peeks into the future to suffer the same pain as you.
You... You don't understand humans at all.
啊啊啊啊啊！别动摇，符玄！不要抗拒我！不要被这个丫头的花言巧语骗了！
Aghhhhh! Don't let them trick you, Fu Xuan! Don't push me away! Don't let her words fool you!
符玄正在挣脱它的控制！
Fu Xuan is breaking free from their grasp!
驱除幽厉，拿捉精灵。在十王司冥差的协助下，你们封印了「藏月瓠」内岁阳。
Expel evil and capture stray spirits... With the support of the Ten-Lords Commission's spiritfarers, you seal the heliobus within the Lunaumbra Gourd.
我觉得这么找没什么效率……
I don't think searching like this is the best way...
「食客恶鬼缠身闯进餐厅暴饮暴食吃下体重一倍的食物！」…有没有可能是尾巴干的？像它的作风……
"Diner haunted! Evil spirit breaks into restaurant and eats double its body weight in food!" ...Do you think Tail did this? Seems like his style...
这应该单纯是吃霸王餐被抓以后在给自己找借口。
Sounds like a very hungry criminal came up with a very poor excuse...
那这个呢…「限制级恐怖幻戏发生灵异事件！七天内多位租借人厄运缠身！」。
What about this one... "Paranormal activity reported at exclusive horror immersia! Guests experience haunting within seven days of screening!"
这让我想起以前看恐怖幻戏练胆时，尾巴总喜欢在最紧要的地方突然冒出来吓唬我。
It reminds me of when I used to watch horror immersia to train my courage... whenever there was a suspenseful moment, Tail would jump up and scare me.
家人啊，我觉着这应该只是某种恶作剧…也不排除是有人想拿这个当噱头，提升幻戏的销量。
Guys, I feel like this is just some sort of prank... or a marketing stunt to boost ticket sales.
What are you guys up to?
Have we planned out our next steps yet?
藿藿刷了几个时辰的「罗浮杂俎」，每逮着一个可疑事件就问咱们「你说这是不是尾巴干的？」
Huohuo has been browsing Ghostly Grove for hours. Every time she finds a suspicious incident, she says: "Do you think Tail did this?"
尾巴真是日理万机，啥坏事都跟它搭上边了。
The problem is, any suspicious incident could be Tail-related when you think about it...
我有种直觉，尾巴还在。可它要是真的还在，为什么不回来见见我呢？
I feel like Tail is still around... but if so, why didn't he come back to see me?
我也觉得，毕竟被绑在一起这么多年，多多少少得念个旧。就算离开也要回来告别一下嘛。
He was your tail for so many years, I'm sure he'd come back to say hi... or bye.
是啊，妖怪的心思你别猜。尾巴被封印了这许多年，大概就像我一样，突然得到了自由，铁定会有一段时间到处乱跑的。
That's right — we can't really know what a heliobus is thinking, right? Tail was sealed away for ages and then suddenly let free... If it were me, I'd want some away time.
当大哥大姐的，还得多多包容，耐心等待呀。
You'll just have to be a little patient.
不过，就算失去了尾巴，藿藿一样是个厉害的判官呀，咱们这么多次行动的成功不就证明了这一点。
Anyway, even if you don't find Tail, you're still a great judge — the success of our ghost-hunting squad proves it.
唔，谢谢你，桂小姐。你这样夸我，我、我真的很不好意思。如果没有你们的帮助鼓励……
I... Thank you, Miss Gui. I... I don't really get compliments. Without the encouragement of you squad members...
虽然这些日子和你们一起行动，让我渐渐变得更有自信了一些。但也总是不自觉地想起尾巴还在的日子……
Ahem. Working with you guys has made me feel a little more confident... but it's hard not to think about the days when Tail was still around...
那时候我只是个没用的胆小鬼，一有风吹草动就要躲起来。尾巴总是一边嘴臭我，一边帮我解决麻烦……
Back then I was a useless coward — I'd hide at the first sign of trouble. Tail would always complain about it... but he'd also get me out of danger.
有点我哥那意思了，唉呀，真是孽缘呐。
Reminds me of me and my brother — sort of a love-hate relationship.
Come to laugh at me again, have you, little brat?
不过我现在没心情听你说话，一边儿呆着去。
I'm not in the mood for your chatter — go away!
这…会是尾巴闹出来的事吗？
Is this... something Tail would do?
尾巴的话题先放在一边…这这这肯定是岁阳作乱啊！
Tail or no Tail — it's definitely the work of a heliobus!
咱们抓紧出发吧，晚了可就麻烦了。
Let's hurry up and get to the scene — there'll be trouble to pay if we're too late.
Shouldn't we talk to Cirrus first?
没这个时间了家人。浮烟也许知道些什么，但等咱们问完话过去，黄花菜都凉了！
We don't have time for that. Even if Cirrus does know something, by the time we've finished asking questions, it'll be too late!
各位，行动时请务必小心，这很可能是个有强烈攻击性的岁阳。
Be careful everyone — this sounds like a very aggressive heliobus.
我刚刚领悟了一招！便用这招来了结你的性命！
I just learned a new technique — I'll use it to end your life!
无关人员切勿靠近，这里很危险！
Unauthorized personnel should keep their distance — it's dangerous here!
其实咱们…也不算无关人员对吧，判官大人？
Actually, we're... not really unauthorized, are we, Judge?
你是…素裳？判官…你怎么和十王司的人走在一起了？
Is that... Sushang? And a judge... Why are the Ten-Lords Commission here?
解释起来实在费时费力，咱们先处理眼前的问题吧。
It's a very long story, so let's deal with the problem at hand first.
云骑大哥，眼下这儿由十王司的人接管了，请你配合。
Mr. Cloud Knight sir, the Ten-Lords Commission will handle this. Thank you for your cooperation.
我明白了，也请判官大人手下留情。
Understood... Please, take mercy on him.
Don't worry, this sort of thing is our specialty.
一番搏斗后，你们制住了狂乱的云骑。
After a struggle, you subdue the crazed Cloud Knight.
倒是不危及性命，只是他手足痉挛，语无伦次，似乎正处于某种无法摆脱的妄想中。
His life isn't in danger, but his hands and feet are spasming... and his speech is incoherent. I think he's experiencing a delusion that he can't snap out of.
我感觉…像是被抽干了力气……
I feel... like I've been drained of my strength...
这位云骑大哥，你还好吗？能回答我几个问题吗？还记得自己身上到底发生了什么事情吗？
Mr. Cloud Knight sir, are you okay? Can you answer a few questions for me? Do you remember what happened to you?
我隐约记得一些…让我回忆回忆……
I... I think so... Let me think for a moment...
今天接报，说丹鼎司这儿有孽物出没，队长派我来清剿。不过，之后的事情…简直、简直就像是做了个梦，太奇怪了。
I received a report today about an infestation of abominations here at the Alchemy Commission — the captain sent me to clear it out. What happened after that was like a dream... I can't explain it.
我的武器突然对我开口说话了…它指点我武艺，说我这一招徒有其表，那一式走了力气，它让我放松身体，由它来帮我舞刀杀敌。

My weapon suddenly started talking to me... it taught me fighting techniques — which moves to avoid, which moves to use, which stances to adopt to retain balance... then it told me to relax and let it take control against the enemy.
怎么跟我娘一样…不是，我是说，这件事果然和岁阳有关！
That sounds just like... a heliobus!
我按它的指示，由它指挥，竟然觉得自己武艺大有长进。可它却说，我实在是资质驽钝，朽木一块。他要另收一名弟子，将自己的技艺发扬光大。

I followed its instructions... To my surprise, it felt like my combat skills had greatly improved. Still, it told me I was incompetent, like a piece of rotten wood. It wanted to find a new apprentice to carry forward the art.
我这才发现，身边不知什么时候多了个佩剑的孩子，正盯着我瞧。
It was only then that I realized — there was a sword-wielding child beside me, staring right at me.
你的武器想收那个孩子为徒？
Your weapon wanted to take the child as your apprentice?
罗浮上自幼习武的孩子倒是有不少，但要说能佩剑行走的孩子——
Lots of children grow up learning to use a sword on the Luofu, but for a child to be walking around with one...
…希望不是咱俩想一块的那个人。
...I sure hope we're not thinking of the same person.
我这才发现，那孩子竟然是将军的高足，彦卿小弟。
I realized the boy was the General's retainer, Yanqing.
我听到我的刀这么说，心中满是不服气，不知怎么地，居然就…就对彦卿兄弟出手了。
When I heard my sword say the name, I was in disbelief... and then, for some reason, I just... attacked Yanqing.
你没事吧？你该问这位云骑伤着了没。
Are YOU alright? You should be asking the Cloud Knight.
我没事。可笑我连他的动作都没看清，就倒在了地上。
Yes, I'm fine. The funny thing is that I didn't even see him move — I just fell straight to the ground.
我猜你们两都安然无恙…
Seems like you both came out unscathed...
是他手下留情了。可笑我连他的动作都没看清，就倒在了地上。
He must have spared me. The funny thing is that I didn't even see him move — I just fell straight to the ground.
随后，我就瞧见了极其古怪的场面，彦卿兄弟仿佛在和他手里的剑说着话一般，头也不回地转身离开了。而我…我手中的武器却再也不开口了。

What happened next was even more outlandish — Yanqing looked like he was talking to the sword in his hand. He turned around and left without looking back. And my weapon... my weapon never spoke again.
I'll take care of the Cloud Knight. You go after Yanqing!
一柄霜蓝色的短剑破空嗡鸣，犹如失了方向的飞燕。
它仿佛觉察到你们的来意，迅速靠近，绕着你们急旋。
Upon detecting your presence, it approaches and starts flying in circles around you.
Is that a new cycrane model!?
这是彦卿小哥的佩剑，我在云骑演武时曾见过他挥舞过。
It's Yanqing's sword — I saw him wield it one time when I was doing drills with the Cloud Knights.
这把剑似乎在呼唤咱们…
It seems to be calling us...
听说彦卿小哥的武器是工造司打造的名器，与主人彼此有感应。主人进退闪躲时，宝剑也会像有灵般随心运转，绝不离身。
I heard that Yanqing's sword is a famous weapon crafted by the Artisanship Commission. It resonates with its master — reacting to his movements in battle like it has a mind of its own.
他一定是遇到了什么凶险，这剑才会跑出来寻人报信的吧？
He must have encountered some kind of danger... and his sword flew away to find someone to help, right?
遇、遇到凶险…素裳小姐，你可不要吓我呀。以那个天才少年的剑术，有什么妖物能伤到他？
D—Danger...? Miss Sushang, don't scare me like that — what kind of evil would be strong enough to pose a threat to Yanqing?
我不知道啊，毕竟岁阳这样的怪东西，再锋利的剑也斩不开嘛。
I'm not sure, but the heliobi are strange creatures — even the sharpest sword can't cut them.
我有一个猜测，不知当不当讲。
Uh-oh. I just had a thought...
不吉利的话还是不要讲了！
If it's not auspicious, you'd best not say it out loud!
从刚才那位云骑大哥的遭遇来看，危险的怕不是彦卿，而是……
Based on what that Cloud Knight said, it isn't that Yanqing's in danger...
It's that Yanqing has become the danger?
跟上这把剑。无论如何，都要在事态恶化前找到彦卿小哥。
Follow the sword. No matter what, we have to find Yanqing before things get even worse.
一具孽物的遗体，上面只有一道剑痕。
The body of an abomination, with only a single sword cut on it.
在一切失控前，咱们得快些赶上他。
We've got to catch up with him before things get out of hand.
死兽的眼眸中还凝有一丝惊骇，仿佛不能置信人类的动作可以如此之快。
The eyes of the slain beast still contained a hint of astonishment, as if seemingly unable to believe the speed of which humans were capable.
此刻渡口浪急风涌，如有刀剑交错铮錝。
The waves ride on the howling wind, bashing the ford with great intensity.
剑悬在空中，指向位于波月古海上遥遥相望的彼处。你们什么也看不清。
Yanqing's sword hangs in the air, pointing to the distance across the Lunarescent Depths.
这里是前往祈龙坛的渡船口。看剑的意思…彦卿小哥应该就在祈龙坛上。
This is the dock for Dragonprayer Terrace. Judging by the sword's behavior... that's where Yanqing is.
咱们真的要这么莽上去吗？就算没有岁阳寄体，彦卿小哥也是云骑中一等一的剑士哎。
Should we really be charging over there? Even without a heliobus, Yanqing is a swordsmaster among swordsmasters.
裳裳，你怕啦？不过，这一回的岁阳也许不比之前那几只，看起来会几手狠活儿，我也怕得很。
A—Are you scared, Sushang? Me too... Compared to the other heliobi we've dealt with so far, this one seems like it could do some serious damage.
胡说什么呢，我娘打从我能走路起就开始教我练剑。虽然不比将军的爱徒，但临阵怯战岂不是辱没了云骑的名头和家传的剑。

Scared? Hmph! My mother taught me swordplay as soon as I could walk. I might not be as good as the general's apprentice, but I would never let cowardice dishonor the name of the Cloud Knights or the family sword...
不过我心里确实是有一丝害怕的。怕万一寄宿在他身上的岁阳凶性大发，我保护不了你们几个。
...but I am worried... If the heliobus possessing Yanqing is too strong, I'm afraid I might not be able to guarantee everyone's safety.
打从这次十王司的行动以来，将军始终在背后支持着我们。该是咱们回报他的时候了。
The General has been supporting our ghost-hunting squad from the very beginning — it's time to return the favor.
即便不为这个，身为判官也不能令岁阳占夺这个孩子的身体，令他犯下将来后悔莫及的大错。
Even if it wasn't for the general's sake, as a judge, I can't let a heliobus take over someone as dangerous as Yanqing.
素裳，桂小姐，还有{NICKNAME}，请各位助我一臂之力。
Sushang, Miss Gui, {NICKNAME}, please help me rescue him.
Let's catch a ferry and head for Dragonprayer Terrace.
眼下彦卿小哥就在祈龙坛上，{NICKNAME}，咱们走吧。
Yanqing is at Dragonprayer Terrace. {NICKNAME}, let's go.
Let's catch a ferry and head for Dragonprayer Terrace.
裳裳，我的裳裳，她怎么那么傻……
Sushang, my bestie... why is she so stubborn...?
但她替咱们挡住彦卿时，背影真的好迷人。
Still, that was pretty freaking cool...
根据冥差消息，将军正在绥园里偷闲呢，咱们得加快脚步，把将军找来！
A spiritfarer told me that the General is still in Fyxestroll Garden — let's hurry!
眼下恐怕只有他才能让彦卿小哥从幻障中恢复过来吧？
I think the only one that can break Yanqing's illusion is Jing Yuan himself...
{NICKNAME}，怎么了？为何一副上气不接下气的样子？
{NICKNAME}, is something the matter? You seem out of breath.
你们向景元讲述了在祈龙坛上的遭遇。
You tell Jing Yuan what happened on Dragonprayer Terrace.
以指点剑法为名左右人心的岁阳？要是能代我因材施教，倒也不错，可惜这妖物胜负心太重，对彦卿这孩子来说实在棘手。

A heliobus that creates illusions for the sole purpose of instructing someone in swordplay? I wouldn't mind learning a few tricks from them myself... Unfortunately, it sounds like this one is a little too aggressive to be a decent sparring partner. This is not an adversary that someone as young as Yanqing is equipped to deal with.
那么将军，咱们立刻出发吧？如果晚了，素裳恐怕……
General, we need to move fast — if we wait any longer, I'm afraid that Sushang might be—
嗯，我明白。但在离开前，我有问题要问从旁偷听的浮烟，这位「熔炬」想必你认识吧？
I can understand your sense of urgency. But before I leave, I have a question for Cirrus, who has been listening this whole time — I trust you are familiar with Apyra...
那是自然。它可是「燎原」的武胆，也是咱们这些碎片中最好斗的一份。不过嘛，这位叫作「彦卿」的剑客是谁？
Naturally. Among the heliobi, Apyra manifests the courage and warring spirit of Ignamar — they are the most aggressive of all the fragments... but who is this swordmaster? Who is Yanqing?
嘻嘻，难怪我在你身上嗅到了一丝悲伤的味道。哦——我懂了，为了援救无能的弟子，师父不得不亲自上阵交锋吗？真羡慕「熔炬」呀。
Hee-hee, no wonder I smell a hint of sadness in you... In order to rescue his incompetent apprentice, the master must fight on the battlefield himself? I must say, I'm very envious of Apyra...
你只知道「悲伤其味」，却不知「悲伤何谓」。弟子执着于胜负迷了心窍，试图提升剑艺却选择了捷径，这是作为师父的失责，也是我悲伤的原因。

You know the flavor of sadness, but not its meaning. An apprentice obsessed with victory and defeat has lost his mind to a heliobus, and is now trying to shortcut his way to mastery of the sword. This is my failure to him as a master, and the source of the grief you see in me now.
我劝你别在这里假装悠闲，熔炬杀性极重，一旦被它役使，六亲不认，何况是师父。
Then you should hurry — Apyra has an insatiable bloodlust. Once they've enslaved your mind, they can make you turn against your friends, your kin... even your own master.
你们快走吧，我就不耽误你们师徒相残啦。
Go. I don't wish to delay your deathmatch with your apprentice.
祈龙坛上的素裳姑娘还在等着，{NICKNAME}，咱们走吧。
Sushang is awaiting our timely arrival at Dragonprayer Terrace. {NICKNAME}, let's go.
驱除幽厉，拿捉精灵。在十王司冥差的协助下，你们封印了「藏月瓠」内岁阳。
Expel evil and capture stray spirits... With the support of the Ten-Lords Commission's spiritfarers, you seal the heliobus within the Lunaumbra Gourd.
真是险象环生的一战，幸亏有素裳小姐在。
Phew, th—that was a big risk, Miss Sushang...
其实啊我的斤两我心里清楚得很，如果不是彦卿小哥分神抗拒了那个岁阳的蛊惑，也许我就撑不到你们搬来救兵了。
Actually, I'm well aware of my own limits. If it weren't for Yanqing resisting that heliobus, maybe I wouldn't have been able to hold on until you brought reinforcements.
所以为什么是三个人搬救兵？
...Why did it take three people to get reinforcements?
当时需要让咱们都撤退吗？
...Was it crucial for ALL of us to retreat?
我也好奇。搬来救兵最多也只用得上一个人，你该把{NICKNAME}这样的战力留在那儿帮你一把才对。
Come to think of it... we only needed one person to fetch reinforcements... Why didn't we get {NICKNAME} to stay behind with you...? And why didn't you ask!?
……嘿嘿，说来有些不好意思。那时候，热血上头，就没考虑那么多。
...Hehe, it's kinda embarassing but... I was caught up in the moment — I guess I never thought it through...
让我说你什么好，你这热血脑瓜子，多半是得去丹鼎司挂号看看了。
Sometimes I wonder whether your head's screwed on right. We need to take you to the Alchemy Commission for a check-up.
这不是为了保护你们三位嘛…藿藿小姐需要人保护；而小桂子你一个普通群众…犯不着冒这么大的风险；至于{NICKNAME}吗，也是神策府的贵客，要是有个三长两短，可算是外交事件了…

Maybe, but my actions kept everyone safe, and that's what matters! Miss Huohuo needed someone to look out for her, and Little Gui is just a civilian — you shouldn't be putting yourself in risky situations. As for {NICKNAME}, {M#he's}{F#she's} a distinguished guest of the Seat of Divine Foresight — if anything were to happen to {M#him}{F#her}, it could turn into a diplomatic crisis.
算来算去，只有我一个留下最妥当嘛。
After weighing things up in my head, it made the most sense for only me to stay put.
要是尾巴还在的话…我也不会这么拖累大家了。
I—If I still had my tail... I wouldn't be slowing everyone down...
怪、怪我嘴笨，藿藿你别在意我的胡话。
Sorry Huohuo, I didn't think it through. You were never a burden.
不是素裳小姐的问题…我在想，失去了尾巴后，像我这样的普通人又能在十王司的事务里坚持多久呢？
It's not your fault Miss Sushang, it's just... I've been wondering — how can someone average like me keep up with the affairs of the Ten-Lords Commission without my tail?
……算了，不烦恼了。明天也许有更危险的任务，请各位好好休息。
...Forget it. We should get some rest — there could be even bigger dangers waiting for us tomorrow.
总能找到尾巴的，别太担心了。
You can always find Tail. Don't worry too much about it.
剩下的情报就在群聊里同步吧…
Let's sync up the rest of the intel in the group chat...
祈龙坛上…为什么会有这么多剑？
What are all these swords doing in Dragonprayer Terrace...?
一定是岁阳生成的幻觉…
It must be a heliobus illusion...
咱们现在是不是该摇一摇铃铛，看看能不能和困在幻境里的彦卿小哥对上话？
Shouldn't we ring the Harmonic Chime and see if we can talk to Yanqing inside the illusion?
既然各位能看得见它，岂不是意味着你们也堕入了幻境中？
Since each of you can see it, wouldn't that mean you'd fallen into the illusion as well?
不必惊慌。在我看来，这座剑阵可是真实不虚的武库宝藏。只要抬头观望其中的任意一柄剑，便有千般招式在我眼中伸展演绎，无穷无尽，远超彦卿过去的所知所学。
Don't be alarmed. To me, these swords form a precious arsenal. When I gaze upon any one, a thousand sword fights dance before my eyes — the swordplay far exceeding anything I have learned.
何况，它似乎来者不拒，欢迎所有想要追求更高境界的人前来一窥。
And better yet, they welcome those who wish to pursue higher realms with open arms.
A heliobus is leading you astray.
我知道，这是岁阳幻化所成的心像。将军遣我配合十王司的行动，你们的事情我也略知一二。
I know that this is an illusion created by a heliobus. The General sent me to assist the Ten-Lords Commission — I know a thing or two about your work...
这些天外灵火并无善恶，就像镜面映照，只要人类自身心境澄澈，就能不受其蛊惑。
These cosmic flames are not good nor evil, they are simply a mirror... As long as a host's mind is clear, a heliobus cannot control them.
比如眼下的我，心无旁骛，从这剑阵中看到了变强的可能。对吧，「熔炬」老师？
Take me, for example... At this moment, I am free of all distractions... and I see the potential for greatness in these swords. Isn't that right, Master Apyra?
它能传授的可不只有剑术。只要想变得更强，这座剑阵总能让你看到数不清的方法，我说的对吧，「熔炬」老师？
Swordsmanship isn't the only thing you can learn. As long as you want to become stronger, these swords will show you countless ways to do so. Isn't that right, Master Apyra?
The general sent us to bring you back...
将军？你说谎。我在丹鼎司的任务已经完成，并未收到其他命令。
The General? You lie. I've already finished my assignment at the Alchemy Commission. I have no further orders...
眼下是彦卿自由支配的时间。趁此良机，我想在这座剑阵中向「熔炬」老师求教参详所学。
This is my own time. I came here to learn from Master Apyra... to learn from these swords.
「熔炬」？那个岁阳的名字叫做「熔炬」？
Apyra? That heliobus's name is Apyra?
是啊，熔炬老师答应在此为我展示我剑法中的漏洞，以及如何更上层楼的方法。因此我将「熔炬」老师带到了祈龙坛。这儿曾是彦卿重重受挫的地方。

Correct. Master Apyra promised to show me the flaws in my swordplay, and how to take it to the next level. That's why I brought them to Dragonprayer Terrace... where I suffered my most serious setback...
少年，有我在，一切便不同了。
Young one, with me, everything will be different.
无论是饮月龙尊，还是那名星核猎手，抑或是那名传你剑招的女子，你的成就将远超彼等，无可限量。
Whether it be Imbibitor Lunae, the Stellaron Hunters, or that woman, your accomplishments will exceed them. You will be matchless, without limits.
几位来得正好，我刚刚自剑阵中有了些体悟，不如就以你们几位作为砥石，试试它的锋芒？
You're just in time. The swords have taught me something already... I'd like to see how sharp my skills have become...
诸位的技艺实在粗疏，再打下去也毫无意义……
Their skills are nothing compared to mine... what can I learn from any of them...
既然如此，何不动手斩了他们？
Then why not hack them down right here?
斩了…他们？我以为刚才只是一场比试而已。
Hack... them down? I thought we were just sparring.
胜生败死，战场的法则和宇宙的法则一样，并无区别。剑术是胜利的艺术，只有胜出的剑才能传承下去，败北的剑全都埋于荒冢之间了。

The laws of the battlefield are no different from the laws of the universe — life for victory and death for defeat. Swordsmanship is the art of victory, and only the victorious swords can be passed on — swords defeated are buried among the barren wastelands.
你在抗拒我？无谓的仁慈。若不能抛下这些杂念，你又如何能向前更进一步！举剑！
You're resisting me? Tsk, rid yourself of these needless notions of clemency. How can you move forward without casting these distractions aside! Raise your sword!
哼哼，好个胜生败死，扮出一副前辈高人的模样，侃侃而谈品评什么剑法高低。其实不过是把人当棋子随意使唤，利用别人的好胜心满足杀欲的坏东西……

Hmph, "life for victory and death for defeat," huh? All this talk of laws of the battlefield and the universe — you think that gives the appearance of a grand master? You're just using someone else's ambition to satisfy your own desire to shed blood.
我手中这柄轩辕剑是家传之物，我娘把它交给我时对我说：「剑客折纸不可多」。平日里我总是在想，这话到底什么意思？

This Xuanyuan Sword in my hand has been passed down through my family for generations. When my mother gave it to me, she said: "The bread may bake, but the hearth remains..." and for a long time I had no idea what she was talking about.
今天这当口，我算是想明白了，她想说的该不会是「剑可折，志不可夺」吧？
Today I just realized I misheard her. I think she actually said: "The edge may break, but the heart remains..." probably.
彦卿骁卫，刚才的战斗咱们还没分出胜负啊。可不要给姐姐自说自话，说什么「再打下去毫无意义」的定论啊！
Lieutenant Yanqing, the winner and loser of this battle have yet to be determined. Don't give me that "there's no point in fighting any longer" speech!
哈哈哈，这个女娃娃的斗志当真滚烫灼人啊！既然她执意要战，少年，你会回应吗？
Hahaha, this little wench's fighting spirit is on fire! Young one, since she insists on fighting, will you give her our answer?
这是云骑同袍间的事情了。败了倒也没什么，但抛弃同僚，令云骑蒙羞，岂不是愧对我手中的剑？
This is between fellow Cloud Knights. Losing a fight isn't a big deal, but if I abandon my fellow soldiers and bring dishonor to the Knights, how could I wield my sword again?
虽说我估摸着自己也许撑不了几招。你们快去把将军找来！在他赶到之前，我绝不会轻易倒下的！
Granted, I might not last more than a few moves. You guys go get the general — quickly! I'll try and hold him off until he gets here!
神策府的骁卫…也不过如此…我本以为你一出剑我就得趴下了。
Lieutenant of the Seat of Divine Foresight... Is that the best you can do? And I was thinking I'd be done for the moment you drew your sword.
没想到…没想到，我竟然能撑到现在。我…我没自己想象的这么菜嘛。
I didn't think... I didn't think I would last this long. I... I'm not half as bad as I thought.
少年，你迟疑了，你一直在迟疑。
Young one, you're hesitating again. You're always hesitating...
对阵实力如此悬殊的剑士，你竟然花费如此之多的时间。身为剑士的你，难道没有一点自尊心吗？折戟于祈龙坛的惨败，难道要再次上演？

Your opponent is no match for you, yet they have managed to fend you off for this long. As a swordsman, have you not any pride? Do you want to repeat the disaster you suffered at Dragonprayer Terrace?
该动手了，只有血能洗去剑上的耻辱。
It's time to finish it. Only blood can cleanse the shame of the sword.
少年，教你用剑的人来了。
Young one, your old teacher has arrived.
在他的教导下，你从未失败，却在最近遭遇了人生中第一次重挫。你原本对剑术的自信摇摇欲坠。
Under his tutelage, you never experienced true failure. But after suffering your first major setback, your confidence in your swordsmanship has been faltering.
你担心将军对你失望。你担心自己没办法成为将军希望你成为的人。
You worry that the General is disappointed in you. You worry that you don't have what it takes to be the person the General wants you to be.
来吧，向他展示我教你的那些招式，他一定非常高兴看到你的长进。告诉他，你会用接下来这一剑，为仙舟赢取胜利！
Now... show him what I have taught you. He'll be very proud of your progress. Tell him that with your sword, you will bring victory to the Xianzhou!
彦卿不会为了向我证明什么而拔剑的。我对他有信心。
Yanqing would never draw his sword on me to prove himself. I have confidence in him.
这份信心并非相信他终将胜利…而是相信他终有一日会从胜负中挣脱出来，意识到自己挥剑的真正理由——为快乐也好，为救人也好，为杀敌也好……

This confidence is not a belief that he will win every contest... It is a belief that he will one day break free from the paradigm of victory and defeat and realize his true reason for wielding the sword... The pleasure of swordsmanship, the saving of life, and the dispatchment of enemies...
这份理由，必须由他自己寻得，没有人能教得了他。眼下，正是他踏出这一步的时刻。
This truth must be discovered by himself — no one can teach it to him. Now is the time for him to take that step.
挣脱胜负？这是安慰死人和失败者的托词！想一想你在祈龙坛上的惨败！想一想那些在死亡边缘徘徊的感觉。

Break free from victory and defeat? Those are just empty words to comfort the dead and the defeated! Think of your crushing defeat at Dragonprayer Terrace! Think of how you felt then — teetering on the brink of death.
倘若那时，星核猎手的剑刺穿了你的身体，你连站在这儿思考胜负意义的机会也不会有。
If the sword of that Stellaron Hunter had pierced your flesh, you wouldn't be standing here pondering the meaning of victory and defeat.
眼下，是你突破自我，击碎所有枷锁的时刻。向老师——向试图困住你的将军…拔剑！
Now is the time to break all your chains. Draw your sword on your master — to the general who is trying to imprison you... draw your sword!
将军…请允许我…展示剑术。我在此向你发起挑战……
General... allow me... to demonstrate my swordsmanship. I hereby challenge you...
……「熔炬」老师！我在此向这座剑阵，向你，发起挑战！
Apyra! I challenge you! I challenge these swords, to battle!
真是辜负了我的一番苦心啊，小鬼。你的成就本来无可限量。可惜，你有太多无谓的念头。
...Young fool, how disappointing. Your accomplishments would have been limitless... but you were led astray by empty idealism.
不过，这一切都不重要了。在引导你的同时，我也对你的一招一式了如指掌了。
None of that matters anymore. While teaching you, I studied your every move inside out...
既然你向我发起挑战，我自当应战。我要用你的形象和招式，来为你上这最后一课！
...and now you wish to throw down the gauntlet. Very well. In your own image and with your own techniques, I will teach you one final lesson!
One hit, one stroke of luck, one victory.
呼，总算一切平安，也该是把这家伙收进葫芦里的时候了。
Phew. It's about time we got this guy into the gourd.
我年纪大，你行行好，煽情的话就别再说了。
I know what you wish to say Yanqing. We can move past the melodrama.
那我还是要感谢各位，竭尽所能将我从迷障中解脱出来…尤其是素裳小姐……
Then... to the rest of you, thank you — for bringing me out of that daze... Especially you, Miss Sushang.
嗨呀，每个被岁阳蛊惑的人怎么都那么热爱道歉啊。明明都是受害者，明明这一切都要怪那些到处乱跑的坏家伙。
Why does everyone that gets "heliobused" love to apologize for it? You're the victim here. They're the ones stirring up chaos.
倒是我，得多谢你在比剑时挣扎和手下留情了……
It should be me thanking you for holding back during our battle...
不过也说不准，可能是最近我的水平兔飞猛进来着？藿藿，小桂子，{NICKNAME}，你们说说，是不是，是不是啊？
Or maybe, just maybe, it's due to a sudden skill improvement? Don't you think?
When you're not passed out in fear, you're pretty good.
嗯嗯，只要醒着，咱们裳裳还是非常靠谱的。
Haha, right — conscious Sushang is pretty badass.
A little pleased with yourself, aren't you...?
能在将军高足的手底下有来有回，撑上这么久，换我我也骄傲。
She went toe-to-toe with the general's star pupil! I'd be pretty pleased with myself, too.
不行，我得给你在罗浮邸报上买个头版广告，好好吹嘘一番。
We're gonna need to get you a front page news story for this one. Heck, let's get some billboards!
你们…这一天天地把损我当日常任务是吧？
So you've made it your daily mission to tease me, huh?
关于此事，诸位打算如何在「罗浮杂俎」上发布？毕竟事涉神策府…希望各位能……
With respect to this incident, what is your plan for posting on the Luofu's Ghostly Grove? Since it concerns the Seat of Divine Foresight, I am hoping you could...
那个啊…那个…容我和{NICKNAME}商量一下。
Well, about that... let me discuss it with {NICKNAME} first.
与桂乃芬商量一下发布内容…
Fancy a chat about our next upload?
Sounds good. Let's have a think about it.
辛苦两位老师替我遮掩，彦卿惭愧不已。
Thanks for covering for me... I'm so embarrassed.
一切平安无事，为免夜长梦多，咱们赶紧回去把这个岁阳装进束形却邪阵吧，以这家伙的危险程度，我、我有些怕它跑了！
All's well that ends well. We should hurry back and lock Apyra in the Evil Binding Matrix... They're a dangerous one — I'm afraid they might escape!
那么，我和彦卿向各位告辞了。
Well then, Yanqing and I will take our leave now.
Alright, let's get out of here!
彦卿学艺不精，屡次败北…
My skills are lacking... I've been through countless defeats...
有熔炬老师的指点，我一定有所精进！
...but with Apyra as my master — no longer!
各位，剑斗须得心诚意正，请全力以赴。
A swordfight must be fought with sincerity of heart and mind... Give it your all!
快醒醒，彦卿骁卫！我们不想和你战斗啊？
Lieutenant Yanqing, snap out of it! We don't want to fight you!
是彦卿任性…还请几位陪我一起对上几招！
But I want to fight you... and we're just getting started!
你的剑法，我已悉数牢记。
Your swordplay, every stroke and sway — I've committed it all to memory.
由我来你施展给你瞧瞧…
在无情的剑意之下，它们会有何等威力。
...with merciless intent, how powerful I am.
Conceal your form and hide your intentions, don't fall for their distractions.
看来人到齐了。本该向藿藿汇报的冥差们说，今日未曾见过藿藿的踪影。
It appears we are all present. The spiritfarers who were supposed to report to Huohuo mentioned they didn't see her today.
开门见山地说吧，小女子不知道藿藿到哪儿去了。不过，聚在一处，我们至少可以梳理线索——你们几位走得很近，还记得昨日藿藿有什么异常吗？

I'll get straight to the point — I have no idea where Huohuo may be. However, if we combine our efforts we may be able to piece together some clues. Each of you are close to Huohuo, did you notice anything unusual about her yesterday?
She was concerned about her Tail.
藿藿小姐和我们一起行动，除了完成职责外，也想搜寻尾巴的线索。
Yeah, Miss Huohuo has been trying to track down Tail — in addition to helping the squad, that is.
It seems like there's something weighing on her mind lately.
自从尾巴没了以后，藿藿看起来始终有些闷闷不乐的。
She's been down in the dumps ever since she lost Tail.
她认为自己拖累了咱们。
She thinks she's slowing us down.
自从成为判官起，藿藿时不时萌生出想要退却离职的意思。她或许认为自己配不上判官的职务。
Since becoming a judge, Huohuo has often thought about resigning. She thinks she might not be cut out for the task.
按我的观察，在尾巴失踪后，她的这个念头更强烈了。
If you ask me, after she lost Tail, I think her urge to resign became even more apparent.
对了，有没有可能，今天藿藿突然得到了关于尾巴的线索…这样一来，以她的性格一定会去找回尾巴的。
What if Huohuo came across a lead today — something that sounded like Tail's doing...? Knowing her, she's probably gone looking for him...
但是藿藿既没有找你们，也没有来找我。这很反常。
...And yet she didn't come to any of us for help. That's not like her.
以藿藿的性格，假设她得到了「线索」，她多半会向外求援。但…如果她没有向我们任何人提及此事，唯有一种可能。
Given the type of person she is, if she did have any clues, she would seek out our help. If she hasn't shared anything with us, it means there is only one possibility.
嗯，我已经有了怀疑对象。
Correct. And I think I might know who the culprit is.
我想经历这几日的行动，各位应该很明白，藿藿早已同你们合作无间了。我很难想象她会独自一人行动。除非有人蒙骗了她……

After working together for the last few days, it is clear that Huohuo has already formed a close bond with each of you. It is hard for me to imagine she would simply wander off on her own... Unless someone deceived her...
她有不得已独自行动的原因。
She must have some reason for acting alone...
嗯，也许有人用尾巴的消息蒙骗了她，并且告诉她「只能一个人去」。嗯嗯，很像是某些绑票的坏家伙会用的招数。
Right, maybe someone deceived her with news about Tail — told her "she could only go alone." Sounds like a trick some nasty kidnapper would use.
浮烟…唯一能知晓尾巴下落的，只有因为它的融入而功败垂成的浮烟。
Cirrus... The only one who may have knowledge of Tail's whereabouts is Cirrus... whose plans were foiled due to Tail's actions.
就算浮烟不知道，要说这里谁最打算使坏，也只有可能是那家伙了。
Even if Cirrus doesn't know where Tail is, given the shared history, they wouldn't hesitate to cause trouble...
走吧，审问浮烟，务必要从它嘴里撬出些什么。
Let's go, we must try to squeeze some answers out of Cirrus.
瞧瞧，几只虫子气势汹汹冲我而来，嗡嗡嗡。想问什么就问吧。
Well, well, insects who don't know when to quit. I sense you have questions... Go on, ask away.
藿藿不见了，你这坏东西一定知道点什么，对吧！
Huohuo is missing, and I'm willing to bet you know something about it!
你们离心离德，连自己的同伴离开都毫不知情，为什么要来找我的麻烦——
How careless... Your companion vanishes right under your noses, and you fail to notice. Why am I the one you're pestering?
她不告而别，显然受人蒙骗。
She left without a word — someone clearly deceived her.
你用尾巴的下落蛊惑了她。
You lied to her about Tail's whereabouts.
十王司虽然无法彻底消灭岁阳，但我们有的是对付岁阳的手段……
The Ten-Lords Commission might not be able to completely eradicate the heliobi, but we have plenty of ways of dealing with them...
你们的手段我都见识过啦，嘻嘻，像我这样劫持人质性命的坏东西，可经受不住您的恐吓。
Ooh, how threatening, hehe... Save your breath, I know your tactics.
不妨把话说开了吧，这件事确实与我有关。
Let's cut to the chase. I do know something about it.
在你们不知道的时候，有一天那个姑娘来问我「知不知道尾巴到哪里去了」，我向她透露了一点线索，她的小脑瓜自然会去拼凑答案。
Believe it or not, while you were distracted, she came and found me. She asked me if I knew where "Mr. Tail" was, and I simply gave her a clue...
当然了，凭她怎么找也一无所获。于是她又来求了我好几遍，你们没看到她那又怕又要问的表情，笑死！
She searched high and low, but came back empty-handed, of course. If only you could have seen her expression — simultaneously terrified and desperate to know more — utterly hilarious!
后来我嫌她烦，我又说「尾巴跟我一样四分五裂了，变成了什么都记不得的小火苗」，你们没看到她脸色吓得煞白，哈哈哈哈！
In the end, I became fed up with her constant nagging. I told her that her beloved Tail had splintered and been reduced to an ember without a single memory... You should've seen her face!
心疼啦？我可没有折磨她太久，我告诉她「尾巴现在躲在流云渡，正准备随星槎逃出仙舟」。
Aw, does it hurt? You'll be pleased to know I didn't drag out the suffering. I told her that her Tail was hiding in Cloudford — preparing to flee the Xianzhou on a starskiff.
我念她心诚，大发慈悲告诉她「尾巴现在躲在流云渡，正准备随星槎逃出仙舟」。
I started feeling sorry for her. Out of pity I told her that her Tail was hiding in Cloudford — preparing to flee the Xianzhou on a starskiff.
我还告诉她，如今十王司正在回收岁阳。如果她求助于你们，就算见到尾巴，它也会被镇入牢狱。显然，她信了……

I also told her that the Ten-Lords Commission was in the process of recapturing all the heliobi. If she were to turn to you for help, "Mr. Tail" would be imprisoned — even if she managed to find him. Looks like she took the bait...
你在说谎，你不可能知道尾巴究竟到哪里去了？
Lies! You can't possibly know where Tail disappeared to!
知不知道两说，但在流云渡那儿却有我的同族等着她，嘻嘻嘻！
Maybe I do, maybe I don't. But I have no doubt about one thing: My friends are ready and waiting for her in Cloudford!
藿藿怎么会如此轻易上当？
How could Huohuo be tricked so easily?
你不也被我骗过吗？哈哈哈哈。
你们要对朋友有信心啊，也许藿藿安然无恙，也许她将那只岁阳顺手降服了呢？也许你们现在赶去流云渡，还能找到她？
You should have faith in your friend... Perhaps Huohuo is safe and sound — perhaps she's managed to subdue the heliobi? If you rush to Cloudford, there's still a chance you might find her...
混蛋！素裳，{NICKNAME}，咱们赶紧到流云渡去找藿藿！
Not good! Sushang, {NICKNAME}, let's head to Cloudford, quickly!
看来案牍工作得搁下了，我和你们一起出发。
The paperwork will have to wait. I'm coming with you.
这下可怎么办？我这就去把丹鼎司的人叫来。
What do we do now? I'll go get help from the Alchemy Commission.
Hold on, let me take a look at her.
寒鸦仔细检查了藿藿的体征。
Hanya carefully examined Huohuo's vital signs.
毫无反应，应是被岁阳劫持了心识。
She's unresponsive. It looks like a heliobus has taken control of her mind.
藿藿长久与岁阳共存，她恐怕早已习惯了这样的状态。尾巴离去后，她的身体对其他岁阳来说，也是处于完全不设防的状态。
Huohuo spent a long time in coexistence with a heliobus — it is likely she became accustomed to that state. With Tail now gone, she was relatively defenseless against other heliobi.
Should we try using the Harmonic Chime?
这并非岁阳编织的幻境迷障，而是封闭了五感，将人类彻底与外界的信息隔绝。这样一来，连能融入幻境的火铃也毫无用武之地了。
This isn't just a heliobus illusion, it's a complete sensory barrier — cutting off the individual from the outside world. In this case, even the Harmonic Chime won't work.
这不是丹鼎司医士能处理的情况，我会将藿藿带回十王司，再看看有什么手段。
This isn't something the healers at the Alchemy Commission can handle. I'll take Huohuo back to the Ten-Lords Commission — perhaps they'll have an answer.
另外，捉鬼小队的任务眼下必须暂时中止了。
As for now, I'm temporarily suspending the activities of the ghost-hunting squad.
如今情况已经截然不同，没有判官相助，会让各位深陷危险境地，这与成立小队的初衷不符。
The situation has changed completely. Without the assistance of a judge, continuing would place all of you in grave danger — defeating the purpose of the squad.
可是，寒鸦小姐，这一回的任务是救回我们的朋友啊！
But, Miss Hanya, this is to save our friend!
各位急切的心思我明白，请交给十王司吧，我们自会有法子将这岁阳揪出来。
I know, I understand. But please, let the Ten-Lords Commission deal with this. We'll find a way to extract this heliobus from Huohuo.
寒鸦小姐，请诚实地告诉我，十王司有什么办法吗？
Miss Hanya, tell me straight... Does the Ten-Lords Commission actually have a solution?
Surely the Ten-Lords can fix this?
对啊，浮烟肯定知道岁阳到底能做什么。
Yeah, Cirrus is bound to know what this heliobus is up to.
不行，它坐在绥园中，却将我们一步步引导到如此境地。在没有搞明白它的意图之前，我们不能再听之任之了。
No, we shouldn't do what they expect us to. They've been manipulating us from Fyxestroll Garden all along. We need to find out what they really want before we go any further.
We are not completely out of options.
让另一只岁阳帮助我们除魔，驱逐占夺了藿藿心智的家伙。
It might be possible to use another heliobus to drive out the one that seized Huohuo's mind.
可是怎么可能有岁阳愿意帮助人类，等等——寒鸦小姐的意思是？
But why would a heliobus ever want to help people? Wait... Miss Hanya, do you mean to say that...
寒鸦自袖中取出藏月瓠。
Hanya produces the Lunaumbra Gourd from her sleeves.
尾巴…其实被我收在此处。
I've been keeping Tail here, all along...
小姑娘，别一副大惊小怪的样子！
Don't look so surprised, young lady!
大惊小怪？！藿藿可是为了找你茶不思饭不想的，现在还被另一个坏东西乘虚而入了！
Surprised!? Huohuo has been worried sick trying to find you, and now something else has gone after her!
你这个火焰团子！到底是怎么回事？难不成寒鸦小姐，你一直都知道吗？
You flaming furball! What the heck is going on!? Did you know about this the whole time, Miss Hanya?
原则上，游离在外的岁阳必须被封印，我只是按规制行事。而且，是尾巴拜托我这么做的……
As per our rules, any free-roaming heliobus must be sealed away. I was merely following protocol. Besides, it was Tail who requested this...
本大爷只记得那天夜里意识快要四分五裂的那一瞬，时间就像是停止了一样。
I only recall a moment during that fateful night when my consciousness was on the verge of shattering into a million pieces... time stood still.
然后老子看到了自己从燎原身上分出来、漫无目的地流浪…看到自己被这小姑娘捡到，然后，一眨眼老子被十王司判官封印在尾巴上……

I watched myself parting from Ignamar — drifting without purpose... Then, before I knew what had happened, the girl had retrieved me, and a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission had sealed me within a tail.
你们人类管这种事叫「回光返照」对吧，为什么岁阳也会有这样的体验，真是见了鬼了…
I believe you humans call this kind of thing a "near-death-experience..." but why would a heliobus experience one of those? Ridiculous...
老子本想，既然都逃出来了，也该换个身体好好逍遥自在一下了。但是——
Since I'd slipped the leash, I thought I might as well change bodies and savor a bit of freedom. But then—
Lucky for you, you met me.
倒了本大爷的血霉，遇见了这个女鬼…我是说判官。
...My luck took a sour turn when I ran into this demoness... I mean, judge.
本大爷在的时候，藿藿老是嫌弃老子，动不动唠唠叨叨数落我给她带来了多少麻烦，她有多讨厌现在的生活。
When I was with Huohuo, she'd constantly rant about me — whining about all the problems I'd caused her, how I'd ruined her life.
嘿嘿，不珍惜本大爷这样的强力上级，等到失去时哭天抢地后悔莫及。老子只想听她哭。所以我一气之下，就让这女鬼…判官把老子给放进葫芦里。
Hehe, it was only after I vanished that she realized she'd taken my power for granted. I wanted to hear her cry about it, so in a fit of anger I had this demon— uh, judge imprison me in the gourd.
你如愿以偿了，现在，我给你一个重获自由的机会。当然，不是放任你离去，而是让一切恢复原样。成交？
You had had your wish. Now, I'm offering you a chance to regain your freedom... not by letting you go, but by going back to the way things were. Do we have a deal?
我说，咱们也算是老同事了，放心交给本大爷吧！
Of course! We're pretty much co-workers at this point!
所以，只要让本大爷附身藿藿，把另一个碍事的家伙给吃了，就没问题了吧？
Hmm... So all I have to do is possess Huohuo and take out those other pesky heliobi... right?
得给这不长眼的东西长点儿记性，让它明白自己惹祸上身了！
Time to give this heedless creature a reality check!
It's all up to you now, Tail!
让本大爷亲自来降妖捉鬼。
Wait a minute, I'm still not ready.
本大爷去附身，你没准备好关老子什么事？
Not ready? I'm the one doing the possessing here!
…哎，本大爷卖你个面子，准备好了再叫我。
Ugh... Fine. As a courtesy, I'll wait. Tell me when you're ready.
你醒啦，藿藿！尾巴的「手术」很成功啊！
Huohuo, you're awake! Seems like Tail's "operation" was a success!
唉、唉？！寒鸦大人，桂小姐，素裳，还有…{NICKNAME}{F#小姐}{M#先生}……
Huh... Madam Hanya, Miss Gui, Sushang, and {F#Miss}{M#Mr.} {NICKNAME}...
谢谢你们，是你们把尾巴带回来了吗？
Thank you, all of you. Are you the ones who brought Tail back?
这有什么嘛，你是我们的队长，当然是要帮你找回来的嘛！
Well, where would we be without our squad leader? We had to help!
哦，小怂包现在是队长啦？了不得嘛。
Oh, so scaredy-cat is squad leader? Well, well, look at you!
…只、只是桂乃芬小姐这样叫我而已。
That's just what Miss Guinaifen calls me... hehe.
原来，尾巴还真的是藿藿小姐的尾巴呀！
Well, well, Tail actually does belong to Miss Huohuo!
浮烟千算万算，显然无法想到尾巴早已回到了藿藿身边。这下它想要劫持判官的计划算是彻底失败了。要是让藿藿出现在它面前，想必能重挫它的斗志。

Despite Cirrus's scheming and calculating, they clearly didn't expect Tail to return to Huohuo... their plan to kidnap her was an utter failure. If they saw Huohuo as she is now, it would break their will!
寒鸦大人！绥园急报！被镇伏的岁阳…又有异动！
Madam Hanya! Urgent news from Fyxestroll Garden! The subdued heliobi are stirring again!
……看来，浮烟虽然不清楚尾巴的所在，但它确实想到了如何转移所有人的视线。
...Cirrus may not know the location of Tail, but they still figured out a way to divert everyone's attention.
这是浮烟的调虎离山之计。
This was definitely Cirrus's ruse to divert our attention.
那家伙虽然看似好斗莽撞，但实在是奸猾……
Cirrus may come across as hot-headed and impulsive, but under the surface they are actually full of guile...
难怪它喜欢以「棋子」喻人、以「棋局」喻势…一时疏忽竟然被它逼到了角落。
No wonder they like to use analogies such as "pawns" and "chess" to describe people. One momentary lapse of concentration, and suddenly we find ourselves backed into a corner.
浮烟一直等着我们离开绥园。
Cirrus was waiting for us to leave Fyxestroll Garden all along.
...It's not because of me, is it?
你不必自责，这些都是浮烟早就计划好的。
There's no need to blame yourself. This was Cirrus's plan all along.
看来，景元将军一直想拖延的「终盘」要提前了。素裳，去神策府把将军请来。
It looks like the "endgame" that General Jing Yuan has been trying to avoid is fast approaching. Sushang, please head to the Seat of Divine Foresight and fetch the general.
我们现在立刻赶回绥园，趁事情还没到无可挽回的地步，陪浮烟来一局吧。
Let's hurry back to Fyxestroll Garden now, while there's still a chance to turn things around. It's time to teach Cirrus a lesson.
啧啧，迟钝的十王司判官终于回来了？
Tsk, tsk, if it isn't the judges of the Ten-Lords Commission — sluggish as ever.
哎哟这不是尾巴大爷吗，看到你又当回看门狗，真是可喜可贺呀。
Oh, and is that "Mr. Tail"? Back to being a guard dog I see — how delightful... This calls for a celebration!
只可惜，经过上一次的教训，我已经彻底放弃将你纳入到我的计划之中了，就算是「燎原」最强大的碎片，获得多余的情感后，也只是个废物。

Still, after our last encounter, I've no intention of including you in my plans. To see Ignamar's most powerful fragment now burdened with emotions pains me. It's a pity, but you've become expendable.
十王司的阵法尚在，岁阳是无法离开绥园的，你自以为得计的一手不过是困兽之斗。

The Ten-Lords Commission's matrix is still intact — the heliobi cannot leave Fyxestroll Garden. You may think you have the upper hand, but you're nothing more than a caged animal. You will never leave here.
我从未想过离开。我从洪炉中苏醒，来到绥园只为一件事情——与你罗浮的将军一战。
Leave? That was never my plan. I came to Fyxestroll Garden for one reason, and one reason alone — to fight the Luofu's formidable general.
你们的将军喜欢「缓兵之计」，我就顺势而为，为各位出谋划策，令岁阳们在此汇聚，成为我的助力！
He seemed fond of playing the waiting game — I merely capitalized on that. While you were all out on a wild goose chase, I rallied other heliobi to my cause, thereby increasing my strength!
多亏了你们，我已汇聚封印在绥园中所有岁阳的力量。万事俱备，只需要静候将军入局。
Thanks to all of you, I've amassed the power of every heliobus sealed within Fyxestroll Garden. All I need to do now is wait for the general to make his grand entrance.
在此之前，我应当先遵照约定，将你们这些车前小卒，杀个片甲不留！
Before that happens, I should keep my end of the bargain: Destroying you without leaving a trace.
这家伙无论打倒多少次，总是能复原……尾巴，我们该怎么办？
They keep on coming back for more... What should we do, Tail?
放心吧，虽然岁阳没有形体，但并非无法被有形之物击败，浮烟终究只是在硬撑而已。
Take it easy, kid. Heliobi might lack physical form, but they're not impervious to physical attacks. Cirrus is merely putting on a brave face.
一旦它在精神层面认为自己已经输掉了，即便是再强大的岁阳也再难像这样聚合起来。
The moment they sense even a hint of defeat, it's over — they'll break into pieces, regardless of how powerful they are.
就像是「燎原大战将军」一样，岁阳意识到「败局注定」时，就会溃不成形吗？
So just like what happened to Ignamar, once a heliobus realizes they're going to lose, they'll shatter?
没错。要说现在谁能令它真正溃败的话，也只有那个人了……
Exactly. And If there's anyone who can cause Cirrus to shatter, it's him...
你终于来了，罗浮的将军。终于愿意与我对局了？
So, general, you've finally decided to show up. Ready to face the music?
「杀穿中阵，我便与你重续当年的战斗。」我一诺千金。
Defeat my army, and I'll give you the rematch you seek. My word holds true.
不过，就像我之前所说，腾骁与燎原，彼时交战的双方可谓旗鼓相当。
As I mentioned previously, when Teng Xiao and Ignamar fought, the scales were balanced.
但对于你，浮烟，这场枰上棋争打从一开始就没有公平的原则——我的实力完全在你之上。
But for you, Cirrus, this game was never about fairness, was it? And yet here we are — my power decidedly outmatches yours.
「遵守规则」、以及「势均力敌」都是弈手常有的幻觉，就让我来教你如何终盘吧。
Notions of rules and equal competition are mere illusions. Now, if you don't mind, allow me to show you how the endgame is played.
我正在看回复呢，你也快来看一看。寒鸦大人说她马上就来。
I'm looking at the reply — see, here. Miss Hanya said she's on her way.
我终究不是燎原，我只是…一团黯淡的火焰，无用之物。
I am no Ignamar... I'm nothing... nothing more than a faint flicker.
敢于挑战帝弓的将军，并且凭计谋令将军入局鏖战。这可不是「无用之物」能做到的。
I know of no "faint flicker" that could strategize such a fierce battle against one of the Reignbow Arbiter's generals.
身为胜者又故作谦逊的发言，真是教人作呕。
Listening to a winner feign humility is enough to make one sick.
岁阳一族所映照的虽然是人类自身的欲望，但这份锐烈燃烧的样子……确实壮丽。无论是腾骁将军还是我，都不会嘲笑这样的对手。
The heliobi may reflect our desires, but their fervent blaze... is undeniably awe-inspiring. Neither General Teng Xiao nor myself would deride such a foe.
输了就是输了——浮烟只求与将军一战，不求胜负，已经满足，接下来……
I have been bested, it's true... I only sought to lock horns with you, regardless of victory or defeat. Next...
接下来，等待你的将是永罚。对长生不灭的火焰而言，失去自由，困于空无一物的虚空囚牢中，比终结其存续更可怕。
Next is eternal punishment. For an inextinguishable flame such as yourself, I see no punishment more fitting than to see you confined to a vacant abyss, forever lamenting your past transgressions.
浮烟，等待着你的，就是这样的命运。
Such is the fate that awaits you, Cirrus.
群山会塌陷，大海会干涸，岁阳会等着，等着重获自由的那一天再度到来。那一天也终将到来。
Mountains will crumble, oceans will evaporate, but the heliobi will always be there, patiently waiting for their day of freedom... and that day will come.
只要仙舟的将军还存在，我将继续与仙舟的将军战斗下去，直到星辰熄灭。
As long as the generals of the Xianzhou live, my battle against them will continue, until the stars themselves burn out.
你来了，刚才我已经帮藿藿重绘了尾巴的封印，接下来就该处理浮烟的事情了。
You're here. I've just finished re-inscribing the seal on Huohuo's tail. Next, it's time to address the matter of Cirrus.
So... Mr. Tail chose to be sealed once again...?
你懂什么，这算是老子和十王司签订的「互不侵犯契约」。
What do you know? This is between me and the Ten-Lords Commission — a non-aggression pact, if you like.
尾巴不想离开这里了吗？
I thought Mr. Tail wanted to leave...?
如果老子还是一个单纯的星火之精，我当然要浮游于天外了。但是我沾染了你们的人情世故之后，老子的「自由」早就不再那么简单了。
If I were merely Starfire Essence, then naturally I'd prefer to glide through the cosmos... but after being entangled in your human world, my freedom is no longer that simple.
现在老子就已经是最自由的，哪里也不去了。
I am freer than ever before... I am going nowhere.
嗯，按照十王司戒律，岁阳尾巴还是应该由判官看管，所以…尾巴大爷就交给我了。
Mm... According to the Ten Lords, Tail must be supervised by a judge... I'll make sure to take good care of Mr. Tail.
嘁，谁看管谁还不一定呢。
Tsk, let's see who takes care of who.
…另外就是，尾巴大爷不在的时候，别的岁阳都欺负我，还是有大爷在的时候比较安心。
...Besides, when Mr. Tail isn't around, the other heliobi pick on me. I feel safer when Tail is here.
有老子在的时候，老子自会收拾你。
Other heliobi? Hmph, I'm the only heliobus you need to worry about.
总之，浮烟的事情交给我，至于「罗浮杂俎」的事情…按照老规矩，你们得编一套新的说辞了，这些事情就交给你们了。
Well then, I will take care of the Cirrus situation. As for what gets written in the Luofu's Ghostly Grove, I'll leave that up to you.
还有，别忘了将岁阳封印到「束形却邪阵」里。
One more thing, don't forget to seal the heliobi within the Evil Binding Matrix.
浮烟战意瓦解，已不再能成为祸患。看来这里事情已经解决，我也该回去了。
Cirrus's will to fight has been shattered — they can no longer pose a threat. Considering that everything here is now under control, I'll take my leave.
应尽之责而已，也兑现了对浮烟的承诺。
I merely fulfilled my duty, and kept my promise to Cirrus.
我这个奇兵还蛮厉害的吧？
My masterstroke wasn't that bad after all?
没错没错，这几日全仰赖{NICKNAME}了，景元在此谢过。
Not at all. You have been of great assistance these past days, and for that I express my gratitude.
这小小岁阳不会被轻易消灭，只要时间足够长，无论出逃概率有多小，总有一天，又会逃出封印吧。不过，这就留给以后的将军来头疼了。

But the heliobus we dealt with will not be easily dismissed. Given sufficient time, and regardless of how slim the odds are, they will someday break the seal that binds them. However, that concern will fall to the generals of the future.
不知道这燎原的碎片以后还会与多少位罗浮将军交手，如此想来，作为一介武人还有些羡慕。
One cannot help but wonder how many Luofu generals this fragment of Ignamar will face in times to come. Speaking purely from the perspective of a warrior, I must say I feel somewhat envious.
岁阳的目的还是挺单纯的。
The heliobi's objective is pretty simple, don't you think?
目的是挺单纯的，但坏事可一件没少干。得向朱明仙舟取取经了……
That it may be, but they cause no shortage of trouble. Perhaps I could glean some wisdom from the Xianzhou Zhuming...
你一开始就出手就好了嘛。
It would've been easier if you'd stepped in from the start...
我看这岁阳不算难得住你们，再说了，你们各自也从这系列事件中有所收获。这不是比我早早出手更好吗？
In my estimation, this heliobus was not an overwhelming problem for you. Besides, each of you has appeared to gain something from this series of events.
这次出门倒也不算公务，没有向策士们报备，剩下的事情自有十王司处理。事情结束之后，我想，在场的公职人员都会得到应得奖励。

This excursion was not an official matter — I didn't report it to the counselors. What remains of it will be left to the Ten-Lords Commission, and once matters have concluded, I believe everyone present will be duly rewarded.
至于你和那位桂乃芬姑娘，好处也少不了你们的。你看，帮罗浮将军做事，总是不会亏待你们的。我也不克久留，先一步告辞了。
And as for you and the young Miss Guinaifen, rest assured you won't be short-changed. You see? Helping the general of the Luofu does have its perks. It's time I took my leave. Farewell.
我把最近帮助十王司斩妖除魔的事情，发信告诉了我娘。
I wrote to my mom about the recent monster-slaying and demon-fighting stuff I've been doing for the Ten-Lords Commission.
我说自己和「武胎剑骨」的天才彦卿五五开，还和大岁阳燎原的碎片打得有来有回，但她居然嫌我惹事生非！她是不是想故意说反话呢？

I told her I went toe-to-toe with the swordfighting prodigy Yanqing and held my own against fragments of Ignamar. But all she did was scold me for getting into trouble! Do you think she was being sarcastic?
云骑的巡逻正事你没干吧？
Perhaps she's worried you're neglecting your regular duties?
保护仙舟免受岁阳侵害，还有比这更正的正事吗？
What could be more important than protecting the Xianzhou from the threat of heliobi?
...You still have a lot to learn.
你怎么说话跟我娘似的。
嗯！裳裳现在可厉害了，不管醒着还是睡着，罗浮上谁也不能比咱们裳裳更靠谱！
Haha, quit worrying Sushang, you've been an awesome squad member! And a very talented sleepyhead.
对了对了，帮我参谋一下这次该在「罗浮杂俎」上发什么吧！这可是大新闻，全靠这期内容涨粉了。
Now, let's think about what to publish on Ghostly Grove! This is huge news — this post will definitely boost our following.
Always on the hunt for more followers...
就像之前的内容一样，这次也都交给你了！{NICKNAME}！
至此，捉鬼小队的工作也算是告一段落了，请允许我作为十王司判官，感谢各位连日来的辛苦劳作，将岁阳灾害的影响降到了最低。

The ghost-hunting squad can now rest easy for a while. Speaking as a judge of the Ten-Lords Commission, I must thank you all for the dedication you've shown these past few days. You really minimized the impact of the heliobi crisis.
接下来，也许还会有岁阳的漏网之鱼，不过已是微不足道的小事了。
There may have been a few heliobi that slipped through the net, but they are of no major concern.
如果有漏网的岁阳，也还是交给我们吧！
不是我自卖自夸，咱们在「罗浮杂俎」上的文章，已经是罗浮最大的话题了。要是这么突然断更的话，真是对不起咱们的观众老爷们呀。
I don't wanna brag, but our articles on Ghostly Grove are the talk of the town! If we suddenly stopped uploading, it'd be pretty unfair to our audience.
就、就让小桂子保留着吧，我睡觉前不看一会「罗浮杂俎」，会睡不着……
Madam Hanya, p—please, let Little Gui carry on uploading... I can't fall asleep without browsing Ghostly Grove before bed...
你们都这么说了，我也没有逼你们停止更新的权力，那你们就继续吧，不过……
Hmm... You seem pretty set on this, so I won't stand in your way. However, bear in mind that—
放心，我们是不会给十王司的工作添堵的。
Don't worry, we promise not to make your job any harder than it already is.
还在这儿转悠吗？你对朋友还真不上心哪。
Still here, huh? Then I guess you're not too concerned about your friend.
这是幻觉吗？妈妈，你怎么在这儿呀，我好想你。
Is this an illusion? Mom, what are you doing here? I've missed you so much.
S—Stay back! Don't come any closer!
你不是藿藿，你不是我的女儿…你身上带着那样的脏东西，别靠过来！
I don't know who you are, but you're not my Huohuo. Keep that filthy thing you're carrying away from me!
可我还是我…我没有被那家伙控制呀。
But I'm still me... I'm the one in control...
不，不是。迟早有一天，它会占据你的身体……
I—It's just a matter of time before it takes control of you...
你不靠近她，她会过得更好的。
The farther you stay away from her, the better.
对不起，藿藿，我和你父亲只能将你送入十王司。就当你从没有我们这样的父母……
I'm sorry, Huohuo, your father and I had no choice but to send you to the Ten-Lords Commission. It's best if you pretend we never existed...
藿藿的大尾巴，烧没啦！藿藿的大尾巴，像烟花！
Huohuo's tail is all singed! It looks like a giant sparkler!
耶？装可怜吗？我最讨厌装可怜的人了！
Huh? Trying to make us feel sorry for you? I can't stand people who do that!
I—I'm not trying to make you feel sorry for me...
你不是装可怜！听说你爸妈也不要你了，确实可怜！
I heard your parents don't want you anymore — YOU should be the one feeling sorry.
要怪就怪你那奇怪的尾巴！我们都没有会燃烧的尾巴，你走开！
Blame that freaky tail of yours! No one else has a tail that catches fire! Get lost!
Playing dumb? Don't wanna talk? Ugh!
我们不要和怪物说话了，快走快走。
We shouldn't be talking to a monster, anyway. Let's get out of here.
尾巴，你怎么…你怎么在这里，你不是早已经…我明白了，这次要离开的人是你。
Tail? How are you... how are you still here? ...I see now... You're leaving me too...
每个人都会离我而去，我到底该怎么办？我不想再孤伶伶一个人……
Everyone always leaves me... I don't want to be alone, not again...
不要再和我说话了，尾巴！我不想看着你消失……
Please, Tail, no more words! I can't bear to see you fade away...
你到底是不是判官啊！这是岁阳在扰乱你的感受！给我支棱起来！别顺着岁阳的想法……
Are you a judge or not!? This heliobus is distorting your perceptions! Get a grip! Resist them!
每个人都离开了…每个人都离开了…
They've all gone... all abandoned me...
「每个人都离开了」是吧？简单，看老子把他们都拉回来！
"All gone"? Just watch me, I'll drag them all back!
Everyone will leave... they always do, eventually...
你不是还有捉鬼小队的朋友吗？
你不是还有捉鬼小队的那群朋友吗？
你不是还有十王司的前辈吗？
What about those Ten Lords fogeys?
你不是还有十王司的那几位前辈吗？
What about those Ten Lords fogeys?
看老子把那些人全部带过来！
Just wait, I'm going to bring everyone here!
藿藿，你看，本大爷把他们都带回来了。
Huohuo, look, I brought everyone back for you.
藿藿，好女儿…爸爸妈妈不该抛下你一个人。
Huohuo, our precious girl... Mom and dad shouldn't have left you all alone.
藿藿，对不起，我就是嫉妒你的尾巴比我的帅！
Huohuo, I'm sorry... I was just jealous that your tail is cooler than mine!
藿藿，我做梦都想有这么酷炫的尾巴，请你和我一起玩好吧？
Huohuo, I've always dreamt about having such a cool tail. Why don't you come play with me?
他们都是被你附身之后强行带回来的，不是吗？哪里是回来了……
They're only here because you possessed them and made them come back. This isn't what I meant...
哎哟我去，你就说回没回来吧？！
Oh c'mon! You wanted them to return — they returned!
尾巴，你不是我的幻觉啊…你是真正的尾巴！你是真的尾巴！你回来了！
Tail... you're not an illusion... You're here! You're actually Tail!
这些日子你都跑哪去了，我还以为你…以为你已经……
Where have you been all this time? I thought you were already...
已经死了？老子过得也不轻松呀，被炸成了无数小碎片，老费力地又融在一起了…老子跟着你倒了这么多年的霉，总该得有些好运气吧！
...Dead? Well, I haven't exactly had a picnic — exploding into countless shards, being your shadow for all those rotten years — it's about time I had some good luck!
老子原本是打算跑路的，但是，这不是不放心你嘛，特意来确认一下，你这个怂包到底能不能行，有没有长进？
I thought about getting out of here, but I couldn't shake the feeling there was something wrong... so I came back to see if you could manage on your own, or if you were still a scaredy-cat.
不好意思，藿藿毫无长进。
I'm sorry... I guess I still am...
不，你也太小看自己了，你那何止是长进啊，你简直是胆大包天！一个人就敢来做这么危险的事？我怀疑你不是没有勇气，你只是没脑子！
No, you're selling yourself short! You're daring! How you had the courage to do something so dangerous amazes me! It's not bravery you lack, but sense!
…那、那我能怎么办嘛，我也觉得浮烟在骗我，但要是错过就找不到了怎么办？
...What other choice did I have? I suspected that Cirrus was deceiving me, but the thought of losing you forever was... unbearable.
这事就别提了。嘿，藿藿，真的是因为老子的关系，这些人都离开了你吗？
Forget about all that, I'm here now. But... did everyone really leave you because of me?
…离开就离开吧。我本来也不擅长和人相处，就算没有尾巴，他们也会离开的。
You know what? They left, let them be. I'm not a people person anyway. Without you, Tail, they'd have left me just the same...
至少现在，你回来了不是吗？

至少现在，有尾巴愿意为我回来，我很满足了。
...but you came back for me... and that's all I need.
既然你都这么说了，本大爷可不会愧疚的哦。
Well, since you put it like that, I suppose I have nothing to feel guilty about anymore!
哎，我还是得盯着你，免得你又惹出什么大乱子！对了，眼前还有件麻烦事——藏起来的岁阳，立刻给老子滚出来！
...Somebody needs to keep you out of trouble! Speaking of which, there's a pesky heliobus lurking right here. I'm coming for you!
这里是哪里呀…尾巴，尾巴，你在这里吗？

…我、我被谁附身了吗？是尾巴吗？
I... I feel like I've been possessed. Tail, is that you?
…肯定不是尾巴。那家伙傲气得很，按它的说法，很少有人配让它寄宿。

…别胡思乱想了，现在该怎么办？
...Stop overthinking, Huohuo. What should I do now?
把这家伙带回藿藿身边好了。
藿藿，对不起。就当爸爸妈妈已经不在了……
Huohuo, I'm sorry. It's better that you pretend mom and dad are no longer here...
即便是亲生父母，也能这么绝情吗。人类啊……
How can your own flesh and blood be so heartless? These humans...
凭什么藿藿要受到那么多关注啊！我才是最应该被关注的人！我要孤立她！
Why does Huohuo get so much attention!? Hmph, I'm gonna get everyone to ignore her...
真是搞不懂臭小鬼的表现欲。
The behavior of these brats is astounding.
这尾巴也太吓人了吧！像个火把一样发亮，好恶心啊。
This tail is just so creepy! It glows like some sort of torch, gross!
尽管知道这不过是岁阳的幻影，母亲离开后，藿藿还是感觉到呼吸变得更加沉重了。
Even though she knows this is just a mirage made by the heliobus, Huohuo's breathing still gets heavier after her mother leaves.
尽管知道这也是岁阳的幻影，同学们离开后，藿藿再次陷入到失落的情绪里。
Even though she knows this is just a mirage made by the heliobus, Huohuo still feels depressed after her classmates leave.
现在附身的话，应该是出不去的。

也许应该将剩下的人一起带回藿藿身边。
Maybe you should take the rest of the people back to Huohuo.
似乎尾巴无法与机关互动，也许应该找个附身后的人来启动机关。
Tail doesn't seem capable of interacting with mechanisms. Maybe we should find someone who's possessed to trigger them.
尾巴附身于两人，试图将他们一起带回藿藿身边。
Tail possesses the two and tries to bring them back to Huohuo together.
尾巴感受到这扇门只是幻障迷境的虚构，门后什么也没有。

尾巴附身到藿藿的母亲身上，试图将她带回藿藿身边。
Tail possesses Huohuo's mother and tries to bring her back to Huohuo.
尾巴附身到恶意的同学身上，试图将他带回藿藿身边。
Tail possesses the mean classmate and tries to bring him back to Huohuo.
尾巴将藿藿的母亲带到了藿藿身边
Tail takes Huohuo's mother back to her.
投子认负吧，你已经输了。
Accept your defeat, you are bested.
按照惯例，在群里同步下情报吧。
Let's sync up our intel as per usual.

Tail felt like he could hear the murmurs of a devil, "Tail, you must not go through there. Do not go through there."
门的那一边究竟是什么呢？尾巴没有做好「等价交换」的准备，他不打算过去。

镇妖塔内封印新的岁阳也许能够获得全新的驱邪术，这对各位大人降妖除魔必有所助益。既然我已经完成藿藿大人的交待，在下就告辞了。

{NICKNAME}, let me introduce you, this... heliobus? She calls herself the "Chess Ghost." Those guys at the back seem to be people who just lost to her...

哦，原来这是解谜…是我搞错了…难道我其实是「谜鬼」？

呵，这个化外民倒是还有点胆识…不像你，明明是个仙舟剑客，却那么畏首畏尾！

你们俩怎么这么磨叽！搞快点！

来吧，化外民{M#小兄弟}{F#小丫头}，来一场酣畅淋漓的对弈吧！你准备好了吗？
Bring it on, outworlder, let's have a hearty game of chess! Are you ready?
你们俩怎么这么磨叽！搞快点！

这三个人就是有棋品没人品的典型！我最看不起这样的人！你们俩也赶紧受死吧！

归根到底，还是要战斗啊…

可恶啊！你们这些有棋品没人品的家伙，就算再擅长解开谜题又有何用！给我记住啊！

Are we... Is this for the best? How about we go back to Fyxestroll Garden and talk things over with Guinaifen first...
毕竟这不符合判官的做法…
After all, this is not in line with the Judge's decision...
你向桂乃芬解释了文远的事情。
You tell Guinaifen about Wenyuan and his situation.
我明白了，藿藿不知道自己究竟做对了还是做错了，可世上哪有那么简单的对错呢？
I see. Huohuo doesn't know whether she was right or wrong. But when is she ever going to get a simple case of right and wrong in this world of ours?
总之事情算是告一段落，我们在「罗浮杂俎」上发一下吧。
Anyway, the whole thing's over and done with now. Let's post up to the Ghostly Grove, okay?
我能理解文远先生的感受，接受「离开」并不容易，我也一样。哎……
I can understand Mr. Wenyuan's sentiments. It's hard to accept someone leaving; I'm the same. Sigh...
藿藿别难过了，我请你去吃尚滋味吧。
Don't be sad, Huohuo. Let me take you out to the Spices Supreme.
不了不了，我们还有很多事要做呢………
No no, we still have lots to get done...
把藿藿交给我，把工作交给{NICKNAME}吧，素裳在的话，肯定也会同意的。
Leave Huohuo with me, and leave the work to {NICKNAME}. If Sushang were in, she'd be sure to agree with me.
桂乃芬好好招待了情绪低落的藿藿，美食总是有治愈人心的力量。
Guinaifen takes good care of the down-in-the-dumps Huohuo. Food always has the power to cure a heavy heart.
至于文远和若昔两人，相信他们会给你们一个交代的。
As for Wenyuan and Ruoxi? I trust they'll give you an explanation of their own.
您终于找到我了…不好意思，我本想去十王司的驻地找您，但那里有不少冥差和判官，我不是很敢接近…就只好在外围等着被您发现了。

You finally found me... I'm sorry. I was going to go look for you at the Ten-Lords Commission, but there were all these spiritfarers and Judges there. I didn't really dare get close... so I just stuck around outside, waiting to be noticed by you.
我想您也听说了…文远已经不在了。那么依照我们之前的承诺，我来见您。
I think you must have heard... Wenyuan is no longer with us. So in light of our promise, I have come to see you.
怎么会呢？您愿意放过我们，我又怎么敢出尔反尔、恩将仇报呢？
How could I? How could I go back on my word like that and bite the hand that feeds, after you'd been willing to let me go?
Thank you for keeping your word.
请不要这样说，我受之有愧。这只是我的本分，不值得您感谢。
Don't say that. I don't deserve it. It's just my job, and doesn't deserve your thanks.
其实不瞒您说，岁阳天性自由，我也的确想过要逃走。但我改变了想法，我想留在这里。
If I'm honest with you, heliobi have a free nature, and I've thought about running off before. But I've changed my mind, and I want to stay here.
因为文远我体会到了爱与被爱的情感…它既有甘甜，又混杂着一丝苦涩和酸楚。像是酝酿了许多年的酒，这就是经过等待和痛苦考验的爱吗？

Because of Wenyuan, I've got to experience the feeling of love, and being loved... It's both sweet, but also mixed with a hint of bitter and sour. Like wine that's steeped for years and years, is this how it feels to love after so much pain and waiting?
…我从未在别的人类身上品尝过如此复杂的情绪。在失去他之后，其他人的情感在我看来太过寡淡，我…一时间居然失去了身为岁阳的感触，堕入了名为「人」的幻觉里。

...I've never experienced such complex emotions in any other human before. After losing him, other people's emotions just seem too bland to me. I... I lost all feeling of being a heliobus for a moment, and fell into this illusion called "being human."
将我送回十王司的囚笼中吧，麻烦您了。
Please, send me back to the Ten Lords' prison. Please.
走吧，我们回去把它带到镇妖塔里吧。
Let's go back and put it inside the Suppression Tower.
文远先生和这位「若昔」小姐想必已经度过了美好的时光……
Mr. Wenyuan and this "Ruoxi" must have spent a wonderful time with each other...
如此捉鬼流程不符合十王司的规范，请你就把它当成你和我之间的秘密吧。
This ghost-hunting mission does not comply with the rules of the Ten Lords. Please keep this a secret just between you and me.
Thank you, {NICKNAME}. We'll see you next time...
文远小步快走地带着若昔离开了，也许他担忧判官突然反悔，无法再像刚才那般心软。
Wenyuan hurriedly left with Ruoxi. Perhaps he was worried that the Judge might suddenly change her mind and wouldn't be as lenient as before.
Ruoxi, I miss you so much...
I can't take it any longer...
你向寒鸦解释了文远的事情。
You explain to Hanya about Wenyuan and his situation.
Something is very strange about this...
There's been lots of strange things going on in the Divination Commission lately!
没错，我找到了人生目标
That's right, I've found my goal in life.
{NICKNAME}，准备好的话藿藿就要摇动同心火铃咯？
{NICKNAME}, if you are ready, Huohuo will ring the Harmonic Chime?
这队伍要排到什么时候？
How long do we have to queue for?
Make your booking and take a number!
There it is! The Golden Legend!
这里是？地衡司的办公室？
What is this place? An office of the Realm-Keeping Commission?
不，这儿只是青雀小姐内心的幻象…
No, this is the illusion inside Miss Qingque's mind...
懒散久了，突然有了雄心壮志想狠狠拼搏一把，这很奇怪吗？
Is it really that strange for someone to have a strong burst of ambition after being lazy for a long time?
对啊，我也会间歇性突发想要奋斗一下的症状。
You're right, I have times when I suddenly feel inspired to work really hard, too.
对小桂子这样在外闯荡的异乡人来说，想要搏一把，租屋变豪宅、星槎换巨舰，这是常事。毕竟你们青春有限，生存压力也很大。

It's common for outworlders like you, Little Gui, to want to work hard and upgrade your flat for a mansion or your starskiff for a giant ship. After all, your youth is limited and the pressure to survive is great.
但对咱们这样的长寿社会…事情就不一样了，大部分人就想求个安稳。
But for a long-life society like ours... Things are different. The majority of people only seek a secure life.
不过嘛，人的念头千奇百怪，谁说得准呢。
But, people think in all kinds of wonderful ways, who can really say for sure?
What do you think, Mr. Tail?
嘿嘿，一切不合常理的事情都是因为看不见的妖魔鬼怪作祟，这是原始人的思考方式。
Hehe, the idea that anything that does not align with common logic must be the work of some unseen ghost is a very primitive way of thinking.
不过，如果一个人啥都没干，却突然性情大变，确实有可能是咱岁阳干的。
However, if someone's personality undergoes a dramatic change without them doing anything, that could indeed be the work of a heliobus.
...That really doesn't help us at all.
本大爷又不是渔公案的主角，没去过现场还能给你下个结论不成？
I'm not the person at the center of the Angler Mystery, how can I give an answer if I've not been to the scene personally?
虽然发帖人并没有明说自己来自哪个司部，不过看名称，毫无疑问是太卜司吧？
Even though the person that posted this didn't say what department they were from, judging by the name, there's no doubt that they're from the Divination Commission, right?
...Is it really a heliobus causing this?
保险起见，{NICKNAME}，咱们还是一起去现场看看吧？
{NICKNAME}, why don't we go and take a look together, to be on the safe side?
让我先处理些手头的杂活…
I've just got some things to deal with first...
好的，藿藿会在太卜司里一边联系发帖人，一边等你。
Okay, I'll contact the person who made the post at the Divination Commission and wait for you there.
啊，竟然还是你们几位，真是够辛苦的。不过，去「罗浮杂俎」上发帖求助果然有效。
Ah, it's you! You really do work hard. I see posting on the "Ghostly Grove" page really gets things done, though!
太卜司最近是多事之秋，自——
There has been a lot of trouble in the Divination Commission lately, ever since—
符玄突然将声音压低到几乎听不见的地步。
Fu Xuan suddenly lowered her voice and became almost too quiet to hear.
——自本座被岁阳害得大大丢脸以后，咱们司部里又出现了一桩怪事。
...Since that time the heliobi greatly damaged my reputation, another strange phenomenon has occurred in our department.
怎么不直接短信找我们？
Why didn't you just message us directly?
是啊，太卜大人，你要是怀疑太卜司里还有没清除的岁阳，可以直接联系我们呀。
That's right, master diviner. If you suspect there are still heliobi that have not been cleared out from the Divination Commission, you can just contact us directly.
本座到没有自信到「这个事情一定是岁阳作祟」的程度，所以发帖试探了一下……
I am not yet entirely convinced that "this is undoubtedly the work of a heliobus," so I thought I'd make the post to investigate...
你们既然出现，就说明这事儿确有可疑的地方了。
As you're here, that means there is indeed something suspicious about this.
见到你，就知道帖子说的是谁了。
Seeing you now, I know exactly who your post is referring to.
是啊，懂的都懂。这件事在旁人看来或许没什么奇特的地方，但在咱们司部内的人看来，当真是极为诡异。
That's right, you understand. This may not seem so strange to the average person, but everyone in our department finds this whole thing extremely abnormal.
呃，该怎么说呢？之前各位帮我祓除缠身的岁阳时，太卜司的卜者青雀居功甚伟。我本想感谢她，多给她一些司部内表现的机会……

Ahem, how should I explain? When you were all assisting me in driving out the lingering heliobi, our diviner Qingque made a great contribution to the efforts. I wanted to thank her and give her more opportunities to show her skills in the department...
但不知为何，这几天她突然转了性子，到的比谁都早，走的比谁都晚。今天我接到司里卜者的报告，她打算辞去卜者的职务，鼓励同事们和她一同创业。

But for some unknown reason, her attitude completely changed recently. She has been the first into the office and the last to leave. Today I even received notice from other diviners that she is planning to quit her role as diviner and is encouraging her colleagues to start a new business with her.
对吧，你肯定能立刻理解。
You see? I'm sure you understand.
Is it that strange to want to start a business and get rich?
不怪。人有七情六欲，渴望出人头地或坐拥亿万家财，这些都是常情。
It is not. People are creatures of desire, it is normal for them to crave renown and fortune.
但青雀这孩子，我和她聊过，她来太卜司工作求的不过是一个安稳和自在…很难想象这样的人突然之间就想尝一尝创业艰辛了。

But I have spoken with Qingque before, she only came to work for the Divination Commission for stability and comfort... It is extremely hard to imagine that a person like this would suddenly want to try starting a business.
勤劳的青雀，太卜不喜欢吗？
Do you not like Qingque now that she is a motivated worker?
勤奋或怠惰都是人的天性，我倒也没有什么偏见。但一个人突然性格大变，多半是有外因影响。
People are naturally diligent or lazy, I do not judge anyone for either. However, when someone's personality suddenly transforms, it is often because of an external influence.
我觉得整件事情里透着诡异。联想到自己的遭遇，所以要把你们找来瞧瞧。
I think there is something extremely eerie about this whole thing. Thinking back to my own encounter, I wanted to ask you to take a look for yourselves.
符玄大人，那青雀小姐眼下还在这儿吗？
Diviner Fu Xuan, is this Miss Qingque still here at the moment?
…她正在书库那厢和同事们高谈阔论，畅想美好未来。
She's currently over by the repository, talking loudly to her colleagues and fantasizing about her bright future.
走吧，我猜你们也很感兴趣。
Let's go, I think you'll find this interesting, too.
青雀，听说你打算辞职了？
Qingque, I hear you're thinking of quitting?
嗯，我找到了全新的人生意义。
That's right, I've found a whole new meaning to my life.
你？没想到还能听到青雀谈论人生意义……
You? I never thought I'd hear Qingque talking about the meaning of life...
嗨哟，这是太卜司要变天了啊！
Looks like the Divination Commission is in for a big change!
你该不会是又被太卜贬了一顿，打算自暴自弃了吧？
You're not just letting yourself give up because the master diviner humiliated you again, are you?
回首过去，我的一生只有蹉跎。而今向前看，我已幡然悔悟！
Looking back on my life, I see all I have done is waste time. However, looking to my future, I regret this greatly.
我看到了命运的道路向我敞开怀抱！
I have seen the path of destiny opening up before me!
这还是我认识的那个青雀吗？
Is this really the Qingque that I know?
你看吧，这也太不正常了。
You see? This is not normal.
复盘过往的体验度量，各位对「成功生活」的提炼只是衣食无忧和栖身之所，缺乏思考和沉淀，这种平淡的体验能够反哺赋能他人吗？

Looking back on past experiences, people only measure a "successful life" in terms of having clothing, food, and minimal worries. Without deeper thought, can these bland experiences serve as feedback to empower others?
太卜司里日复一日干上几百年，这样的「成功」底层逻辑是什么？顶层设计在哪？比起短生种的亮点在哪？优势在哪？没有！

I have worked the same day over and over in the Divination Commission for hundreds of years. Where is the logic in terms of "success"? Where is the pinnacle? Where are the highlights in our lives compared with short-life species? Where are the benefits? There are none!
这是对时间和人生价值的双重浪费！在宇宙的另一边，比你短寿的人在垂直领域采用复用打法达成持久收益，他们终日奋斗，远比你更努力！

This is a waste of both time and life! Across the universe, there are people with shorter lifespans than yourselves in parallel dimensions that use and reuse methods for lasting gains. They work day-in-day-out and work far harder than you ever will!
而你躲在小小洞天里，假装超级富豪们经手的一百亿信用点与你毫不相干！却惊讶地发现富豪们买走了你身边的一切！

Yet you hide in your little delves and pretend that the billions of credits in the hands of the super rich have nothing to do with you! Then you're shocked when you find that the rich have already bought up everything around you!
你是否感到热血沸腾、胸膛左侧正在隐隐作痛，它正在雷鸣般地喊出你的渴望——
Don't you feel your blood boiling? A faint pain in the left-hand side of your chest? Your desire is screaming out like thunder—
你感觉现场的气氛不太对劲，一阵狂热的情绪从心底涌上来了。
You sense an abnormal atmosphere around you as a wave of manic emotion bursts forth from the bottom of your heart.
我想要豪宅、星槎…不，我是说歼星舰！
I want a huge house and a starskiff... No, I want a starnought!
…我、我要还清我三百年的房贷！
...I, I want to pay off my three-hundred year mortgage!
已经没有那种世俗的欲望了。
I no longer feel these worldly desires.
小了，各位，格局小了。你们以为我在和你们谈钱吗？不，不是，不只是这样！
Too small, you're all thinking too small! You think I am talking to you about money? No, it's much more than that!
就像路易斯•弗莱明的那句豪言一样——「我不在乎信用点，因为我就是信用本身」。
Just as Louis Fleming once said: "I do not care about credits, because I AM credit!"
我要和各位谈的是人生的价值与自我实现！…然后才是钱！
I am talking to you about the value of life and self-fulfillment! ...Only after these can you think about money!
那，青雀你打算怎么开始呢？
Then, where do you plan to start, Qingque?
怎么开始？就从这一步开始，我将辞去这份旱涝保收的工作，展开我的创业计划——我要让帝垣琼玉牌成为风靡银河的娱乐！然后进军其他领域……

Where will I start? From this step right here, I shall leave this safe and stable job and begin my business plan... I will make Celestial Jade popular across the galaxy! Then I shall branch out into other dimensions...
只要你和我一样，也拥有一颗奋斗的心，随时欢迎！各位听懂了吗？听懂掌声——
You are all welcome to follow along. All you need is to be like me and have a fighter's heart! Do you understand me? Clap if you understand—
人群被兴奋的浪潮淹没，人们为青雀吐出的每一个字拼命鼓掌。
The crowd was overwhelmed with a wave of exhilaration, the people applauded every word Qingque had uttered.
就在此时，青雀的语声突然顿止，笑容凝固在了她的脸上。
Right at this moment, Qingque's voice suddenly cut out and her face froze in a fixed smile.
喂喂，你还好吧？别吓我啊！
Hey, hey! Are you okay? You're scaring me!
这个女孩的脑袋里面燃烧着一股不正常的贪欲，尝起来火辣辣的。
There is an abnormal greed burning in this girl's mind, it tastes spicy.
她一定是遭遇了什么岁阳异常，符玄大人——
She must have been affected by some heliobus's influence, Lady Fu Xuan—
各位散开吧，青雀需要静养休息，请不要聚集在此处。
Everyone stand back. Qingque needs rest, please don't crowd her.
不会吧，她还没说完她的创业计划……
No way, she still hasn't told us her business plan...
Stand back, get out of here!
We were sent by the Alchemy Commission.
在符玄的帮助下，你们驱散了围观人群，将青雀转移到一处僻静的地方。
With the assistance of Fu Xuan, you dispersed the crowd of onlookers and moved Qingque to a secluded space.
多半是同占据我的犀焰一样，放大了内心某处的不安感。
Something must be enhancing one of her latent insecurities, like did Keralum when it possessed me.
{NICKNAME}，太卜大人，准备好的话我就要摇动同心火铃咯？
{NICKNAME}, master diviner, if you are ready, I shall ring the Harmonic Chime?
Wait, I still need to prepare.
太、太卜大人？{NICKNAME}？还有…藿藿小姐？你们怎么在这儿？
M—Master Diviner? {NICKNAME}? And... Miss Huohuo? What are you doing here?
青雀小姐，你突然睡着了！
Miss Qingque, you suddenly lost consciousness!
你还好吧，青雀？有没有觉得哪儿有点不对劲？头疼、恶心、做了奇怪的梦什么的？
Are you okay, Qingque? Have you been feeling out of sorts at all? Headache, nausea, strange dreams?
似乎有这么回事来着，我一倒头睡着了，做了个好长好长的梦。梦里我发了大财，嘿嘿。
Actually, yes. I fell asleep and had a really, really long dream. I dreamed I got super rich, hehe.
没事就好。对了，别再让我逮着你上班时间瞌睡了，快快去收拾书库吧。
As long as you're okay. Oh, right, don't let me catch you slacking off during work again! Go and tidy up the repository.
符玄拍了拍青雀脑袋，转身离开了。
Fu Xuan patted Qingque on the head, turned, and left.
呼，太卜走了。唉，我一定是被岁阳附身了对吧，{NICKNAME}，判官大人？
Phew, the Master Diviner's gone. Ah, I must have been possessed by a heliobus, right {NICKNAME}, Judge?
那当然，你都出现了…再加上我竟然梦见自己辞职创业、大发横财，这也太不正常了吧！我想我多半是不小心招上了那些会让人胡思乱想的幽魂吧……

Of course, you're all here after all... That and the fact that I dreamed about quitting my job and becoming a hugely successful entrepreneur, this is all too crazy! I imagine I must have attracted one of those spirits that makes people think wild things...
太卜似乎也不打算追究你…
Looks like the master diviner isn't going to press you on this...
嘿嘿，那是。没想到她老人家也会有看破不说破的时候。
Hehe, it does. I never had her down as the kind of person that could leave these things unsaid.
这也是她在回报青雀小姐之前的帮助吧。
This must be her way of repaying you for all your help before.
太卜在人情方面还真是老派。
The Master Diviner really is old-school when it comes to repaying favors.
所以你真不考虑创个业吗？
So, aren't you really planning on starting your own business?
哈？你不要吓我，我哪儿有这个精力和胆子来着。
What? Don't be crazy! As if I have the energy or the guts for that!
但岁阳不会无端给人类灌入不存在的念头。青雀小姐你真的没有这样的想法吗？
But a heliobus cannot implant an idea in a human that does not already exist. Have you really never thought about this before, Miss Qingque?
呃，有时候…当然会有！但也只是一瞬间的事情。向全宇宙证明自己的野心，这样的念头，谁能没有嘛？
Ugh well... sometimes, of course! But it's only ever just a fleeting thought. Being able to prove your ambition to the entire universe, who wouldn't want that?
接下来，{NICKNAME}，咱们也该把岁阳收回法阵里去了。
Okay, {NICKNAME}, let's get this heliobus back to the matrix.
真是辛苦两位，改日请两位去金人巷里大吃一顿，要来喔！
Thank you both so much. Please allow me to treat you to a meal at Aurum Alley some day!
Why not seize the moment now!
今天怕是不成了。下次见，青雀小姐。
I'm afraid I can't do today. I'll see you another time, Miss Qingque.
I'll be off now, Miss Qingque.
没想到太卜司里还有岁阳…这一次似乎是只擅长鼓动人贪欲，诱人挖空心思发财的家伙。
I never thought that there would still be heliobi in the Divination Commission... It seems this one excelled in enhancing people's desires and seducing them to work hard for riches.
还不是沾染你们人类的欲望？这次多亏了{NICKNAME}和太卜，事情算是顺利解决了。
So, it would infect people with your human desires? Well, at least this has been dealt with smoothly by you two. Thanks a bunch {NICKNAME}, master diviner.
别忘了，我们还得将这件事影响减至最小，要在「罗浮杂俎」发布新的帖子。
