其实我也不确定消息是真是假，不好麻烦大家……
I'm not actually sure if these messages are reliable, so I don't want to trouble you all...
藿藿，有什么困难记得要跟我们讲哦。
Huohuo, make sure you tell us if you come across any trouble!
毕竟我们四个人才是捉鬼小队嘛。
After all, it's not the ghost-hunting squad without any of us, right?
我私信联系了一下发帖人，他给我发了个地址。那么捉鬼小队出动！
I've messaged the person who made the post, and he has sent me an address. Alright, ghost-hunting squad, let's move out!
到碰面的地方了，那个人应该就是发帖人吧？
This is the meeting place. That must be the person who made the post?
…你们可算来了，就是我，我就是凶宅的房东，叫我雷诺就好。
...You're finally here. It's me, and I am the landlord of the haunted house. Just call me Renault.
哦哦哦，走吧，现在就去你的凶宅里一探究竟！
Woo, let's go! It's time to investigate your haunted house!
等等，你们之中那个…十王司专家呢？
Wait a minute. Where is your Ten-Lords member?
我们虽然不是十王司，但都挺有本事的，有什么不能告诉我们的吗？
We may not be members of the Ten-Lords, but we're all pretty capable! Is there something that you cannot tell us?
我可不是嫌弃你们，「罗浮杂俎」上怪事甚多，但大多都是捕风捉影、无凭无据的假消息，根本经不起推敲…但这次不一样，我遇上了真家伙！

It's not that I am looking down on you. It's just that there are so many strange stories on the Ghostly Grove, and so many of them are just baseless made-up stories... But this time, I've met the real thing!
如果十王司不能出手，只凭你们几人恐怕是无济于事。
Without the assistance of the Ten-Lords Commission, I fear that you alone may not be of any use.
We've dealt with the real thing before, too!
要我说，十王司也不过如此。
If you ask me, the Ten-Lords Commission aren't all they're cracked up to be.
你这{F#小姑娘}{M#小子}也太狂了。
说不定你才是在弄虚作假。
For all we know, you're the one making up stories.
Hey! You still don't believe me?
这样吧，有些事情我没有在帖子里讲，讲完以后，你们肯定就明白了。
Fine. There are some things that I did not mention in my original post. You'll understand once I explain.
起初，我这是在这里低价购置了一处房产，以为自己占了便宜。卖房以后，前房主音讯全无，后来我才知道过去每一任房主都没有善终。

At first, this was just a property that I bought at a low price, thinking I'd gotten myself a steal. But, after they sold me the property, I never heard from the previous owner again. It was later that I learned that every prior landlord had met with an unfortunate end.
我本是不相信「凶宅」这些说法的…但自从我住下之后，开始出现咳嗽、胸闷等症状，这让我不得不开始紧张起来。

I never used to believe in "haunted houses" or things like that... But, ever since I moved in, I've developed a cough and it was difficult for me to even breathe sometimes. It's starting to make me nervous.
后来，我找到风水大师，他看着罗盘说「这房子虽有窗轩却不通阳气，虽有院墙却不能聚财；东面病役众多，西面人丁不齐。四方不顺，五行相克……」

After some time, I found a geomantic master. He checked his compass and said that: "Though there are windows and pavilions, there is no flow of yang energy. The courtyard walls do not foster a growth of wealth. There is sickness to the east and the population to the west lacks harmony in community. The four directions are not favorable and the five elements clash..."
「再加之，这房屋历史久远，居者皆破，冥差接引频频，冤魂不散；我劝你三日之内速速离开，否则便是重症难愈、大难临头。」

"What's more, this house has a long history and all residents have met with ruin. Spiritfarers are frequently called, yet the spirits of the aggrieved dead linger. My advice: Move out within three days, or you will fall gravely ill and tragedy will befall you."
这位风水大师不会是个骗子吧？
Are you sure this geomantic master isn't just a con man?
你只要去过，就知道大师所言不假。
Once you're inside, you will know that the master was telling the truth.
我命由我不由天，你应该住下去。
We decide our fates, not the heavens. You should continue living there.
住什么住？！得亏我搬出及时，不然我早就魔阴身了。
What do you mean? Continue living there!? If I hadn't moved out when I did, I'd have fallen into mara-struck long ago!
这破宅子我虽然不打算要了，但它好歹算是我私人财产，高低能卖点钱。你们既然想调查凶宅，我想拜托你们帮我个忙。

Even though I don't want this busted house anymore, it is still a personal asset. I'd like to sell it no matter the price. If you're going to investigate the haunted house, there's something I'd like to ask you.
我就知道，说吧，要干什么？
I knew it. Well, what is it?
你这破凶宅还想卖给谁呢？
Who could you even sell this rickety haunted house to?
卖不卖得出去，不就全看你们调查结果了嘛。
Well, whether I can sell it or not depends on the results of your investigation, does it not?
小桂子，我看还是回去吧。
Little Gui, I think we should just head back.
等等，这「探访凶宅」是绝佳的题材，不能错过啊。
Wait! "Haunted house investigation" is perfect material. We can't miss out on this!
你们在调查凶宅的时候，能不能帮我找到<color=#dbc291ff>「房产证」</color>。没有它，我可卖不了房……
While you are investigating the haunted house, could you help me find the <color=#dbc291ff>deed</color>? I won't be able to sell it without...
要是能做，我就同意你们探访凶宅如何？
If you do that, then I'll allow you to visit the haunted house. What do you think?
Easy enough! Leave it to us!
…真不知道你这迷之自信到底是从哪里而来。
...I really don't know where this baffling self-confidence of yours comes from.
Well? Shall we head on over?
稍等一下，我还没准备好
Hold on a sec. I'm not ready yet.
凶宅…希望藿藿留给我的纸符能有用……
A haunted house... I hope the paper talisman Huohuo gave us works...
这…是不是和我们之前遭遇「鬼打墙」的地方一模一样啊？好吓人……
This... Isn't this place exactly the same as the "heliobus labyrinth" that we encountered before? So creepy...
哎，这罗浮仙舟资源有限，只能用看着差不多的样板房拼拼凑凑吧。
Ah, there is limited resource on the Xianzhou Luofu, I just had to piece things together with a blueprint of a similar house.
...That must be the haunted house up ahead.
今晚就在这里住一晚吧？晚安。
So we're staying here tonight? Good night!
等等，我还没有蠢到在凶宅里过夜。
Wait. I'm not stupid enough to spend the night in a haunted house!
我还以为能到室内去看一看呢…
I thought we would be able to look around inside...
房东大叔说，他搬走的时候，屋内搬空、房门锁死，房产证应该在某个保险箱里。
The owner said that when he was moving out, the house was cleared out and locked shut. The deed should be in a safe somewhere.
